from googleapiclient.discovery import build
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns

In [ ]:
api_key = "AIzaSyDxr4gUPU3pXfOzqE_PtVK8E9hQDDbVQEM"  # Userkey for extracting data from YouTube API

channel_id = "UCeG0cjZClabYTnYZldpCNwQ"

channel_ids = ["UCdRnXk2yE-4olVkgz0tECvw", # HKUST Official YouTube
               "UCvZ4seZaqaO_A_WPfL-d9WQ", # HKU Official YouTube
               "UCeG0cjZClabYTnYZldpCNwQ", # CUHK Official YouTube
               "UCkio4asleKcQVRVEM8RnXlQ", # PolyTechnic University Official YouTube
               "UC1OVYBbIxEFAzm_Hc4nvG9w", # City University Official YouTube
               
              ]

youtube = build("youtube", "v3", developerKey=api_key)

Function to get channel statistics¶

In [ ]:
# Function was used to extract specific channel stats from YouTube

def get_channel_stats(youtube, channel_ids):
    all_data = []
    request = youtube.channels().list(
                part="snippet, contentDetails,statistics",
                id=",".join(channel_ids))
    response = request.execute()
    
    for i in range(len(response["items"])):
        data = dict(channel_name = response["items"][i]["snippet"]["title"],
                    subscribers = response["items"][i]["statistics"]["subscriberCount"],
                    views = response["items"][i]["statistics"]["viewCount"],
                    total_videos = response["items"][i]["statistics"]["videoCount"],
                    playlist_id = response["items"][i]["contentDetails"]["relatedPlaylists"]["uploads"]
                   )
        all_data.append(data)
    
    return all_data
In [ ]:
channel_statistics = get_channel_stats(youtube, channel_ids)
In [ ]:
channel_data = pd.DataFrame(channel_statistics)
channel_data

#Transforming data for processing

channel_data["subscribers"] = pd.to_numeric(channel_data["subscribers"])
channel_data["views"] = pd.to_numeric(channel_data["views"])
channel_data["total_videos"] = pd.to_numeric(channel_data["total_videos"])

In [ ]:
#Extract all the playlist id of the videos within the channels

playlist_id_HKUST = channel_data.loc[channel_data["channel_name"]=="HKUST", "playlist_id"].iloc[0]
playlist_id_CUHK = channel_data.loc[channel_data["channel_name"]=="CUHK Channel", "playlist_id"].iloc[0]
playlist_id_HKU = channel_data.loc[channel_data["channel_name"]=="The University of Hong Kong", "playlist_id"].iloc[0]
playlist_id_CityU = channel_data.loc[channel_data["channel_name"]=="CityUHongKong", "playlist_id"].iloc[0]
playlist_id_PU = channel_data.loc[channel_data["channel_name"]=="The Hong Kong Polytechnic University", "playlist_id"].iloc[0]
In [ ]:
#Function to extract number of videos within each channel

def get_video_ids(youtube,playlist_id):
    
    request = youtube.playlistItems().list(part="contentDetails", playlistId = playlist_id, maxResults = 50)
    
    response = request.execute()
    
    video_ids = []
    
    for i in range(len(response["items"])):
        video_ids.append(response["items"][i]["contentDetails"]["videoId"])
    
    next_page_token = response.get("nextPageToken")
    more_pages = True
    
    while more_pages:
        if next_page_token is None:
            more_pages = False
        else:
            request = youtube.playlistItems().list(part="contentDetails", playlistId = playlist_id, maxResults = 50, pageToken = next_page_token)
            response = request.execute()
            
            for i in range(len(response["items"])):
                video_ids.append(response["items"][i]["contentDetails"]["videoId"])
                
            next_page_token = response.get("nextPageToken")
                
    return video_ids
In [ ]:
HKUST_video_ids = get_video_ids(youtube,playlist_id_HKUST)
CUHK_video_ids = get_video_ids(youtube,playlist_id_CUHK)
HKU_video_ids = get_video_ids(youtube,playlist_id_HKU)
CityU_video_ids = get_video_ids(youtube,playlist_id_CityU)
PU_video_ids = get_video_ids(youtube,playlist_id_PU)

print("HKUST: ", len(HKUST_video_ids))
print("CUHK: ", len(CUHK_video_ids))
print("HKU: ", len(HKU_video_ids))
print("CityU: ", len(CityU_video_ids))
print("PU: ", len(PU_video_ids))

Function to extract video details¶

In [ ]:
#Function to find out what data are available

def get_video_details(youtube, video_ids):
        request = youtube.videos().list(part="snippet, contentDetails, topicDetails, statistics", 
                                        id=",".join(video_ids[:5]))
        response = request.execute()
        
        return response
In [ ]:
get_video_details(youtube, PU_video_ids)

{'kind': 'youtube#videoListResponse',

 'items': [{'kind': 'youtube#video',
   'etag': '258hzQTFJ7r58BpAVNU4Mu755zM',
   'id': 'S_yTf4GvHa8',
   'snippet': {'publishedAt': '2022-10-13T04:06:43Z',
    'channelId': 'UCkio4asleKcQVRVEM8RnXlQ',
    'title': 'PolyU Science “Our Alumni, Our Pride” – Dr Edmond Ho',
    'description': '理大理學院 “Our Alumni, Our Pride” – 何健民博士\n\n理大培育了逾40萬名校友，桃李滿門。他們投身各行各業，當中不乏各專業與工商界領袖及翹楚，是推動香港發展的强大力量。為慶祝理大85周年校慶，理學院特別推出“Our Alumni Our Pride” 影片系列，邀請了數名出色的校友分享他們如何尋索個人路向和為所屬行業及社會作出貢獻。\n\n於應用生物及化學科技學系取得博士學位的何健民博士將率先分享他研發出納米抗擦墨，以打擊不法商人竄改有效食用日期的經歷。 這種「抗擦墨」不單有效保障食品安全，更為企業帶來了可觀的經濟效益。\n\nPolyU has nurtured more than 400,000 alumni to help forge the development of Hong Kong. They have been distinguished leaders in all sectors of society, including in various professions, industries and businesses. In celebration of PolyU’s 85th Anniversary, the Faculty of Science proudly presents a new video series “Our Alumni, Our Pride”, featuring some of our outstanding alumni speaking about their experiences in finding their paths in life and creating positive impacts on their respective careers and on our society. \n\nIn this first video, Dr Edmond Ho, a PhD graduate of the Department of Applied Biology and Chemical Technology, shares his experiences in developing a nano-based anti-erasing Ink to combat counterfeit and food tampering. The indelible ink has resulted in large-scale economic, industrial and food safety benefits.\n\n#PolyUResearch #PolyUScience #PolyUScience_Research #PolyUABCT #Alumni #Anti-erasingInk #理學院 #應用生物及化學科技學系 #抗擦墨',

They have been distinguished leaders in all sectors of society, including in various professions, industries and businesses. In celebration of PolyU’s 85th Anniversary, the Faculty of Science proudly presents a new video series “Our Alumni, Our Pride”, featuring some of our outstanding alumni speaking about their experiences in finding their paths in life and creating positive impacts on their respective careers and on our society. \n\nIn this first video, Dr Edmond Ho, a PhD graduate of the Department of Applied Biology and Chemical Technology, shares his experiences in developing a nano-based anti-erasing Ink to combat counterfeit and food tampering. The indelible ink has resulted in large-scale economic, industrial and food safety benefits.\n\n#PolyUResearch #PolyUScience #PolyUScience_Research #PolyUABCT #Alumni #Anti-erasingInk #理學院 #應用生物及化學科技學系 #抗擦墨'}},

  {'kind': 'youtube#video',

   'id': '0I2DWqnSLFA',
   'snippet': {'publishedAt': '2022-10-12T12:08:28Z',
    'channelId': 'UCkio4asleKcQVRVEM8RnXlQ',
    'title': '文化傳承的新視野 A New Vision for Carrying the Traditional Culture Forward',
    'description': '故宮的文物收藏是國之重寶，不僅是藝術珍玩，還有以器明道的文化意義。故宮博物院自成立以來，一直以傳承中華文化為使命。新時代的故宮致力把文物活起來，從館舍天地走向大千世界。香港故宮繼往開來，定位於連繫古今，融通中外，以香港角度，結合環球視野，詮釋故宮文物和文化。香港故宮並致力走向世界，宣揚中國文化的普世價值，推動文化對話和文明互鑑。#理大 八十五周年校慶公開講座有幸邀請香港故宮文化博物館館長吳志華博士與大家分享「文化傳承的新視野」，一起展開文化傳承之旅。\n\nThe Palace Museum houses a collection of national treasures, which are not only rare and precious artworks, but also serve as vehicles for Chinese philosophy and culture. Since its establishment, the Palace Museum has taken preserving and carrying the Chinese cultural heritage forward as its core mission. In the past few decades, the Palace Museum has endeavoured to activate its collection and make the museum more connected and relevant to the world beyond the museum walls. As a bridge between the past and the present, China and the world, the Hong Kong Palace Museum is committed to the study and appreciation of Chinese art and culture. With a Hong Kong perspective and a global vision, the Museum interprets the Palace Museum’s collection and its culture and presents the essence of Chinese culture and values to a global audience, while advancing dialogue and mutual learning among world civilizations. In this #PolyU 85th Anniversary Public Lecture, we are honored to have Dr Louis Ng Chi-wa, the first Director of Hong Kong Palace Museum, presents a public lecture, A New Vision for Carrying the Traditional Culture Forward. We sincerely invite you to embark on a journey exploring cultural heritage through the lecture.\n\n#PolyU85 #publiclecture #art #culture #PalaceMuseum #lecture See less',

     'description': '故宮的文物收藏是國之重寶，不僅是藝術珍玩，還有以器明道的文化意義。故宮博物院自成立以來，一直以傳承中華文化為使命。新時代的故宮致力把文物活起來，從館舍天地走向大千世界。香港故宮繼往開來，定位於連繫古今，融通中外，以香港角度，結合環球視野，詮釋故宮文物和文化。香港故宮並致力走向世界，宣揚中國文化的普世價值，推動文化對話和文明互鑑。#理大 八十五周年校慶公開講座有幸邀請香港故宮文化博物館館長吳志華博士與大家分享「文化傳承的新視野」，一起展開文化傳承之旅。\n\nThe Palace Museum houses a collection of national treasures, which are not only rare and precious artworks, but also serve as vehicles for Chinese philosophy and culture. Since its establishment, the Palace Museum has taken preserving and carrying the Chinese cultural heritage forward as its core mission. In the past few decades, the Palace Museum has endeavoured to activate its collection and make the museum more connected and relevant to the world beyond the museum walls. As a bridge between the past and the present, China and the world, the Hong Kong Palace Museum is committed to the study and appreciation of Chinese art and culture. With a Hong Kong perspective and a global vision, the Museum interprets the Palace Museum’s collection and its culture and presents the essence of Chinese culture and values to a global audience, while advancing dialogue and mutual learning among world civilizations. In this #PolyU 85th Anniversary Public Lecture, we are honored to have Dr Louis Ng Chi-wa, the first Director of Hong Kong Palace Museum, presents a public lecture, A New Vision for Carrying the Traditional Culture Forward. We sincerely invite you to embark on a journey exploring cultural heritage through the lecture.\n\n#PolyU85 #publiclecture #art #culture #PalaceMuseum #lecture See less'}},

  {'kind': 'youtube#video',
   'etag': 'C0TiHDceDVCZU6k7BgsHs6_O2WQ',
   'id': '4iu1gIyC5I8',
   'snippet': {'publishedAt': '2022-10-07T11:13:30Z',
    'channelId': 'UCkio4asleKcQVRVEM8RnXlQ',
    'title': 'PolyUSTARS - Chui Cho Kwan',
    'description': '【#理大 德藝展才能】理大新生徐楚君小時曾受過社工的幫助，所以多年來積極參與社會服務和活動，幫助不同有需要的人。現正修讀社會政策及社會創業課程的她，希能成立自己的社企，運用創新的思維幫助弱勢社群。\n\n楚君憑藉於社會服務和領導力的出色表現，獲得了今年理大 #德藝獎學金 。該獎學金旨在嘉許一些在體育、藝術、社會服務和領導才能，以及 STEM 學科表現卓越的理大生。\n\n【#PolyU STARS unleashes students’ potential】 Having been helped by social workers when she was a child, new PolyU student Chui Cho Kwan has been actively participating in social services and activities to help people in need for a number of years. Cho Kwan is studying social policy and social entrepreneurship at PolyU, and has set herself the goal of establishing a social enterprise to help the less privileged with her innovative solutions.\n\nCho Kwan was awarded this year’s PolyU #STARSscholarship for her outstanding achievements in leadership and community service. The Scholarship aims to recognise PolyU students who have demonstrated remarkable talents in sports, arts and culture, community service and leadership, as well as Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics (STEM).\n#PolyUStudent #PolyUSTARS #STARS #scholarship #special #talents #admission #scheme #community #serivces #leadership #university #理大德藝計劃',
    'thumbnails': {'default': {'url': 'https://i.ytimg.com/vi/4iu1gIyC5I8/default.jpg',

      'height': 90},

In [ ]:
#Function for converting YouTube's standard time format into numerical time format for processing

import re

def yt_time(duration):

    ISO_8601 = re.compile(
        'P'   # designates a period
        '(?:(?P<years>\d+)Y)?'   # years
        '(?:(?P<months>\d+)M)?'  # months
        '(?:(?P<weeks>\d+)W)?'   # weeks
        '(?:(?P<days>\d+)D)?'    # days
        '(?:T' # time part must begin with a T
        '(?:(?P<hours>\d+)H)?'   # hours
        '(?:(?P<minutes>\d+)M)?' # minutes
        '(?:(?P<seconds>\d+)S)?' # seconds
        ')?')   # end of time part
    # Convert regex matches into a short list of time units
    units = list(ISO_8601.match(duration).groups()[-3:])
    # Put list in ascending order & remove 'None' types
    units = list(reversed([int(x) if x != None else 0 for x in units]))
    # Do the maths
    return sum([x*60**units.index(x) for x in units])
In [ ]:
#Function for extracting video specific data 

def get_video_details(youtube, video_ids):

    all_video_stats = []
    
    for i in range(0, len(video_ids), 50):
                   
        request = youtube.videos().list(part="snippet, contentDetails, statistics", 
                                        id=",".join(video_ids[i:i+50]))
        response = request.execute()
                   
        for video in response["items"]:         
                video_stats = dict(
                    Channel_name = video["snippet"]["channelTitle"],
                    Title = video["snippet"]["title"],
                    Description = video["snippet"]["description"],
                    Category = video["snippet"]["categoryId"],
                    Published_date = video["snippet"]["publishedAt"],
                    Duration = yt_time(video["contentDetails"]["duration"]),
                    Tags = video["snippet"].get("tags",None),
                    Views = video["statistics"]["viewCount"],
                    Likes = video["statistics"].get("likeCount",0),
                    Favourites = video["statistics"]["favoriteCount"],
                    Comments = video["statistics"].get("commentCount",0))
                all_video_stats.append(video_stats)
                   
    
    return all_video_stats
In [ ]:
#Extracting latest categorisation of videos available in YouTube

    # calling the videoCategory.list method
    # to retrieve youtube video categories result
    video_category = youtube.videoCategories(
       ).list(part ='snippet', regionCode ='IN').execute()
      
    # extracting the results
    # from video_category response
    results = video_category.get("items", [])
  
    # empty list to store video category metadata
    videos_categories = []
      
    # extracting required info
    # from each result object
    for result in results:
          
        # video_categories result object
        videos_categories.append((result["id"],
                   result["snippet"]["title"]))

videos_categories

  'Title': '點解你鍾意中大？Why do you like CUHK? Alumni Simon x Rainbow',
  'Description': '崇基學院校友Simon同Rainbow在中大校園相遇、相知、相愛，二人帶住愛情結晶品重回母校，佢地最鍾意中大嘅乜咩？立即睇片啦！\n\n#香港中文大學 #中大 #中大本科入學資訊日2022 #thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk #cuhkinfoday2022\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '點解你鍾意中大？晨興書院同學仔 Why do you like CUHK? Morningside College students',
  'Description': '一班來自五湖四海嘅晨興書院同學仔，離鄉別井來到中大讀書，個個都好享受校園生活，而每個人最鍾意中大嘅…？睇片聽佢地講！\n\n#香港中文大學 #中大 #中大本科入學資訊日2022 #thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk #cuhkinfoday2022\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '點解你鍾意中大？Yola x 中大女子欖球隊 Why do you like CUHK? Yola x CUHK Rugby (Women) team',
  'Description': 'Year 2學生Yola本來參與田徑項目，在機緣巧合之下，加入咗中大女子欖球隊，她堅持嘅原因係咩？點解鍾意咁中大？睇片就明晒！\n\n#香港中文大學 #中大 #中大本科入學資訊日2022 #thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk #cuhkinfoday2022\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '點解你鍾意中大？Why do you like CUHK?',
  'Description': "點解中大咁多人鍾意，最好嘅方法就係由中大人親自講解。\n\n我地鍾意中大，你呢？不如親身入黎發掘你鍾意中大嘅原因？約定你，10月15日，中大本科入學資訊日見！\n\n了解更多：https://infoday.cuhk.edu.hk/tc\n \nWhy do so many people have a deep affection for CUHK? The best way to find out is to talk to CUHKers!\n\nWe love CUHK. How about you? Why don't you come over and discover our reasons? See you on campus on 15 October at CUHK Information Day.\n\nMore: https://infoday.cuhk.edu.hk/en.",

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '點解你鍾意中大？Why do you like CUHK? Ann x Captain',
  'Description': '在山城行走，有時會看到一頭毛茸茸的狗狗走過，原來那是晨興書院協理院長兼社監何素楠教授 （Professor Ann Huss）的愛犬Captain，他們一齊在中大生活，最鍾意中大嘅…？睇片就知啦！\n\n\n#香港中文大學 #中大 #中大本科入學資訊日2022 #thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk #cuhkinfoday2022\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-10-12T09:49:59Z',
  'Duration': 81,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '432',
  'Likes': '11',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '點解你鍾意中大？Why do you like CUHK? Amy x Ryan x Victoria',
  'Description': '「Amy姐」在山城無人不識，她在中大服務廿幾年，視呢度為第二個家；Ryan是NA Can （新亞書院學生餐廳）的負責人，照顧學生的一日三餐，希望大家「有啖好食」；Year 3學生Victoria 在中大遇到不少人樂意跟她打招呼，甚至提供意見。\n\n他們三人最鍾意中大嘅…？立即睇片啦！\n\n#香港中文大學 #中大 #中大本科入學資訊日2022 #thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk #cuhkinfoday2022\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-10-12T09:42:23Z',
  'Duration': 4,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1382',
  'Likes': '10',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《疫久嘗新》 第二輯預告 ”Alumni@Workplace” Season II Teaser',
  'Description': '《疫久嘗新》 第二輯加推四集\u3000即將首播！\n\n四個不同行業，四種疫境自強的態度。 疫情限制下電子商務、酒店業行情瞬息萬變，把握機遇，是否就能轉危為機？疫境求生，環境社會及治理和文化藝術產業怎樣才能開創先河，化腐朽為神奇？\n\n一個讓中大校友交流的特輯，一個由中大人一手一腳包辦的企劃，10月18日起全新四集，即將首播！ \n======================================== \n節目預告： \n第一集︰電商網購 — 周慧晶（社會科學院） \n第二集：環境社會及治理 — 李雅詩（理學院） \n第三集：酒店 — 關寶智（商學院）\n第四集：文化藝術 — 陳焯威（理學院）\n\n”Alumni@Workplace” 4 Episodes Coming Soon!\n\nFour different industries, four kinds of attitude towards the pandemic. Under the restrictions of COVID-19, the businesses of #E-Commerce and #Hotel have changed from time to time. Is it possible to turn the crisis into opportunities? How could #ESG as well as the #ArtandCulture industries come up with brand-new solutions to overcome the unprecedented challenges? \n\nThis is a programme which allows CUHK alumni to exchange their ideas, all arranged and produced by CUHKers. 4 new episodes will premiere from 18 October! ======================================== \nComing up next: \nEpisode 1: E-Commerce – Jelly Zhou (Faculty of Social Science) \nEpisode 2: ESG – Peggy Lee (Faculty of Science) \nEpisode 3: Hotel – Mona Kwan (Faculty of Business Administration) \nEpisode 4: Art and Culture – Octavian Chan (Faculty of Science) \n#香港中文大學 #疫久嘗新 #中大人 \n#CUHK #CUHKCPDC #OSA #AlumniAtWorkplace #CUHKers\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-10-11T09:16:30Z',
  'Duration': 25,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '114',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '不“疫”“樂”乎 -文藝雲匯演 - 京港大學聯盟專場',
  'Description': '香港中文大學內地及大中華發展處（本處）與內地伙伴院校聯手舉辦「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」活動，是次為京港大學聯盟專場。雲滙演將於9月30日星期五晚上8時於線上舉行，誠意邀請您的參與。\n\n支持單位\n京港大學聯盟 \n\n表演團體（按筆劃序）\n中國人民大學藝術學院\n中國科學院大學鴻雁舞蹈團\n北京大學 \n北京工業大學北京PMC音樂愛好者協會\n香港中文大學崇基合唱團及管弦樂團\n香港科技大學 二人合唱及Tunatics清唱團\n \n簡介\n「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」由香港中文大學與內地夥伴院校聯手舉辦，期望在疫情中搭建線上交流平台，讓兩地同學在逆境時刻互相砥礪，透過欣賞及參與樂團、歌唱、歌劇、戲曲等多元化表演，保持身心健康，發放正能量，樂觀應對疫情帶來的挑戰。雲匯演計劃於每個月最後一個周五舉行，每次匯演時間約一小時。\n \n榮譽顧問\n香港中文大學音樂系系主任劉長江教授\n香港中文大學新聞與傳播學院馮應謙教授\n香港中文大學音樂系官美如教授\n\nChina Engagement Office (CEO) of The Chinese University of Hong Kong and partner universities jointly organized Pleasure in the Pandemic Joint Performance. This performance is a Beijing-Hong Kong University Alliance special concert. The performance will be held on 30 September (Friday) at 8pm online. We cordially invite you to join us.\n\nSupported by \nBeijing-Hong Kong University Alliance\n\nPerforming Ensembles\nSchool of Arts, Renmin University of China\nHongyan Dance Company, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences\nPeking University \nPublic Music Club, Beijing University of Technology\nChung Chi Choir & Chung Chi Orchestra, The Chinese University of Hong Kong\nVocal Duet and Tunatics, The Hong Kong University of Science & Technology\n \nThe Performance\nPleasure in the Pandemic Joint Performance is organized by The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) in collaboration with mainland partners. The event aims to establish a virtual platform during the pandemic committed to enriching the cultural life of the students by presenting a diverse range of student performances. Students from the Mainland and Hong Kong  can support each other in adversity, maintaining physical and mental health, and to stay positive to respond to the challenges. It will take place on the last Friday of every month via online platform(s). Each show lasts about an hour.\n \nHonorary Advisors\nProfessor LAU Cheung Kong Frederick, Chairman of Department of Music, CUHK\nProfessor FUNG Ying Him Anthony, Professor of School of Journalism and Communication, CUHK\nProfessor KOON Carmen, Department of Music, CUHK',
  'Category': '10',
  'Published_date': '2022-10-01T01:04:52Z',
  'Duration': 2906,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '167',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '飛躍中大(簡體版) Soar with CUHK (Simplified Chinese version)',
  'Description': '香港中文大學是一所研究型綜合大學，提供優質的本科和研究生課程，並以其尖端研究成果，服務社會。\n英文版: https://youtu.be/aNtj8D06ccQ\n繁體版: https://youtu.be/Ep-N-QNflBY\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong is a comprehensive research-led university in Hong Kong delivering high-quality education on both undergraduate and postgraduate levels and serving the community with its cutting-edge research capability.\nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/aNtj8D06ccQ\nTraditional Chinese version: https://youtu.be/Ep-N-QNflBY\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-09-09T09:50:37Z',
  'Duration': 170,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '213',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大創業大賽2022 終極8強',
  'Description': "#中大創業大賽2022 #中大創業日2022 #創伴同行躍動未來\n\n第六屆中大創業大賽即將於9月24日在康本國際學術園舉行，經過初賽的一番激鬥，共有8隊初創企業晉身決賽，爭奪冠軍殊榮。冠亞季軍的隊伍可分別獲得港幣5萬元、3萬元及2萬元獎金，以作鼓勵，賽事同時設有最受歡迎大獎，由網上參加者及決賽現場觀眾投選，敬請密切留意 #香港中文大學校友事務處  @CUHKAAO 社交平台最新消息！\n\n中大創業大賽2022：\n日期及時間：2022年9月24日2:00pm-3:30pm\n地點：中大康本國際學術園LT3\n詳情：https://bit.ly/3dRzit7 \n\n成功入圍的最後8強如下（按初創英文名稱排序）：\n🟣 Alpha AI\n🟣 Cytomics Limited（細胞圖譜有限公司）\n🟣 H&S Analytics\n🟣 King's Phase Technologies Limited（王態科技有限公司）\n🟣 Liquid Corporate Digital Self-Sovereign ID（匯流企業數碼自主身份證）\n🟣 NFT Investment and Venture Limited\n🟣 ÖKOSIX Limited（綠適有限公司）\n🟣 Precision Cut Limited（精准醫療有限公司）\n\n決賽星級評審團包括（按英文姓氏字母排序）：\n🌟#勞維信 校友｜#點亮資本 合夥人\n🌟#駱美琪 校友｜#阿裡巴巴 香港創業者基金執行董事\n🌟#譚偉豪 校友｜#香港英諾天使基金 始創合夥人；權智有限公司主席\n🌟#王瑩 女士｜#香港科技園公司 創科培育計畫及企業加速計畫總監\n🌟#任景信 校友｜#香港數碼港管理有限公司 行政總裁\n\n想知終極8強各有甚麼本事？立即去片！\n----------------------------------\n立即報名參加中大創業日2022➡️ https://bit.ly/3pAIrJd \n\n更多精彩活動資訊，請密切留意「中大創業日」網站：https://www.cuhkeday2022.com/\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-08-25T04:28:11Z',
  'Duration': 179,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '392',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '飛躍中大(繁體版) Soar with CUHK (Traditional Chinese version)',
  'Description': '香港中文大學是一所研究型綜合大學，提供優質的本科和研究生課程，並以其尖端研究成果，服務社會。\n英文版: https://youtu.be/aNtj8D06ccQ\n簡體版: https://youtu.be/saMwkiiZFHI\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong is a comprehensive research-led university in Hong Kong delivering high-quality education on both undergraduate and postgraduate levels and serving the community with its cutting-edge research capability.\nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/aNtj8D06ccQ\nSimplified Chinese version: https://youtu.be/saMwkiiZFHI\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Soar with CUHK(English version) 飛躍中大(英文版)',
  'Description': 'The Chinese University of Hong Kong is a comprehensive research-led university in Hong Kong delivering high-quality education on both undergraduate and postgraduate levels and serving the community with its cutting-edge research capability.\nTraditional Chinese version: https://youtu.be/Ep-N-QNflBY\nSimplified Chinese version: https://youtu.be/saMwkiiZFHI\n\n香港中文大學是一所研究型綜合大學，提供優質的本科和研究生課程，並以其尖端研究成果，服務社會。\n繁體版: https://youtu.be/Ep-N-QNflBY\n簡體版: https://youtu.be/saMwkiiZFHI\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-08-01T10:21:35Z',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '不“疫”“樂”乎 -文藝雲匯演',
  'Description': '香港中文大學內地及大中華發展處（本處）與內地伙伴院校聯手舉辦「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」活動，雲滙演將於7月29日星期五晚上8時於線上舉行，誠意邀請您的參與。\n\n主辦單位:\n香港中文大學\xa0\n\n表演團體（按筆劃序）:\n佛山科學技術學院飛虹合唱團\n哈爾濱工業大學（深圳）學生藝術團\n香港中文大學崇基合唱團及和聲書院\n香港中文大學（深圳）學勤書院\n廣東外語外貿大學藝術學院\n澳門大學舞蹈隊\n澳門科技大學藝術團\n\n特邀參演團體\n廣東實驗中學交響樂團\n\n簡介:\n「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」由香港中文大學與內地夥伴院校聯手舉辦，期望在疫情中搭建線上交流平台，讓兩地同學在逆境時刻互相砥礪，透過欣賞及參與樂團、歌唱、歌劇、戲曲等多元化表演，保持身心健康，發放正能量，樂觀應對疫情帶來的挑戰。雲匯演計劃於每個月最後一個周五舉行，每次匯演時間約一小時。\n\n榮譽顧問:\n香港中文大學音樂系系主任劉長江教授\n香港中文大學新聞與傳播學院馮應謙教授\n香港中文大學音樂系官美如教授\n\nChina Engagement Office (CEO) of The Chinese University of Hong Kong and partner universities jointly organized Pleasure in the Pandemic Joint Performance. The performance would be held on 29 July (Friday) at 8pm online. We cordially invite you to join us.\n\nOrganizer:\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong\n\nPerforming Ensembles:\nFeihong Chorus, Foshan University\nHITSZ Students Art Society\nChung Chi Choir and Lee Woo Sing College, The Chinese University of Hong Kong\nDiligentia College of The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen\nThe art school of Guangdong University of foreign studies\nUniversity of Macau Dance Troupe\nArt Troupe of Macau University of Science and Technology\n\nSpecial Guest\nSymphony Orchestra of Guangdong Experimental High School\n\nThe Performance:\nPleasure in the Pandemic Joint Performance is organized by The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) in collaboration with mainland partners. The event aims to establish a virtual platform during the pandemic committed to enriching the cultural life of the students by presenting a diverse range of student performances. Students from the Mainland and Hong Kong can support each other in adversity, maintaining physical and mental health, and to stay positive to respond to the challenges. It will take place on the last Friday of every month via online platform(s). Each show lasts about an hour.\n\nHonorary Advisors:\nProfessor LAU Cheung Kong Frederick, Chairman of Department of Music, CUHK\nProfessor FUNG Ying Him Anthony, Professor of School of Journalism and Communication, CUHK\nProfessor KOON Carmen, Department of Music, CUHK',
  'Category': '10',
  'Published_date': '2022-07-30T01:03:15Z',
  'Duration': 4439,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '348',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大月餅．愛心傳承 Send Happiness And Reach Everyone',
  'Description': '一年一度的中秋佳節，除了與親友一同慶祝外，我們亦為獨居長者送上關懷 ，讓愛傳承。\n\n「中大愛心月餅」每盒有四個低糖雙黃白蓮蓉月餅，特別委託社會企業明愛天糧製作。明愛天糧透過經營飽點烘培業務，為精神病康復者及殘疾人士創造就業機會，協助他們融入社區生活。每售出一盒，中大就會送上一個「中大愛心月餅」給沙田、大埔區的獨居長者，由NGO合作夥伴送至長者家門，長者安坐家中，就可收到月餅。出售月餅的收益將撥捐中大博群計劃。\n\n大學今年邀請了英文系學生李佩兒同學，設計「中大愛心月餅」禮盒。靈感來自她一次中秋觀月活動 ，同學們正在觀察月球之時，可愛的「貓星人」出來搶風頭，令中秋節更添歡樂。她希望透過作品，傳遞互相關懷的訊息。\n購買月餅兼可傳播愛心，一舉兩得！「中大愛心月餅」以低糖白蓮蓉製作，每盒糖份只有10.8克，售價HK$300 。\n購買時亦可選擇速遞送貨服務 ，數量有限，請即訂購！\n\n查詢 : 3943-3945 / souvenirs@cuhk.edu.hk\n訂購詳情 : https://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake/ordering\n\nAs well as spending the festive season with the family in the Moon Festival, let’s extend our love to those elderly people living alone. When you buy a box of “CUHK Mooncake”, a mooncake will be delivered to the solitary elderly, sending love to everyone.\nEach box of CUHK Mooncake includes four low sugar white lotus seed paste mooncakes with double egg yolks. The University has joined hands with Caritas La Vie, a local social enterprise which provides job opportunities for the mentally disabled through its baking workshop, to produce “CUHK Mooncake. For each box sold, CUHK together with our NGO partners will deliver a free mooncake to the elderly living alone in Shatin and Tai Po. Proceeds from the mooncake sales will be donated to support CUHK I·CARE. This year, the university has invited CUHK English student Ruby Lee to design the packaging box. The idea came from an activity she joined in the Mid-Autumn Festival. When students are observing the moon, a cat suddenly comes out to grab the limelight and add delight to the festival. She also hopes to convey through her art piece the message to care for each other.\nEach box is sold at HK$300 and includes four low sugar white lotus seed paste mooncakes with double egg yolks. Each contains 10.8 grams of sugar only.\n\nDelivery service is available. Stocks are limited, place your order now!\n\nEnquiry : 3943-3945 / souvenirs@cuhk.edu.hk\nOrdering Details : https://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake/ordering\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-07-22T09:30:17Z',
  'Duration': 42,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '724',
  'Likes': '7',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大研發小型「摺紙」軟體機械人 CUHK devises small-scale “origami” soft robots',
  'Description': '#中大工程學院機械與自動化工程學系 張立教授領導的研究團隊，最近成功研發嶄新的 #軟體機械人 組裝技術。團隊參考了「#紋身貼紙」將膠片上的圖案轉印到皮膚表面的概念，利用數片膠紙和磁性顆粒，通過簡單的黏貼及裁剪，就可以製作出靈活變形、擁有不同功能的小型摺紙式軟體機械人結構。配合不同感測元件模組，這些小型軟體機械人日後將可執行環境感測和醫療等任務，技術亦進一步為發展智能軟體機械人提供組裝基礎。\n\n此研究獲香港研究資助局（RGC）、香港創新科技署（ITC）、裘槎基金會、中大周毓浩創新醫學技術中心、中大天石機器人研究所、中大—中國科學院深圳先進技術研究院機器人與智慧系統聯合實驗室及創新香港研發平台（InnoHK）的醫療機器人創新技術中心（MRC）大力支持。結果已刊登於國際學術期刊《Science Advances》。詳情：https://bit.ly/3uIXgwk \n\nA research team lead by Professor Li ZHANG from the Department of Mechanical and Automation Engineering, Faculty of Engineering of CUHK has recently devised a novel fabrication method for #softrobots. They were inspired by #temporarytattoos , decals printed on transfer film and transferred onto the skin by applying pressure and moisture. The soft robot is made by adhesive tape and magnetic microparticles with simple cutting and embedding. This structural fabrication, like 3D origami, provides a foundation for developing modular soft robots that potentially enable flexible shape deformation and multifunctionality in environmental sensing and medical tasks, after assembling different functional modules.\n\nThe project has been supported by the Research Grants Council (RGC), the HKSAR Innovation and Technology Commission (ITC), the Croucher Foundation, the Chow Yuk Ho Technology Centre for Innovative Medicine, the CUHK T Stone Robotics Institute, the SIAT-CUHK Joint Laboratory of Robotics and Intelligent Systems, and the Multi-Scale Medical Robotics Center (MRC), InnoHK, at the Hong Kong Science Park. The findings have been reported in Science Advances. Details: https://bit.ly/3PlAOB4  \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-07-15T09:22:18Z',
  'Duration': 93,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '453',
  'Likes': '15',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},

  'Title': '同根同源·共創未來  香港中文大學-香港中文大學（深圳）慶祝香港特別行政區成立25周年文藝雲匯演」',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大慶祝香港特別行政區成立25周年升旗禮',
  'Description': '香港中文大學（中大）舉行升旗儀式，慶祝香港特別行政區（特區）成立25周年，標誌著香港回歸祖國至今四分一世紀。\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-07-01T06:28:50Z',
  'Duration': 398,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '7400',
  'Likes': '120',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大慶祝香港特別行政區成立25周年(繁體中文版)',
  'Description': '中大全體仝人熱烈祝賀香港特別行政區成立25周年！今後，中大會繼續與香港並肩前進，貢獻國家，共同開創新一頁，「砥礪奮進、再上征程」，邁向更美好的未來！\n簡體中文版: https://youtu.be/iRco5lqB7sw\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-07-01T06:28:47Z',
  'Duration': 137,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '532',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大慶祝香港特別行政區成立25周年 (簡體中文版)',
  'Description': '中大全體仝人熱烈祝賀香港特別行政區成立25周年！今後，中大會繼續與香港並肩前進，貢獻國家，共同開創新一頁，「砥礪奮進、再上征程」，邁向更美好的未來！\n繁體中文版: https://youtu.be/3weNhsUM6ms\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-07-01T06:28:17Z',
  'Duration': 137,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '178',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Summer Institute 2022',
  'Description': 'The CUHK Summer Institute (SI) is a credit-bearing summer programme designed for local and international secondary 5 students (or equivalent) to explore their study interest and to prepare for their future studies at CUHK. In this programme, students will be able to take one or two credit-bearing courses taught by outstanding CUHK faculty members, and enjoy a series of enriching and enlightening activities including an undergraduate admission skills workshop, as well as various sessions and activities showcasing CUHK’s teaching and research strengths.   \n\n「高中生暑期課程」將於8月13日至20日期間舉行。課程旨在讓將於2023年升讀大學的本地及海外高中生於暑假期間修讀兩門由中大教員主講的短期網上課程，探索不同學科領域。課程範圍包括文學、工商管理學、教育學、工程學、法律學、醫學、科學及社會科學。成功完成課程並達到課程規定的要求後，學生可獲得能納入將來入讀中大本科課程之學分（最多2學分，部分課程除外）。同學更可參與多項網上團體活動，獲得適應大學學習環境的秘訣。\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-06-07T08:42:07Z',
  'Duration': 120,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '257',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '不“疫”“樂”乎 -文藝雲匯演',
  'Description': '香港中文大學內地及大中華發展處（本處）與內地伙伴院校聯手舉辦「不“疫”“樂”乎 – 文藝雲匯演」活動，雲滙演將於5月27日星期五晚上8時於線上舉行，誠意邀請您的參與。\nChina Engagement Office (CEO) of The Chinese University of Hong Kong and partner universities jointly organized Pleasure in the Pandemic Joint Performance. The performance would be held on 27 May (Friday) at 8 pm online. We cordially invite you to join us.\n\n表演團體（按筆劃序）Performing Ensembles::\n上海交通大學學生民樂團\n中央民族大學音樂學院及舞蹈學院\n北航校友人聲樂團\n香港中文大學崇基合唱團\n香港中文大學（深圳）合唱團及管弦樂團\n澳門大學管樂團\nChinese Orchestra of Shanghai Jiao Tong University\nThe MUC School of Music and School of Dance\nBeihang Alumni Vocal Group\nChung Chi Choir, The Chinese University of Hong Kong\nThe Chorus and The Orchestra of The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen\nUniversity of Macau Symphonic Band\n \n簡介The Performance\n「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」由香港中文大學與內地夥伴院校聯手舉辦，期望在疫情中搭建線上交流平台，讓兩地同學在逆境時刻互相砥礪，透過欣賞及參與樂團、歌唱、歌劇、戲曲等多元化表演，保持身心健康，發放正能量，樂觀應對疫情帶來的挑戰。雲匯演計劃於每個月最後一個周五舉行，每次匯演時間約一小時。\nPleasure in the Pandemic Joint Performance is organized by The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) in collaboration with mainland partners. The event aims to establish a virtual platform during the pandemic committed to enriching the cultural life of the students by presenting a diverse range of student performances. Students from the Mainland and Hong Kong   can support each other in adversity, maintaining physical and mental health, and to stay positive to respond to the challenges. It will take place on the last Friday of every month via online platform(s). Each show lasts about an hour.\n \n榮譽顧問Honorary Advisors\n香港中文大學音樂系系主任劉長江教授Professor LAU Cheung Kong Frederick, Chairman of Department of Music, CUHK\n香港中文大學新聞與傳播學院馮應謙教授Professor FUNG Ying Him Anthony, Professor of School of Journalism and Communication, CUHK\n香港中文大學音樂系官美如教授Professor KOON Carmen, Department of Music, CUHK\n \n查詢Enquiries\n香港中文大學內地及大中華發展處China Engagement Office, The Chinese University of Hong Kong  (cneo@cuhk.edu.hk)',
  'Category': '10',
  'Published_date': '2022-05-28T01:06:19Z',
  'Duration': 3993,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '913',
  'Likes': '21',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '貓虎宗親 Big Cat Small Cat',
  'Description': '中大校友李揚立之醫生是一位骨科醫生，也照顧過不少大型貓科動物。平日會細心研究貓科動物和喜歡畫畫的李揚醫生在新冠肺炎疫情出現初期繪製了以動物造型為主的抗疫小冊子，於全球熱傳。李揚立之醫生對文物館 #壬寅說虎 展覽中的「大貓小貓」又有甚麼想法呢？去片聽聽她的分享吧！\nCUHK alumna and orthopedic surgeon Dr. Liyeung Lucci Lugee once took care of many big felines. As a cartoonist, she created a story book with various animal characters, in hope of educating children to fight against Covid-19. It has been widely distributed and translated into different languages. How does she feel about the “big cats and small cats” in the Art Museum’s exhibition 𝘊𝘦𝘭𝘦𝘣𝘳𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘠𝘦𝘢𝘳 𝘰𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘛𝘪𝘨𝘦𝘳? Watch her sharing here!\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-05-27T07:31:19Z',
  'Duration': 332,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1413',
  'Likes': '15',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK’s Co-operative Education Programme (Co-op@CUHK)',
  'Description': 'Co-op@CUHK prides itself in being the first of its kind in Hong Kong, open to CUHK’s penultimate and final-year students of all disciplines who exhibit good academic standing, a breadth of extra-curricular activities and a positive, can-do attitudes. It is an academically accredited programme that combines classroom learning with productive and paid work experience in a field related to students’ academic or career goals. \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-05-19T11:16:58Z',
  'Duration': 320,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3207',
  'Likes': '45',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大團隊研發「史萊姆機械人」  Slime Robot developed by CUHK team',
  'Description': '這部連日來獲國際媒體廣泛報道、引起全球關注的「史萊姆機械人」，能伸縮變形、抓物移動，具科幻電影感，其實是中大機械與自動化工程學系團隊發明的微型機械人。機械人的設計靈感亦真的源自電影《毒魔》，而與電影不同的是，這部機械人毒性很微，未來可望於人體內執行任務。\n\n「史萊姆機械人」成分包括磁性顆粒，所以透過操控外在磁場，便能屈能伸，穿過超窄管道，遊走複雜迷宮，更能自我修復、抓住物件，而且可以傳電。中大機械與自動化工程學系張立教授及孫猛猛博士（論文第一作者）表示，「史萊姆機械人」有望作醫療用途，包括取出誤吞進消化管道的有害物，如電池或尖銳骨頭等。\n\n今次研究獲BBC、Guardian、New Scientist等國際媒體報道，片段觀看次數過千萬。對於引起廣泛迴響，團隊表示興奮：「研究能引起大家對機械人的興趣及關注，我們感到十分鼓舞。團隊將繼續努力，探討如何好好利用『史萊姆機械人』帶來實際效用。」\n\n研究論文已刊登於《先進功能材料》：\nhttps://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/adfm.202112508\n\nThis slime robot has gone viral globally after its international media exposure lately. The slime robot, which was developed by a research team of CUHK Mechanical and Automation Engineering Department, can deform, grab objects and move, just like the sci-fi movie creatures. Indeed, the robot design was inspired by the movie Venom, but it is different from Venom in a way that it is expected to bring benefit to human beings in the future.\n\nThe magnet particles in the slime give it conductivity and the capability to change its shape to navigate through narrow tubes and complex mazes, self-heal and grab objects driven by an external magnetic field. According to Prof. Li Zhang and Dr. Mengmeng Sun, the lead author of the publishing, of CUHK Mechanical and Automation Engineering Department, the slime robot is expected to be of great value in medical applications, such as removing accidentally swallowed objects like button batteries and sharp bones.\n\nThe study was widely covered by international media outlets like BBC, Guardian and New Scientist. The news videos have gained over 10 million views online. The research team was thrilled about the overwhelming response, ‘It is encouraging to know that our study has aroused people’s interest and attention. We will keep it up and explore how the slime robot can be put into practical use in the future.’\n\nThe findings have been published in Advanced Functional Materials:\nhttps://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/adfm.202112508\n\n\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-05-03T08:32:17Z',
  'Duration': 67,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '922',
  'Likes': '19',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '不“疫”“樂”乎 -文藝雲匯演',
  'Description': "第二場「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」將會於 2022年5月27日（星期五）晚上8時舉行。\n\n時間 2022年4月29日（星期五）時間 晚上8時 \n\n主辦單位Organizer      \n香港中文大學  The Chinese University of Hong Kong\n \n表演團體（按筆劃序）Performing Ensembles\n中國科學技術協會科學之聲合唱團 Voice of Science Chorus, China Association for Science and Technology (CAST)\n西安交通大學學生舞蹈團及民樂團 Students' Dance Group and Students' Chinese Orchestra of Xi'an Jiaotong University\n香港中文大學崇基合唱團及管弦樂團 Chung Chi Choir & Chung Chi Orchestra, The Chinese University of Hong Kong\n香港中文大學（深圳）國樂團、合唱團及管弦樂團 The Chinese Orchestra, The Chorus and The Orchestra of The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen\n清華大學學生藝術團交響樂隊 Tsinghua University Symphony Orchestra\n華東師範大學音樂學院及學生藝術團舞蹈團 East China Normal University School of Music ECNU and Student Art Association (Dance)\n \n簡介The Performance\n「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」由香港中文大學與內地夥伴院校聯手舉辦，期望在疫情中搭建線上交流平台，讓兩地同學在逆境時刻互相砥礪，透過欣賞及參與樂團、歌唱、歌劇、戲曲等多元化表演，保持身心健康，發放正能量，樂觀應對疫情帶來的挑戰。雲匯演計劃於每個月最後一個周五舉行，每次匯演時間約一小時。\nPleasure in the Pandemic Joint Performance is organized by The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) in collaboration with mainland partners. The event aims to establish a virtual platform during the pandemic committed to enriching the cultural life of the students by presenting a diverse range of student performances. Students from the Mainland and Hong Kong   can support each other in adversity, maintaining physical and mental health, and to stay positive to respond to the challenges. It will take place on the last Friday of every month via online platform(s). Each show lasts about an hour.\n \n榮譽顧問Honorary Advisors\n香港中文大學音樂系系主任劉長江教授Professor LAU Cheung Kong Frederick, Chairman of Department of Music, CUHK\n香港中文大學新聞與傳播學院馮應謙教授Professor FUNG Ying Him Anthony, Professor of School of Journalism and Communication, CUHK\n香港中文大學音樂系官美如教授Professor KOON Carmen, Department of Music, CUHK\n \n查詢Enquiries\n香港中文大學內地及大中華發展處China Engagement Office, The Chinese University of Hong Kong  (cneo@cuhk.edu.hk)",
  'Category': '10',
  'Published_date': '2022-04-30T01:05:32Z',
  'Duration': 3933,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '385',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 — 社會責任與可持續發展（普通話版）',
  'Description': "香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 「中大2025」\n\n承擔社會責任，共圖持續發展\n\n中大在可持續發展的路上，積極支持全人、社會，以及環境與經濟和諧的信念。\n\n詳情：https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan...\n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（「中大2025」） \n英語版：https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \n廣東話版：https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \n普通話版：https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 'CUHK 2025'\n\nEducation: Meeting the Challenges of Tomorrow \n\nCUHK espouses the values of people, social, and environment and economic harmonies in the pursuit of sustainable development.\n\nMore details at https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan...\n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021-2025 ('CUHK 2025') \nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-04-22T10:12:02Z',
  'Duration': 135,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '217',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 — Student Experience (English version)',
  'Description': "CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 'CUHK 2025' \n\nStudent Experience: Nurturing Excellence of Both Heart and Mind\n\nCUHK is a cradle for future global leaders who are imbued with strong moral character, emotional resilience, entrepreneurial mindset, innovative spirit and competencies to make lifelong contributions to society.\n\nMore details at https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan...\n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021-2025 ('CUHK 2025') \nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 「中大2025」\n\n學生體驗：培育心與靈的卓越\n\n中大是孕育未來全球領袖的搖籃：一群德情兼具、擁有企 業思維、富創新精神和能力，志以終身貢獻社會的領袖。\n\n詳情：https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan...\n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（「中大2025」） \n英語版：https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \n廣東話版：https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \n普通話版：https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-04-22T09:59:44Z',
  'Duration': 140,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '186',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 — 社會責任與可持續發展（廣東話版）',
  'Description': "香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 「中大2025」\n\n承擔社會責任，共圖持續發展\n\n中大在可持續發展的路上，積極支持全人、社會，以及環境與經濟和諧的信念。\n\n詳情：https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/tc/social.html\n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（「中大2025」） \n英語版：https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \n廣東話版：https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \n普通話版：https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 'CUHK 2025'\n\nEducation: Meeting the Challenges of Tomorrow \n\nCUHK espouses the values of people, social, and environment and economic harmonies in the pursuit of sustainable development.\n\nMore details at https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/social.html\n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021-2025 ('CUHK 2025') \nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-04-01T07:59:23Z',
  'Duration': 136,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '245',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '不“疫”“樂”乎 -文藝雲匯演',
  'Description': '第二場「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」將會於 2022年4月29日（星期五）晚上8時舉行。\n觀看演出: https://youtu.be/3YdwyG1u8TE\n\n時間 2022年3月25日（星期五）時間 晚上8時 \n\n主辦單位 \n香港中文大學\n\n表演團體（按筆劃序）\n上海交通大學學生合唱團 \n中國科學院大學博士合唱團\n北京大學學生阿卡貝拉清唱社\n香港中文大學崇基合唱團及管弦樂團\n香港中文大學（深圳）合唱團及管弦樂團\n清華大學學生藝術團交響樂隊\n\n簡介\n「不“疫”“樂”乎 - 文藝雲匯演」由香港中文大學與內地夥伴院校聯手舉辦，期望在疫情中搭建線上交流平台，讓兩地同學在逆境時刻互相砥礪，透過欣賞及參與樂團、歌唱、歌劇、戲曲等多元化表演，保持身心健康，發放正能量，樂觀應對疫情帶來的挑戰。雲匯演計劃於每個月最後一個周五舉行，每次匯演時間約一小時。\n\n榮譽顧問\n• 香港中文大學音樂系系主任劉長江教授\n• 香港中文大學新聞與傳播學院馮應謙教授\n• 香港中文大學音樂系官美如教授\n\n查詢\n香港中文大學內地及大中華發展處cneo@cuhk.edu.hk',
  'Category': '10',
  'Published_date': '2022-03-26T01:15:17Z',
  'Duration': 3941,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '759',
  'Likes': '25',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大與您共同抗疫 CUHK and the Community Act Together Against COVID-19',
  'Description': '本地第五波疫情持續嚴竣，中大醫院及醫學院接連推出新措施，為更多市民接種疫苗，為患者診症治療，騰出病床及人手紓緩公立醫院壓力，以及進行跨學科新冠病毒研究，全力支援社區抗疫。\n\n在這艱難時刻，中大醫護、研究團隊、師生及校友上下一心，以專業精神關顧市民健康。抗疫路再難行，中大也與您同行。\n\n-------------------\n中大校長致前線員工、醫學研究和專業人員、及香港中文大學醫院全體員工的感謝信：https://bit.ly/3I3877V\n\nThe COVID-19 pandemic in Hong Kong is still severe. CUHK Medical Centre and CUHK Medicine have rolled out new measures one after another, to provide vaccination to more and more citizens, to treat COVID-19 patients, to help alleviate the pressure on the public healthcare system by offering hospital beds and manpower, and to conduct interdisciplinary COVID-19 research, with an ultimate goal of supporting the community in containing the spread of the pandemic.\n\nDuring this difficult time, CUHK is bringing together our health professionals, research teams, staff, students and alumni to protect your health and contribute to the community by sharing our professional knowledge. You are not alone in this battle. CUHK always stands by you.\n\n-------------------\nThank you message to CUHK frontline staff, medical researchers and professionals, and CUHKMC employees from the CUHK Vice-Chancellor and President: https://bit.ly/3I7ILWp\n\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-03-11T07:56:19Z',
  'Duration': 89,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1015',
  'Likes': '24',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '【學生運動員入學】運動員在中大讀書是怎樣的？ 【Student-athlete Admission】 An athlete studying at CUHK',
  'Description': "中大學生運動員入學🎓📚現正接受報名🏃🏃\u200d♀️\n\n精英運動員要兼顧訓練、比賽和學業，會很難嗎？日程如何安排？\n於中大在學期間，香港田徑代表「欄后」呂麗瑤Vera（2020年 新亞 | 體育及運動科學）取得 2018 年亞運 100 米跨欄銅牌，成為香港史上首位女子跨欄選手登上亞運頒獎台。在較早前的專訪中，Vera跟大家分享她在中大的學業、日常、校園生活，以及中大給予的支援，不妨看看她是怎樣做到兼顧學業與體育事業的。\n\n「學生運動員學習支援及入學計劃」現正接受報名，入學講座將於 3 月 9 日舉行，立即登記👉http://admission.cuhk.edu.hk/salsa/\n\n💬入學講座詳情💬\n日期：3月9日\n時間：晚上 7 時\n登記：https://bit.ly/3vHh18G （3月7日截止登記）\n\nCUHK Student-Athlete Admission🎓📚Open for Application 🏃🏃\u200d♀️\n\nHow hard is it for an elite athlete to manage sports training, competition and academic workload at the same time? How do they allocate the time?\n\nDuring the study at CUHK, Hong Kong track and field athlete Vera Lui (2020 New Asia | Sports Science and Physical Education) got the bronze medal in the 100-metre hurdles at the Asian Games 2018, being the first ever Hong Kong female hurdler mounting the winners podium of the Asian Games. In an earlier interview, Vera told us of her study, daily routine, campus life and professors' support at CUHK. You will know how she struck a balance between study and sports career. \n\nThe 'Student-Athlete Learning Support and Admission (SALSA) Scheme' is open for application. An admission talk will be held on 9 March. Register now👉http://admission.cuhk.edu.hk/salsa/\n\n💬Admission Talk Details💬\nDate: 9 March (Wed)\nTime: 7 pm\nRegister at https://bit.ly/3vHh18G by 7 March\n\n\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-03-05T05:57:32Z',
  'Duration': 187,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1733',
  'Likes': '15',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《疫久嘗新》第四集︰旅遊 "Alumni@Workplace” Episode 4: Tourism',
  'Description': '一個疫情，對全球旅遊業帶來前所未有的挑戰。業界紛紛推出新招數，例如虛擬旅遊，以吸引參加者。除此之外，業界還可以如何「變陣」作出突破呢？《疫久嘗新》第四集，提提大家努力、奮鬥的同時，別忘記跟身處的這片土地同呼吸、同心跳。\n\n今集嘉賓陳智遠（社會科學院/ 2005）分享他由開初一步一腳印地建立本地遊生意，到利用自身優勢面對疫境的故事。純理科出生身的影像創作者張展銘（理學院/ 2020）與師兄更深入探討本地人與本地遊的意義。\n\n致將投身社會的你︰「你的每一步看似雖小，但只要緊記當初給予工作的意義，你的力量或可改變世界。」\n\n=================== \n\n重溫《疫久嘗新》系列：\n\n預告片：https://youtu.be/l2Koupx4SbM \n第一集：外送服務 — 葉曉慧（社會科學院）https://youtu.be/fd2xMFnil4w \n第二集：教育 — 朱子穎（教育學院）https://youtu.be/_TaYQvqivYU\n第三集︰生物科技 — 蔡佩樺（理學院）https://youtu.be/4uiZW-fH7yo \n\n#香港中文大學 #疫久嘗新 #中大人 #陳智遠 #旅遊 #影像創作者 #跟香港同呼吸同心跳 #嘗試為你的每一步找尋意義 #給有志者的一句話\n\nInternational tourism has been hardest hit by the pandemic\'s impact. While live virtual tours are admired, how can the travel industry adapt to the changes and recover? The fourth episode of "Alumni@Workplace” reminds us to keep pace with the beat of other people while we are striving.\n\nThe guest in this episode, Paul CHAN (Faculty of Social Science/ 2005) tells his story of building his local tourism business and how he takes advantage of his own strengths to overcome challenges. A YouTuber from a pure science background, Ahmy CHEUNG (Faculty of Science/ 2020), further discusses with Paul about the influences of local tourism on local people and its meaning.\n\nFor those who will join the workforce:\nYour every step may seem small. As long as you keep in mind the meaning you have given to your job, your power may change the world.\n\n=================== \n\nRevisiting "Alumni@Workplace" series:\n\nTeaser: https://youtu.be/l2Koupx4SbM\nEpisode 1: Food Delivery – Ding Ding (Faculty of Social Science) https://youtu.be/fd2xMFnil4w\nEpisode 2: Education – Headmaster Chu (Faculty of Education) https://youtu.be/_TaYQvqivYU\nEpisode 3: Biotechnology – Dr. Choi (Faculty of Science)\nhttps://youtu.be/4uiZW-fH7yo\n\n#CUHK #OSACUHK #CPDC #AlumniAtWorkplace #CUHKers #PaulChan #Tourism #YouTuber #BreathingandPalpitatingwiththePeople #MeaningofWork\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-01-18T10:31:50Z',
  'Duration': 346,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '535',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大博文教學獎 2021  University Education Award 2021',
  'Description': "師者，傳道授業，還要解惑。酒店及旅遊管理、信息工程及通識教育的學生遇到甚麼疑惑？作為他們的老師，尹振英教授、何震宇博士及 PASS 團隊怎樣回應？\n\n尹教授、何博士及 PASS 團隊 是中大「博文教學獎 2021」的得獎者。他們願意理解學生的學習需要，用心對待學生的疑惑，並精心設計教案，憑教學熱誠得獎，恭喜！\n\nGreat teachers do not only convey the truth and pass on knowledge, they also clarify doubts. What doubts do students of hotel and tourism management, information engineering and general education have? Being their teachers, how do Prof. Lisa Wan, Dr. Marco Ho and the PASS Team clarify the doubts?\n\nProf. Wan, Dr. Ho and the PASS Team are awardees of the University Education Award 2021. They are eager to understand students' needs and wants so as to design suitable teaching methods. They also treat students' doubts seriously. Their passion in teaching is greatly appreciated. Congratulations on winning the award!\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-01-05T09:00:22Z',
  'Duration': 363,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '524',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《疫久嘗新》第三集︰生物科技   "Alumni@Workplace” Episode 3: Biotechnology',
  'Description': '科學家為科研奮鬥，可以去到幾盡？當中又有甚麼掙扎？而對於醫學界的新鮮人來說，需要甚麼力量協助我們向前走？《疫久嘗新》第三集，鼓勵大家繼續懷著「信念」前行。\n\n今集嘉賓蔡佩樺博士（理學院/ 2013）真摰地分享她的故事、她對香港科研發展的看法、作為女性科學家的優勢，以及建立初創公司的心理歷程。蔡博士提到薪火相傳的美麗，而醫學界新鮮人周婉蕎（醫學院/ 2021）正正從蔡博士身上學習良多，並以準醫生的角度與大家互勉。\n\n科研職涯跟面對疫境一樣，都要不斷經歷Trial and Error（嘗試與錯誤），只有堅持信念，才可以令你繼續向目標前行。\n=================== \n節目預告：\n第四集：旅遊 — 陳智遠（社會科學院） \n=================== \n重溫《疫久嘗新》系列：\n預告片：https://youtu.be/l2Koupx4SbM \n第一集：外送服務 — 葉曉慧（社會科學院）https://youtu.be/fd2xMFnil4w \n第二集：教育 — 朱子穎（教育學院）https://youtu.be/_TaYQvqivYU\n\n#香港中文大學 #疫久嘗新 #中大人 #蔡佩樺 #生物科技 #醫學 #科研 #薪火相傳的美麗 #香港和我們一起變得更加好 #信念 #勇氣 #給有志者的一句話 \n\nWhat are the struggles of scientists? How far can they go in pursuing excellence? For newbies in the medical field, what is needed to keep us going? The third episode of "Alumni@Workplace" encourages everyone to hang in there with "Faith".\n\nThe guest in this episode, Dr. CHOI Pui Wah  (Faculty of Science/ 2013) enthusiastically tells her story, her views on the development of scientific research in Hong Kong, the advantages of being a female scientist, and how she went through the ups and downs of  founding her start-up company. Coincidentally and naturally, the concept of passing on what was shared by Dr. Choi was grasped by Karen CHOW (Faculty of Medicine/ 2021), a newbie in the medical field. Inspired by Dr. Choi, she encourages us to persevere from the perspective of a houseman.\n\nConstant Trial and Error is unavoidable in both pursuing a research career and facing the pandemic situation. Only “Faith” can keep us going.\n===================\nComing up next:\nEpisode 4: Travel – Paul Chan (Faculty of Social Science) \n=================== \nRevisiting "Alumni@Workplace" series:\nTeaser: https://youtu.be/l2Koupx4SbM \nEpisode 1: Food Delivery – Ding Ding (Faculty of Social Science) https://youtu.be/fd2xMFnil4w\nEpisode 2: Education – Headmaster Chu (Faculty of Education) https://youtu.be/_TaYQvqivYU \n\n#CUHK #OSACUHK #CPDC #AlumniAtWorkplace #CUHKers #DrChoi #Biotechnology #Medicine #ScientificResearch #TheBeautyOfPassingOn #ThisCityToBeBetterWithUs #Faith #Courage #HangInThere',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2022-01-04T09:01:16Z',
  'Duration': 331,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '918',
  'Likes': '25',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大‧成就 2021  CUHK Achievements 2021',
  'Description': '對中大成員而言，2021年是成績亮麗的一年。\n\n我們於國際排名表現卓越，科研、創新及創業方面成績驕人，逾100名教職員及約400名學生榮獲國家、本地及國際讚譽，獲得各個獎項。\n\n歡迎觀看「中大‧成就 2021」短片。如欲了解更多詳情，請瀏覽 https://bit.ly/3mrYdVC\n\n2021 was another standout year for the CUHK community.\n\nThe year recorded strong performance in university rankings, as well as many staff and students receiving national, local and global recognition for their achievements in research, innovation and entrepreneurship with more than 100 faculty members and around 400 students picking up awards.\n\nWe invite you to watch a short video highlighting CUHK’s achievements this year. For details of our achievements in 2021, please visit: https://bit.ly/33UgTXB\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-12-23T08:33:20Z',
  'Duration': 143,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2857',
  'Likes': '51',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 — 教育（普通話版） CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 — Education (Putonghua version)',
  'Description': "香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 「中大2025」\n\n教育：迎向明日挑戰\n\n中大的嚴格要求及創意課程，令學生更有自信迎向明日挑戰。\n\n詳情：https://translate.itsc.cuhk.edu.hk/uniTS/www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/tc/\n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（「中大2025」） \n英語版：https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \n廣東話版：https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \n普通話版：https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 'CUHK 2025' \n\nEducation: Meeting the Challenges of Tomorrow \n\nCUHK's exacting standards and innovative programmes enable its students to step up to the challenges of tomorrow. \n\nMore details at https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/education.html\n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021-2025 ('CUHK 2025') \nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-12-22T08:38:49Z',
  'Duration': 116,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '257',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 — 教育（廣東話版） CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 — Education (Cantonese version)',
  'Description': "香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 「中大2025」\n\n教育：迎向明日挑戰\n\n中大的嚴格要求及創意課程，令學生更有自信迎向明日挑戰。\n\n詳情：https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/tc/education.html\n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（「中大2025」） \n英語版：https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \n廣東話版：https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \n普通話版：https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 'CUHK 2025' \n\nEducation: Meeting the Challenges of Tomorrow \n\nCUHK's exacting standards and innovative programmes enable its students to step up to the challenges of tomorrow. \n\nMore details at https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/education.html\n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021-2025 ('CUHK 2025') \nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-12-22T08:34:56Z',
  'Duration': 116,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '232',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大正向員工服務獎 2021 CUHK Positive Workplace Service Awards 2021',
  'Description': "正向員工服務獎 2021 頒獎典禮已於2021年12月15日圓滿結束。今年共收到31份提名，當中每一位獲提名的同事及團隊，都是中大正向工作間的 「Champions」。而今屆正向員工服務獎一共有12個得獎單位（瀏覽得獎名單：https://bit.ly/3H34K0F )，分別包括4名個人獎得主、6個工作團隊獎，以及兩個「評審嘉許獎」。讓我們細聽得獎者的心得分享，一同在工作間發揮正能量。\n\nThe Positive Workplace Service Awards 2021 Presentation Ceremony ended successfully on 15 December 2021 with over 200 participants joining the party to celebrate positivity together. All colleagues and work teams being nominated, totally 31 this year, are indeed champions of the CUHK positive workplace. The Committee is pleased to include 12 nominations on the list of awardees (view at https://bit.ly/3H34K0F). There are 4 Individual Awards, 6 Team Awards and 2 Panel’s Appreciation Awards. Let's hear their stories.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-12-22T03:09:39Z',
  'Duration': 887,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '713',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 — Social Responsibility and Sustainability Development (Eng version)',
  'Description': "CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 'CUHK 2025' \n\nEducation: Meeting the Challenges of Tomorrow \n\nCUHK espouses the values of people, social, and environment and economic harmonies in the pursuit of sustainable development.\n\nMore details at https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/social.html\n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021-2025 ('CUHK 2025') \nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（「中大2025」） \n英語版：https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \n廣東話版：https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \n普通話版：https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-12-21T02:40:31Z',
  'Duration': 136,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '257',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 — Education (English version) 香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 — 教育（英語版）',
  'Description': "CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 'CUHK 2025' \n\nEducation: Meeting the Challenges of Tomorrow \n\nCUHK's exacting standards and innovative programmes enable its students to step up to the challenges of tomorrow. \n\nMore details at https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/education.html\n\nCUHK Strategic Plan 2021-2025 ('CUHK 2025') \nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025 「中大2025」\n\n教育：迎向明日挑戰\n\n中大的嚴格要求及創意課程，令學生更有自信迎向明日挑戰。\n\n詳情：https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/strategicplan/cuhk2025/tc/education.html\n\n香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（「中大2025」） \n英語版：https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ \n廣東話版：https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI \n普通話版：https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《疫久嘗新》第二集︰教育 "Alumni@Workplace" Episode 2: Education',
  'Description': '教育工作者對未來有甚麼盼望？將教育理念實踐，又有甚麼竅門？《疫久嘗新》第二集帶大家認識「使命」的重要性。\n\n停課、網上學習、復課、全面復課......不斷改變的教學模式為學界帶來前所未有的挑戰，更讓教育工作者意識到推行網上教學以至混合式學習的重要性。「混合式學習」對教學質素有甚麼正面影響？在網上平台又如何發揮教學相長？同時，面對重大的挑戰，善意溝通技巧又如何支援老師及學生去表達自己的感受及需要？\n\n今集嘉賓朱子穎（教育學院/2009）分享他對教育發展及未來的前瞻性見解。而職場新鮮人霍靖兒（社會科學院/2020）還會透過遊戲卡，邀請朱校長跟大家分享教育工作者的感受及需要。兩位嘉賓在教育路上擔當不同的角色。緊守崗位，是「愛」或是「責任」？\n=================== \n節目預告：\n第三集：生物科技 — 蔡佩樺（理學院） \n第四集：旅遊 — 陳智遠（社會科學院） \n=================== \n《疫久嘗新》系列重溫：\n預告片︰https://youtu.be/l2Koupx4SbM \n第一集 外送服務 - 葉曉慧 (社會科學院)︰https://youtu.be/fd2xMFnil4w \n#香港中文大學 #疫久嘗新 #中大人 #朱子穎 #實踐想法 #對未來的愛 #使命 #給有志者的一句話 \n\nWhat are the hopes of educators for the future? What is the gist of putting educational theories into practice? The second episode of "Alumni@Workplace" takes everyone to realize the importance of "mission". \n\nSuspension of classes, online learning, partial class resumption, official school reopening... The ever-changing teaching mode has brought unprecedented challenges to the academic arena  and has made educators aware of the importance of implementing blended learning modes. What are the positive impacts of "blended learning"? How could we make good use of online platforms for teaching and learning? At the same time, in the face of challenges, how can Giraffe Language support teachers and students to express their feelings and needs?\n\nThe guest in this episode, Tsz-wing Chu (Faculty of Education/2009) gives his forward-looking views on the development and future of education. A freshman in the workplace, Rachel (Faculty of Social Science}invites headmaster Chu to share with us his feelings and needs as an educator through the card game. The two guests play different roles in education. Is an educator\'s commitment and perseverance an indicator of "love" or "responsibility” for his/her profession?\n=================== \nComing up next:\nEpisode 3: Biotechnology – Dr. Choi Pui Wah (Faculty of Science) \nEpisode 4: Travel – Paul Chan (Faculty of Social Science) \n=================== \nRevisiting "Alumni@Workplace" video series\nTeaser: https://youtu.be/l2Koupx4SbM \nEpisode 1: Food Delivery – Ding Ding (Faculty of Social Science) https://youtu.be/fd2xMFnil4w\n#CUHK #OSACUHK #CPDC #AlumniAtWorkplace #CUHKers #ChuTszWing #Educators #LoveForTheFuture #Mission #LifePurpose #HoldOn\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-12-14T09:00:09Z',
  'Duration': 336,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '427',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大2022年曆 CUHK 2022 Calendar',
  'Description': '【全新設計\u3000中大2022年曆開賣中！】\n中大2022年曆主題為「中大策略計劃2021–2025 ： 力臻卓越，任重志遠」，以全新的座枱卡片設計，配以中大景色及校園生活精彩照片，簡介七個重點範疇，展示中大未來五年的目標和方向。\n\n座枱年曆定價為港幣98元正，所有收益將撥捐中大I‧CARE博群計劃。年曆即日起於中大書店及富爾敦樓紀念品銷售處有售，今年繼續有速遞送貨服務，數量有限，請即訂購！\n\n網上訂購表格：https://bit.ly/31kJww1 \n\n【Newly Designed CUHK 2022 Calendar Is Available Now!】\nThe theme of CUHK 2022 Calendar is "CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025: Excellence with Purpose and Responsibility" . With its table card design and wonderful photos of CUHK\'s scenery and campus life, it introduces the seven key areas, and maps out CUHK’s aims and direction over the next five years.\n\nThe desktop calendar is being sold at HK$98 and proceeds from the calendar sales will be donated to support CUHK I‧CARE Programme. The calendar is now available at the CUHK Bookstore and the Souvenir Counter at John Fulton Centre. We have also arranged a delivery service. Stocks are limited so place your order now!\n\nOnline order form: https://bit.ly/31kJww1 \n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-12-01T09:53:41Z',
  'Duration': 47,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2322',
  'Likes': '49',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《疫久嘗新》第一集︰外送服務 "Alumni@Workplace” Episode 1: Food Delivery',
  'Description': '《疫久嘗新》第一集，帶大家認識外送服務及面對逆境的一個重要態度︰堅持。\n\n限聚令生效後，安坐家中用膳成為日常，造就外送服務一大商機。飲食業即時轉型並加強外送服務，外送員的需求亦大量增加。\n\n在新常態下，如何將外送服務推廣至穩定的長遠發展計劃？ 作為創業者，如何由零開始經營生意，同時履行社會責任？今集嘉賓葉曉慧（社會學/2016）在創業路上遇過不少困難，她又憑甚麼理念一直堅持下去？\n===================\n節目預告：\n第二集：教育 — 朱子穎（教育學院）\n第三集：生物科技 — 蔡佩樺（理學院）\n第四集：旅遊 — 陳智遠（社會科學院）\n===================\n預告片重溫︰https://youtu.be/l2Koupx4SbM \n\n#香港中文大學 #疫久嘗新 #中大人 #葉曉慧 #創業 #堅持 #光 #希望 #給有志者的一句話\n\nThe first episode introduced you to an important attitude towards facing adversity: Persistence.\n\nAfter the gathering restriction order came into effect, eating at home became a daily routine which created a major business opportunity for delivery services. The catering industry has immediately shifted to strengthen delivery services, and the demand for delivery staff increased exponentially. \n\nUnder the new normal, how should the industry promote the delivery services for a stable long-term development? How should an entrepreneur run a business from scratch while fulfilling social responsibilities? Ding Ding (Sociology/2016), the guest of this episode has faced many difficulties when she runs her business. What makes her persist in doing so? \n===================\nComing up next:\n\nEpisode 2: Education – Headmaster Chu Tsz Wing (Faculty of Education)\nEpisode 3: Biotechnology – Dr. Choi Pui Wah (Faculty of Science)\nEpisode 4: Travel – Paul Chan (Faculty of Social Science)\n===================\nRevisiting Teaser: https://youtu.be/l2Koupx4SbM \n\n#CUHK #OSACUHK #CPDC #AlumniAtWorkplace #CUHKers #DingDing #Entrepreneur #Persistence #TheLightAtTheEndOfTheTunnel #Hope #IntoTheUnknown \n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-11-30T07:40:44Z',
  'Duration': 308,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1573',
  'Likes': '40',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Our CUHK (Student Experience)  我們的中大 (學生體驗)',
  'Description': 'Building a vibrant student experience is a key pillar of CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025. Learn more on the University’s effort to engaging students from the video. \n\n中大策略計劃 2021–2025 以豐富學生的學習體驗為其中一個重點範疇，透過此短片，了解更多大學在加強學生參與方面的工作。\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-11-25T03:58:16Z',
  'Duration': 154,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2608',
  'Likes': '40',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《疫久嘗新》預告片 Alumni@Workplace Teaser',
  'Description': '【《疫久嘗新》一連四集\u3000即將首播！】\n四個不同行業，四種面對疫境的態度。\n疫情加速社會演變，在新常態中，哪些行業繼續一枝獨秀、茁壯成長？求職者又如何看準機遇，裝備自己？一個讓中大校友交流的特輯，一個由中大人一手一腳包辦的企劃， 11月30日起一連四集，即將首播！\n========================================\n節目預告：\n第一集︰外送服務 — 葉曉慧（社會科學院）\n第二集：教育 — 朱子穎（教育學院）\n第三集：生物科技 — 蔡佩樺（理學院）\n第四集：旅遊 — 陳智遠（社會科學院）\n#香港中文大學 #疫久嘗新 #中大人 #葉曉慧 #朱子穎 #蔡佩樺 #陳智遠\n\n【”Alumni@Workplace” 4 Episodes Coming Soon!】\nFour different industries, four kinds of attitude towards the pandemic. \nCOVID-19 accelerates social evolution. Under the “new normal”, which industries can stand out and thrive? How can job seekers seize opportunities and equip themselves? This programme allows CUHK alumni to exchange their ideas. It is all arranged and produced by CUHKers as well. 4 consecutive episodes will premiere from 30 November!\n========================================\nComing up next:\nEpisode 1: Food Delivery – Ding Ding (Faculty of Social Science)\nEpisode 2: Education – Headmaster Chu Tsz Wing (Faculty of Education)\nEpisode 3: Biotechnology – Dr. Choi Pui Wah (Faculty of Science)\nEpisode 4: Travel – Paul Chan (Faculty of Social Science)\n#CUHK #CUHKCPDC #OSA #AlumniAtWorkplace #CUHKers #DingDing #HeadmasterChu #DrChoi #PaulChan\n\nConnect with Us 聯絡我們: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-11-24T10:24:48Z',
  'Duration': 25,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '450',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '粵港澳大灣區發展論壇暨香港中文大學大灣區發展成果研討會開幕典禮',
  'Description': '為慶祝中大於粵港澳大灣區發展十五周年，大學於10月28日舉辦「粵港澳大灣區發展論壇暨香港中文大學大灣區發展成果研討會」，簽署了七份新的戰略合作夥伴協議，進一步鞏固香港在大灣區創新科技方面的地位。\n\nIn a major celebration of its 15-year presence in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macau Greater Bay Area (GBA), at a special forum CUHK unveiled seven new strategic partnerships that are set to strengthen Hong Kong’s presence in the region’s emerging innovation and technology ecosystem.\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-11-01T13:06:44Z',
  'Duration': 3345,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '336',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '粵港澳大灣區發展論壇暨香港中文大學大灣區發展成果研討會',
  'Description': '為慶祝中大於粵港澳大灣區發展十五周年，大學於10月28日舉辦「粵港澳大灣區發展論壇暨香港中文大學大灣區發展成果研討會」，簽署了七份新的戰略合作夥伴協議，進一步鞏固香港在大灣區創新科技方面的地位。\n\n論壇以"承先啟後，繼往開來"為主題，以成果展覽、主題演講、專題論壇等形式，回顧港中大15年來在大灣區的發展歷程，展示大學在灣區發展期間取得的豐碩成果！\n\n主題演講 （一）香港中文大學大灣區發展的回顧與前瞻\n主持：香港中文大學校長段崇智教授\n主講：香港中文大學藍饒富暨藍凱麗經濟學講座教授劉遵義教授\n\n主題演講 （二）中長期視角下的中國經濟與大灣區發展\n主持：香港中文大學（深圳）副校長朱世平教授\n主講：國務院發展研究中心宏觀經濟研究部副部長許偉博士\n\n大學與創科發展在大灣區論壇\n主持人：香港中文大學常務副校長陳金樑教授\n\n講者：\n1. 樊建平院士（中國科學院深圳先進技術研究院院長、中國科學院深圳理工大學籌備辦主任、國際歐亞科學院院士）\n2. 盧煜明教授（香港中文大學醫學院李嘉誠健康科學研究所所長、李嘉誠醫學講座教授及化學病理學講座教授）\n3. 林達華教授（香港中文大學人工智慧交叉學科研究所暫任所長、商湯科技聯合創始人）\n4. 李睿宇博士（思謀科技聯合創始人兼產品總經理）\n\nIn a major celebration of its 15-year presence in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macau Greater Bay Area (GBA), at a special forum CUHK unveiled seven new strategic partnerships that are set to strengthen Hong Kong’s presence in the region’s emerging innovation and technology ecosystem.\n\nThematic Talk 1: Retrospect and Prospects of CUHK Development in the Greater Bay Area\nHost: Professor Rocky S. TUAN, Vice-Chancellor and President,\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong\nSpeaker: Professor Lawrence J. LAU, Ralph and Claire Landau Professor of Economics,\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong\n\nThematic Talk 2: China’s Economy and Greater Bay Area Development in Medium and Long Term\nHost: Professor Shiping ZHU, Vice President of\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong (Shenzhen)\nSpeaker: Dr. Wei XU, Deputy Director-General, Department of Marcoeconomic Research,\nDevelopment Research Center of the State Council\n\nForum on Development of The Chinese University of Hong Kong and Innovation and Technology in the Greater Bay Area\nHost: Professor Alan K.L. CHAN, Provost, The Chinese University of Hong Kong\nSpeakers:\n． Professor Jianping FAN, President of Shenzhen Institute of\nAdvanced Technology (SIAT), Chinese Academy of Science (CAS),\nDirector of the Preparatory Office of SIAT University, CAS, and Academician of the\nInternational Eurasian Academy of Sciences\n． Professor Dennis LO, Director, Li Ka Shing Institute of Health Sciences, Li Ka Shing\nProfessor of Medicine, and Professor of Chemical Pathology,\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong\n． Professor Dahua LIN, Interim Director of CUHK Interdisciplinary Artificial Intelligence\nResearch Institute and Co-founder of SenseTime\n． Dr. Ruiyu LI, Co-founder and Head of Product of SmartMore\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-11-01T13:06:39Z',
  'Duration': 9571,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '364',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '承先啟後繼往開來\u3000多位重量級嘉賓亮相粵港澳大灣區發展論壇！',
  'Description': '【#承先啟後繼往開來\u3000多位重量級嘉賓亮相粵港澳大灣區發展論壇！】\n早在2006年，#香港中文大學（中大）便踏足深圳，是香港最早在粵港澳大灣區開展學術、科研合作的香港高等院校之一，今年適逢中大在灣區發展的第15年，中大將舉辦"#粵港澳大灣區發展論壇暨香港中文大學大灣區發展成果研討會"。\n\n論壇以"承先啟後，繼往開來"為主題，以成果展覽、主題演講、專題論壇等形式，回顧港中大15年來在大灣區的發展歷程，展示大學在灣區發展期間取得的豐碩成果！\n\n兩場主題演講及一場專題論壇邀請了多位重量級嘉賓出席，詳情如下：\n\n日期：2021年10月28日（星期四）\n時間：上午10時20分至下午1時正\n網上直播連結（ZOOM平台）：https://cuhk.zoom.us/j/93563499864 \n\n主題演講 （一）香港中文大學大灣區發展的回顧與前瞻\n主持：香港中文大學校長段崇智教授\n主講：香港中文大學藍饒富暨藍凱麗經濟學講座教授劉遵義教授\n\n主題演講 （二）中長期視角下的中國經濟與大灣區發展\n主持：香港中文大學（深圳）副校長朱世平教授\n主講：國務院發展研究中心宏觀經濟研究部副部長許偉博士\n\n大學與創科發展在大灣區論壇\n主持人：香港中文大學常務副校長陳金樑教授\n講者：\n1. 樊建平院士（中國科學院深圳先進技術研究院院長、中國科學院深圳理工大學籌備辦主任、國際歐亞科學院院士）\n2. 盧煜明教授（香港中文大學醫學院李嘉誠健康科學研究所所長、李嘉誠醫學講座教授及化學病理學講座教授）\n3. 林達華教授（香港中文大學人工智慧交叉學科研究所暫任所長、商湯科技聯合創始人）\n4. 李睿宇博士（思謀科技聯合創始人兼產品總經理）\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-10-25T07:43:52Z',
  'Duration': 55,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '210',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大網上本科入學資訊日歡迎辭 Welcoming Speech of CUHK Information Day',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '我們的中大 Our CUHK',
  'Description': '剛畢業的同學說，中大最吸引的是其秀逸的大自然環境；一年級新生說，中大最獨特的是其書院制度；畢業數年的校友說，最欣賞的是中大老師和員工展現的人文精神。中大有何吸引之處？不如一起細聽「我們的中大」吧。\n\n有興趣了解中大更多，可以參加今個星期六 （10月16日）的中大網上本科入學資訊日 (Info Day)，立即登記吧：https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/infoday  \n\nA fresh graduate says he’s most attracted to the stunning natural environment of CUHK. A year-1 freshman says she likes the unique college system of CUHK the most. Some alumni say their best memory of CUHK is the humanistic concern demonstrated by CUHK teachers and staff members. Why do they have deep affection for CUHK? Let’s listen to their feelings on “Our CUHK”.\n\nWant to know more on CUHK? You can join the CUHK Virtual Information Day for Undergraduate Admissions (Info Day) scheduled for this Saturday (16 October). Register now at https://www.cuhk.edu.hk/infoday   \n\n#香港中文大學 #中大 #中大網上本科入學資訊日\n#thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk #CUHKVirtualInformationDayforUndergraduateAdmission\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-10-15T01:52:36Z',
  'Duration': 168,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1450',
  'Likes': '31',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '演藝追夢人—張靜文 Dream Chaser—Eugenea Cheung',
  'Description': "入讀大學其中一個原因，是為了將來的事業發展鋪路，不過工作與興趣往往很難兼顧。校友張靜文（新聞與傳播學）憑著對京昆的熱愛，一直堅持兼任傳媒人及京昆演員。對於她而言，第一次在鏡頭前報道新聞，與第一次踏上台板表演，兩者的感受到底有何分別？在追尋夢想的旅途上，她又遇過甚麼困難？發生怎樣的難忘事？立即觀看完整訪問，了解更多！\n\n同學對於選報大學課程有任何疑問，中大將於10月16日(星期六)舉辦網上本科入學資訊日！活動設有多場 #入學講座、超過 110 個 #網上展位，更有即時問答時段，絕對是一個一站式平台，等你了解中大的學科、獨特的書院生活，以及其他學習機會。\n\n歡迎同學、家長和老師參加，費用全免，立即登記：https://cuhkinfoday2021.eventx.io/index-tc.html\u3000\n-----------------------------------\n重溫【演藝追夢人】系列\n章彥琦: https://bit.ly/39NQgTZ\n阿正: https://bit.ly/3BF9GXj \n\n#演藝追夢人 #香港中文大學 #中大網上本科入學資訊日 #中大\n\nOne of the reasons for entering university is to pave the way for your future career, but it is hard to strike the balance between work and hobbies. With a passion for Jingqun, CUHK alumna Eugenea Cheung (Journalism and Communication) perseveres to become a media person and a Jingqun actress simultaneously. What is the difference in  Eugenea's true feelings between the first time she reported news in front of the camera, and the first time she performed on stage? As she was chasing her dream, what difficulties did she encounter and what unforgettable things happened? Watch her interview and get to know more!\n\nIf you have any questions about programme choices, CUHK will hold a Virtual Information Day for Undergraduate Admission on 16 Oct (Sat)! Over 110 virtual booths will be showcased and live chat sessions will be available throughout the day. It’s definitely a one-stop platform for you to learn about our different academic programmes, unique college life, and other learning opportunities. \n\nThe event is free-of-charge. All are welcome. Register now at\nhttps://cuhkinfoday2021.eventx.io/index.html\n-----------------------------------\nRevisiting “Dream Chaser”video series\nAshley Cheung: https://bit.ly/39NQgTZ\nAh Jeng: https://bit.ly/3BF9GXj \n\n#chasingdreams #thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk #CUHKVirtualInformationDayforUndergraduateAdmission\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-10-13T09:22:31Z',
  'Duration': 253,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '878',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '粵港澳大灣區發展論壇暨香港中文大學大灣區發展成果研討會 10月28日隆重登場！',
  'Description': '隨著在《粵港澳大灣區發展規劃綱要》及"十四五規劃"的公布及推展，#粵港澳大灣區 的發展被深度納入國家發展大局，國家更明確提出加強粵港澳 #產學研 協同發展，建設綜合性國家科學中心。\n\n#香港中文大學  (中大)在大灣區先後落地項目包括深圳先進技術研究院、深圳研究院、再生醫學高等研究院、香港中文大學(深圳)、深圳研究院眾創中心、深圳創新研究院(福田)等。\n\n適逢今年是中大踏足大灣區15周年，將於10月28日舉辦「粵港澳大灣區發展論壇暨香港中文大學大灣區發展成果研討會」，展示中大多年來的大灣區發展建設成果！\n\n期待各位中大人承先啟後、繼往開來，共同引領大灣區進入新時代發展模式！\n\n活動將於香港、深圳兩地連線直播，歡迎網上參加！\n\n詳情如下：\n日期：2021年10月28日（星期四）\n時間：上午10時20分至下午1時正\n參與形式：網上直播 （ZOOM平台）\n立即登記:https://bit.ly/3mOXe0U\n\n主題演講及論壇\n主題演講 （一）香港中文大學大灣區發展的回顧與前瞻\n主持： 香港中文大學校長段崇智教授\n主講： 香港中文大學藍饒富暨藍凱麗經濟學講座教授劉遵義教授\n \n主題演講 （二）大灣區的發展與國家的經濟佈局\n主持：香港中文大學（深圳）副校長朱世平教授\n主講：國務院發展研究中心宏觀經濟研究部部長陳昌盛博士\n \n大學與創科發展在大灣區論壇\n主持人：香港中文大學常務副校長陳金樑教授\n講者：\n1. 樊建平院長（中國科學院深圳先進技術研究院院長、中國科學院深圳理工大學籌備辦主任、國際歐亞科學院院士）\n2. 盧煜明教授（香港中文大學醫學院李嘉誠健康科學研究所所長、李嘉誠醫學講座教授及化學病理學講座教授）\n3. 林達華教授（香港中文大學人工智能交叉學科研究所暫任所長、商湯科技聯合創始人）\n4. 李睿宇博士（思謀科技聯合創始人兼產品總經理）\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-10-12T13:24:22Z',
  'Duration': 53,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '452',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '演藝追夢人—阿正 Dream Chaser—Ah Jeng',
