  'Description': '【#演藝追夢人 — #阿正 🗣️🎙️📻】\n各位準DSE考生除了努力溫習，備戰考試外，是否正在為JUPAS選報課程而煩惱？其實就算讀哪一科，只要敢於追夢，便是勝利！ \n\n現職電台DJ的阿正 #黃正宜（#新聞與傳播學），由細到大都努力朝著這個目標進發，現在可算得上是夢想成真！在電台的工作時，同樣係中大出身的大師兄 #森美 常常提點阿正，他們之間的相處如何？一路走來，阿正追夢時也曾缺乏信心，是甚麼東西令她堅持下去，而且一講起會眼濕濕？立即睇片就知！\n\n睇完條片後，仍然對大學選科充滿疑問？唔洗擔心！中大將於10月16日(星期六)舉辦網上本科入學資訊日，安排了不同講座，介紹各學系課程，還有在線即時對話，解答大家的疑問！\n\n立即登記：https://cuhkinfoday2021.eventx.io/index-tc.html\u3000\n-----------------------------------\n重溫【演藝追夢人】系列\n章彥琦: https://bit.ly/39NQgTZ \n\n#香港中文大學 #中大 #中大網上本科入學資訊日 \n\n【Dream Chaser—Ah Jeng🗣️🎙️📻】\nAll HKDSE candidates should be working hard preparing for the examination. Are you also struggling to select your programme choices in JUPAS? No matter which subject you choose, you will win as long as you dare to chase your dreams.\n\nCurrently a radio DJ, Ah Jeng / Wong Ching Yee (Journalism and Communication) has worked hard to achieve her goals since she was a kid. Now she regards it as a dream come true. While she has been working at the radio station, Sammy, who also graduated from CUHK, has often coached and prompted her as her senior. How do they get along? Along the way, when Ah Jeng was chasing her dream, she once lost her confidence. What made her persist? She was almost in tears when she talked about it. Check out this video!\n\nYou still have questions about choosing programmes? No worries! CUHK is going to organize Virtual Information Day for Undergraduate Admission on 16 Oct (Sat). There will be many talks to introduce different programmes. Live chat sessions will also be arranged to answer your questions!\n\nRegister now: https://cuhkinfoday2021.eventx.io/index.html \n-----------------------------------\nRevisiting “Dream Chaser”video series\nAshley Cheung: https://bit.ly/39NQgTZ\n#chasingdreams #thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk #CUHKVirtualInformationDayforUndergraduateAdmission\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-10-04T02:13:56Z',
  'Duration': 151,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '46107',
  'Likes': '930',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大創新日2021  五大創新主題等你探究  CUHK Innovation Day 2021 Explore the 5 Emerging Technologies',
  'Description': '看看眼前電腦電話，你有多少個應用程式是因應疫情而下載？\n\n至今，全世界的教學和工作模式都有所轉變。不少初創應運而生，將上游的大學知識帶到下游應用，創造社會影響，達至知識轉移的目標！\n\n如果不想錯過這個激動人心的時刻，就一定要參加中大創新日！\n\n直至2021年，中大申請超過3,300項專利，位列全港大學首位。而大學將於2021年9月23日舉辦中大創新日，當日會展出大學部分創新成果！\n\n參加以下主題講座，深入認識5大創新科技：\n📲 #Satellite , #MobileSensingTechnologies and #PublicHealthInfrastructure\n⚡ #GreenEnergy and Advanced Materials\n🩺 #TissueEngineering and #RegenerativeMedicine\n🔭 Industry Insights: Future Demand of Technologies\n🛰️ Advantages of Future CUHK Satellite\n🌫️ Laser-based #GasSensing\n👶 Strategies to Enhance #EarlyLanguageDevelopment\n\n創新日會於大學校園及線上同步舉行，隨時隨地都可以參與這場創新盛會，立即報名： https://bit.ly/38Wh8AM\n\nTake a look at your computer and cellphone. How many apps have you downloaded due to the pandemic outbreak? \n\nThe way the world works, teaching and learning has changed. As a result, many start-ups were born, bringing upstream knowledge from universities to downstream applications to create societal impact!\n\nDon’t want to miss out on the excitement? Join the first CUHK Innovation Day to learn more!\n\nAs of today, CUHK has filed over 3,300 patents, ranking first among universities in Hong Kong. The CUHK Innovation Day will showcase a taste of innovation on 23 September 2021. \n\nJoin the thematic lectures below to learn more about the 5 innovative technologies:\n📲 Satellite, Mobile Sensing Technologies and Public Health Infrastructure\n⚡ Green Energy and Advanced Materials\n🩺 Tissue Engineering and Regenerative Medicine\n🔭 Industry Insights: Future Demand of Technologies\n🛰️ Advantages of Future CUHK Satellite\n🌫️ Laser-based Gas Sensing\n👶 Strategies to Enhance Early Language Development\n\nThe event will be held simultaneously on the university campus and online. Participate with one click, anytime, anywhere. Register now: https://bit.ly/38Wh8AM\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-09-17T05:00:56Z',
  'Duration': 55,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3011',
  'Likes': '137',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Nurturing knowledgeable decision makers in SEEM 培育具備系統工程與工程管理知識的決策者',
  'Description': 'The Department of Systems Engineering and Engineering Management was established in 1991 as the first of its kind in tertiary educational institutions in Hong Kong. The scope of the research area of the Department covers Financial Engineering and FinTech, Service Engineering and Management, Logistics and Supply Chain Management, Operations Research, and Information Systems. SEEM supports Hong Kong’s pillar industries and our diverse programmes educate students for applying the engineering techniques to the management for optimal decision-making in complex environments.\n\n系統工程與工程管理學於1991年成立，為香港首個系統工程與工程管理學系。本學系的研究領域包括金融工程、金融科技、服務工程及管理、物流及供應鏈管理、運籌學及信息系統。系統工程與工程管理學支援著香港經濟的支柱產業，而學系多元化的課程亦教導學生把所學的技術應用於管理上，從而能在複雜的環境下進行決策。\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-09-13T07:47:48Z',
  'Duration': 243,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1431',
  'Likes': '98',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大創新日2021：創新創意 盡在其中 CUHK Innovation Day 2021: Innovation, Patents and Beyond',
  'Description': "【中大創新日2021：創新創意 盡在其中】\n在「路透社亞太區最具創新力大學」排名中，中大連續4年 (2016-2019) 居於全港首位，大學迄今申請的專利達3300 多項，為全港最多 🏆。為推動和鼓勵大學社群繼續運用創意產生社會影響，並表揚和展示豐碩的研究和創新成果，中大將於2021年9月23日於校園和線上同步舉行第一屆 #中大創新日💡。\n\n大學和社會間的知識轉移可以透過借助知識產權、進行創業活動和科研成果產業化，為社會和企業帶來經濟效益和改善。🤝\n\n活動當日將有：\n🗣️ 14 位講者\n💡 20 個展覽（實體和虛擬）\n🚀 展示衛星技術、機器人、生物醫學和教育領域的創新創意\n\n即上網站了解更多，座位數量有限，請盡早報名！👉 https://bit.ly/38Wh8AM\n\n【CUHK Innovation Day 2021: Innovation, Patents and Beyond】\nCUHK ranked 1st in Hong Kong in the Reuters Asia Pacific's Most Innovative Universities ranking in 2016 -2019 and has filed more than 3300 patents to date, top among local universities 🏆. In order to inspire and encourage the CUHK community to continue to innovate for societal impact and showcase our research and innovation achievements, we will organise the 1st ever #CUHKInnovationDay on 23 September 2021. The event will be held simultaneously on CUHK campus and online. 💡 \n\nThrough capitalisation of intellectual property, entrepreneurial activities and the commercialisation of R&I projects, the transfer of knowledge between universities and society helps bring about a socio-economic impact and improvements to the community and businesses. 🤝 \n\nThe day will include:\n🗣️ 14 Speakers\n💡 20 booths (Hybrid)\n🚀 Innovation in the areas of satellite technologies, robotics, biomedicine & education\n\nLearn more and secure your seat NOW! 👉 https://bit.ly/38Wh8AM\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-09-13T06:06:11Z',
  'Duration': 43,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1203',
  'Likes': '85',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大校長段崇智教授致新生的話 Welcome Message to New Students by Prof Rocky Tuan, CUHK Vice-Chancellor/President',
  'Description': "【中大校長段崇智教授致新生的話】\n段崇智校長向新生發表歡迎詞。新學年中大恢復面授教學，段校長表示：「現時本港的感染率相對較低，我們熱切期盼在新學年恢復面授教學及學習活動，重見久違了的活力校園。」\n\n段校長提到：「中大為你們提供的教育，並不限於專業知識及實用技能。我們希望大家在畢業的時候，已經為應對現實世界中的挑戰作好準備，具備所需的軟實力，成為負責任的本地及世界公民，過充實而豐盛的生活。」\n\n段校長於本科課程設計、中大對全人發展的重視，以及培養學生全球視野三方面，向新生簡介一些具體細節。\n\n【Welcome Message to New Students by Professor Rocky S. Tuan, CUHK Vice-Chancellor and President】\nProfessor Rocky S. Tuan, CUHK Vice-Chancellor and President delivered a welcome message for new students. The University resumes face-to-face teaching and learning in the new semester. “As the current rate of local infections remains relatively low, we eagerly look forward to resuming face-to-face teaching and learning activities and seeing the greatly missed vibrant campus in the new semester,” said Professor Tuan. \n\n“The education that you will receive in CUHK is not only about our imparting to you technical and practical knowledge. We are here to prepare you for local and global challenges in the real world, to equip you with the soft skills, and to nurture you to be responsible global citizens. In other words, the CUHK experience will allow you to live and flourish,” said Professor Tuan. \n\nSpecifically, Professor Tuan briefed new students on CUHK’s undergraduate curriculum, the University's commitment on whole-person development, and our global engagement.\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-09-06T01:14:26Z',
  'Duration': 409,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1461',
  'Likes': '18',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大創業大賽2021\u3000五強一較高下！CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2021 Five Finalists Fight It Out!',
  'Description': '【中大創業大賽2021\u3000五強一較高下！🗣️🏆】\n中大創業大賽今年已是第五屆舉行，晉身最後5強的初創企業將於現場施展渾身解數，爭奪冠軍殊榮。決賽評審團由香港科技園公司和香港數碼港的代表，以及三位豐富創投經驗的校友投資者組成，冠亞季軍的隊伍可分別獲得港幣5萬元、3萬元及2萬元的獎金，以作鼓勵。\n\n成功入圍的最後五強包括：\n1. 貝思生物科技有限公司—王海天（中大賽馬會公共衞生及基層醫療學院副教授）\n2. 生物醫學科技控股有限公司—曾志謙（1984崇基經濟）、徐國榮（1985崇基化學）、盧景勳（2002崇基內外全科醫學） \n3. 漢鵬輔助生殖科技有限公司—趙銘鵬（2020研究院婦產科哲學博士）\n4. 朗思科技有限公司—任偉（中大機械與自動化工程學系副教授）、許可（2020研究院機械與自動化工程哲學博士）、陳思捷（2020研究院生物醫學工程學） \n5. 騰熠科技有限公司—馮威棠（2000研究院訊息工程學）\n\n立即睇片！了解五強過人之處！\n----------------------------------\n立即報名參加中大創業日2021➡️ https://bit.ly/3E7a4jd \n更多精彩活動資訊，請密切留意「中大創業日」網站：http://www.alumni.cuhk.edu.hk/cuhkeday\n\n#中大創業大賽2021 #中大創業日2021 #創業創新 #共享共贏\n\n【CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2021 Five Finalists Fight It Out!🗣️🏆】\nThe CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition is being held for the fifth time. The five finalists are going to pull out all the plugs competing for the championship. The judging panel is composed of two representatives from Hong Kong Science and Technology Parks and Cyberport, and three alumni investors with rich venture capital experience. The winners, 1st runners-up and 2nd runners-up will receive prizes of $50K, $30K and $20K respectively. \n\nThe five finalists are:\n1. Beth Bioinformatics Co., Ltd— (Professor Maggie Wang)\n2. BioMed Technology Holdings Limited— (Mr. Vincent Tsang, Professor Stephen Tsui, Dr. Steven Loo)\n3. Han-Peng Assisted Reproductive Technology Limited— (Dr. Ming Peng Zhao)\n4. LaSense Technology Limited— (Professor Wei Ren, Dr. Ke Xu, Miss Sigrid Chan)\n5. LeapFlash Technology Limited— (Dr. Torin Fung)\n\nLet’s watch the video and get to know more about their strength! \n----------------------------------\nRegister now➡️ https://bit.ly/3E7a4jd \nPlease stay tuned to CUHK E-Day Website for more event information：http://www.alumni.cuhk.edu.hk/cuhkeday \n\n#CUHKEntrepreneurDay2021 #CUHKEDay2021 #Entrepreneurship #Innovation #SharingforGood \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-08-27T07:50:17Z',
  'Duration': 65,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '598',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大創業日2021—創業創新‧共享共贏 CUHK Entrepreneur Day 2021—Entrepreneurship‧Innovation‧Sharing for Good',
  'Description': '第七屆「中大創業日」將於9月24至25日隆重舉行！\n\n\n本年活動特別以「創業創新．共享共贏」為主題，除了有香港貿易發展局及中大創業者聯盟的鼎力支持外，更有幸邀得香港科學園、數碼港、阿里巴巴創業者基金成為合作夥伴，促進大學與校外創業相關機構多方面的交流，讓中大創業人與校友投資者互動共贏。 \n\n\n\n活動以線上與線下的混合模式舉行，方便中大人親身出席或於網上參與。連串精彩節目包括：\n🟠✨全新✨創業項目互動展示區 (實體)\n🟠100+初創項目展覽 (網上)\n🟠中大創業大賽決賽\n🟠多場主題講座\n🟠中大創業者聯盟Happy Hour X 創業大師班\n\n🟠創業小型工作坊\n\n立即報名➡️ https://bit.ly/3E7a4jd \n更多精彩活動資訊，請密切留意「中大創業日」網站：http://www.alumni.cuhk.edu.hk/cuhkeday\n#中大創業日2021 #創業創新 #共享共贏\n\nThe 7th CUHK Entrepreneur Day 2021 (E-Day) will be held on September 24 and 25!\n\nThemed as "Entrepreneurship‧Innovation‧Sharing for Good", E-Day this year aims to encourage CUHK members to join hands and promote entrepreneurship and innovation for good in Hong Kong. This event has not only received support from the Hong Kong Trade Development Council (HKTDC) and CUHK Entrepreneurs Alliance, but we have also invited Hong Kong Science & Technology Parks Corporation (HKSTP), Cyberport and the Alibaba Entrepreneurs Fund to become our partners.    \n\nThis event will go hybrid (mixture of offline and online programmes) to facilitate all CUHK members. Programmes include:\n🟠✨New✨Interactive Display Zone \n🟠Online Exhibition of 100+ Start-up Projects \n🟠CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition Final\n🟠A series of Thematic Talks \n🟠CUEA Happy Hour X Entrepreneurial Masterclass\n🟠Entrepreneurial Workshops\n\nRegister now➡️ https://bit.ly/3E7a4jd \n\nPlease stay tuned to CUHK E-Day Website for more event information：http://www.alumni.cuhk.edu.hk/cuhkeday\n\n#CUHKEntrepreneurDay2021 #Entrepreneurship #Innovation #SharingforGood\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-08-19T03:25:05Z',
  'Duration': 39,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1470',
  'Likes': '55',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（《中大2025》）（普通話版）CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 ('CUHK 2025') (Mandarin version)",
  'Description': "現在，中大是時候展開新的策略計劃。中大策略計劃2021–2025（《中大2025》）以「力臻卓越，任重志遠」為目標，勾畫出我們未來五年的目標和方向，重點有兩個——固本培元、變革求進。\n\n《中大2025》是廣泛諮詢大學成員後得到的成果，計劃涵蓋了大學運作的七大範疇——教育、學生體驗、研究與創新、人才招攬及發展、全球視野、凝聚校友及大學拓展、社會責任及可持續發展。\n\n《中大2025》確立我們未來的方向，努力建立一個擁抱多元的社群，同心協力貢獻香港以至全球。\n\n英文版: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ\n廣東話版: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI\n\nThe time has come for a new strategic plan for CUHK. With the theme of ‘Excellence with Purpose and Responsibility’, CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 (‘CUHK 2025’) maps out our aims and direction over the next five years, with a dual focus on cultivating the fundamentals and leading positive change.\n\n‘CUHK 2025’ is the result of extensive consultations with members of the University. Seven key areas are addressed in it, including education, student experience, research and innovation, talent attraction and development, global engagement, alumni engagement and institutional advancement, and social responsibility and sustainable development.\n\nWith 'CUHK 2025', we aim to chart our future direction and build a community that embraces diversity and stays united in its effort to enrich the lives of the people of Hong Kong and beyond.\n\nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ\nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-08-04T02:48:57Z',
  'Duration': 311,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '623',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（《中大2025》）（廣東話版）CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 ('CUHK 2025') (Cantonese version)",
  'Description': "現在，中大是時候展開新的策略計劃。中大策略計劃2021–2025（《中大2025》）以「力臻卓越，任重志遠」為目標，勾畫出我們未來五年的目標和方向，重點有兩個——固本培元、變革求進。\n\n《中大2025》是廣泛諮詢大學成員後得到的成果，計劃涵蓋了大學運作的七大範疇——教育、學生體驗、研究與創新、人才招攬及發展、全球視野、凝聚校友及大學拓展、社會責任及可持續發展。\n\n《中大2025》確立我們未來的方向，努力建立一個擁抱多元的社群，同心協力貢獻香港以至全球。\n\n英文版: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ\n普通話版: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns\n\nThe time has come for a new strategic plan for CUHK. With the theme of ‘Excellence with Purpose and Responsibility’, CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 (‘CUHK 2025’) maps out our aims and direction over the next five years, with a dual focus on cultivating the fundamentals and leading positive change.\n\n‘CUHK 2025’ is the result of extensive consultations with members of the University. Seven key areas are addressed in it, including education, student experience, research and innovation, talent attraction and development, global engagement, alumni engagement and institutional advancement, and social responsibility and sustainable development.\n\nWith 'CUHK 2025', we aim to chart our future direction and build a community that embraces diversity and stays united in its effort to enrich the lives of the people of Hong Kong and beyond.\n\nEnglish version: https://youtu.be/pCYiqV3FfGQ\nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-08-04T02:39:16Z',
  'Duration': 296,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1769',
  'Likes': '17',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "CUHK Strategic Plan 2021-2025 ('CUHK 2025') (English version) 香港中文大學策略計劃 2021–2025（《中大2025》）（英語版）",
  'Description': "The time has come for a new strategic plan for CUHK. With the theme of ‘Excellence with Purpose and Responsibility’, CUHK Strategic Plan 2021–2025 (‘CUHK 2025’) maps out our aims and direction over the next five years, with a dual focus on cultivating the fundamentals and leading positive change. \n\n‘CUHK 2025’ is the result of extensive consultations with members of the University. Seven key areas are addressed in it, including education, student experience, research and innovation, talent attraction and development, global engagement, alumni engagement and institutional advancement, and social responsibility and sustainable development.\n\nWith 'CUHK 2025', we aim to chart our future direction and build a community that embraces diversity and stays united in its effort to enrich the lives of the people of Hong Kong and beyond.\n\nCantonese version: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI\nMandarin version: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns\n\n現在，中大是時候展開新的策略計劃。中大策略計劃2021–2025（《中大2025》）以「力臻卓越，任重志遠」為目標，勾畫出我們未來五年的目標和方向，重點有兩個——固本培元、變革求進。\n\n《中大2025》是廣泛諮詢大學成員後得到的成果，計劃涵蓋了大學運作的七大範疇——教育、學生體驗、研究與創新、人才招攬及發展、全球視野、凝聚校友及大學拓展、社會責任及可持續發展。\n\n《中大2025》確立我們未來的方向，努力建立一個擁抱多元的社群，同心協力貢獻香港以至全球。\n\n廣東話版: https://youtu.be/edTLeZNFwkI\n普通話版: https://youtu.be/PtF1_MhYtns\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-08-04T02:30:29Z',
  'Duration': 315,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '831',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中秋．讓愛傳出去 Let Love Spread at Moon Festival',
  'Description': '一年一度的中秋佳節，在疫情之下除了與親友一同慶祝外，也不忘為一班獨居長者送上關懷，讓愛走動。現在只要購買一盒「中大愛心月餅」與家人一同分享，就會有一個月餅送到獨居長者手上，讓愛長存。\n\n「中大愛心月餅」每盒有四個低糖雙黃白蓮蓉月餅。中大為支持社會企業，特別委託明愛天糧製作中大月餅，明愛天糧透過經營飽點烘培業務，為精神病康復者及殘疾人士創造就業機會，協助他們融入社區生活。每售出一盒，中大就會送上一個「中大愛心月餅」給沙田、大埔獨居長者，由NGO合作夥伴送至長者家門，減少人群接觸。長者安坐家中收到月餅，月餅收益將撥捐中大博群計劃。\n\n「中大愛心月餅」為一盒四個低糖雙黃白蓮蓉月餅，每盒糖份只有10.8克，售價HK$300 。\n\n購買月餅兼可傳播愛心，一舉兩得！今年亦會安排速遞送貨服務，數量有限，請即訂購！\n\n查詢: 3943-3945 / souvenirs@cuhk.edu.hk\n訂購表格: http://mooncake.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/orderform\n詳情: https://mooncake.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/\n截止日期: 20 August 2021\n\nAs well as spending the festive season with the family in the Moon Festival, let’s extend our love to those elderly people living alone. When you buy a box of “CUHK Mooncake”, a mooncake will be delivered to the solitary elderly, letting love spread to people in need.\n\nEach box of CUHK Mooncake includes four low sugar white lotus seed paste mooncakes with double egg yolks. The University has joined hands with Caritas La Vie, a local social enterprise which provides job opportunities for the mentally disabled through its baking workshop, to produce “CUHK Mooncake”. For each box sold, CUHK together with our NGO partners will deliver a free mooncake to the elderly living alone in Shatin and Tai Po. Proceeds from the mooncake sales will be donated to support CUHK I·CARE. \n\nEach box is sold at HK$300 and includes four low sugar white lotus seed paste mooncakes with double egg yolks. Each contains 10.8 grams of sugar only.\n\nDelivery service is available this year. Stocks are limited, place your order now!\n\nEnquiry : 3943-3945 / souvenirs@cuhk.edu.hk\nOrdering form: http://mooncake.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/orderform\nDetails : https://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake\nDeadline : 20 August 2021\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-08-02T04:28:27Z',
  'Duration': 49,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1880',
  'Likes': '87',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '我們都是中大人II - 第五集：初心 We are CUHKers II – Fifth Episode: Staying True',
  'Description': '#我們都是中大人II  \n不少學生初進中大山城時，充滿抱負和理想，但畢業後如何保持初心？導演 #黃修平 （藝術系）謹記了教授當年的一句話：「陽光底下無新事，許多存在影子中。」即使影子是依附在物件上，但會令物件更立體，當藝術家便需要探討這層面。\n\n黃的好拍檔、編劇 #陳心遙 （人類學系）則認為，人生是累積而成，無論做的任何事會否開心，也是有意義的。\n\n同場加映：二人相識經過，還有黃修平的親筆畫作曝光！想知就立即睇片~\n--------------\n從預告片開始，共推出了六段影片，我們看到每位中大人透過山城連繫起來，成為同行的夥伴，一路走來，從迷茫中重塑自己，保持初心。\n\n節目重溫：\n預告片：我們都是中大人II\nhttps://bit.ly/3qIeBlO \n第一集：連繫—梅詩華（建築學院），一口設計工作室共同創辦人\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz\n第二集：同行 —梁雅媛（醫學院），實習醫生\nhttps://bit.ly/3gG3uFt\n第三集：夥伴 —陳珊珊（會計學院），Blendit 創辦人\nhttps://bit.ly/3vG9J17\n第四集：重塑 —王森（藝術系），陶瓷藝術家、金繼師 \nhttps://bit.ly/2Ubsht4 \n\n＃陳心遙 ＃主演\n＃黃浩然 ＃監製編劇導演\n＃黃修平 ＃監製編劇主演\n\nMany students are full of ambitions and dreams when they first enter CUHK, but how can they stay true to them after graduation? Director Adam Wong (Fine Arts) remembered a quote from his professor, "There is nothing new under the sun, but much is underlain in shadows." Every object has a shadow which makes it  more dimensional. Being an artist involves exploring this aspect.\n\nAdam Wong’s partner, writer Saville Chan (Anthropology) believes that life is built on experience. Whether things make you happy or not, they are all meaningful.\n\nScreening with: how did these two guys meet each other and become good friends? And Adam Wong’s drawing is also exposed! Let’s watch the video now!\n--------------\nStarting from the trailer, a total of six videos are produced. We have seen that CUHKers are connected in this campus and become companions. Along the way, they reinvent themselves from confusion and continue staying true.\n\nRevisiting previous stories:\nTrailer — We are CUHKers II  \nhttps://bit.ly/3y5TLz9\nFirst episode: Connection — Sarah Mui (Architecture), Co-founder of One Bite Design Studio\u3000\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz\nSecond episode: Companion — Rachel Leung (Medicine Programme Global Physician-Leadership Stream), Houseman\nhttps://bit.ly/3gG3uFt\nThird episode: Friendship — Ashley Chan (Accounting), Founder of Blendit\nhttps://bit.ly/3vG9J17\nFourth episode: Reinvention — Enders Wong (Fine Arts), Ceramics and Kintsugi Artist\nhttps://bit.ly/2Ubsht4 \n\n#SavilleChan #Starring\n#AmosWhy #ProducerWriterDirector\n#AdamWong #ProducerWriterStarring \n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-07-23T04:01:37Z',
  'Duration': 301,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '10646',
  'Likes': '26',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '未來工程領袖的完美選擇 Perfect Choice for Future Engineering Leaders',
  'Description': '中文大學電子工程學系於1970年由諾貝爾物理學獎得主「光纖之父」高錕教授創立。電子工程學課程內容廣泛，與時並進。主要課題包括：納米技術、電子材料、集成電路、光纖通信、無線通信、多媒體及信號處理、和人工智能等。學系致力於培育學生成為工程學科的世界領袖，啟發他們去追求知識和推動電子工程學的發展，以及應用新技術來為人類謀幸福。\n\nThe Department of Electronic Engineering was established in 1970 by Prof. Charles Kao, ‘Father of Fibre Optics’ and a Nobel Laureate in Physics. The Department features a dynamic and adaptive curriculum that covers a wide range of topics, including nanotechnology, electronic materials and devices, integrated circuits, opto-electronics and optical communication, telecommunication and wireless systems, multimedia and signal processing, and artificial intelligence. The Department aims at cultivating students to become global leaders in the engineering discipline and inspiring them to pursue knowledge, to advance the state-of-the-art in EE and to apply the new technologies for the betterment of mankind.\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-07-20T10:28:06Z',
  'Duration': 321,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '869',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '演藝追夢人—章彥琦 Dream Chaser—Ashley Cheung',
  'Description': '今年的 #DSE 快放榜了！同學在考慮更改JUPAS選項時，會作甚麼考慮？大學時讀哪一科，很影響將來的工作嗎？\n\n就讀 #中大哲學系 的導演 #章彥琦 Ashley，反而受父親章國明導演影響，自小接觸電影，並對這個行業感興趣，直至中學時期遇見了一個人，便真正打開通往光影世界的大門。\n\nAshley除了擔任導演，更是一名編劇，在撰寫劇本的時候，跟很多「哲學人」一樣，會不停推翻自己，像是一段無盡的旅途，不過她最享受事前的資料搜集，每次也可以接觸全新的事物。在Ashley眼中，何謂好電影？她自己又想拍怎樣的電影？答案就在以下影片找到！\n\n#演藝追夢人 #香港中文大學 #中大\n\nThe HKDSE examination results will be released soon! What would you consider when modifying programme choices of JUPAS? Will the subject you choose in university affect your future career very much? \n\nDirector Cheung Yin Kei Ashley studied #CUHK_Philosophy but influenced by her father director Alex Cheung. She has been immersed in films and interested in this sector since she was a kid. It was not until she met someone whilst studying in secondary school that the door was really opened towards the world of films.\n\nIn addition to acting as a director, Ashley is also a screenwriter. When writing a script, she will be like many "philosophers" and overturn herself constantly, like an endless journey. Nevertheless, she always enjoys doing research because she can learn something new. In Ashley’s eyes, what is a "good movie"? What kind of movie does she like to make? Let’s find the answer in the following video!\n\n#dreamchaser #thechineseuniversityofhongkong #cuhk\n\n聯絡我們 Connect with Us: https://linktr.ee/CUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-07-17T02:00:44Z',
  'Duration': 255,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '395',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '帶着獎學金追夢 — 蕭垚靚 Sail to the Dream with a Scholarship — Rice Siu',
  'Description': "有甚麼比贏獎學金更具挑戰性？是贏得雙獎學金呀！\n\n\n中大生物化學系四年級學生蕭垚靚（音：遙靜）入讀中大之後，對科學研究達到「上癮」的程度，一放學就會衝進實驗室。憑着對生物化學的熱情，垚靚榮獲「2020/21滙豐海外獎學金」，並以訪問學生的身分到加州大學柏克萊分校學習了一年。在柏克萊期間，她再下一城，獲得「利黃瑤璧千禧獎學金」，將於今年十月負笈英國牛津大學，修讀神經科學博士學位課程。🧠🧪🔬👩\u200d🔬\n\n\n垚靚有兩個夢想，一個是研究，另一個是教育。是甚麼啟發她追夢？她有甚麼學習心得？想知道就不要錯過她的訪問啦！\n\n\n蕭垚靚訪問全文：https://bit.ly/3xCz2Tu\n\n\n#獎學金 #追夢 #滙豐海外獎學金 #利黃瑤璧千禧獎學金 #中大生物化學 #牛津大學 #加州大學柏克萊分校\n\n\n\nWhat is more challenging than winning a scholarship? It is winning two.\n\n\nAfter studying at CUHK, the Biochemistry Year 4 student Rice Siu has become crazy about science. The laboratory is where she goes after school. With her passion for biochemistry, she was awarded the 2020/21 HSBC Overseas Scholarship and got the chance to study at the University of California, Berkeley as a visiting student. During her study there, she won another scholarship which is the Esther Yewpick Lee Millennium Scholarship and will continue her study in a PhD programme in neuroscience at the University of Oxford.🧠🧪🔬👩\u200d🔬\n\n\nRice has two dreams, a researching dream and a teaching dream. What inspired her? What learning tips does she have? Don't miss her interview!\n\n\n#sailtothedream #scholarship #HSBCOverseasScholarship #EstherYewpickLeeMillenniumScholarship #CUHKbiochemistry #UniversityOfOxford #UCBerkeley\n\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b \nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b \nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial CUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-06-21T04:10:14Z',
  'Duration': 192,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '773',
  'Likes': '16',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '回望．回饋．中大 Looking Back, Giving Back, CUHK',
  'Description': '四位環球校友諮詢委員會中的校友藉着回望過去，分享他們在中大時的點滴。雖然畢業多年，但仍心繫中大。究竟他們如何運用自己的經驗，於連繫、人才、形象、創新範疇中回饋中大？請觀看短片，了解四位校友的初心。\n\n\n這四位校友與其他八位身處海外的校友，組成新一屆「環球校友諮詢委員會」。他們連成一線，為大學的未來發展出一分力。成員名單：https://bit.ly/3wBNevN\n\n\nThe four alumni from Global Alumni Advisory Board (GAAB) looked back to share their fond experiences at CUHK with us. Although they have been graduates for many years, they still care about CUHK. How do they make use of their experiences to give back to their alma mater in the areas of “Connection”, “Talent”, “Reputation” and “Innovation”? Let’s watch the video and learn more about how they stay true to themselves.\n\n\nThese four alumni has partnered up with eight other alumni residing overseas, forming the new term of GAAB, to contribute to the future development of the University. Member list: https://bit.ly/3cS5BER\n\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-06-19T02:00:02Z',
  'Duration': 127,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '337',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '我們都是中大人II - 第四集：重塑 We are CUHKers II - Fourth Episode: Reinvention',
  'Description': '王森（藝術系）除了是一位陶瓷藝術家，更是一名金繼師。相信大家也很好奇，甚麼是金繼？導演黃修平也一樣，所以他在《重塑》短片中向王森請教，原來這門手藝是以金去延續事物的生命，過程需時七七四十九天。\n\n在學習金繼的過程中，王森領略到即使發生了不好的事，只要能夠借助它，並改變它，便足以扭轉局面，「原來沒有分好壞，時間會令一切都變得美好。」立即睇片，細味更多金繼精神🏺\n#我們都是中大人II #重塑 #王森\n--------------\n節目預告：\n第五集：初心 —黃修平（藝術系），電影導演、編劇│陳心遙（人類學系），電影監製、編劇、作詞人\n--------------\n節目重溫：\n第一集：連繫—梅詩華（建築學院），一口設計工作室共同創辦人\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz\n第二集：同行 —梁雅媛（醫學院），實習醫生\nhttps://bit.ly/3gG3uFt \n第三集：夥伴 —陳珊珊（會計學院），Blendit 創辦人\nhttps://bit.ly/3vG9J17 \n\n＃陳心遙 ＃主演\n＃黃浩然 ＃監製編劇導演\n＃黃修平 ＃監製編劇主演\n\nEnders Wong (Fine Arts) is not only a ceramics artist. He also delves into Kintsugi. You are probably very curious about what Kintsugi is. Director Adam Wong who consulted Enders in the “Reinvention” video certainly feels that way. Kintsugi is  mending with gold, thereby extending the lives of broken objects but it takes 49 days to finish the whole process.\n\nDuring his time learning Kintsugi, Enders came to understand that even if a flawed thing exists, you should embrace and transform the imperfection. Then you may turn the tide. “There is no flawed or perfect. Time makes everything beautiful, moment by moment,” Watch the video and savour the spirit of Kintsugi🏺\n--------------\nComing up next:\nFifth episode: Staying true — Adam Wong (Fine Arts), Director, Writer│Saville Chan (Anthropology), Producer, Writer, Lyricist\n--------------\nRevisiting previous stories:\nFirst episode: Connection — Sarah Mui (Architecture), Co-founder of One Bite Design Studio\u3000\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz\nSecond episode: Companion — Rachel Leung (Medicine Programme Global Physician-Leadership Stream), Houseman \nhttps://bit.ly/3gG3uFt \nThird episode: Friendship — Ashley Chan (Accounting), Founder of Blendit\nhttps://bit.ly/3vG9J17 \n#SavilleChan #Starring\n#AmosWhy #ProducerWriterDirector\n#AdamWong #ProducerWriterStarring\n--------------\nComing up next:\nFifth episode: Staying true — Adam Wong (Fine Arts), Director, Writer│Saville Chan (Anthropology), Producer, Writer, Lyricist\n--------------\nRevisiting previous stories:\nFirst episode: Connection — Sarah Mui (Architecture), Co-founder of One Bite Design Studio\u3000\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz\nSecond episode: Companion — Rachel Leung (Medicine Programme Global Physician-Leadership Stream), Houseman \nhttps://bit.ly/3gG3uFt \nThird episode: Friendship — Ashley Chan (Accounting), Founder of Blendit\nhttps://bit.ly/3vG9J17 \n\n#SavilleChan #Starring\n#AmosWhy #ProducerWriterDirector\n#AdamWong #ProducerWriterStarring \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-06-18T08:50:54Z',
  'Duration': 207,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3789',
  'Likes': '18',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '我們都是中大人II - 第三集：夥伴 We are CUHKers II - Third Episode: Friendship',
  'Description': '很多人經常說學生時期交的朋友最真心，對於陳珊珊（會計學院）而言，這確實是毫無懸念。陳珊珊在中大認識到一班志趣相投的好友，讓她獲得滿滿的支持和鼓勵，堅定地走上創業之路。「有甚麼驅使我們幫助她？」「係愛呀！」\n\n年紀輕輕的陳珊珊開設了自家麵包店Blendit，導演黃修平在《夥伴》短片中問道，甚麼因素令她成功開店，陳珊珊認為：「You never lose, you either win or learn!（你從不會失敗，你只會贏或是有所學習！）」想知更多她的創業心得，立即睇片！\n#我們都是中大人II #夥伴 #陳珊珊 \n--------------\n節目預告：\n第四集：重塑 —王森（藝術系），陶瓷藝術家、金繼師\n第五集：初心 —黃修平（藝術系），電影導演、編劇│陳心遙（人類學系），電影監製、編劇、作詞人\n#陳心遙 #主演\n#黃浩然 #監製編劇導演\n#黃修平 #監製編劇主演\n--------------\n節目重溫：\n第一集：連繫—梅詩華（建築學院），一口設計工作室共同創辦人\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz\n第二集：同行 —梁雅媛（醫學院），實習醫生\nhttps://bit.ly/3gG3uFt \n\nMany people often say that friends they made in school are the most sincere. Ashley Chan (Accounting) is in no doubt about that. Ashley has met a group of like-minded friends at CUHK. She received loads of support and encouragement that set her firmly on the road of entrepreneurship. "What drives us to help her? It’s love!"\n\nAshley opened her own bakery Blendit at such a young age. Director Adam Wong asks her in the "Friendship" video what made her successful in opening the bakery. She believes, "You never lose, you either win or learn!" Watch the video and know more about her entrepreneurial experience! \n--------------\nComing up next:\nFourth episode: Reinvention — Enders Wong (Fine Arts), Ceramics and Kintsugi Artist\nFifth episode: Staying true — Adam Wong (Fine Arts), Director, Writer│Saville Chan (Anthropology), Producer, Writer, Lyricist\n--------------\nRevisiting previous stories:\nFirst episode: Connection — Sarah Mui (Architecture), Co-founder of One Bite Design Studio\u3000\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz \nSecond episode: Companion — Rachel Leung (Medicine Programme Global Physician-Leadership Stream), Houseman \nhttps://bit.ly/3gG3uFt \n\n#SavilleChan #Starring\n#AmosWhy #ProducerWriterDirector\n#AdamWong #ProducerWriterStarring\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-06-11T09:49:36Z',
  'Duration': 250,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3855',
  'Likes': '23',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '我們都是中大人II - 第二集：同行 We are CUHKers II - Second Episode: Companion',
  'Description': '作為一名醫生，最重要的是甚麼？剛當選本年度「羅德學人」的梁雅媛（醫學院）在《同行》短片接受導演黃修平訪問，她認為雖然醫生未必可以醫百病，但自己最能夠幫助病人的事，就是做一名同行者，聆聽病人和家屬的需要。\n\n梁雅媛在中大讀書時經常做義工，但一次在柬埔寨的特別經歷令佢反思，如何做才可真正幫助別人，到底發生甚麼事？想知就立即睇片！\n#我們都是中大人II #同行 #梁雅媛 \n#仲有中大名物出鏡 #切勿錯過\n--------------\n節目預告：\n第三集：夥伴 —陳珊珊（會計學院），Blendit 創辦人\n第四集：重塑 —王森（藝術系），陶瓷藝術家、金繼師\n第五集：初心 —黃修平（藝術系），電影導演、編劇│陳心遙（人類學系），電影監製、編劇、作詞人\n\n＃陳心遙 ＃主演\n＃黃浩然 ＃監製編劇導演\n＃黃修平 ＃監製編劇主演\n--------------\n節目重溫：\n第一集：連繫—梅詩華（建築學院），一口設計工作室共同創辦人\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz \n\nWhat is the most important quality of a doctor? Rachel Leung (Medicine Programme Global Physician-Leadership Stream), the newly selected Rhodes Scholar is interviewed by director Adam Wong in the "Companion" video.  Rachel believes that doctors may not be able to cure all diseases, but the best thing they can do to help patients is to be a companion and listen to the needs of patients and their families. \n\nRachel often worked as a volunteer when she was studying at CUHK. A special experience in Cambodia brought her some new perspective on how to really help people. What happened to Rachel? Let’s watch the video! \n--------------\nComing up next:\nThird episode: Friendship — Ashley Chan (Accounting), Founder of Blendit\nFourth episode: Reinvention — Enders Wong (Fine Arts), Ceramics and Kintsugi Artist\nFifth episode: Staying true — Adam Wong (Fine Arts), Director, Writer│Saville Chan (Anthropology), Producer, Writer, Lyricist\n--------------\nRevisiting previous stories:\nFirst episode: Connection — Sarah Mui (Architecture), Co-founder of One Bite Design Studio\u3000\nhttps://bit.ly/3pl6smz \n#SavilleChan #Starring\n#AmosWhy #ProducerWriterDirector\n#AdamWong #ProducerWriterStarring \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-06-07T02:50:35Z',
  'Duration': 250,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '14065',
  'Likes': '10',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '我們都是中大人II - 第一集：連繫 We are CUHKers II - First Episode: Connection',
  'Description': '人類是群居動物，而彼此的社會連繫需要建基於棲息地之上。導演黃修平在《連繫》短片訪問了「一口設計工作室」共同創辦人梅詩華（建築學院），她深信建築不只是建造高樓大廈，還有建構人和空間的連繫。\n\n梅詩華認為雖然香港的空間比較小，但不代表沒有社區，如何保持人與社區的連繫，正是她身為建築師的工作。立即睇片，了解她的理念👩🏻💭\n--------------\n節目預告：\n第二集：同行 —梁雅媛（醫學院），實習醫生\n第三集：夥伴 —陳珊珊（會計學院），Blendit 創辦人\n第四集：重塑 —王森（藝術系），陶瓷藝術家、金繼師\n第五集：初心 —黃修平（藝術系），電影導演、編劇│陳心遙（人類學系），電影監製、編劇、作詞人\n\n#我們都是中大人II #連繫 #梅詩華\n#陳心遙 #主演\n#黃浩然 #監製編劇導演\n#黃修平 #監製編劇主演\n\nHuman beings are born social and our social connections are built on our habitats. In the “Connection” video, director Adam Wong interviewed with Sarah Mui (Architecture), Co-founder of One Bite Design Studio. Sarah reckons that architecture is not only about building skyscrapers, but also constructing the connection between people and spaces.\n\nSarah believes that although the space in Hong Kong is relatively small, it does not mean that there is no community. It is her job as an architect to maintain the connection between people and the community. Watch the video and listen to her ideas 👩🏻💭\n--------------\nComing up next:\nSecond episode: Companion — Rachel Leung (Medicine Programme Global Physician-Leadership Stream), Houseman\nThird episode: Friendship — Ashley Chan (Accounting), Founder of Blendit\nFourth episode: Reinvention — Enders Wong (Fine Arts), Ceramics and Kintsugi Artist\nFifth episode: Staying true — Adam Wong (Fine Arts), Director, Writer│Saville Chan (Anthropology), Producer, Writer, Lyricist \n\n#SavilleChan #Starring\n#AmosWhy #ProducerWriterDirector\n#AdamWong #ProducerWriterStarring\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-05-28T04:20:46Z',
  'Duration': 246,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '4701',
  'Likes': '35',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '我們都是中大人 II We are CUHKers II',
  'Description': '「中大人」，不只是一個稱呼，更是一種跨世代連結。\n大家從中大畢業後，到底如何發揮「中大人」的共同特質：連繫 、同行 、夥伴 、重塑 、初心 ，為社會盡一分力?\n--------------\n節目預告：\n第一集：連繫 —梅詩華（建築學院），一口設計工作室共同創辦人\n第二集：同行 —梁雅媛（醫學院），實習醫生\n第三集：夥伴 —陳珊珊（會計學院），Blendit 創辦人\n第四集：重塑 —王森（藝術系），陶瓷藝術家、金繼師\n第五集：初心 —黃修平（藝術系），電影導演、編劇│陳心遙（人類學系），電影監製、編劇、作詞人\n\n“CUHKers” is not only a name, but also an intergenerational connection. \nAfter graduating from CUHK, how do we express the core attributes of “CUHKers” including connection , comapnion , friendship , reinvention , and staying true ? \n--------------\nComing up next:\nFirst episode: Connection — Sarah Mui (Architecture), Co-founder of One Bite Design Studio \nSecond episode: Companion — Rachel Leung (Medicine Programme Global Physician-Leadership Stream), Houseman\nThird episode: Friendship — Ashley Chan (Accounting), Founder of Blendit\nFourth episode: Reinvention — Enders Wong (Fine Arts), Ceramics and Kintsugi Artist\nFifth episode: Staying true — Adam Wong (Fine Arts), Director, Writer│Saville Chan (Anthropology), Producer, Writer, Lyricist\n\n#我們都是中大人II #WeareCUHKersII \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-05-21T13:14:28Z',
  'Duration': 97,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2300',
  'Likes': '76',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《情動於中：生死愛慾的哲學思考》',
  'Description': '當焫焫焫焫焫焫著的時候😡🤯，你會點做？鬧人？摔東西？向朋友呻？\n\n大家知唔知道，由哲學角度去睇，憤怒本身係有意義和價值？了解情緒的價值，有助明白自己之餘，亦能明白別人憤怒的原因。\n📚📖📚📖📚📖📚📖\n由香港中文大學出版社出版的《情動於中：生死愛慾的哲學思考》一書，早前入選了「香港初創數碼廣告企業×出版宣傳支援計劃」，獲資助製作及執行一系列的數碼廣告活動。\n\n作者黃沐恩表示：「希望是以哲學角度，探討情緒在人生中的價值和意義，讓大家理解情緒同時，也學到擁抱和明白情緒的重要性。」\n點撃連結，觀看更多👉🏻https://www.facebook.com/CUHKPress \n📚📖📚📖📚📖📚📖\n由即日起至2021年5月30日，HKTVmall線上購買《情動於中：生死愛慾的哲學思考》，享8折優惠：https://bit.ly/3mKl91j\u3000\n\n #情動於中 #生死愛慾的哲學思考 #黃沐恩\n#香港中文大學出版社 #CUHKPress #語溝創作\n#AdxPub #數碼廣告企業x出版宣傳支援計劃 #創意香港 #香港互動市務商會\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-05-21T08:27:41Z',
  'Duration': 82,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '417',
  'Likes': '7',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學博群短片（2021）CUHK I·CARE Trailer (2021)',
  'Description': '博群計劃於 2011 年成立，建基於 I·CARE 發展模式，爲學生提供非形式全人教育。博群計劃以「博思明志，群育新民」為規訓，旨在鼓勵學生積極參與社會及公民服務，並促使他們發揮所長，以滿足本港、地區，以至全球的社會需要。\n\nLaunched in 2011, the I‧CARE Programme has been committed to offering informal whole-person education to students based on the I·CARE Framework.  In line with its motto “Aspiration through Reflection; Renewal through Civility”, the I·CARE Programme aims to inspire students to actively partake in social and civic services.  It also facilitates the release of students’ holistic competencies so that they will become able to enhance the wellness of people in the local, regional and global communities.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/CUHKchannel\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-05-05T02:50:41Z',
  'Duration': 592,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '778',
  'Likes': '16',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The CUHK Summer Institute (SI) 2021 香港中文大學高中生暑期課程2021',
  'Description': 'The CUHK Summer Institute (SI) is a credit-bearing summer programme designed for local and international secondary 5 students (or equivalent) to explore their study interest and to prepare for their future studies at CUHK. In this 9-day virtual programme, students will be able to take one or two credit-bearing courses taught by outstanding CUHK faculty members, and enjoy a series of enriching and enlightening activities including a undergraduate admission skills workshop, as well as various sessions and activities showcasing CUHK’s teaching and research strengths.  \n\n香港中文大學高中生暑期課程乃為期九天的學分制暑期課程，專為將於2022年報讀大學的本港、中國內地及海外高中生而設。透過修讀一系列網上即時面授課程，參加者可探索不同學科領域，了解升學興趣。本課程透過一系列學術強化活動，使參加者了解中大的教學及研究優勢，並分享升讀心儀大學的秘訣。 \n\n參加者可修讀兩科短期課程探索中大學科領域，並獲得能納入將來入讀中大本科課程之學分（最多2學分、部分課程除外）。 \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/CUHKchannel\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-05-04T07:32:20Z',
  'Duration': 101,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '484',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Message from the Vice-Chancellor and President on university social responsibility (USR) 校長的話—大學社會責任',
  'Description': '‘University social responsibility—or USR for short—is the promotion by tertiary education institutions of a set of values and principles that will help us resolve and overcome the grand challenges we face.’ Professor Rocky S Tuan, Vice-Chancellor and President of CUHK said, ‘To embrace USR, we need to empower and transcend CUHK’s core functions to take on the responsibility as well as responsiveness to pressing social issues and sustainability challenges.’\n\nHow does CUHK embrace USR? Let’s hear from our VC.  Learn more: http://www.srsdo.cuhk.edu.hk\n\n「大學社會責任（University social responsibility, 簡稱USR）\n是在高等學院內推行的價值觀和原則，幫助我們解決和克服社會挑戰。」中大校長段崇智教授說：「我們為了推動USR，在堅守中大的核心職責之餘，將推而廣之，承擔更多社會責任，應對社會問題和可持續發展面臨的挑戰。」\n\n中大如何推動USR？請各位細聽校長講解。了解更多：http://www.srsdo.cuhk.edu.hk\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b\u200b \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b\u200b \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b\u200b \nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b\u200b \nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\u200b \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial CUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b\u200b \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-04-23T09:20:13Z',
  'Duration': 8,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '546',
  'Likes': '10',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '帶著獎學金追夢—梁雅媛 Sail to the Dream with a Scholarship - Rachel Leung',
  'Description': "中大醫學院環球醫學領袖培訓專修組別2020年畢業生梁雅媛「文武雙全」，曾經入選游泳港隊，擔任中大崇基管樂團的長號手，現在成為2021年度香港羅德學者！亦是中大歷來第15位羅德學者！\n\n羅德學士獎學金是全球競爭最激烈的獎學金之一，雅媛除了學業表現出眾，加上有一顆樂於助人的心而奪獎。她將於今年9 月前往英國牛津大學修讀關於公共衛生的碩士課程，希望學成歸來後繼續當醫生，造福病人。\n\n立即點撃影片，看看雅媛分享在中大善衡書院的難忘回憶，還有參與義工服務帶來的啟發。\n梁雅媛訪問全文：https://bit.ly/3vgkzLP \n\nRachel Leung, a 2020 graduate of the MBChB programme Global Physician-Leadership Stream at CU Medicine, was an outstanding student with an all-round performance. She joined the swimming team of the HKSAR delegation and was a trombonist with the Chung Chi Wind Orchestra, CUHK. She has now been selected as Rhodes Scholars for Hong Kong 2021! She is also the fifteenth Rhodes Scholar from CUHK!\n\nThe Rhodes Scholarship is one of the most competitive scholarships in the world. Along with her stellar academic achievements, Rachel is committed to serving the community. These criteria are essential for her to be awarded this prestigious scholarship. She will study a master programme in Public Health at Oxford University in coming fall. She also wishes to continue to be a doctor after graduation and benefit patients.\n\nView the video to see Rachel's account of her memorable college life in S.H. Ho College and inspiration from her voluntary service\nFull article of Rachel's interview: https://bit.ly/3elERwu \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b \nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b \nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial CUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT\u200b",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-04-22T09:06:07Z',
  'Duration': 133,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '568',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學賽馬會老年學研究所「賽馬會安寧頌」計劃',
  'Description': '資深演員周驄為甚麼會在中大校園出現？原來他並非在拍劇，而是為香港中文大學賽馬會老年學研究所推行的「賽馬會安寧頌」計劃接受訪問。\n\n現年89歲的周驄近年為照顧患病太太而淡出幕前，他慶幸太太及時講出最後心願，讓家人能為她完成。他亦坦言：「我拍戲拍了60年，好像已死過好多次，死亡是最公平的，無論你是富或貧，人人都要面對，你不去說死亡，不等於它不會降臨。」生老病死，是人生必經階段，如何增添生命的質素和意義，則是我們的權利。😌\n\n根據香港政府統計處數據，預計人口將持續老化，其中65歲及以上長者的比例，推算將由2016年的17%，增加至2036年的31%，再進一步上升至2066年的37%*。面對人口老化問題，制訂長者友善政策及配套服務變得甚為迫切。「賽馬會安寧頌」計劃旨在協助改善社區晚期護理服務質素，以及為相關服務的專業人員提供培訓，並舉辦公眾教育活動。立即點擊以下影片🎥 ，了解計劃詳情👵🏻🧓🏻\n\n香港中文大學賽馬會老年學研究所: https://www.ioa.cuhk.edu.hk/zh-tw/home \u3000\u3000\n*資料來源：https://bit.ly/3mrqsCt\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\u200b \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/\u200b \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\u200b \nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\u200b \nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial CUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\u200b \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-04-08T04:44:24Z',
  'Duration': 368,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '824',
  'Likes': '13',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK VIRTUAL International Summer School (ISS) 2021 中大網上國際暑期課程2021',
  'Description': 'A 5-week virtual summer programme designed to academically challenge and culturally stimulate international and local students. 14 courses from 4 academic streams and Chinese language courses are offered, as well as a series of immersive virtual extra-curricular activities. Tuition is waived for CUHK and exchange students.\u202fDetails and application at www.summer.cuhk.edu.hk. \n\n2021年度的中大國際暑期課程將於網上舉行，為期五周，讓來自中大及世界各地的大學生一同學習並進行文化文流。課程包含四個學術範疇共14項科目、中國語文課程，以及一系列網上課外活動。中大本科生及交換生無需繳付額外學費。 \n\n查詢更多資訊及報名：www.summer.cuhk.edu.hk \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La \nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews \nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial CUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-03-29T04:57:42Z',
  'Duration': 4,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '334',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '帶著獎學金追夢 ⸺ 何博菁 Sail to the Dream with a Scholarship ⸺ Jane Ho',
  'Description': '帶著獎學金追夢 ⸺ 何博菁\n你有夢想嗎? 有盡力令夢想成真嗎?\n教育學院畢業的何博菁說:「雖然知識改變命運這種說法很老套，但覺得自己就是這樣的例子。」由於家境不富裕，令她體會到要努力上進，善用僅有的資源，以知識豐富自己。畢業後擔任了四年英語教師，在職期間亦兼修了一個教育碩士課程，可是她仍一直希望能負笈海外升讀碩士學位。最終她憑著對教育的熱誠推動下，成功考獲北山堂基金獎學金，於2019-2020期間遠赴美國著名學府史丹福大學留學攻讀國際教育政策分析課程，實現了她的留學夢! \n\n記得要看片尾的彩蛋呀！博菁會為大家透露「獎學金Tips大分享」，不容錯過！\n\nSail to the Dream with a Scholarship - Jane Ho\nDo you have dreams? Have you ever tried your best to make your dreams come true?\n\n‘Although “knowledge can change my fate” sounds a bit of a cliché, I feel like this is an example.’ said Jane who is a graduate of the Faculty of Education. She comes from a grassroots family and understands that she has to work harder and makes use of the limited resources to enrich herself with knowledge. \n\nJane received her first master degree while she was working as an English teacher for 4 years. However, what she was pursuing was nothing but the dream of studying abroad. With the support of Bei Shan Tang Foundation Scholarship, she turned her passion into motivation, sailed to the dream at the Stanford University in 2019-20, and finally received a Master of Arts in International Education Policy Analysis.\n\nRemember to watch till the end of this video! Jane will share some useful tips for applying for a scholarship! Don’t miss it!\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 Please watch more videos from \nCUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La \nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews \nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial CUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-03-26T08:27:51Z',
  'Duration': 135,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '422',
  'Likes': 0,
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Diversity and Inclusion Pledging Ceremony 多元共融宣誓儀式',
  'Description': 'To increase understanding and heighten the awareness of the University community towards diversity and inclusion and to exhibit the University’s commitment in building a diverse and inclusive campus, CUHK held the Diversity and Inclusion Pledging Ceremony on campus on 4 March.\n\n為加強大學社群對多元共融的理解和認識，並展示大學對推動多元共融文化的決心，中大於3月4日在校園舉辦多元共融宣誓儀式。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-03-18T07:00:10Z',
  'Duration': 211,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '375',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '看牛展 迎新春 View Ox-related Artworks for Chinese New Year’s Celebration',
  'Description': '西元2021年歲次辛丑，為十二生肖中的牛年。中大文物館為大家預備了「辛丑說牛」展覽，精選了十餘件與牛相關的文物，由今日開始一齊來看牛展迎新春！\n讓小編趁這機會祝大家牛年如意，身體健康，日日都力大如牛！\n「辛丑說牛」展覽\n展期：2021年 1月29日至5月31日\n地點：香港中文大學文物館展廳 II\n歡迎公眾人士參觀，免費入場。\n因應疫情，訪客須提前預約參觀時段。\n詳情︰http://www.artmuseum.cuhk.edu.hk/zh/visit/opening/\n\n2021 is the Year of the Ox according to Chinese zodiac. CUHK Art Museum prepares an exhibition "Celebrating the Year of the Ox" which showcases more than 10 ox-related items from its collection. Come and experience it to celebrate the Chinese New Year!\nLet us take this opportunity to wish you all the best and good health in the Year of the Ox!\n“Celebrating the Year of the Ox”\nDate: 29 January - 31 May 2021\nVenue: Gallery II, Art Museum, CUHK\nOpen to the public. Free admission\nIn view of the pandemic situation, advance booking is required for all visits to the exhibitions.\nDetails: http://www.artmuseum.cuhk.edu.hk/en/visit/opening/',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-02-10T02:00:01Z',
  'Duration': 66,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '128',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '2020年博文教學獎  2020 University Education Award',
  'Description': '教育是什麼？2020年博文教學獎得主崔佩怡博士認為，「教育不單是知識傳授，更能帶來態度和行為改變。」\n\n同樣獲得2020年博文教學獎的金國慶教授認為，使用科技能令教與學做得更好，將來的學習會是多面向的，憑藉科技，我們將能夠「終身學習」！\n\n請觀看短片，了解兩位教師的教學成就。\n\n獲頒博文教學獎及校長模範教學獎的中大優秀教師: https://bit.ly/3jpS6hQ\n\nWhat is teaching? “Teaching is not only about transmitting knowledge, but also changing attitude and transforming habit,’ said Dr. Apple Chui, winner of 2020 University Education Award. \n\nAlso getting the 2020 University Education Award, Professor Irwin King believes using technology inside our education allows us to teach and learn better, and that learning will become very multi-dimensional in the future. With the use of technology, we can “KEEP learning for Life”!\n\nCheck out the video to learn more about their achievement in teaching.\n\nCUHK teachers who have received the University Education Award and the Vice-Chancellor’s Exemplary Teaching Award for their teaching excellence: https://bit.ly/3tBLjGn\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-02-08T04:17:02Z',
  'Duration': 239,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '391',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '2020年教資會傑出教學獎 及 中大博文教學獎   2020 UGC Teaching Award & CUHK University Education Award',
  'Description': '中大的教師為了讓學生學習更自主，背後花了很多工夫，兩位獲獎中大教師黃嘉雯教授及藍澧銓教授亦然。\n\n\n恭喜醫學院黃嘉雯教授榮獲2020年教資會傑出教學獎（一般教學人員組別）及中大博文教學獎，以及學能提升研究中心藍澧銓教授，其參與的跨院校團隊「AIE-AR」榮獲2020年教資會傑出教學獎（隊伍組別）。\n\n\nTeachers of CUHK, including Prof. Carmen Wong and Prof. Paul Lam has paid huge efforts to let students have more autonomy in their learning. \n\n\nProf. Carmen Wong of the Faculty of Medicine has been awarded the 2020 UGC Teaching Award (General Faculty Members) and CUHK University Education Award. Professor Paul Lam of the Centre for Learning Enhancement And Research (CLEAR) was a member of the inter-institutional AIE-AR Team, which was named the 2020 UGC Teaching Award (Teams) recipient. Congratulations!\n\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-01-29T09:12:56Z',
  'Duration': 202,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '330',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '從小學興趣班到中大羽毛球隊長 From Primary School Interest Class to Captain of CUHK Badminton Team',
  'Description': '2020傑出學生獎（體育）得主麥子欣（Gianne）是中大三年級學生，修讀健康與體育運動科學。從小學二年級起參加興趣班打羽毛球一直到現在，她對運動的熱情未曾消減; 升讀大學後，先後擔任書院、大學的羽毛球隊隊長。她說道：「在這段運動的路上，我真的成長了不少，運動也幫助了我很多，希望也可以幫助其他人，令大家一起進步，得到滿足感和成功感。」\n\n為甚麼Gianne一直堅持打羽毛球？在密集的訓練和學習中，如何取得平衡？立即點撃睇片！\n#傑出學生獎 #羽毛球 #運動 #博文約禮中大人 \n\nGianne Mak, the awardee of 2020 CUHK Outstanding Students Awards (Sports), is in year 3 of studies in Physical Education, Exercise Science and Health. From joining an interest class in primary 2, her passion for sport has not diminished. Since entering university, she has served as the captain of the CUHK and United College badminton teams. “In the course of playing sport, I really grew up a lot. Sport also helps me a lot. I hope it can also help others and make everyone progress together to get a sense of satisfaction and success,” she said.\n\nWhy does Gianne persist in playing badminton? How can she strike a balance between training and learning? Watch the video now! \n#OutstandingStudentsAwards #Badminton #Sports #CUHKerThroughLearningandTemperancetoVirtue \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-01-28T03:35:27Z',
  'Duration': 156,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '784',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "段崇智校長回應襲擊保安事件 Prof. Rocky Tuan's Message Regarding Assault on Campus",
  'Description': '1月11日中午時份，大約8名黑衣蒙面人士在中大校園內不同方向衝向港鐵大學站A出口的中大保安崗位，向現場保安人員多次潑灑不知名白色粉末，並大肆搗亂，包括推倒鐵馬、坐椅等設施。段崇智校長就襲擊事件作出回應。\n\nOn 11 January at noon, 8 masked individuals, clad in black, raided the security counter near Exit A of the University MTR station from various directions on campus. They threw an unknown white powder repeatedly at the security guards on duty and damaged campus facilities including fences and chairs, causing panic to the people nearby. Vice-Chancellor Prof. Rocky Tuan recorded a message regarding the incident.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-01-16T13:22:13Z',
  'Duration': 170,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '13442',
  'Likes': '268',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大雲上師」CU in the CLOUD',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n在「中大雲上師」的帶領老師的支援及指導下，香港中文大學教育學院的教學實習學生設計了一系列網上課堂，免費提供予本港中小學及幼稚園學生報讀。 網上課堂涵蓋不同科目及課題，內容互動有趣，除了讓參與學生學習學科知識外，亦提升他們的學習興趣。\n詳情：https://www.fed.cuhk.edu.hk/cuinthecloud/tc/\n\nWith the support and guidance of teacher educators who co-ordinate the “CU in the CLOUD” programme, student teachers of the Faculty of Education of The Chinese University of Hong Kong have designed a series of free online lessons covering various subjects and topics for primary, secondary and kindergarten students in Hong Kong. These productive and interactive online lessons will not only provide participating schoolchildren with subject knowledge, but also enhance their learning interest.\nFor details : https://www.fed.cuhk.edu.hk/cuinthecloud/en',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2021-01-08T09:43:24Z',
  'Duration': 189,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '706',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大‧成就 2020  CUHK Achievements in 2020',
  'Description': '2020 是充滿挑戰的一年。儘管面對前所未有的困難，中大仍然於不同範疇表現出色，在國際排名、學術獎項及學生成就等取得驕人成就。逾60名教職員及逾170名學生榮獲本地及國際讚譽。\n\n歡迎觀看「中大‧成就 2020」短片。如欲了解更多詳情，請瀏覽 https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/tc/cuhk-achievements/ \n\n2020 certainly has been a challenging year. Despite the challenges, CUHK has been able to forge ahead and excel in many fronts, attaining noteworthy achievements in ranking results, scholarly awards, and student achievements.  More than 60 faculty members and 170 students achieved local and worldwide recognitions.\n\nWatch the video which highlights the achievements of CUHK in 2020. For more details, please visit https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/cuhk-achievements/\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-12-31T03:20:30Z',
  'Duration': 86,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1008',
  'Likes': '14',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '推廣精神健康  讓世界變得更美好  Improving  Mental Health Awareness in Society',
  'Description': '社會上不少人因為「精神病」這標籤而受到不同的對待。現為中大心理學博士生的「說書人」共同創辦人李昭明，希望透過「說書人」這平台，讓不同的人士都能認識精神健康，以及聆聽到有精神病經歷的人的故事。\n\n「研究顯示，親身接觸是減低歧視最有效的方法，說故事就是最能夠讓人直接認識眼前這個人。」李昭明表示， 2015年成立的「說書人」，去年在中大的協助下，轉型成為社企，爭取更多資源接觸多些本來不認識精神健康的人，突破同溫層！\n\n「精神健康並非單純個人開心與否，更加重要是整個群體的事，整個社會的事。」憑藉推廣精神健康方面的貢獻，李昭明獲得「2020年傑出學生獎 – 社會服務」。\n\n#精神健康 #親身接觸去污名 #中大心理學 #傑出學生獎 #社會服務 #博文約禮中大人\n\nSometimes people get discriminated against because they are labeled as mentally ill.  Currently a Ph.D. student of Department of Psychology, CUHK, Amanda Li cofounded StoryTaler to promote mental health and let people listen to the stories of people with mental illness.\n\n“Research shows that personal contact is the most effective way to reduce discrimination. Story-telling is the most direct way to get to know more about the person in front of us,” said Amanda. StoryTaler was set up in 2015. With funding support from CUHK, it became a social entrepreneur last year, with the aim of acquiring more resources to reach people who do not know much about mental health and break through that stratosphere.\n\n“Mental health is not just personal. It is a matter for the community. It is a matter for the whole of society,” said Amanda. \n\nIn view of her contribution to promoting mental health, Amanda received the “2020 Outstanding Students Awards – Social Service”. \n\n#mentalhealth #personalcontactreducestigma #CUHKPSY #OutstandingStudentsAwards #SocialService #CUHKerThroughLearningandTemperancetoVirtue\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-12-30T07:00:07Z',
  'Duration': 182,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '891',
  'Likes': '17',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大2021年曆 CUHK 2021 Calendar',
  'Description': '【中大2021年曆\u3000現已登場】\n2021年即將來臨，中大推出全新設計的座檯年曆。年曆以校園十二個知名景點與地標，配合十二位與中大淵源深厚的國際著名學者之名言雋語。想知道是哪些景點? 立即睇片！🎥\n\n中大2021年曆定價港幣40元正，所有收益將撥捐中大I‧CARE博群計劃。年曆即日起於中大書店有售，今年更增設速遞送貨服務🚚，數量有限，請即訂購！\n\n網上訂購表格：https://bit.ly/37dld1Y\n#中大2021年曆 #中大ICARE博群計劃 \n\n【CUHK 2021 Calendar Is Available Now】\nWith 2021 just around the corner, we are pleased to present to you the brand new CUHK 2021 Calendar. Twelve scenic CUHK landmarks and places of interest are featured in this calendar, accompanied by the quotes from twelve internationally renowned scholars who have built very strong connections with CUHK. Want to know which attractions are included? Watch the video now!🎥\n\nThe desktop calendar is sold at HK$40 and proceeds from the calendar sales will be donated to support CUHK I‧CARE Programme. The calendar is now offered at the CUHK Bookstore. CUHK also has a specially arranged delivery service this year🚚. Stocks are limited, place your order now!\n\nOnline order form: https://bit.ly/37dld1Y\n#CUHK2021Calendar #CUHKICAREProgramme\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/CUHKchannel',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-11-26T06:31:57Z',
  'Duration': 51,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '614',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'From Germany to Home Kong',
  'Description': 'Organized by Office of Student Affairs, German Festival introduces the unique and vibrant German culture through a series of activities including talk, cultural sharing and language table.  \n\nIn this video, our Year 1 student Antonia talked about the difference between Germany and Hong Kong and shared her experience in adapting to the local culture. More videos about German culture could be found on Cultural Encounters at CUHK Facebook page (@CUHKCulturalEncounters).\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/CUHKchannel',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-11-11T02:59:40Z',
  'Duration': 642,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1512',
  'Likes': '40',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '趙軍湘先生主講：「職業挑戰與樂趣：聯合國的同聲傳譯」',
  'Description': '趙軍湘先生現任聯合國日內瓦總部會議口譯員，在聯合國系統已有三十年的工作經驗。十月二十四日，趙先生應香港中文大學翻譯系的邀請，為同學、老師和口譯專業人士分享了他豐富的專業心得，並為踴躍提問的聽眾提供了中肯的建議和指導。\n\nAt the invitation of the Department of Translation, CUHK, Mr. Yunxiang Zhao, a senior staff interpreter of the United Nations Office in Geneva gave a professional talk to an audience from across the Greater China region and overseas. He shared his decades of experience working for the international organization and gave insightful advice and suggestions to members of the international audience.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-11-06T03:13:23Z',
  'Duration': 6038,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '223',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '從Dirty Team到牛津 From Dirty Team to Oxford',
  'Description': '【從Dirty Team到牛津】\n鄭世鴻醫生於今年修畢於中大內外全科醫科學士課程環球醫學領袖培訓專修組別，並獲頒本年度利黃瑤璧千禧獎學金，負笈英國牛津大學修讀臨床醫學博士課程。他隻身一人遠赴海外，修讀有關愛滋病的研究，科研之路往往看不見盡頭，也無法預測成敗得失，到底背後有甚麼原因，令他下此決定？\n\n今年年初新冠疫情爆發，鄭醫生在香港威爾斯親王醫院加入了dirty team，成為抗疫前線一員。正正因為這次經歷，令他體會到傳染病學在香港的重要性。了解更多鄭世鴻醫生的從醫之路及研究初心，立即去片！\n\n【From Dirty Team to Oxford】\nDr. Timothy Liong Tipoe is a graduate of the MBChB programme in the Global Physician-Leadership Stream of CUHK. He has been awarded the Esther Yewpick Lee Millennium Scholarship to pursue a DPhil in Clinical Medicine at the University of Oxford this year. Going to UK alone to further his study, he has chosen to focus on clinical research in HIV. Doing research is an open road where anything can come up and nothing can be predicted. Why did he make this decision?\n\nWhen the outbreak of COVID-19 started earlier this year, Dr. Tipoe joined the dirty team at the Prince of Wales Hospital and fought the virus in the frontline. With such experience, he realised that epidemiology is an important speciality in Hong Kong. To understand more about Dr. Tipoe’s inspiration to become a doctor and his commitment to medical research, watch the video now!\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/CUHKchannel',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-10-30T09:20:29Z',
  'Duration': 162,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '468',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'WE R SMART 醒目抗疫八式 - 8 Ways to Fight the Virus',
  'Description': '下星期開始，更多高年級本科課程、研究生課程及實驗室/工作室/實習課程的科目將恢復面授課堂，而中大大部分教學活動將以面授課堂及實時線上授課並行的「混合教學模式」進行。有需要出席面授課堂的同學在返回校園前，緊記以下抗疫八式，減低感染風險，保障自己和他人健康。\n\n\nStarting from next week, more higher-level undergraduate courses, postgraduate courses, as well as lab/studio/practicum-based courses, face-to-face classes or related academic activities will be resumed. A curated “hybrid” mode—a carefully planned combination of face-to-face and synchronous online academic activities—will define most teaching and learning. Students who have to return to campus for face-to-face classes/other academic activities, please remember the following 8 ways to fight the virus before returning to campus. These can minimise the risk of infection and protect our health.\n\n\n1️⃣ W: 勤洗手 Wash hands frequently\n2️⃣ E: 慎飛沫Ensure no droplets are spread\n3️⃣ R: 齊點名Register attendance in class\n4️⃣ S: 早求醫Seek early medical consultation\n5️⃣ M: 戴口罩 Mask up\n6️⃣ A: 勿飲食 (課室範圍) Avoid eating and drinking in class\n7️⃣ R: 保距離Respect social distancing\n8️⃣ T: 量體溫Take body temperature\n🎥 立即去片 View the video now👇🏻\u3000\n\n#WERSMART #醒目抗疫 #FighttheVirus\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-10-16T04:47:03Z',
  'Duration': 104,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '288',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '疫情下‧ 不停學 Keep Learning Under the Pandemic',
  'Description': '【疫情下‧ 不停學📚】\n疫症期間，有特殊教育需要的同學在網上學習💻時可能會遇到不同程度的困難，面對這突如其來的轉變，中大人的支援如何令他們更快適應新的學習模式？\n\n其實，來自中大不同部門的教職員，包括學生事務處心理健康及輔導中心的同事以及學生義工 uShiners，會經常與他們溝通，了解他們的需要，在疫情下同行❤️。\n\n讓大家在短片中了解他們如何在疫情下繼續學習。只要大家願意，你我都可以出一分力💪🏻，陪伴他們一起渡過。\n\n#網上教學 #特殊教育需要支援 #學生事務處殘疾學生支援服務 #uShineSEN服務隊 #uShiner\n\n【Keep Learning📚 Under the Pandemic】\nDuring the pandemic, students with special educational needs will likely encounter various difficulties in online learning💻. How does the support of CUHKers facilitate their adaptation to the new learning mode?\n\nIn fact, CUHKers, including colleagues from the Wellness and Counselling Centre of the Office of Student Affairs and uShiners, maintain communications with them to understand their needs and accompany them in getting through the pandemic❤️.\n\nLet’s watch their interviews and see how they keep learning under these circumstances. If we are willing to, all of us can play a part and support them💪🏻.\n\n#SENStudents #OnlineLearning #SENSupport #StudentDisabilitySupportServices #uShineSENServiceTeam #uShiner\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-10-06T03:00:54Z',
  'Duration': 184,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '437',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大文科生唔一定…… Arts Students of CUHK are not only...',
  'Description': '【🖋️📖中大文科生唔一定......】\n各位中六的同學仔剛開學，除了忙於準備應考來年的DSE，又係時候計劃JUPAS選科了！\n\n說到「文科生」，你對他們有甚麼印象？出口成文兼風度翩翩？畢業後成為語重心長的老師，還是筆耕不輟的文字工作者？我們邀請了山城中2位分別來自歷史系及哲學系的校友，由他們的職業說起，細看今時今日的「文科生」是怎樣！\n\n今年的「本科入學資訊日（Info Day）」將移師網上舉行，定於10月10日（星期六）上午9時至下午6時，大家可以從網上展覽及入學講座了解學科資訊及書院生活，將會是一次獨特體驗！立即預先登記: www.cuhk.edu.hk/infoday \n\n【🖋️📖Arts Students of CUHK are not only...】\nA new semester has just started. Form 6 students are not only busy preparing for the coming DSE exam, but also working on the selection of JUPAS programme choices.\n\nWhen we talk about Arts students, what do you think of? Wise words flowing from them? Always gentle and refined? After graduation, becoming a dedicated teacher or hard-working writer? We invited two CUHK alumni who have graduated from the History and Philosophy programmes to talk about their career paths and review the reality of being Arts students now.\n\n“Information Day for Undergraduate Admissions” will go virtual this year. It will be held from 9am – 6pm on 10 October (Saturday). Discovering all the admissions information, programme details and college life online will be a special experience. Register now at www.cuhk.edu.hk/infoday',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-09-30T09:40:58Z',
  'Duration': 135,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3797',
  'Likes': '44',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '陳金樑教授與你談多元共融 Professor Alan Chan Talks about Diversity and Inclusion',
  'Description': '「生物多元，帶來包羅萬有的環境；社會多元，則會帶來更具活力的社會！」中大常務副校長及利榮森中國文化教授陳金樑教授道出多元的重要性。\n\n陳教授認為，若我們實踐多元，便要有共融的文化，「共融其實就是開放、尊重、有耐性、願意聆聽，明白人人都能作出貢獻，對大學以至整個社會都作出貢獻。」\n\n至於多元共融與中大校訓有何關係？且聽陳教授為你道來。更多詳情: http://www.cuhk.edu.hk/dio/\n\n“Just as biodiversity will make for a more wholesome natural environment, social diversity will also contribute to a more vibrant society,” Professor Alan Chan, CUHK Provost and J. S. Lee Professor of Chinese Culture stressed the importance of diversity.\n\nProfessor Chan expressed the view that, if we embrace diversity, we need to make sure that there is inclusion. “Inclusion really means being open, being respectful, being patient, willing to listen, recognising that everybody has something to contribute to the betterment, not only of the University, but to society as a whole.” \n\nWhat do diversity and inclusion have to do with the CUHK motto? Let’s hear Professor Chan’s distinctive view. More details: http://www.cuhk.edu.hk/dio/\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-09-18T02:02:21Z',
  'Duration': 201,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1235',
  'Likes': '23',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '新常態下的新學年 Welcome to the New Normal',
  'Description': '段崇智校長在這個不一樣的新學年，寄語新生們把握及善用線上線下每一個學習新知和擴闊體驗的機會，於開學日跟各位同學分享四件事，分別是疫症下的教學和校園生活 、網上學生交流計劃、可持續發展學習計劃及擁抱多元共融。\n\nProf. Rocky Tuan, CUHK Vice-Chancellor suggested on the atypical first day of the semester that new students should avail every opportunity to be exposed to and learn about new things and gain new experience, whether virtual or face-to-face.
