Prof. Tuan would like to share his thoughts on 4 relevant and timely topics with students, including Classes and Campus Life Under Pandemic, Virtual Exchange Opportunity, New Study Scheme on Sustainable Development and Embracing Diversity and Inclusion.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-09-07T01:11:09Z',
  'Duration': 697,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1887',
  'Likes': '28',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大創業大賽2020 五強爭奪冠軍殊榮 CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2020 Five Finalists Compete for Championship',
  'Description': '【中大創業大賽2020 🏆五強爭奪冠軍殊榮！】\n早前公布中大創業大賽2020成功入圍的最後五強，相信大家對他們的入圍項目非常好奇🧐 到底五名校友及其團隊的創業理念是甚麼？入圍項目有何獨特？立即去片！📹\n\n終極五強包括：\n1. 智能健有限公司—朱子勤 (2018 公共衞生)\n2. 飛天奶茶有限公司—陳柏基 (2019 物理)\n3. 股跡—嚴謹宏 (2003 訊息工程學)\n4. 轉廢為能—以廢木廢竹生產燒烤炭—何志磊 (1980 經濟)\n5. 醒呀—張焯然 (2013 工商管理)\n\n本年度中大創業大賽將於9月25日網上全程直播，更邀請了一眾星級校友評審坐陣，包括老鷹基金創始合夥人劉小鷹校友、點亮資本合夥人勞維信校友、香港英諾天使基金合夥人譚偉豪校友、香港科技園公司行政總裁黃克強校友及香港數碼港管理有限公司行政總裁任景信校友。\n\n收看比賽直播及了解中大創業日其他精彩活動：https://cuhkeday.eventxtra.com/landing\n\n【CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2020🏆 Five Finalists Compete for the Championship!】\nFive finalists in the CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2020 were announced earlier. Many of you may be very curious about their shortlisted projects 🧐 What are the business ideas of the five alumni teams? What is unique about their projects? Watch the interview now! 📹\n\nThe Five Finalists include:\n1. DeepHealth Limited—Christopher Chu (2018 Public Health)\n2. Flying Milk Tea Limited—Keith Chan (2019 Physics)\n3. Percival.ai—Kenneth Yim (2003 Information Engineering)\n4. Upcycle landscape waste and construction bamboo into charcoal—Richard Ho (1980 Economics)\n5. ShingAh—Clearence Cheung (2013 Integrated BBA)\n\nThe CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2020 will be held online on 25 September for the first time. Star alumni judges are invited, including Mr Steve Lau Siu-ying, Founder and Managing Partner of Eagles Fund; Dr Lo Wai-shun, General Partner of DL Capitals; Dr. Samson Tam, JP, Partner of Hong Kong Inno Angel Fund; Mr. Albert Wong Hak-keung, CEO of Hong Kong Science & Technology Parks Corporation and Mr Peter Yan King-shun, CEO of the Hong Kong Cyberport Management Company Limited.\n\nSee the Competition Live & Details of CUHK Entrepreneur Day: https://cuhkeday.eventxtra.com/landing\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-09-04T08:11:20Z',
  'Duration': 120,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '366',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '預告—中大創業大賽2020\u3000終極五強\u3000Official Trailer: CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2020\u3000Five Finalists',
  'Description': '［中大創業大賽2020🏆終極五強］\n中大創業大賽將於9月25日首次移師線上舉行，終極五強已經誕生。五個校友團隊抱著創業熱誠，期望在疫情下帶來突破。他們敢創，便帶來新機遇！\n\n終極五強包括：\n1. 智能健有限公司—朱子勤 (2018 公共衞生) \n2. 飛天奶茶有限公司—陳柏基 (2019 物理)\n3. 股跡—嚴謹宏 (2003 訊息工程學)\n4. 轉廢為能—以廢木廢竹生產燒烤炭—何志磊 (1980 經濟)\n5. 醒呀—張焯然 (2013 工商管理) \n\nP.S. 想了解五強隊伍的過人之處，就要留意稍後發布的訪問影片！📹\n中大創業日及比賽詳情：https://cuhkeday.eventxtra.com/landing\n\n［CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2020🏆Five Finalists］\nThe CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2020 will be held online on 25 September for the first time. The five finalists have been selected. The five alumni teams are full of entrepreneurial enthusiasm and hope to bring breakthroughs during the pandemic. They are daring to start undertakings and create new opportunities! \n\nThe Five Finalists include:\n1. DeepHealth Limited—Christopher Chu (2018 Public Health)\n2. Flying Milk Tea Limited—Keith Chan (2019 Physics)\n3. Percival.ai—Kenneth Yim (2003 Information Engineering)\n4. Upcycle landscape waste and construction bamboo into charcoal—Richard Ho (1980 Economics)\n5. ShingAh—Clearence Cheung (2013 Integrated BBA)\n\nP.S. An interview video will be released to introduce their strong points. Please stay tuned! 📹 \n\nCUHK Entrepreneur Day & Competition Details: https://cuhkeday.eventxtra.com/landing\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-09-01T02:19:35Z',
  'Duration': 30,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '165',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '新常態・新開始 New Normal. New Page',
  'Description': '新學期即將開始，中大上上下下在暑假期間馬不停蹄地為開學作好準備，並推出一系列措施，確保師生無論在家上課，或是有需要回校學習，都得到足夠支援，保持教學質素。各位中大人，新學年見！\n\n#新學期 #新常態 #新開始\n\n\nThe new term is fast approaching. This summer, CUHK staff members have been busy preparing to turn a new page. The University has rolled out a series of measures to ensure students and staff can receive adequate support to enrich the teaching and learning experience. CUHKers, see you in the new semester!\n\n#NewTerm #NewNormal #NewBeginning\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-08-28T10:04:29Z',
  'Duration': 98,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '494',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '疫情下的中秋  中大愛心月餅贈長者',
  'Description': '【疫情下的中秋🌕  中大愛心月餅贈長者】\n於疫情期間，與家人準備迎接中秋時，可有想過將「愛❤️」與有需要的獨居長者分享，令中秋佳節更有意義？\n\n每售出一盒「中大愛心月餅」，中大將會送出一個中大月餅給沙田、大埔區的獨居長者，長者可以安坐家中收到月餅，月餅收益更會撥捐中大博群計劃。\n\n購買月餅兼可傳播愛心，一舉兩得！今年增設🚚速遞送貨服務，數量有限，請即訂購！\n\n「中大愛心月餅」為一盒四個低糖雙黃白蓮蓉月餅，每盒糖份只有10.8克，售價HK$300 。\n\n📣 請即購買 : https://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake/ordering\n🛎️ 截止日期 : 4 September 2020\n\n【Choose CUHK Mooncake to Show Care at Moon Festival🌕 during the Pandemic】\nHave you thought of making your Moon Festival extra meaningful by sharing your love❤️ with the solitary elderly during the pandemic?\n\nFor each box sold, CUHK together with our NGO partners🤝 will deliver a free mooncake to the elderly living alone in Shatin and Tai Po. Proceeds from the mooncake sales will be donated to support CUHK I·CARE.\n\nCUHK has a specially arranged 🚚delivery service this year. Stocks are limited, place your order now!\n\nEach box is sold at HK$300 including four low sugar white lotus seed paste mooncakes with double egg yolks. Each box contains 10.8 grams of sugar only.\n\n📣 Order Now : https://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake/ordering\n🛎️ Deadline : 4 September 2020\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-08-14T13:18:20Z',
  'Duration': 46,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1607',
  'Likes': '25',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「跨學科全球實地體驗式學習」機會 Award-Winning Interdisciplinary Global Field Experiential Learning Opportunities',
  'Description': '由香港中文大學及英國牛津大學於2011年4月合作成立的CCOUC災害與人道救援研究所，一直通過其「少數民族健康計劃」，為香港中文大學的本科生、研究生以及校友提供跨學科全球實地體驗式學習機會。CCOUC是一所非營利研究所，致力進行與大中華和亞太地區災害與人道救援有關的研究，培訓和知識轉移。\n\nCCOUC所長陳英凝教授先後獲頒香港中文大學的博文教學獎、大學教育資助委員會的教資會傑出教學獎，以及國家教育部頒發的高等教育國家級教學成果獎，以表揚她通過這獨特的教學計劃對高等教育作出的貢獻。行政長官林鄭月娥女士於2020年7月3日正式向陳教授頒發四年一度的高等教育國家級教學成果獎獎狀。獲獎的「循證科學為本的跨學科全球實地體驗式教與學」的經驗也被收錄在CCTV發現之旅頻道《記錄東方》欄目中，該集名為《守望生命 守護健康》。\n\n有興趣參加2020-21學年CCOUC實地考察的同學和校友，請留意CCOUC網站（http://ccouc.org）上將發佈的相關消息。\n\nEstablished by the joint effort of The Chinese University of Hong Kong and the University of Oxford as a non-profit research centre to carry out research, training and community knowledge transfer in the area of disaster and medical humanitarian response in Greater China and the Asia-Pacific Region since April 2011, Collaborating Centre for Oxford University and CUHK for Disaster and Medical Humanitarian Response (CCOUC) has been offering interdisciplinary global field experiential learning opportunities via its Ethnic Minority Health Project to CUHK undergraduate and postgraduate students and alumni. \n\nIn recognition of the contribution to higher education via this unique teaching and learning programme, CCOUC Director Prof Emily Ying Yang Chan has been successively awarded the University Education Award from The Chinese University of Hong Kong, the UGC Teaching Award from University Grants Committee of Hong Kong, and the National Teaching Achievement Award (Higher Education) from the Ministry of Education of China. The quadrennial National Teaching Achievement Award was officially presented to Prof Chan by the Chief Executive Ms Carrie Lam on 3 July 2020. This award-winning "Evidence-based Interdisciplinary Global Field Experiential Teaching and Learning" experience has also been documented in a CCTV Discovery Channel documentary entitled Safeguarding Life, Protecting Health. \n\nStudents and alumni who are interested in joining CCOUC’s field trips during the coming academic year 2020-21 can pay attention to coming announcements at CCOUC’s website (http://ccouc.org).\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-08-05T06:46:17Z',
  'Duration': 901,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '255',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Business Webinar Series - What’s Going on in Oil ETFs? 「中大商業智慧」網上講座 - 原油期貨ETF跌至負值是甚麼意思？',
  'Description': 'Crude oil investors are currently witnessing extreme conditions in futures prices. On 20th April 2020, crude futures declined to a negative level for the first time in history. This webinar will brief you on the fundamentals of crude oil futures and provide an understanding on how expiration and contract roll will affect oil ETFs.\n\n2020年4月20日，原油期貨價格首次歷史性跌至負值，投資者目睹了前所未有的淒慘狀況。歐陽博士將在這場網上直播講座中握要介紹原油期貨的基本知識，並講解影響原油期貨ETF投資價值的相關因素，包括期貨合約到期日和轉倉等。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-28T09:51:44Z',
  'Duration': 2573,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '413',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Business Webinar Series - Data Visualisation Done Right「中大商業智慧」網上講座 - 如何將數據中的重要資訊有效地呈現？',
  'Description': 'With data being a critical source of competitive advantage, business analysts are now familiar with statistical, economic, and computational methods that analyze data. However, many are not trained to effectively communicate their findings with others, which is essential for decision-makers in inferring managerial insight. Data visualisation serves as a powerful means to present a story embedded in data when it is done right. However, when it is done wrong, misleading visualisation can confuse and even deceive the audience. In this era of big data, effective data visualisation has become even more important. In this live webinar, Prof. Kim will explain why data visualisation is so important with the support of various examples.\n\n善用數據能有助提升企業的競爭優勢，業務分析師通過統計，經濟和計算方法，對數據進行梳理和分析。然而，很多人由於沒有受過正規培訓，無法有效地與其他人交流從數據中挖掘出來的寶貴資訊。數據中隱藏着很多重要的訊息，經過妥善整理和分析，便可得出有用的資訊，這對決策者提升企業管理至關重要。置身大數據時代，最重要是抽絲剝繭，將數據中有用的資訊正確無誤地呈現出來，否則錯誤的資訊將對用家造成誤導和混淆。金起亨教授將在這場網上直播講座中，通過多個案例的講解，解釋如何在數據中抽取有用的資訊，並有效地呈現出來。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-28T09:33:42Z',
  'Duration': 2408,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '372',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Business Webinar Series - An Introduction to Angel Investment 「中大商業智慧」網上講座 - 簡介天使投資',
  'Description': 'A unicorn is a privately held startup valued at over US$1 billion, but all unicorns must have started out as small companies and received funding from investors during the seed stage. Such investors are called Angel Investors. Who are these risk-taking angels? How do they identify and select their investment targets? Entrepreneurship and innovation are important parts of the growth strategy of many countries, and angel investment is an essential component of the innovation ecosystem. In this webinar, Prof. Dominic Chan will introduce the basics of angel investment and share his experience as an angel investor.\n\n獨角獸（unicorn）企業是指市值逾十億美元的初創公司，發展初期它們的規模都很小，並通過吸納各方投資者的資金不斷壯大。對甘願承受高風險投資初創企業的投資者，市場稱之為「天使投資者」（Angel Investors）。天使投資者究竟是甚麼人？他們如何尋找和鎖定投資目標？時至今日，創業和創新已成為各國發展策略中的重要一環，而天使投資更是整個創新生態系統內不可或缺的組成部分。陳志邦教授將在這場講座中介紹有關天使投資的基本知識，並分享自己作為天使投資者多年來累積的心得。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-28T08:48:58Z',
  'Duration': 2433,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '208',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Business Webinar Series - Getting Famous = Successful Brand? 「中大商業智慧」網上講座 - 成名＝成功？解構品牌建設之要素',
  'Description': 'A successful brand increases the chances of customers choosing your product or service over your competitors. According to a Nielson survey, 59% of consumers prefer buying new products from brands familiar to them. Brand building is the process of managing reputation of a brand and improving customers’ perception of it in a way that builds brand awareness, equity, and loyalty. How customers perceive a brand wholly determine how they will engage with it. In this webinar, Prof. Lisa Wan will share with you why do companies need brand building; and what are some key elements of successful brand building.\n\n成功的品牌往往能擊倒競爭對手，吸引顧客選用旗下的產品或服務。根據尼爾森的調查顯示，59％的消費者更樂意選購他們熟悉品牌的新產品。品牌建設是管理品牌聲譽，提升品牌知名度、資產和忠誠度，以及加強顧客對相關品牌認知度的過程。顧客對品牌的看法決定了他們與品牌的互動。尹教授將在這場網上直播講座中，講解企業為何需要建立品牌，以及成功建立品牌的關鍵要素。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-28T08:48:15Z',
  'Duration': 1990,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '265',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '環境·心境·意境——老畫家的探尋 Hope Springs Eternal: States of Mind of the Painter',
  'Description': '「兩者一天一地，一動一靜，帶領我慢慢去找我的源頭。」著名藝術家王無邪教授介紹自己的畫作《萬里尋源圖》時說道。\n\n他在訪談中講解此作品的特點，亦分享了他的人生觀及藝術歷程，讓我們進入他的內心世界。\n\n“In sky and on earth, dynamic and still, they guide me to find my source,” said the renowned artist Prof. Wucius Wong.\n\nWhile introducing his work “Journeying Ten Thousand Miles to the Source”, he shared his philosophy of life and artistic journey. Watch Episode 8 of “HEART to HEART Talks” and feel his soul.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-17T09:01:22Z',
  'Duration': 566,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '167',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '當星級大廚遇上年青創業家 When a star chef meets a young entrepreneur',
  'Description': '一位是經驗豐富的副總廚，一位是年青的釀酒師，兩人在中大酒店及旅遊管理學院的星級廚房遇上，切磋廚藝，分享創業經驗。若你對煮食及創業都有興趣，這短片就可以一次過滿足兩個願望！\n\np.s. 近日疫情反彈，留在家中煮這道「創業佳餚」該是個不錯的選項吧？\n\n#博文約禮中大人 #創業 #廚藝 #留家煮食 \n\nOne is an experienced sous chef. One is a young distiller. They meet at the star kitchen of CUHK’s School of Hotel and Tourism Management, demonstrating culinary skills and sharing their experience of starting up a business. If you are interested in cooking and entrepreneurship, this is the video that cannot be missed!\n\np.s. There is a rebound by COVID-19 lately so why not stay home and try out this ‘entrepreneurship dish’?\n\n#CUHKerThroughLearningandTemperancetoVirtue #entrepreneurship #cooking #stayhomeandcook\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-17T04:00:01Z',
  'Duration': 198,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '100',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '最後召集：「2020年傑出學生獎」提名   Final call: nominations for the 2020 Outstanding Students Awards',
  'Description': '請注意！呢個係提名「2020年傑出學生獎」嘅最後召集！邊啲學生先可以拎到呢個獎？山城樹窿uBuddies管理團隊舊年就獲得「2019年傑出學生獎 – 社會服務」，更獲選為社會服務組別嘅「傑出之星」。\n\n相信唔少喺山城讀書嘅同學仔都有搵過山城樹窿 uBuddies 傾心事，「樹窿」每次都耐心聆聽，窩心回應。佢哋為同學排憂解困，宣傳精神健康，得獎肯定係實至名歸。佢哋嘅理念係啲咩？一齊睇睇短片，聽聽「樹窿」一班幕後英雄嘅分享喇！\n\n其實除咗社會服務，任何中大同學喺創新及發明、體育、藝術或特別貢獻呢啲範疇有傑出表現，都可以報名架！\n\n順帶溫提，有興趣為朋輩提供情緒支援同埋推廣心理健康嘅同學仔，就記住密切留意 uBuddies 嘅宣傳喇，佢哋會喺嚟緊 9 月招募新一批 uBuddies! \n\n#傑出學生獎  #接受報名  #創新及發明  #體育  #藝術  #社會服務 #特別貢獻  #博文約禮中大人\n\nAttention please! This is the final call for nominations for the 2020 Outstanding Students Awards! How outstanding should the students be in order to get the awards? The team of uBuddies received the “2019 Outstanding Students Awards – Social Service” and was elected as “Most Outstanding Stars” in the social service category.\n\nAt CUHK, it is believed that lots of students have shared their personal stories and feelings with uBuddies via their Facebook page. uBuddies listen without judgment and they respond to emotions. They provide their peers with needed relief and promote the importance of mental health. Their professional service won them the award. So what is their mission? Check out the video and get to know more about the unsung heroes! \n\nApart from social service, CUHK students with notable achievements who have made significant contributions in any of the areas of Innovation and Invention, Sports, Arts or Special Achievement can apply for the Awards. \n\nAnd a friendly reminder that those interested in providing peer counselling and promoting mental health should stay tuned for the uBuddies’ promotion. They will recruit a new batch of peer counsellors this coming September. \n\n#OutstandingStudentsAwards #ApplyNow #InnovationandInvention #Sports #Arts #SocialService #SpecialAchievement #CUHKerThroughLearningandTemperancetoVirtue\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-14T03:49:07Z',
  'Duration': 208,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '256',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '點滴在心頭——咖啡店主說品味 Liquid Gold: Bittersweet for the Coffee Shop Owner',
  'Description': '「東西好就不用説得太多，原來會慢慢遇到懂欣賞的人。」中大咖啡店Paper & Coffee的店主洪嘉偉先生（Vincent）說。\n\n鑒賞中國繪畫和咖啡有何相關？\n\nVincent和中大文物館中國書畫主任陳冠男博士品嘗兩幅不同味道的花鳥畫，他更即席想到適合兩位畫家口味的咖啡。《藝術無間》第七集帶大家品味藝術、人生。\n\n“Good products speak for themselves. They will find their way into the right hands,” said Mr. Vincent Hung, the owner of CUHK’s coffee shop “Paper & Coffee”.\n\nHow can appreciating Chinese paintings and coffee be related?\n\nVincent and Dr. Chan Kwun Nam, Phil (Associate Curator of Painting and Calligraphy, Art Museum, CUHK) savoured two bird-and-flower paintings. Let’s have a taste of the arts and get refreshed by their conversation.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-10T08:55:49Z',
  'Duration': 628,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '160',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '逆境生活態度．動 Street Workout in Adversity',
  'Description': "「街頭健身，是不斷與自己溝通，做好每個動作。」\n\n\n去年首次參加街頭健身比賽就奪得兩面金牌的中大哲學系學生黃楚恩，沒有被別人對女生的偏見影響，在安全、不影響人的情況下反覆練習挑戰自己，練成多個高難度動作。\n\n\n在中大人逆境小故事第三集中，她分享自己由柔道到街頭健身，以至征服珠穆朗瑪峯的領悟，鼓勵大家勇於挑戰自己。\n\n\n-------------------\n節目重溫：\n第一集🎤 逆境生活態度 ‧ 歌 — 中大音樂系四年級生、紀錄片《天水圍唱》製作人 陳君明\n\nhttps://youtu.be/_Wx-L_MFwVE\n\n\n第二集🎨 逆境生活態度 ‧ 畫 — 中大社會科學院全球研究課程講師、插畫家 張可欣博士\n\nhttps://youtu.be/nIutCPO7emY\n\n\n#逆境生活態度 #街頭健身 #挑戰自己 #博文約禮中大人\n\n\n\n\n'Street workout is a process of self-communication with intent to perfect every movement.' \n\n\n\nLast year, Wong Chor-yan, a CUHK Philosophy student gained two gold medals in her first street workout competition. Through perseverance and iterative practice, she can now do many elite-level moves, breaking the bias against women.\n\n\nIn the third story of CUHKers overcoming adversity, Wong told us what she has learnt from practising judo and street workout, and also from her Mount Everest challenge, to encourage all of us to keep challenging our limits.\n\n\n-------------------\nRevisiting previous stories:\nEpisode 1 🎤 Singing in Adversity - Kessay Chan, CUHK Music Year 4 student and producer of documentary Wai Sing\n\nhttps://youtu.be/_Wx-L_MFwVE\n\n\nEpisode 2 🎨 Drawing in Adversity - Dr. Yannie Cheung, Lecturer of Global Studies Programme, CUHK Faculty of Social Science, and an illustrator\n\nhttps://youtu.be/nIutCPO7emY\n\n\n#StreetWorkoutInAdversity #StreetWorkout #ChallengeYourLimits #CUHKerThroughLearningandTemperancetoVirtue\n\n\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-10T03:03:45Z',
  'Duration': 181,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '400',
  'Likes': '10',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '2020 年傑出學生獎現已接受提名  2020 Outstanding Students Awards Open for Nomination now',
  'Description': '與眾不同的藝術背後是什麼？獲得「2019年傑出學生獎 — 藝術組別」的 Tobias Fandel 認為，要創作與眾不同的藝術，靠的不是技藝，而是持續地從根本著手，探索未知，然後轉化為一個全新的藝術結構。\n\n你身邊也有中大同學在創新及發明、體育、藝術、社會服務或特別貢獻等範疇有傑出表現嗎？新一屆「傑出學生獎」現正接受提名或同學自薦，歡迎報名。\u3000\n\n#傑出學生獎  #接受報名  #藝術  #探索未知  #創新及發明 #體育 #社會服務 #特別貢獻  #博文約禮中大人 \n\nWhat it is behind the art that makes the difference? Tobias Fandel, winner of 2019 Outstanding Students Awards – Arts, believes that it is not a question of craftsmanship. It is the philosophical decision on a constant basis, the exploring of the unknown and also then to translate this into artistic structures that have not happened yet. \n\nHave you got to know any CUHK students with notable achievements who have made significant contributions in the areas of Innovation and Invention, Sports, Arts, Social Service or Special Achievement? The 2020 Outstanding Students Awards is now open for nomination or self-nomination. Apply now.\n\n#OutstandingStudentsAwards #ApplyNow #Arts #ExplorationoftheUnknown #InnovationandInvention #Sports #SocialService #SpecialAchievement #CUHKerThroughLearningandTemperancetoVirtue\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-06T09:25:10Z',
  'Duration': 96,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '282',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '藝術無間 第六集 HEART to HEART Talks Episode 6',
  'Description': '中大駐校髮型師和中大文物館碑帖書畫專家何碧琪博士穿梭到古時看俊男美女，一起欣賞繪畫與造型的層次美吧！\n\nMr. Danny Lee (hairdresser in the CUHK campus salon) and Dr. Ho Pik Ki, Peggy (RE at the CUHK Art Museum) met two handsome persons. Let’s join them to feel the beauty of paintings and "fashion icons"!\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-03T09:28:04Z',
  'Duration': 696,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '163',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《藝術無間》第三集「青花「煮」意——在職媽媽餐具經」',
  'Description': 'CNBC主播Emily和中大文物館器物專家王冠宇博士都是在職媽媽，她們近距離接觸瓷器的時候，熱切地尋找令孩子津津有味的藝術。她們有什麼發現呢？事不宜遲，一齊去片！\n\nMs. Emily Chan, anchor of CNBC, and Dr. Wang Guanyu, Samantha, Research-Assistant Curator (Antiquities) of Art Museum, CUHK, both look for inspiration from the ceramics featured in Episode 3. What do they think about the artifacts as a working mum? Let’s watch their “Heart to Heart talk”!\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-07-02T01:46:10Z',
  'Duration': 666,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '127',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《藝術無間》第五集: 「人情練達即文章—學生的溝通心得」',
  'Description': '兩位學生Quincy和Susanna跟中大文物館研究員童宇博士趣談一封晚清的珍貴信札，領略字裡行間中的人情世故。這封信除了展現清朝高材生費念慈的溝通技巧外，也反映了當時社會的文化。一起走進有趣的文字世界吧！\n\nQuincy and Susanna came to the Art Museum and read a letter from the late Qing dynasty by a top graduate called Fei Nianci. They had a chat with our postdoctoral fellow Dr. Tong Yu and found “treasures” from the letter. Let’s join them!\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-26T08:53:36Z',
  'Duration': 621,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '109',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大教曉我的事 – 專業忠誠   What I learnt from CUHK – Professionalism and loyalty',
  'Description': '「中大人的根基非常紮實，目標清晰，工作時專注，所以成效更高。」現時為羅兵咸永道香港審計部合夥人的方蘊萱，畢業至今於同一間會計師樓工作了二十多年。於最後一集「中大教曉我的事」，她會與我們分享中大人「專業忠誠」的特質。\n--------------\n節目重溫：\n第一集：多角度思考——新聞與傳播系、電台主持森美 https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH \u3000\n第二集：人文精神——商學院環球商業學系、非牟利機構Teach For Hong Kong創辦人陳君洋 https://bit.ly/3f5Aq7A \u3000\u3000\n第三集：止於至善——心理學系、香港紅十字會臨床心理學家張依勵 https://bit.ly/3dUYqu3\n第四集：心術豁達——工商管理系、香港賽馬會慈善及社區事務執行總監張亮 https://bit.ly/37M7H5l\u3000\n\n#中大教曉我的事 #中大人 #中大人的特質 #方蘊萱\u3000＃專業忠誠\n\n“The foundations of CUHKers are rock-solid. When you have a clear goal, you are more focused when you work, and you will achieve more effective results.” Now an Audit and Assurance Partner in PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC HK), Loretta Fong has been working with the same accounting firm since graduation, for over 20 years. In the last episode of “What I learnt from CUHK”, she will tell us about the attributes that CUHK graduates inherit - professionalism and loyalty.\n--------------\nRevisiting previous stories:\nFirst episode: Multi-perspective thinking - Sammy Leung (Journalism and Communication), Media worker https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH\nSecond episode: Humanism - Arnold Chan (Global Business Studies), Founder of Teach For Hong Kong https://bit.ly/3f5Aq7A\nThird episode: In Pursuit of Excellence - Eliza Cheung (Psychology), Hong Kong Red Cross Clinical Psychologist https://bit.ly/3dUYqu3\nFourth episode: Mind & Means, Open-mindedness - Cheung Leong (Integrated BBA), Executive Director, Charities and Community of The Hong Kong Jockey Club https://bit.ly/37M7H5l\n\n#WhatILearntFromCUHK #CUHKGradutes #CUHKAttributes #LorettaFong #ProfessionalismAndLoyalty \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-26T04:00:11Z',
  'Duration': 200,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '102762',
  'Likes': '37',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Nurturing engineering leaders in the Secure and Intelligent Connected World 培育在安全和智能兼備的互聯世界中之工程領導者',
  'Description': 'The Department of Information Engineering, CUHK founded in 1989, was the first and is still the only Information Engineering Department in Hong Kong. Under the leadership of Professor Sir Charles Kao, the department set up the first Internet connection from CUHK to NASA in US in 1991, paving way for the speedy Internet connection between Hong Kong and the global network. The department is also highly influential in several major research areas, including telecommunications, network security, multimedia networking and processing, big data technology and analysis, and network coding. The department is also committed to nurture engineering leaders to realize a secure and intelligent connected world.\n\n中大信息工程學系成立於1989年，是香港第一個，也是至今唯一的信息工程學系。1991年，在時任香港中文大學校長高錕教授的領導下，學系在香港建立了第一個互聯網連線，連接香港中文大學至美國國家航空航天局，為香港與全球互聯網通訊網絡鋪平了道路。此外，信息工程學系在幾個主要研究領域，包括電信、網絡安全、多媒體網絡和處理、大數據技術和分析，及網絡編碼等，都極具影響力。學系亦致力培育工程領導者，實現一個安全和智能兼備的互聯世界。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-23T09:14:10Z',
  'Duration': 221,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '279',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '逆境生活態度．畫 Drawing in Adversity',
  'Description': "疫情遲遲未退，大家的情緒可能仍然繃緊。然而，在這般困難的時期，大家有沒有想過，原來一句簡單的「How are you today?（你今天好嗎？）」，足以傳遞快樂？\n\n中大人的逆境小故事來到第二集，邀請了中大社會科學院全球研究課程講師兼插畫家張可欣博士Dr. Yannie Cheung，分享了自己無心插柳下開始畫畫，創作了一對沒有嘴巴的卡通角色，畫出一幅幅溫暖人心的作品。在疫情中，身為老師的Yannie面對教學上突如其來的轉變，她於訪問中也談及如何適應，以及她眼中的中大人有何特別之處。\n\n大家可下載Yannie的畫作，自行填色和寫下心意，家長們更可陪同孩子畫畫，一起向身邊人送上關心。立即下載：https://bit.ly/2Nk1xA0 \n\nThe pandemic is ongoing and anyone may feel stressed. Even if you just say, “How are you today?”, do you realize how much happiness you can bring during this difficult time?\n\nHere is the second episode of CUHKers' stories about overcoming adversity. We have invited Dr. Yannie Cheung, lecturer of Global Studies Programme, CUHK Faculty of Social Science, and an illustrator to tell us about how she started drawing at an unexpected time because of an accident. She created a pair of cartoon characters without a mouth which have become drawings that can bring you warmth. During the pandemic, Yannie was also facing a sudden change in teaching. She talks about how to cope with the challenges and also the uniqueness of CUHKers through her eyes.\n\nHere is Yannie’s drawing to download. You can paint and write your personal messages. Parents can also draw with kids. Let's present people with this drawing and show you care. Download: https://bit.ly/2Nk1xA0\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-22T10:38:34Z',
  'Duration': 181,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '364',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '藝術無間 第四集 HEART to HEART Talks Episode 4',
  'Description': '行山專家李維安先生和中大文物館館長姚進莊教授遊山玩水，嘗試踏入呂壽琨先生的足跡，探索他筆下的鹿頸村。\n\nMr. Li Wai On (Hike leader) and Prof. Josh Yiu (Director of Art Museum, CUHK) had a rendezvous with nature, following Lui Shou-kwan’s footsteps to explore Luk Keng Village. \n\n登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK YouTube Channel: http://www.youtube.com/cuhkchannel',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-19T09:59:19Z',
  'Duration': 630,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '345',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大教曉我的事」系列   "What I learnt from CUHK" Video Series',
  'Description': '【足本重溫：中大教曉我的事】\n中大人有何共同特質？我們請來五位畢業於不同年代、不同學系的中大人，回顧大學對他們的影響。他們現時在社會上擔任不同的崗位，中大人一直傳承着的特質如何影響他們事業的發展？現在可以五集足本重溫！\n第一集：多角度思考——新聞與傳播學院、電台主持森美 https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH \u3000\n第二集：人文精神——工商管理學院環球商業課程、非牟利機構Teach For Hong Kong創辦人陳君洋 https://bit.ly/3f5Aq7A\u3000\u3000\n第三集：止於至善——心理學系、香港紅十字會臨床心理學家張依勵 https://bit.ly/3dUYqu3\u3000\n第四集：心術豁達——工商管理學院、香港賽馬會慈善及社區事務執行總監張亮 https://bit.ly/37M7H5l\u3000\n第五集：專業忠誠——會計學院、羅兵咸永道香港審計部合夥人方蘊萱 https://bit.ly/3dHP04f\n \n#中大教曉我的事   #中大人   #中大人的特質   #足本重溫\n  \n【Revisiting “What I learnt from CUHK”】\nWhat core attributes do CUHK graduates share? We have invited five alumni from different generations who graduated from different disciplines to review how CUHK inspired them. The five are taking up different roles in society now. How do the uniquely inherited features shape their career development? You can now revisit all five episodes!  \n \nFirst episode: Multi-perspective thinking - Sammy Leung (Journalism and Communication), Media worker https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH\nSecond episode: Humanism - Arnold Chan (Global Business Studies), Founder of Teach For Hong Kong https://bit.ly/3f5Aq7A\nThird episode: In Pursuit of Excellence - Eliza Cheung (Psychology), Hong Kong Red Cross Clinical Psychologist https://bit.ly/3dUYqu3\nFourth episode: Mind & Means, Open-mindedness - Cheung Leong (Integrated BBA), Executive Director, Charities and Community of The Hong Kong Jockey Club https://bit.ly/37M7H5l\nFifth episode: Professionalism and loyalty - Loretta Fong (Professional Accountancy), Audit and Assurance Partner in PricewaterhouseCoopers (PwC HK) https://bit.ly/3dHP04f\n \n#WhatILearntFromCUHK #CUHKGradutes #CUHKAttributes #RevisitingAll\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-19T07:07:38Z',
  'Duration': 71,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '124281',
  'Likes': '49',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'A Way Out in the Midst of Challenges Posed by the Pandemic (English Subtitle) 如何在新冠的時代中絕處逢生 (英文字幕)',
  'Description': 'It has been revealed that one of the traits that COVID-19 has exhibited is “dampness”.  While Hong Kong is located on the coast of Lingnan with a hot and humid climate, we need to figure out a way to discern and cope with the symptoms triggered by the“dampness pathogen” so as to maintain good health. Let’s hear the advice from an alumna with her expertise and insights into traditional Chinese medicine.\n\nChinese subtitle : https://youtu.be/q3JdnXng_A4\n\n2019年尾出現的新型冠狀病毒所引起的肺炎疫情，有一種接近濕的特徵。可恨的是，香港處於潮濕的華南沿岸，故辨清濕邪引起的症狀，並加以預防，有助大家盡早把問題矯正過來。總之，堅持到最後便是贏家。\n\n中文字幕: https://youtu.be/q3JdnXng_A4\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV:\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\nCUHKChannel : http://www.youtube.com/CUHKchannel',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-19T04:19:23Z',
  'Duration': 1152,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '68',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '如何在新冠的時代中絕處逢生 (中文字幕) A Way Out in the Midst of Challenges Posed by the Pandemic (Chinese Subtitle)',
  'Description': '2019年尾出現的新型冠狀病毒所引起的肺炎疫情，有一種接近濕的特徵。可恨的是，香港處於潮濕的華南沿岸，故辨清濕邪引起的症狀，並加以預防，有助大家盡早把問題矯正過來。總之，堅持到最後便是贏家。\n\n英文字幕: https://youtu.be/mx31m2yxzKQ\n\nIt has been revealed that one of the traits that COVID-19 has exhibited is “dampness”.  While Hong Kong is located on the coast of Lingnan with a hot and humid climate, we need to figure out a way to discern and cope with the symptoms triggered by the“dampness pathogen” so as to maintain good health. Let’s hear the advice from an alumna with her expertise and insights into traditional Chinese medicine.\n\nEnglish subtitle: https://youtu.be/mx31m2yxzKQ\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV:\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\nCUHK Youtube: http://www.youtube.com/CUHKchannel',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-19T04:18:07Z',
  'Duration': 1152,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '142',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大教曉我的事 –心術豁達  What I learnt from CUHK – Mind & Means, Open-mindedness',
  'Description': '現職為香港賽馬會慈善及社區事務執行總監的張亮，事業生涯充滿變化及挑戰。每一次轉工都是減薪兼轉行，每一次也是從頭開始，到底所為何事？一起聽聽他的分享吧。\n--------------\n節目預告：\n第五集：專業會計學系、羅兵咸永道香港審計部合夥人方蘊萱\n--------------\n節目重溫：\n第一集：新聞與傳播系、電台主持森美 https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH\n第二集：商學院環球商業學系、非牟利機構Teach For Hong Kong 創辦人陳君洋 https://bit.ly/3f5Aq7A\n第三集：心理學系、香港紅十字會臨床心理學家張依勵 https://bit.ly/3dUYqu3\n\n#中大教曉我的事 #中大人 #中大人的特質 #張亮 #心術豁達\n\nNow the Executive Director of Charities and Community of The Hong Kong Jockey Club, Cheung Leong’s career has been full of changes and challenges. Every time he changed his job, he took a pay cut. And every time he changed his job, he ventured into a new industry and started from scratch. There must be something bigger in his mind. Here’s his answer.\n--------------\nComing up next:\nFifth episode: Loretta Fong (Accounting), Partner, PwC Hong Kong\n--------------\nRevisiting previous stories:\nFirst episode: Sammy Leung (Journalism and Communication), Media worker https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH\nSecond episode: Arnold Chan (Global Business Studies), Founder of Teach For Hong Kong https://bit.ly/3f5Aq7A\nThird episode: Eliza Cheung (Psychology), Hong Kong Red Cross Clinical Psychologist https://bit.ly/3dUYqu3\n\n#WhatILearntFromCUHK #CUHKGraduates #CUHKAttributes #CheungLeong #MindAndMeans #OpenMindedness \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-19T03:00:04Z',
  'Duration': 221,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '684',
  'Likes': '7',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '逆境生活態度．歌 Singing in Adversity',
  'Description': "無論是面對疫情，還是遇上生活上的挫折，每一個人的心情都受到影響。我們會一連三集，介紹中大人的逆境小故事，陪着大家樂觀面對。\n\n天水圍被指是「悲情城市」，從小在天水圍區長大的中大音樂系四年級生陳君明卻不這麼認為。去年開始，他以無伴奏合唱的歌聲連繫天水圍的人，於中大崇基學院「圓夢計劃」資助下製作了紀錄片《天水圍唱》，並舉行放映會，呈現社區的愛與關心。\n\n畢業在即遇上疫情，他於訪問中分享面對逆境的態度，更教大家扮鼓聲做「人聲敲擊」，希望大家一起唱，面對困難未算糟。\n\nThe pandemic or other setbacks in life can change our emotions. In the 'Adversity' video series, we will tell three CUHKers' stories about overcoming adversity. Let's stay hopeful together.\n\nSome say Tin Shui Wai is a city of sadness, but Kessay Chan, CUHK Music Year 4 student, does not agree. Since last year, he has connected the people in Tin Shui Wai through a cappella. With the support of the Dreaming Through Chung Chi Scheme, Kessay produced a documentary 'Wai Sing' and organised screenings of the documentary to show the community's love and care.\n\nGraduating in the pandemic, Kessay told us how he faces adversity. He also taught us vocal percussion, so that we can all sing together to ease the challenges.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-16T08:16:03Z',
  'Duration': 199,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '936',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '360º中大校园游 (普通话) 360º CUHK Virtual Campus Tour (Putonghua Version)',
  'Description': '透过香港中文大学360度全景图，从崭新角度欣赏山城！\n\n中大校园面积达一百三十七点三公顷，俯瞰吐露港，是全港最宽广丶最绿意盎然的校园，校内设施齐备 ，包括一流的图书馆，另有游泳池丶运动场丶网球场丶健身室等。书院制更是中大特色，在本港大学中独一无二。\n\n请登陆中大视野观看更多精彩短片:\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: \nhttps://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: \nhttps://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: \nhttps://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: \nhttps://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: \nCUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: \nhttps://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: \nhttps://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-11T07:09:49Z',
  'Duration': 208,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '764',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大教曉我的事 –止於至善  What I learnt from CUHK – In Pursuit of Excellence',
  'Description': '從事災難心理支援工作的張依勵，本科時已立志成為一名臨床心理學家，並希望能在災難地區工作。當她告訴別人自己的志向時，很多人都會潑冷水，但她並沒有放棄，憑著追求「止於至善」的決心，克服挫折與困難。她走入人群的服務精神，讓她獲選為香港十大傑出青年。\n--------------\n節目預告：\n第四集：工商管理系、香港賽馬會慈善及社區事務執行總監張亮\n第五集：專業會計學系、羅兵咸永道香港審計部合夥人方蘊萱\n--------------\n節目重溫：\n第一集：新聞與傳播系、電台主持森美 https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH\n第二集：商學院環球商業學系、非牟利機構Teach For Hong Kong 創辦人陳君洋 https://bit.ly/3f5Aq7A \n\n#中大教曉我的事  #中大人  #中大人的特質  #張依勵  #止於至善 \n\nWorking on post-disaster psychological relief now, Eliza Cheung was determined to be a clinical psychologist and work in regions prone to disasters when she was an undergraduate student. When she told people about her aspiration, many of them discouraged her. Persevering with “In Pursuit of Excellence”, she overcame challenges and difficulties to pursue her dream. She was honoured as one of the Hong Kong Ten Outstanding Young Persons in recognition of her service to the community.\n\n--------------\nComing up next:\nFourth episode: Cheung Leong (Integrated BBA), Executive Director, Charities and Community of The Hong Kong Jockey Club\nFifth episode: Loretta Fong (Accounting), Partner, PwC Hong Kong\n\n--------------\nRevisiting previous stories:\nFirst episode: Sammy Leung (Journalism and Communication), Media worker https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH\nSecond episode: Arnold Chan (Global Business Studies), Founder of Teach For Hong Kong https://bit.ly/3f5Aq7A \n\n#WhatILearntFromCUHK #CUHKGraduates #CUHKAttributes #ElizaCheung #InPursuitofExcellence  \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-11T03:16:53Z',
  'Duration': 187,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '47108',
  'Likes': '16',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '360º中大校園遊 (英文) 360º CUHK Virtual Campus Tour (English Version)',
  'Description': "You can enjoy the beautiful view of the University's campus in 360 degrees through CUHK panoramic photos! CUHK with 137.3-hectare campus overlooking Tolo Harbour is the largest and greenest in Hong Kong. It houses a range of facilities, such as world-class libraries, swimming pool, sports fields, tennis courts and gymnasiums. Of all Hong Kong universities, CUHK is the only one that offers a college experience.\n\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: \nhttps://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: \nhttps://bit.ly/3bNn8La \n\nCUHK Telegram: \nhttps://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n \nCUHK Twitter: \nhttps://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: \nCUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: \nhttps://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: \nhttps://bit.ly/2AIlflT",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-09T04:22:13Z',
  'Duration': 221,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1450',
  'Likes': '17',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《藝術無間》第二集「如切如磋，如琢如磨 — 醫生的觀察和品德」',
  'Description': '仁心仁術，醫生除了要琢磨醫術外，還要有醫德。中大醫學院院長陳家亮教授和中大文物館副館長許曉東教授在《藝術無間》看一件德行化身的文物。究竟是何方神聖？立即去片！\n\nProf. Francis Chan, Dean of the Faculty of Medicine, CUHK and Prof. Xu Xiaodong, Associate Director of Art Museum, CUHK talked about a virtuous artifact. What is it? Let’s watch Episode 2 of “HEART to HEART Talks” to find out the answer! \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-05T09:21:59Z',
  'Duration': 599,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '216',
  'Likes': '7',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大教曉我的事 – 人文精神 What I learnt from CUHK – Humanism',
  'Description': '若你問中大人有何共同特質？相信不少人都會答「人文精神」。於「神科」環球商業學畢業後加入投資銀行的陳君洋，數年後毅然放棄逾百萬年薪，創立非牟利機構 Teach For Hong Kong, 向基層學童提供課外活動及生涯規劃等，希望解決香港的教育不平等。獲選為2019年十大傑出青年，以及《福布斯》2019年度亞洲社會企業家榜的「30位30歲以下精英」的陳君洋，與我們分享他如何受到中大的人文熏陶。\n\n--------------\n節目預告：\n第三集：心理學系、香港紅十字會臨床心理學家張依勵\n第四集：工商管理系、香港賽馬會慈善及社區事務執行總監張亮\n第五集：專業會計學系、羅兵咸永道香港審計部合夥人方蘊萱\n--------------\n節目重溫：\n第一集：新聞與傳播系、電台主持森美 https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH \u3000\n\n#中大教曉我的事 #中大人 #中大人的特質 #陳君洋 #人文精神 \n\nIf you ask what attributes CUHK graduates have in common, humanism must be one of them. Arnold Chan joined an investment bank after he graduated from the prestigious Global Business Studies programme. The high-flyer quit his million-dollar job several years later and founded the NGO Teach For Hong Kong, which provides life and careers lessons and runs extracurricular activities for less privileged students in grassroots schools, with a mission to bridge Hong Kong’s educational inequality. Honoured as one of the ‘Ten Outstanding Young Person Selection 2019’ and selected as one of Forbes ‘30 Under 30’ Asian Social Entrepreneurs list 2019, Arnold will describe his alma mater’s humanistic influence on him.\n\n--------------\nComing up next:\nThird episode: Eliza Cheung (Psychology), Hong Kong Red Cross Clinical Psychologist\nFourth episode: Cheung Leong (Integrated BBA), Executive Director, Charities and Community of The Hong Kong Jockey Club\nFifth episode: Loretta Fong (Accounting), Partner, PwC Hong Kong\n\n--------------\nRevisiting previous story:\nFirst episode: Sammy Leung (Journalism and Communication), Media worker https://bit.ly/2U4SuXH\n\n#WhatILearntFromCUHK #CUHKGraduates #CUHKAttributes #ArnoldChan #Humanism #TeachForHongKong\n\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-05T07:48:48Z',
  'Duration': 224,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '54187',
  'Likes': '28',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Summer Institute 2020',
  'Description': 'In view of the latest development in the COVID-19 pandemic, the CUHK Summer Institute (SI) 2020 will become a credit-bearing online programme. It continues to provide opportunities for enthusiastic learners from secondary schools to explore different academic fields and prepare for their future studies at CUHK. The credit-bearing online courses will be conducted during 3 – 14 August 2020.\nFor details : http://www.summer.cuhk.edu.hk/si/\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-05T03:37:54Z',
  'Duration': 67,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '243',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '疫境自助 投保索賠變輕鬆 (中文字幕)',
  'Description': '鑑於新型冠狀病毒疫情來勢洶洶，每日都有不同變化，突發情況時有出現。若不幸懷疑或確診感染新冠肺炎而須強制隔離，可有額外援助？其他國家封關令已計劃的旅程受阻，會否得到賠償？如果在外地染病怎麼辦？如何令客戶能得到即時適切的協助？虛擬保險主要透過網上申請及索償，不涉及中介人，投保過程簡單快捷，牽涉保費亦較少。校友講者會以專業角度，分析傳統與虛擬保險的分別何在，助我們在「疫境」中得到更好保障。\n\n英文字幕: https://youtu.be/CEwDV0hH68U\n\nHow could Insurance help protect our interests in time of the COVID-19 pandemic? And perhaps you may have many more questions and concerns in mind: Will insurance companies compensate for the loss arising from trip delay due to the lockdown measure? What are the benefits or coverage the insured could obtain if getting infected in the locale? \n\nLet’s learn and understand more from Winnie Wong, the Chief Executive Officer and Director of Asia and Avo Insurance. She will also share with us some useful information on the insurance coverage and characteristics of virtual insurance in response to the pandemic.\n\nEnglish subtitle: https://youtu.be/CEwDV0hH68U\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV:\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-01T10:13:39Z',
  'Duration': 797,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '105',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Self-help guides: Make it easy for insurance application and claims under pandemic(English Subtitle)',
  'Description': 'How could Insurance help protect our interests in time of the COVID-19 pandemic? And perhaps you may have many more questions and concerns in mind: Will insurance companies compensate for the loss arising from trip delay due to the lockdown measure? What are the benefits or coverage the insured could obtain if getting infected in the locale? \n\nLet’s learn and understand more from Winnie Wong, the Chief Executive Officer and Director of Asia and Avo Insurance. She will also share with us some useful information on the insurance coverage and characteristics of virtual insurance in response to the pandemic.\n\nChinese subtitle : https://youtu.be/D35cFCBuhAY\n\n鑑於新型冠狀病毒疫情來勢洶洶，每日都有不同變化，突發情況時有出現。若不幸懷疑或確診感染新冠肺炎而須強制隔離，可有額外援助？其他國家封關令已計劃的旅程受阻，會否得到賠償？如果在外地染病怎麼辦？如何令客戶能得到即時適切的協助？虛擬保險主要透過網上申請及索償，不涉及中介人，投保過程簡單快捷，牽涉保費亦較少。校友講者會以專業角度，分析傳統與虛擬保險的分別何在，助我們在「疫境」中得到更好保障。\n\n中文字幕: https://youtu.be/D35cFCBuhAY\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV:\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-06-01T10:12:29Z',
  'Duration': 797,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '212',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大教曉我的事 - 多角度思考  What I learnt from CUHK - Multi-perspective thinking',
  'Description': '大學教育如何影響學生畢業後的發展？我們請來五位畢業於不同年代、不同學系的中大人，回顧中大對他們的影響。你會發現，即使畢業後大家在社會上擔任不同的崗位，但原來他們都有著共同的特質：多角度思考、人文精神、止於至善 、心術豁達、專業忠誠。也許，這就是中大人一直傳承着的共同特質。\n\n第一集，我們請來畢業於新聞與傳播系、現職電台主持的森美，與我們回顧中大如何培育他的多角度思考。\n--------------\n節目預告：\n第二集：商學院環球商業學系、非牟利機構「良師香港」創辦人陳君洋\n第三集：心理學系、香港紅十字會臨床心理學家張依勵\n第四集：工商管理系、香港賽馬會慈善及社區事務執行總監張亮\n第五集：專業會計學系、羅兵咸永道香港審計部合夥人方蘊萱\n\n#中大教曉我的事 #中大人 #中大人的特質 #森美大哥 #多角度思考 #仲有四集萬勿錯過\n\nHow does university education influence one’s development after graduation? We have invited five alumni from different generations who graduated from different disciplines to review how CUHK inspired them. You’ll find that, despite taking up different roles in society, they share the same core attributes, which are multi-perspective thinking, humanism, in pursuit of excellence, broad-mindedness, as well as professionalism and loyalty. Perhaps, those are the uniquely inherited features of CUHK graduates.\n\nIn the first episode, Sammy Leung, the famous media worker who graduated from the School of Journalism and Communication, will tell how CUHK trained his multi-perspective thinking.\n--------------\nComing up next:\nSecond episode: Arnold Chan (Global Business Studies), Founder of Teach For Hong Kong\nThird episode: Eliza Cheung (Psychology), Hong Kong Red Cross Clinical Psychologist\nFourth episode: Cheung Leong (Integrated BBA), Executive Director, Charities and Community of The Hong Kong Jockey Club\nFifth episode: Loretta Fong (Accounting), Partner, PwC Hong Kong\n\n#WhatILearntFromCUHK #CUHKGraduates #CUHKAttributes #SammyLeung #MulitPerspectiveThinking #StayTunedFor4MoreEpisodes\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: https://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-29T10:02:33Z',
  'Duration': 231,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '4246',
  'Likes': '66',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《藝術無間》第一集「般若波羅蜜 — 與法師談傳承和修行」“HEART to HEART Talks” EP 1 - Art of Zen: Soul-searching with the Abbot',
  'Description': '《藝術無間》頭炮節目邀得東蓮覺苑苑長僧徹法師與中大文物館館長姚進莊教授看兩件藝術品，傾談中法師分享了對傳承及修行的看法。\n\nThe Art Museum invited Abbot, the Venerable Sik Tsang Chit from Tung Lin Kok Yuen (Monastery) to share with us his thoughts on two artworks and the art of Zen.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV:\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \nCUHK Instagram: https://bit.ly/3bNn8La\nCUHK Telegram: https://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\nCUHK Twitter: https://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \nCUHK WeChat ID: CUHKofficial \nCUHK Weibo: https://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-29T08:56:56Z',
  'Duration': 736,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '167',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大綠色生活村\u3000賽馬會研究生宿舍（二座及三座）CUHK Green-Hostel Village Jockey Club Postgraduate Halls 2 & 3',
  'Description': '中大校園發展處及設計顧問團隊為新落成的「賽馬會研究生宿舍（二座及三座）」注入多個「綠色建築」元素，由設計概念、樓宇座向到節能技術等着手，讓同學可在日常起居飲食，全方位實踐可持續發展的生活。不妨一探這個毗鄰39區的「綠色生活村」！\n\nThe CUHK Campus Development Office and consultant team have worked in harness to enforce green building concepts in the ‘Jockey Club Postgraduate Halls 2 & 3’ project. The concepts, position and technologies of the complex are designed for a lifestyle that fulfills the sustainable development goals. Let’s have a look at this ‘Green-Hostel Village’ near Area 39.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV:\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: \nhttps://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: \nhttps://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: \nhttps://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: \nhttps://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: \nCUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: \nhttps://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: \nhttps://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-29T04:48:45Z',
  'Duration': 207,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1590',
  'Likes': '16',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《藝術無間》宣傳短片 "HEART to HEART talks" Trailer',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n法師、醫生、在職媽媽、行山領隊、學生、髮型師、咖啡店主和老畫家跟文物館的藝術品與專家可以擦岀甚麼火花？請留意5月29日起一連8個星期五下午4:30分推出的《藝術無間》！\n\nWhat will an abbot, a doctor, a working mother, a hike leader, students, a hairdresser, a coffee shop owner and a painter tell our curators about the treasures in CUHK? Stay tuned to the "HEART to HEART talks" to be broadcasted from 29 May onwards for eight consecutive Fridays at 4:30pm.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-26T11:27:16Z',
  'Duration': 79,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '103',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '360º中大校園遊 (廣東話) 360º CUHK Virtual Campus Tour (Cantonese Version)',
  'Description': '透過香港中文大學360度全景圖，從嶄新角度欣賞山城！\n\n中大校園面積達一百三十七點三公頃，俯瞰吐露港，是全港最寬廣、最綠意盎然的校園，校內設施齊備 ，包括一流的圖書館，另有游泳池、運動場、網球場、健身室等。書院制更是中大特色，在本港大學中獨一無二。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV:\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK Facebook: \nhttps://www.facebook.com/CUHKofficial/ \n\nCUHK Instagram: \nhttps://bit.ly/3bNn8La\n\nCUHK Telegram: \nhttps://t.me/cuhkofficialnews\n\nCUHK Twitter: \nhttps://twitter.com/cuhkofficial \n\nCUHK WeChat ID: \nCUHKofficial \n\nCUHK Weibo: \nhttps://www.weibo.com/cuhkofficial\n\nCUHK YouTube Channel: \nhttps://bit.ly/2AIlflT',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-25T00:45:00Z',
  'Duration': 180,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '24926',
  'Likes': '185',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大支援基金 CU RElief Fund',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【中大支援基金】\n為了協助受新冠肺炎疫情影響的大學成員渡過難關，香港中文大學成立「中大支援基金」，除了支援受疫情影響的中大人外 ，更期望能提升大學成員的抗逆能力，合力應對當前及往後的挑戰：https://bit.ly/3fSAUiE\n\n「中大支援基金」主要援助：\n（1）為中大全日制本科生提供校內兼職工作\n（2）為2020年畢業班同學及2019年畢業校友提供短期受薪在校工作機會。基金亦正與校外機構緊密聯絡，邀請提供工作機會，以協助同學及校友累積實際工作經驗，增加競爭力\n（3）為全職中大基層員工提供免息貸款\n\n段崇智校長聯同全體七位副校長，將捐出本年餘下每月百分之十五的薪金作為起動基金。我們深盼各界慷慨捐助支持「中大支援基金」，共襄善舉，同心協力，支持中大人面對逆境。\n\n我們亦誠邀各界友好提供寶貴工作機會，詳情請與「中大支援基金」管理委員會聯絡 （電話: 3943-1931；電郵：curefund@cuhk.edu.hk）。\n\n有關捐助及申請詳情，可瀏覽網頁﹕www.cuhk.edu.hk/oia/cure-fund\n\n#中大支援基金 #中大人 #慷慨捐助 #同心協力 #渡過難關\n\n【CU RElief Fund】\nTo support university members during the current period of adversity, The Chinese University of Hong Kong launched the CU RElief Fund (CURE Fund), which aims to provide assistance and support to members who are adversely affected by the COVID-19 pandemic and to enhance the resilience of the CUHK community: https://bit.ly/3cyKipP\n\nThe main relief measures are:\n(1) To provide on-campus part-time job opportunities for current CUHK full-time undergraduate students\n(2) To provide short-term job opportunities for graduating students of the class of 2020 and alumni of the class of 2019. The CURE Fund Management Committee is also in discussion with various organizations to create job opportunities. The aim is to help graduating students and young alumni to gain work experience and competitiveness\n(3) To provide interest-free emergency loans for full-time staff members in junior\n\nProfessor Rocky Tuan, Vice-Chancellor and President of CUHK, along with all seven Pro-Vice-Chancellors/Vice-Presidents, will donate 15% of their salaries for the remaining months of the current year to seed the CURE Fund.\n\nWe are calling for donations to support the CURE Fund and to help CUHK members in need to overcome adversity. The University also sincerely invites interested organizations to offer job opportunities for graduating students and young alumni. Please contact the CURE Fund Management Committee for details (tel: 3943-1931; email: curefund@cuhk.edu.hk).\n\nFor information on donation and application, please visit www.cuhk.edu.hk/oia/cure-fund\n\n#CURE #CUHKCommunity #callfordonation #overcomeadversity',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-15T08:31:17Z',
  'Duration': 73,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '541',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Putting COVID-19 in perspective (English Subtitle) 轉念看疫境 ( 英文字幕)',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nDuring the pandemic, many of us are worried about getting infected. Not only has it disrupted our daily life, but also put much strains on our mental and physical well-being, finance and even family relationship.  Such reality, though painful, should not hold us back from enjoying and appreciating the beauty of love in our life and world that is still having truth, virtue and happiness. An ex-depression sufferer will also be invited to share her rehabilitation story during SARS, shedding some light on how to deal with the adversity. \n\nFor Chinese subtitle: https://youtu.be/qh_WSAP24NA\n\n在疫症蔓延的非常時期，不少人都會擔心受到感染。社會運作、經濟活動減慢甚至停擺，人們在情緒、經濟、與家人關係上都承受不少壓力。然而，痛苦雖然真實，但我們仍能在生活中尋找到表現愛的人、事、物，那怕是一朵開得燦爛的小花、一個小孩的微笑，都在提醒著我們其實世界還有真、善、美。透過17年前沙士期間，患上抑鬱症的康復者現身說法，也可幫助我們了解怎樣自強度過「疫境」。\n\n中文字幕請按此: https://youtu.be/qh_WSAP24NA',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-15T02:51:28Z',
  'Duration': 1241,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '224',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '轉念看疫境 ( 中文字幕) Putting COVID-19 in perspective (Chinese Subtitle)',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n在疫症蔓延的非常時期，不少人都會擔心受到感染。社會運作、經濟活動減慢甚至停擺，人們在情緒、經濟、與家人關係上都承受不少壓力。然而，痛苦雖然真實，但我們仍能在生活中尋找到表現愛的人、事、物，那怕是一朵開得燦爛的小花、一個小孩的微笑，都在提醒著我們其實世界還有真、善、美。透過17年前沙士期間，患上抑鬱症的康復者現身說法，也可幫助我們了解怎樣自強度過「疫境」。\n\n英文字幕請按此：https://youtu.be/SU88DDDitZE \n\n\nDuring the pandemic, many of us are worried about getting infected. Not only has it disrupted our daily life, but also put much strains on our mental and physical well-being, finance and even family relationship.  Such reality, though painful, should not hold us back from enjoying and appreciating the beauty of love in our life and world that is still having truth, virtue and happiness. An ex-depression sufferer will also be invited to share her rehabilitation story during SARS, shedding some light on how to deal with the adversity. \n\nFor English subtitle: https://youtu.be/SU88DDDitZE',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-15T02:50:05Z',
  'Duration': 1241,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '191',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "'What I Have Learnt as a Surgeon' by Dr. Jeremy Teoh 「外科醫生的親身體驗」張源津醫生",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nBeing a doctor has been Dr. Jeremy Teoh's dream since he was very young. Being a surgeon has been his goal since he has entered medical school. What does it take to become a surgeon? What are the struggles that a surgeon may have to face? Dr. Teoh shares what he has learnt as a surgeon in 'Class Acts'.\n張源津醫生兒時就夢想成為醫生，入讀醫科後，他便立志成為外科醫生。要怎樣才能成為外科醫生？外科醫生會面對甚麼困難？張源津醫生於「博文在線」分享他做外科醫生的親身體驗。\n\n'Class Acts' Online Talk Series:\nIn supporting quality learning off campus during the epidemic situation, the CUHK distinguished speakers will deliver a series of online talks, “Class Acts” exploring topics from their own professions.\n「博文在線」講座系列：\n為讓學生在疫情下仍能在家學習不同學術範疇知識，香港中文大學現舉辦「博文在線」講座系列，學生可安坐家中自我增值。「博文在線」講座將中大不同領域的傑出學者主講，以深入淺出的方式分享真知灼見。\n\nOther Talk Links:\n其他講座連結：\n\n'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0' by Prof. Alan Chan\n「大學之道 4.0」陳金樑教授\nhttps://youtu.be/8FybyfCNJYI\n\n'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating' by Prof. Tingting FAN\n「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」范亭亭教授\nhttps://youtu.be/f6rQhDmxp0Y\n\n'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?' by Dr. Tong Shiu Sing\n「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」湯兆昇博士\nhttps://youtu.be/qHYKBCc7sW8\n\n'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting' by Prof. Steven GALLAGHER\n「中國沉船與尋寶國際法例」Steven GALLAGHER教授\nhttps://youtu.be/TFdvqQhi53A\n\n'City Development and Urban History' by Prof. Ian Morley\n「城市發展及歷史」Ian Morley教授\nhttps://youtu.be/sJBQzgAacBE\n\n'Robots as Mentors for Children with Autism' by Prof. Catherine So\n「機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友」蘇詠芝教授\nhttps://youtu.be/xG9JTYkVNhI",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-11T07:45:00Z',
  'Duration': 1796,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3029',
  'Likes': '55',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "「機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友」蘇詠芝教授 'Robots as Mentors for Children with Autism'  by Prof. Catherine So",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n中大教育學院教育心理學系蘇詠芝教授於「博文在線」講座邀請大家參觀「小星教室」，了解如何培養社交機械人成為自閉同學的良師益友。\nProf. Catherine So, Department of Educational Psychology, Faculty of Education, CUHK, invited us to visit a robotic classroom and learn how they trained the robots to be the mentors for children with autism.\n\n「博文在線」講座系列：\n為讓學生在疫情下仍能在家學習不同學術範疇知識，香港中文大學現舉辦「博文在線」講座系列，學生可安坐家中自我增值。「博文在線」講座將中大不同領域的傑出學者主講，以深入淺出的方式分享真知灼見。\n'Class Acts' Online Talk Series:\nIn supporting quality learning off campus during the epidemic situation, the CUHK distinguished speakers will deliver a series of online talks, “Class Acts” exploring topics from their own professions.\n\n其他講座連結：\nOther Talk Links:\n\n「大學之道 4.0」陳金樑教授\n'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0' by Prof. Alan Chan\nhttps://youtu.be/8FybyfCNJYI\n\n「三磅宇宙探索指南」金國慶教授\n'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-Pound Universe' by Prof Irwin King\nhttps://youtu.be/omduIktSPLM\n\n「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」范亭亭教授\n'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating' by Prof. Tingting FAN\nhttps://youtu.be/f6rQhDmxp0Y\n\n「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」湯兆昇博士\n'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?' by Dr. Tong Shiu Sing\nhttps://youtu.be/qHYKBCc7sW8\n\n「中國沉船與尋寶國際法例」Steven GALLAGHER 教授\n'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting' by Prof. Steven GALLAGHER\nhttps://youtu.be/TFdvqQhi53A\n\n「城市發展及歷史」Ian Morley教授\n'City Development and Urban History' by Prof. Ian Morley\nhttps://youtu.be/sJBQzgAacBE\n\n「外科醫生的親身體驗」張源津醫生\n'What I Have Learnt as a Surgeon' by Dr. Jeremy Teoh\nhttps://youtu.be/ddCz2CBUUZ8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-05-05T07:45:04Z',
  'Duration': 1307,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2219',
  'Likes': '45',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "「博文在線」網上講座系列－張源津教授 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series - Prof. Jeremy Teoh",
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',

  'Published_date': '2020-05-05T07:45:03Z',
