 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "'City Development and Urban History' by Prof. Ian Morley",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nAt 'Class Acts', Prof. Ian Morley speaks on the topic of 'City Development and Urban History'. He talks about understanding cities and their development and, in this frame, recognising the value and significance of studying the urban past. After all, to value urban history helps us to evaluate how cities of the modern world came into being with the form and meaning that they have.\n\n在「博文在線」講座中，Ian Morley教授以「城市發展與歷史」為題，向大家剖析城市及其發展，以及在城市發展中探索它的價值與重要性。畢竟，理解城市的歷史有助於我們評估當代世界現在的形式與意義如何誕生。\n\n'Class Acts' Online Talk Series:\nIn supporting quality learning off campus during the epidemic situation, the CUHK distinguished speakers will deliver a series of online talks, “Class Acts” exploring topics from their own professions.\n「博文在線」講座系列：\n為讓學生在疫情下仍能在家學習不同學術範疇知識，香港中文大學現舉辦「博文在線」講座系列，學生可安坐家中自我增值。「博文在線」講座將中大不同領域的傑出學者主講，以深入淺出的方式分享真知灼見。\n\nOther Talk Links:\n其他講座連結：\n\n'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0' by Prof. Alan Chan\n「大學之道 4.0」陳金樑教授\nhttps://youtu.be/8FybyfCNJYI\n\n'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-Pound Universe' by Prof Irwin King\n「三磅宇宙探索指南」金國慶教授\nhttps://youtu.be/omduIktSPLM\n\n'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating' by Prof. Tingting FAN\n「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」范亭亭教授\nhttps://youtu.be/f6rQhDmxp0Y\n\n'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?' by Dr. Tong Shiu Sing\n「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」湯兆昇博士\nhttps://youtu.be/qHYKBCc7sW8\n\n'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting' by Prof. Steven GALLAGHER\n「中國沉船與尋寶國際法例」Steven GALLAGHER 教授\nhttps://youtu.be/TFdvqQhi53A\n\n'Robots as Mentors for Children with Autism' by Prof. Catherine So\n「機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友」蘇詠芝教授\nhttps://youtu.be/xG9JTYkVNhI\n\n'What I Have Learnt as a Surgeon' by Dr. Jeremy Teoh\n「外科醫生的親身體驗」張源津醫生\nhttps://youtu.be/ddCz2CBUUZ8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-29T07:55:32Z',
  'Duration': 1759,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1690',
  'Likes': '53',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "「博文在線」網上講座系列－蘇詠芝教授 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series - Prof. Catherine So",
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n自閉症孩童跟「小星」為甚麼會成為好朋友？社交機械人「小星」怎樣幫助自閉症孩童增進社交及溝通能力？\n引入這些社交機械人的中大教育心理學系蘇詠芝教授，將會於第七場「博文在線」講座帶我們到「小星教室」，認識這幾位自閉症孩童的良師益友。\n\nHow do children with autism and the robot become good friends? How can the robot improve their social and communications skills?\nProf. Catherine So of CUHK Department of Educational Psychology, who pioneered use of robots to help autistic children, will be the speaker of the 7th ‘Class Acts’ online talk. She will introduce this robot to all of us.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-29T07:49:34Z',
  'Duration': 33,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '450',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '家居Keep Fit錦囊 (中文字幕)Tips to Keep Fit at Home (Chinese Subtitle)',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n疫情嚴峻，勤做運動有效增強身體免疫力，實在是防疫減壓的好方法！即使現在只能留在家中，也可按個人能力及身體狀況，運動伸展鬆一鬆。今集由前香港三項鐵人代表李致和校友，分享如何在家中Keep Fit，並帶領兩位校友（蘇嘉欣及黃梓浩）一同親身示範，協助大家鍛鍊主肌群，以保持及增強肌肉力量和耐力。\n\n英文字幕: https://youtu.be/ZWuW_r8k6AU\n\nHome Workout might have been one of the best antidotes against COVID-19 as exercise helps boost our immune system and relieve our stress. In this episode, Daniel Lee, former triathlon Hong Kong representative, is leading two young alumni (Winnie and Leslie) to demonstrate some at-home exercises which aim to train the major muscle groups in a way to maintain and develop the muscle strength and endurance.\n\nFor English subtitle: https://youtu.be/ZWuW_r8k6AU',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-28T07:48:54Z',
  'Duration': 614,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '171',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Tips to Keep Fit at Home (English Subtitle) 家居Keep Fit錦囊 (英文字幕)',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nHome Workout might have been one of the best antidotes against COVID-19 as exercise helps boost our immune system and relieve our stress. In this episode, Daniel Lee, former triathlon Hong Kong representative, is leading two young alumni (Winnie and Leslie) to demonstrate some at-home exercises which aim to train the major muscle groups in a way to maintain and develop the muscle strength and endurance.\n\nChinese subtitle: https://youtu.be/gKQu1kun0z4\n\n疫情嚴峻，勤做運動有效增強身體免疫力，實在是防疫減壓的好方法！即使現在只能留在家中，也可按個人能力及身體狀況，運動伸展鬆一鬆。今集由前香港三項鐵人代表李致和校友，分享如何在家中Keep Fit，並帶領兩位校友（蘇嘉欣及黃梓浩）一同親身示範，協助大家鍛鍊主肌群，以保持及增強肌肉力量和耐力。\n\n中文字幕: https://youtu.be/gKQu1kun0z4',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-28T07:48:09Z',
  'Duration': 614,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '105',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-pound Universe' by Prof. Irwin King 「三磅宇宙探索指南」金國慶教授",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nIn Prof. Irwin KING's 'Class Acts' talk on 'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-pound Universe, he tells of his personal journey to explore the universe of the brain and what he does in AI, and how these topics would shape today and tomorrow.\n在金國慶教授主講的「博文在線」網上講座，他以「三磅宇宙探索指南」為題，分享他個人探索大腦這個「三磅宇宙」的經歷，以及他在人工智能範疇的工作，還講及這些議題如何塑造今日和明日的世界。\n\n'Class Acts' Online Talk Series:\nIn supporting quality learning off campus during the epidemic situation, the CUHK distinguished speakers will deliver a series of online talks, “Class Acts” exploring topics from their own professions.\n「博文在線」講座系列：\n為讓學生在疫情下仍能在家學習不同學術範疇知識，香港中文大學現舉辦「博文在線」講座系列，學生可安坐家中自我增值。「博文在線」講座將中大不同領域的傑出學者主講，以深入淺出的方式分享真知灼見。\n\nOther Talk Links:\n其他講座連結：\n\n'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0' by Prof. Alan Chan\n「大學之道 4.0」陳金樑教授\nhttps://youtu.be/8FybyfCNJYI\n\n'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating' by Prof. Tingting FAN\n「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」范亭亭教授\nhttps://youtu.be/f6rQhDmxp0Y\n\n'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?' by Dr. Tong Shiu Sing\n「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」湯兆昇博士\nhttps://youtu.be/qHYKBCc7sW8\n\n'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting' by Prof. Steven GALLAGHER\n「中國沉船與尋寶國際法例」Steven GALLAGHER教授\nhttps://youtu.be/TFdvqQhi53A\n\n'City Development and Urban History' by Prof. Ian Morley\n「城市發展與歷史」Ian Morley教授\nhttps://youtu.be/sJBQzgAacBE\n\n'Robots as Mentors for Children with Autism' by Prof. Catherine So\n「機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友」蘇詠芝教授\nhttps://youtu.be/xG9JTYkVNhI\n\n'What I Have Learnt as a Surgeon' by Dr. Jeremy Teoh\n「外科醫生的親身體驗」張源津醫生\nhttps://youtu.be/ddCz2CBUUZ8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-28T06:26:42Z',
  'Duration': 1670,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '824',
  'Likes': '17',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0' by Prof. Alan Chan 「大學之道 4.0」陳金樑教授",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe 'Class Acts' commenced with CUHK Provost Professor Chan Kam-leung, Alan speaking on the topic 'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0'. \n中大常務副校長陳金樑教授將為「博文在線」打響頭炮，以「大學之道4.0」為題，討論高等教育在第四次工業革命經歷的變化。\n\n'Class Acts' Online Talk Series:\nIn supporting quality learning off campus during the epidemic situation, the CUHK distinguished speakers will deliver a series of online talks, “Class Acts” exploring topics from their own professions.\n「博文在線」講座系列：\n為讓學生在疫情下仍能在家學習不同學術範疇知識，香港中文大學現舉辦「博文在線」講座系列，學生可安坐家中自我增值。「博文在線」講座將中大不同領域的傑出學者主講，以深入淺出的方式分享真知灼見。\n\nOther Talk Links:\n其他講座連結：\n\n'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-Pound Universe' by Prof Irwin King\n「三磅宇宙探索指南」金國慶教授\nhttps://youtu.be/omduIktSPLM\n\n'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating' by Prof. Tingting FAN\n「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」范亭亭教授\nhttps://youtu.be/f6rQhDmxp0Y\n\n'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?' by Dr. Tong Shiu Sing\n「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」湯兆昇博士\nhttps://youtu.be/qHYKBCc7sW8\n\n'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting' by Prof. Steven GALLAGHER\n「中國沉船與尋寶國際法例」Steven GALLAGHER 教授\nhttps://youtu.be/TFdvqQhi53A\n\n'City Development and Urban History' by Prof. Ian Morley\n「城市發展與歷史」Ian Morley教授\nhttps://youtu.be/sJBQzgAacBE\n\n'Robots as Mentors for Children with Autism' by Prof. Catherine So\n「機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友」蘇詠芝教授\nhttps://youtu.be/xG9JTYkVNhI\n\n'What I Have Learnt as a Surgeon' by Dr. Jeremy Teoh\n「外科醫生的親身體驗」張源津醫生\nhttps://youtu.be/ddCz2CBUUZ8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-27T04:33:19Z',
  'Duration': 2362,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1070',
  'Likes': '19',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "中大「博文在線」講座系列－Ian Morley教授 CUHK 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series - Prof. Ian Morley",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n🗺讓我們憧憬一下，疫情過後，你最想去哪個城市？\n\n現在我們無法出遊，反而是個好機會讓我們先認識那個城市的歷史。讀一個城市的發展史，有助我們理解它的現狀。到真正成行時，再到那個地方深度遊，更富意義，收穫更豐。\n\n榮獲多屆文學院教學奬及歷史系教學奬的Ian Morley教授，將於第六場「博文在線」講座以「城市發展與歷史」為題，教我們如何以一個城市的過去，去解讀那個地方的現在與發展。\n\n📹播放安排\n日期：4月29日（星期三）\n時間：下午4時\n講者：中大歷史系Ian Morley教授\n講題：City Development and Urban History\n語言：英語\n播放平台：中大YouTube頻道 youtube.com/user/CUHKchannel\n毋須登記，下星期三見👋\n\n🙋\u200d♂️想提問❓\n星期日（4月26日）或之前，把你的問題電郵至classacts@cuhk.edu.hk，Ian Morley教授將盡量在節目錄影中解答。\n\n【'Class Acts' Preview: City Development and Urban History】\n🗺Looking ahead, which city do you want to visit most after the pandemic?\n\nAlthough it is not a time for us to travel, it is an excellent opportunity for us to learn about that city's history first. Studying a modern city's past helps us to better comprehend its present. When we can finally get there, we will get more fun out of an in-depth trip.\n\nProf. Ian Morley of CUHK Department of History, four-time awardee of the Outstanding Teaching Awards of the Faculty of Arts and the Department of History, will be the speaker in the sixth ‘Class Acts’ online talk. He will tell us how urban history helps us to evaluate how modern cities came into being with the form and meaning that they have.\n\n📹Broadcast Arrangement\nDate: 29 April (Wednesday)\nTime: 4:00pm\nSpeaker: Prof. Ian Morley, CUHK Department of History\nTopic: City Development and Urban History\nLanguage: English\nBroadcast Platform: CUHK YouTube channel (youtube.com/user/CUHKchannel)\nNo registration required. See you next Wednesday.👋\n\n🙋\u200d♂Want to raise a question❓\nSend your question to classacts@cuhk.edu.hk on or before 26 April (Sunday). Prof. Ian Morley will try to include your question in the recording.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-24T02:08:20Z',
  'Duration': 39,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '913',
  'Likes': '15',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting' by Prof. Steven GALLAGHER",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nAt 'Class Acts' on 'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting', Professor Steven GALLAGHER talks about what happens to people who find treasure, who can keep treasure and the importance of Chinese shipwrecks in the development of international law about treasure.\n在「博文在線」講座中，Steven GALLAGHER教授以「中國深船與尋寶法例」為題，講解誰可保存尋寶者獲得的寶物，及以中國沉船對推進有關尋寶之國際法的重要性。\n\n'Class Acts' Online Talk Series:\nIn supporting quality learning off campus during the epidemic situation, the CUHK distinguished speakers will deliver a series of online talks, “Class Acts” exploring topics from their own professions.\n「博文在線」講座系列：\n為讓學生在疫情下仍能在家學習不同學術範疇知識，香港中文大學現舉辦「博文在線」講座系列，學生可安坐家中自我增值。「博文在線」講座將中大不同領域的傑出學者主講，以深入淺出的方式分享真知灼見。\n\nOther Talk Links:\n其他講座連結：\n\n'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0' by Prof. Alan Chan\n「大學之道 4.0」陳金樑教授\nhttps://youtu.be/8FybyfCNJYI\n\n'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-Pound Universe' by Prof Irwin King\n「三磅宇宙探索指南」金國慶教授\nhttps://youtu.be/omduIktSPLM\n\n'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating' by Prof. Tingting FAN\n「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」范亭亭教授\nhttps://youtu.be/f6rQhDmxp0Y\n\n'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?' by Dr. Tong Shiu Sing\n「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」湯兆昇博士\nhttps://youtu.be/qHYKBCc7sW8\n\n'City Development and Urban History' by Prof. Ian Morley\n「城市發展與歷史」Ian Morley教授\nhttps://youtu.be/sJBQzgAacBE\n\n'Robots as Mentors for Children with Autism' by Prof. Catherine So\n「機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友」蘇詠芝教授\nhttps://youtu.be/xG9JTYkVNhI\n\n'What I Have Learnt as a Surgeon' by Dr. Jeremy Teoh\n「外科醫生的親身體驗」張源津醫生\nhttps://youtu.be/ddCz2CBUUZ8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-23T08:02:45Z',
  'Duration': 1471,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '488',
  'Likes': '15',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」湯兆昇博士 'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?' by Dr. Tong Shiu Sing",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n愛恩斯坦發表廣義相對論100年之後，物理學家才真正探測到重力波。究竟重力波是怎樣被探測的？它怎樣改變我們人類對宇宙旳認知？又怎樣驗證廣義相對論呢？湯兆昇博士於「博文在線」講座中，以「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」為題，跟大家一起探討。\nOnly 100 years after Einstein published the General Theory of Relativity have the physicists discovered gravitational waves for the very first time. How could the gravitational waves be detected? How could they change the humans' understanding about the universe and verify the General Theory of Relativity? Dr. TONG Shiu Sing discusses with the audience in the 'Class Acts' talk on 'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?'.\n\n「博文在線」講座系列：\n為讓學生在疫情下仍能在家學習不同學術範疇知識，香港中文大學現舉辦「博文在線」講座系列，學生可安坐家中自我增值。「博文在線」講座將中大不同領域的傑出學者主講，以深入淺出的方式分享真知灼見。\n'Class Acts' Online Talk Series:\nIn supporting quality learning off campus during the epidemic situation, the CUHK distinguished speakers will deliver a series of online talks, “Class Acts” exploring topics from their own professions.\n\n其他講座連結：\nOther Talk Links:\n\n'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0' by Prof. Alan Chan\n「大學之道 4.0」陳金樑教授\nhttps://youtu.be/8FybyfCNJYI\n\n「三磅宇宙探索指南」金國慶教授\n'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-Pound Universe' by Prof Irwin King\nhttps://youtu.be/omduIktSPLM\n\n「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」范亭亭教授\n'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating' by Prof. Tingting FAN\nhttps://youtu.be/f6rQhDmxp0Y\n\n「中國沉船與尋寶國際法例」Steven GALLAGHER 教授\n'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting' by Prof. Steven GALLAGHER\nhttps://youtu.be/TFdvqQhi53A\n\n「城市發展與歷史」Ian Morley教授\n'City Development and Urban History' by Prof. Ian Morley\nhttps://youtu.be/sJBQzgAacBE\n\n「機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友」蘇詠芝教授\n'Robots as Mentors for Children with Autism' by Prof. Catherine So\nhttps://youtu.be/xG9JTYkVNhI\n\n「外科醫生的親身體驗」張源津醫生\n'What I Have Learnt as a Surgeon' by Dr. Jeremy Teoh\nhttps://youtu.be/ddCz2CBUUZ8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-23T07:42:33Z',
  'Duration': 2390,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '13510',
  'Likes': '294',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating' by Prof. Tingting FAN 「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」范亭亭教授",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nDo monkeys need Tinder for dating? Did your parents meet on Tinder? Can Tinder help you find your true love? In the 'Class Acts' talk on 'Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating', Prof. Tingting Fan tells about the past, present and future of dating platforms.\n猴子需要網上約會平台Tinder來約會嗎？你的父母是在Tinder上認識的嗎？Tinder可以幫你找到真愛嗎？在「博文在線」講座中，范亭亭教授以「一點鍾情：在線約會的創新」為題，探究過去、現在與未來的約會模式。\n\n'Class Acts' Online Talk Series:\nIn supporting quality learning off campus during the epidemic situation, the CUHK distinguished speakers will deliver a series of online talks, “Class Acts” exploring topics from their own professions.\n「博文在線」講座系列：\n為讓學生在疫情下仍能在家學習不同學術範疇知識，香港中文大學現舉辦「博文在線」講座系列，學生可安坐家中自我增值。「博文在線」講座將中大不同領域的傑出學者主講，以深入淺出的方式分享真知灼見。\n\nOther Talk Links:\n其他講座連結：\n\n'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0' by Prof. Alan Chan\n「大學之道 4.0」陳金樑教授\nhttps://youtu.be/8FybyfCNJYI\n\n'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-Pound Universe' by Prof Irwin King\n「三磅宇宙探索指南」金國慶教授\nhttps://youtu.be/omduIktSPLM\n\n'What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?' by Dr. Tong Shiu Sing\n「重力波告訴我們甚麼？」湯兆昇博士\nhttps://youtu.be/qHYKBCc7sW8\n\n'Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting' by Prof. Steven GALLAGHER\n「中國沉船與尋寶國際法例」Steven GALLAGHER教授\nhttps://youtu.be/TFdvqQhi53A\n\n'City Development and Urban History' by Prof. Ian Morley\n「城市發展與歷史」Ian Morley教授\nhttps://youtu.be/sJBQzgAacBE\n\n'Robots as Mentors for Children with Autism' by Prof. Catherine So\n「機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友」蘇詠芝教授\nhttps://youtu.be/xG9JTYkVNhI\n\n'What I Have Learnt as a Surgeon' by Dr. Jeremy Teoh\n「外科醫生的親身體驗」張源津醫生\nhttps://youtu.be/ddCz2CBUUZ8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-23T06:12:14Z',
  'Duration': 1713,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1202',
  'Likes': '24',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大這一課📚 - 前傳 A Class by CUHK 📚—The Prequel',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n上回提到， 中大化學系的講師為15間中學的學生在停課期間準備網上課堂，教授中學生可親自製作酒精搓手液及漂白水，更能從過程中學習消毒用品殺滅病毒的原理（重溫：https://youtu.be/cyLfJdNMTPo ）。\n\n今次課堂全賴兩位化學系講師侯俊傑博士及麥建華博士的精心安排。究竟2位化學系講師為何萌生向中學生安排網上課堂的念頭？\n\nAs mentioned previously, two lecturers from CUHK Department of Chemistry prepared an online course for 15 secondary schools during the class suspension to demonstrate the production of alcohol handrub and bleach in the laboratory. Students have benefited from the class as they had chance to produce their own alcohol handrub and bleach, and learn the theories and principles behind it.（Review: https://youtu.be/cyLfJdNMTPo ）\n\nThis class relies on the careful arrangement of the two lecturers of the Department of Chemistry, Dr. HAU Chun Kit Sam and Dr. MAK Kin Wah. Why did the two lecturers have this idea to initiate the online class for secondary school students?',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-20T06:58:24Z',
  'Duration': 112,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   '線上學習',
   '自製酒精搓手液',
   '中大化學系',
   '自製漂白水',
   '網上教學',
   'CUHKDeptofChemistry',
   'homemadebleach',
   'homemadealcoholhandrub',
   'onlineclass'],
  'Views': '895',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大這一課 A Class by CUHK',
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n自二月起停課，已經第75天。停課期間如何讓學生維持自主學習的動機，是每個老師都在思考的問題，以轉危為機。不能群聚，改用網上教學，少了肢體接觸，卻讓課堂走得更遠。\n\n中大化學系的老師在停課期間，利用網上教學的便利造就知識轉移，向15間中學的學生示範製作酒精搓手液及漂白水，並教授消毒用品殺滅病毒的原理，幫助學界助人自助，同心抗疫；22位化學系的同學更親身到各中學協助學生及解釋相關的化學知識👩🏻🔬👨🏻🔬，讓他們有實踐的機會，更能學以致用。就讓我們一同聽聽今次課堂如何令中學生有所得著。💪🏻💪🏻\n\n今次課堂全賴兩位化學系講師侯俊傑博士及麥建華博士的精心安排。究竟2位化學系講師為何萌生向中學生安排網上課堂的念頭？大家可觀看前傳：https://youtu.be/GYdJuTmgywI\n\nIt is the 75th day of class suspension due to the epidemic since February 2020. Every teacher is working very hard to keep up students’ self-learning motivation with a view to turning challenges into opportunities. E-learning mode, while reduces human touch, allows us to go beyond boundary. \n\nTwo lecturers from CUHK Department of Chemistry, for the sake of knowledge transfer, initiated an online course to demonstrate the production of alcohol handrub and bleach in the laboratory and elaborated the theories and principles behind to students in 15 secondary schools👩🏻🔬👨🏻🔬. 22 chemistry students assisted the secondary school students to carry out the experiments and explained the theories in person. Let us hear how students have benefitted from the class. 💪🏻💪🏻\n\nThis class relies on the careful arrangement of the two lecturers of the Department of Chemistry, Dr. HAU Chun Kit Sam and Dr. MAK Kin Wah. Why did the two lecturers have this idea to initiate the online class for secondary school students? Let's watch The Prequel : https://youtu.be/GYdJuTmgywI",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-17T10:38:13Z',
  'Duration': 231,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   '網上教學',
   '線上學習',
   '自製酒精搓手液',
   '自製漂白水',
   '中大化學系',
   'onlineclass',
   'CUHKDeptofChemistry',
   'homemadealcoholhandrub',
   'homemadebleac'],
  'Views': '2219',
  'Likes': '19',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The Impact of Covid-19 on the Hong Kong Economy and Financial Market (English subtitle)',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe pandemic has grown so severe that it has disrupted many activities like transport and travel, triggering the global financial crisis. What does the future hold for Hong Kong’s economy despite the positive factors of low-interest and abundant funds What are the moods in the market? Is it panic-stricken? \n \nLet's hear more from the three renowned alumni sharing their insights into the impact of Covid-19 on Hong Kong’s and the World’s economy as well as the Financial Market. \n\nEnglish Subtitle Translation: Information Services Office\n\nFor Chinese subtitle: https://youtu.be/aljuWR5WPUU \n\n新冠肺炎疫情持續升溫，經濟活動和交通運輸減少，引發全球金融動盪。低息及市場資金充裕，可否穩定香港的經濟，以及有利香港資本市場和地產市場？如何瞭解金融市場的恐慌情緒？現在市場是否過度恐慌？三位熟悉本港以至全球經濟、金融及貿易市場的校友，會與大家分享疫情期間所觀察到的市場反應及啟示，助大家找出「疫」流而上之對策，瞭解如何化危為機。\n\n英文字幕翻譯：大學資訊處\n\n中文字幕: https://youtu.be/aljuWR5WPUU",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-15T08:52:50Z',
  'Duration': 1383,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '361',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '新冠肺炎疫情打擊下的香港經濟和金融前景及對策 (中文字幕)',
  'Description': "新冠肺炎疫情持續升溫，經濟活動和交通運輸減少，引發全球金融動盪。低息及市場資金充裕，可否穩定香港的經濟，以及有利香港資本市場和地產市場？如何瞭解金融市場的恐慌情緒？現在市場是否過度恐慌？三位熟悉本港以至全球經濟、金融及貿易市場的校友，會與大家分享疫情期間所觀察到的市場反應及啟示，助大家找出「疫」流而上之對策，瞭解如何化危為機。\n\n英文字幕: https://youtu.be/tUtb94S6b-s \n\nThe pandemic has grown so severe that it has disrupted many activities like transportand travel, triggering the global financial crisis. What does the future hold for Hong Kong’s economy despite the positive factors of low-interest and abundant funds? What are the moods in the market? Is it panic-stricken? \n \nLet's hear more from the three renowned alumni sharing their insights into the impact of Covid-19 on Hong Kong’s and the World’s economy as well as the Financial Market. \n\nEnglish Subtitle: https://youtu.be/tUtb94S6b-s",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-15T08:52:40Z',
  'Duration': 1384,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2773',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Sturdy Grass Withstands the Storm of Covid-19 (English subtitle) 疫風知勁草 (英文字幕)',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe storm of Covid-19 has engulfed the globe. With escalating number of infections reported in various countries, it has become the striking fear in us. \nProfessor Francis KL Chan and his research team have recently discovered that the COVID-19 virus was detectable in the stool samples from all confirmed patients, regardless of the degree of illness and even after the clearance in their respiratory tract. The finding suggests important public health implications. Let’s hear more from Prof. Francis Chan, who will also share his insights and “tips” about the prevention of Covid-19.\nEnglish Subtitle Translation: Information Services Office\nFor chinese subtitle : https://youtu.be/XvlScWO_kTw\n\n新型冠狀病毒席捲全球，世界各地的感染個案不斷上升，人人皆聞「肺炎」色變。 \n陳家亮教授和他的團隊最新研究發現不論病情輕重，所有患者的糞便樣本均帶有新型冠狀病毒。即使呼吸道樣本已完全清除，其糞便樣本仍有病毒存在。此發現對我們日常生活防範帶來重要啟示。除此以外，陳教授還會分享他在疫情的見解和貼士。\n英文字幕翻譯：大學資訊處\n中文字幕: https://youtu.be/XvlScWO_kTw',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-14T12:53:10Z',
  'Duration': 1134,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '169',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '疫風知勁草 (中文字幕) Sturdy Grass Withstands the Storm of Covid-19 (Chinese subtitle)',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n新型冠狀病毒席捲全球，世界各地的感染個案不斷上升，人人皆聞「肺炎」色變。 \n陳家亮教授和他的團隊最新研究發現不論病情輕重，所有患者的糞便樣本均帶有新型冠狀病毒。即使呼吸道樣本已完全清除，其糞便樣本仍有病毒存在。此發現對我們日常生活防範帶來重要啟示。除此以外，陳教授還會分享他在疫情的見解和貼士。\n英文字幕: https://youtu.be/dpbLdbrBjf0\n\nThe storm of Covid-19 has engulfed the globe. With escalating number of infections reported in various countries, it has become the striking fear in us. \nProfessor Francis KL Chan and his research team have recently discovered that the COVID-19 virus was detectable in the stool samples from all confirmed patients, regardless of the degree of illness and even after the clearance in their respiratory tract. The finding suggests important public health implications. Let’s hear more from Prof. Francis Chan, who will also share his insights and “tips” about the prevention of Covid-19.\n\nFor English Subtitle : https://youtu.be/dpbLdbrBjf0',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-14T12:51:56Z',
  'Duration': 1134,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1735',
  'Likes': '23',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '◀️ 諾貝爾學人精選講座重溫 ◀️ Revisiting the Nobel Laureates Lectures',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n📖📚🏠 足不出戶無法「sit堂」？\n\n「中大視野」網站特別搜羅一系列不可不聽的山城課堂，讓各位在疫情期間亦能安坐家中，一搔 #sit堂 之癢。頭炮即找來逾10位近年曾到訪中大的諾貝爾得獎學人，細味他們在山城開講時的哲思金言。詳情：bit.ly/2w1snI6\n\n#中大視野 #諾貝爾學人講座重溫\n\n💬 朱棣文教授「科學逍遙遊」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 彼得‧戴蒙德教授「優良的退休金制度」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 高行健博士「藝術與人生：高行健與方梓勳對談」\n語言：普通話\n\n💬 詹姆士‧赫克曼教授「人生的相關技能」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 Barry James Marshall教授「幽門螺旋桿菌：古代細菌的現代用法」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 莫理斯教授「知也無涯？」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 理察‧羅伯茨爵士「為何我鍾愛細菌？」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 蘭迪‧謝克曼教授「細胞分泌蛋白質的包裝和運輸基理」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 約瑟夫‧斯蒂格利茨教授「全球財富不均」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 楊振寧教授「宇稱不守恆：1957年的震撼」\n語言：英語\n\n💬 穆罕默德‧尤努斯教授「盆景樹下小錢莊」\n語言：英語\n\n\n------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n📖📚🏠 Finding ways to sit in on lectures at home?\n\nCUTV website is a treasure of knowledge where you can find various collections of CUHK lecture series to enrich yourselves while staying at home during the COVID-19 pandemic. As a start, we\'re pleased to present \'Revisiting the Nobel Laureates Lectures\' which you can\'t miss. This first series includes more than 10 Nobel Laureates who have given lectures in CUHK in recent years. Check out the videos to learn from the distinguished scholars. Details: bit.ly/2UAc1zR\n\n💬 Prof. Steven Chu "A Random Walk in Science"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Prof. Peter A. Diamond "Good Pension Design"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Dr. Gao Xingjian "Arts and Life - Dialogue between Dr. Gao Xingjian and Prof. Fong Chee Fun"\nLanguage: Mandarin\n\n💬 Prof. James J. Heckman "Life-Relevant Skills"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Prof. Barry James Marshall "Helicobacter Pylori: Modern Uses for the Ancient Bacterium"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Prof. Sir James Mirrlees "How Much More Can We Discover?"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Sir Richard J. Roberts "Why I Love Bacteria"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Prof. Randy W. Schekman "How Cells Package and Traffic Proteins for Export"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Prof. Joseph E. Stiglitz "Global Inequality"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Prof. Yang Chen Ning "The Great Excitement in 1957 about Parity Nonconservation"\nLanguage: English\n\n💬 Prof. Muhammad Yunus "Small Loans for a Big Future"\nLanguage: English\n\n#CUTV #NobelLaureatesLectures',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-04-03T08:50:25Z',
  'Duration': 51,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '292',
  'Likes': '7',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "中大「博文在線」講座系列－Steven Gallagher教授 CUHK 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series - Prof. Steven Gallagher",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n⚓👑💍「地上執到寶，問天問地攞唔到」，尋獲地下的寶藏或海底的沉船可據為己有嗎？\n\n原來國際法對寶藏誰屬有明文規定，其中中國的沉船對條文發展有很重要的影響。中大法律學院Steven Gallagher教授將於第五場「博文在線」講座帶領大家探討尋寶法律。現在就登記👇\n\n第五場「博文在線」網上講座\n日期：4月1日（星期三）\n時間：下午12時30分\n講者：中大法律學院副院長（學術事務）Steven Gallagher教授\n講題：Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting\n語言：英語\n網上報名：https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/\n\n\n\n\n⚓👑💍Is treasure hunting legal? Can we own the treasures we find underground or sunk at sea?\n\nActually there is a part of the international law about treasure hunting where the Chinese shipwrecks have played an important part in the development of it. Professor Steven Gallagher of CUHK Faculty of Law will tell us about the law and its history. Register now👇\n\nFifth of 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series\nDate: 1 April (Wednesday)\nTime: 12:30pm\nSpeaker: Professor Steven Gallagher, Associate Dean (Teaching and Learning), CUHK Faculty of Law\nTopic: Chinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting\nLanguage: English\nOnline registration: https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-03-27T08:36:15Z',
  'Duration': 34,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '252',
  'Likes': '7',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "中大「博文在線」講座系列－湯兆昇博士 CUHK 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series - Dr. Tong Shiu Sing",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n不時在電視上見到中大物理系湯兆昇博士，他講的課你有沒有聽過？\n\n在第四場「博文在線」講座中，湯博士將會帶我們探討天文，講解重力波的探測及如何印證愛因斯坦的廣義相對論。機會難逢，立即登記👇\n\n第四場「博文在線」網上講座\n日期：3月31日（星期二）\n時間：下午4時\n講者：中大物理系湯兆昇博士\n講題：重力波告訴我們甚麼？\n語言：廣東話\n網上報名：https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/\n\n\n\n\nYou may often see Dr. Tong Shiu Sing of CUHK Physics on the TV screen. Have you ever gone to his class?\n\nIn the fourth 'Class Acts' online talk, Dr. Tong will tell us about astronomy, how to detect gravitational waves and how gravitational waves have proved Einstein's general theory of relativity. Register now👇\n\nFourth of 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series\nDate: 31 March (Tuesday)\nTime: 4:00pm\nSpeaker: Dr. Tong Shiu Sing, Senior Lecturer, Department of Physics\nTopic: What Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?\nLanguage: Cantonese\nOnline registration: https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-03-27T08:34:50Z',
  'Duration': 33,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '662',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "中大「博文在線」講座系列－范亭亭教授 CUHK 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series - Prof. Tingting FAN",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n💕💞你有朋友的愛情故事是在網上開始的嗎？他們怎樣認識？小心🤭你的答案可能會暴露年齡。\n\n無論你認不認同，在線約會已勢不可擋，一見鍾情變一「點」鍾情，而且更發展出各種創新模式。中大市場學系助理教授范亭亭教授將於第三場「博文在線」網上講座，以『一「點」鍾情：在線約會的創新』，跟大家分享她於在線約會市場的觀察。題目那麼有趣，看來是絕對不會分心了！請先登記👇\n\n第三場「博文在線」網上講座\n日期：3月27日（星期五）\n時間：下午4時\n講者：中大市場學系助理教授范亭亭教授\n講題：一「點」鍾情﹕在線約會的創新\n語言：英語\n網上報名：https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/\n\n----------------------------\n其餘六場「博文在線」網上講座題目🗣\n\n重力波告訴我們什麼？\n🗣物理系湯兆昇博士\n\nChinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting\n🗣法律學院Steven GALLAGHER教授\n\nCity Development and Urban History\n🗣歷史系Ian MORLEY教授\n\n機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友\n🗣教育心理學系蘇詠芝教授\n\n採用移動感知精準量度個人環境的空氣污染物\n🗣地理與資源管理學系關美寶教授\n\n外科醫生的親身體驗\n🗣外科學系張源津教授\n\n【Join 'Class Acts' now: Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating】\n💕💞Have any of your friends begun their love stories on the web? How did they get to know each other? Mind how you answer as it may disclose your age🤭\n\nWhether you like it or not, online dating has become unstoppable. Love at first 'swipe' has replaced love at first sight. Many novel features have been developed. In the third online talk of the 'Class Acts' series, Professor Tingting FAN, Assistant Professor, CUHK Department of Marketing, will tell us about her observations on the online dating market. It will be difficult to distract us from this interesting topic. Register now👇\n\nThird of 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series\nDate: 27 March (Friday)\nTime: 4:00pm\nSpeaker: Professor Tingting FAN, Assistant Professor, Department of Marketing\nTopic: Love at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating\nLanguage: English\nOnline registration: https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/\n\n----------------------------\nThe remaining six 'Class Acts' topics🗣\n\nWhat Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?\n🗣Dr. Shiu Sing TONG, Department of Physics\n\nChinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting\n🗣Professor Steven GALLAGHER, Faculty of Law\n\nCity Development and Urban History\n🗣Professor Ian MORLEY, Department of History\n\nRobots as Mentors for Children with Autism\n🗣Professor Catherine Wing Chee SO, Department of Educational Psychology\n\nUsing Mobile Sensing to Accurately Assess Individual Exposure to Air Pollution\n🗣Professor Mei Po KWAN, Department of Geography and Resource Management\n\nWhat I Have Learnt as a Surgeon\n🗣Professor Jeremy Yuen Chun TEOH, Department of Surgery",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-03-25T08:34:42Z',
  'Duration': 41,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '653',
  'Likes': '7',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "中大「博文在線」講座系列－金國慶教授 CUHK 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series - Prof. Irwin KING",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n疫情期間旅遊癮發作嗎？介紹你一個旅遊勝地，地名「三磅宇宙」。三磅？宇宙？說的是……大腦\n\n一個大腦三磅重，神經元景點已有千億個，交通複雜，探索難度好比宇宙，跟着當地「資深導遊兼人工智能達人」金國慶教授，應該好好玩，可以治治旅遊癮。\n\n中大計算機科學與工程學系金國慶教授，將會是第二場「博文在線」網上講座的主講嘉賓，他會做你的『「三磅宇宙」探索指南』，帶你遊歷大腦世界，並分享他研究人工智能的有趣歷程，歡迎所有人報名做團友👇\n\n第二場「博文在線」網上講座\n日期：3月25日（星期三）\n時間：下午4時\n講者：中大計算機科學與工程學系金國慶教授\n講題：「三磅宇宙」探索指南\n語言：英語\n網上報名：https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/\n\n----------------------------\n其餘七場「博文在線」網上講座題目\n\n一「點」鍾情：在線約會的創新\n市場學系范亭亭教授\n\n重力波告訴我們什麼？\n物理系湯兆昇博士\n\nChinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting\n法律學院Steven GALLAGHER教授\n\nCity Development and Urban History\n歷史系Ian MORLEY教授\n\n機械人：自閉症孩童的良師益友\n教育心理學系蘇詠芝教授\n\n採用移動感知精準量度個人環境的空氣污染物\n地理與資源管理學系關美寶教授\n\n外科醫生的親身體驗\n外科學系張源津教授\n\n\nMissing travel badly? Here is an attraction that you could visit now, called the '3-pound Universe'. Where is it? It is actually our brain.\n\nOur brain weighs 3 pounds. Every one of its hundred billion neurons could be a 'scenic spot'. Traffic is super busy. Adventure there is as tough as in the Universe. Join the tour with senior tour guide and A.I. expert Professor Irwin KING and you could well satisfy your craving for travel.\n\nProfessor King will be our guest speaker to give the second online talk of the 'Class Acts' series. He will embark with participants on 'A Traveler's Guide to the 3-pound Universe', leading them in an adventurous trip through the universe of the brain. All are welcome to join.\n\nSecond of 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series\nDate: 25 March (Wednesday)\nTime: 4:00pm\nSpeaker: Professor Irwin KING, Department of Computer Science and Engineering\nTopic: A Traveler’s Guide to the 3-pound Universe\nLanguage: English\nOnline registration: https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/\n\n----------------------------\nThe remaining seven 'Class Acts' topics\n\nLove at First Swipe: Innovations for Online Dating\nProfessor Tingting FAN, Department of Marketing\n\nWhat Do Gravitational Waves Tell Us?\nDr. Shiu Sing TONG, Department of Physics\n\nChinese Shipwrecks and the Law of Treasure Hunting\nProfessor Steven GALLAGHER, Faculty of Law\n\nCity Development and Urban History\nProfessor Ian MORLEY, Department of History\n\nRobots as Mentors for Children with Autism\nProfessor Catherine Wing Chee SO, Department of Educational Psychology\n\nUsing Mobile Sensing to Accurately Assess Individual Exposure to Air Pollution\nProfessor Mei Po KWAN, Department of Geography and Resource Management\n\nWhat I Have Learnt as a Surgeon\nProfessor Jeremy Yuen Chun TEOH, Department of Surgery",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-03-20T09:00:26Z',
  'Duration': 31,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '677',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "中大「博文在線」講座系列－陳金樑教授 CUHK 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series - Prof. Alan K.L. Chan",
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n這是一個人人都在網上學習的時代。為了讓中大的知識財富推至所有人，中大最新推出的「博文在線」講座系列，邀請到來自各學院的9位傑出學者開講，人人都可以參加。\n\n「博文在線」第一場將由中大常務副校長陳金樑教授主講，題目為「大學之道4.0」。對全球高等教育界有廣泛了解和經驗的陳教授開發的網上教學課程，在Coursera平台吸引近萬人修讀。想聽聽他的課堂？想知道甚麼是「大學之道4.0」？立即登記第一場「博文在線」講座吧！\n\n第一場「博文在線」網上講座\n日期：3月20日（星期五）\n時間：下午4時\n講者：中大常務副校長陳金樑教授\n講題：大學之道4.0\n語言：英文\n網上報名：https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/\n\n另外，8位來自文學、工商管理、教育、工程、法律、醫學、理學、社會科學8個學院的傑出學者亦將就專長領域分享，主題涵蓋人工智能、重力波、機械人應用於特殊教育、水底尋寶相關法規等議題，詳情可參考以上連結。\n\n\n\nIt is an era of online learning. To let more people reach CUHK's treasure chest of knowledge, CUHK has launched a new online talk series 'Class Acts'. Nine distinguished scholars of different faculties will be our speakers. All are welcome.\n\nThe 'Class Acts' will commence with CUHK Provost Professor Chan Kam-leung, Alan speaking on the topic 'Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0'. Having a broad understanding and experience of the higher education sector in a global context, Professor Chan's online course has drawn close to 10,000 learners on Coursera. If you want to join his class, or learn what higher learning in the era of industry 4.0 is like, register for the first 'Class Acts' online talk.\n\nFirst of 'Class Acts' Online Talk Series\nDate: 20 March (Friday)\nTime: 4:00pm\nSpeaker: CUHK Provost Professor Chan Kam-leung, Alan\nTopic: Higher Learning in the Era of Industry 4.0\nLanguage: English\nOnline registration：https://againstcovid19.cuhk.edu.hk/class-acts-online-talk/\n\nEight other outstanding scholars from eight faculties, namely Arts, Business Administration, Education, Engineering, Law, Medicine, Science and Social Science, will also give their views on their respective areas of expertise. The topics cover artificial intelligence (AI), gravitational waves, the application of robots in education for Special Educational Needs students, and the law of treasure hunting, amongst others. Details could be found at the link above.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-03-16T07:15:57Z',
  'Duration': 54,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '792',
  'Likes': '16',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大搓手液 ‧ 一人一分力 Keeping It Clean CUHK Style!',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n中大搓手液，一共有多少人受惠？中大早於一月下旬開始製作三批酒精搓手液，共約1,900公升，分別派發予50個校內單位、宿舍及餐廳、夥拍36間社福機構，當中包括護老院、長者中心、特殊學校及兒童之家等，以及18間中學共同參與的外展計劃。中大學生、校友亦一同出力，協助分發至多個社區，贈予長者及弱勢社群，與香港人一起同心抗疫。由原料採購、製作，直至送到有需要人士手上，都可以見到中大師生校友的足跡，一人一分力。 \n#中大人 #上下一心 #同心抗疫 #中大自家製 \n \nHow many people have benefited from the CUHK homemade alcohol based handrub? In late January, CUHK prepared to meet the challenge by producing 3 batches of alcohol based handrub to a total of almost 1,900 litres for distribution to 50 CUHK internal units, hostels and canteens. The University has collaborated in its distribution with 36 NGOs serving elderly homes, elderly centres, special schools and residential child care centres, as well as with 18 secondary schools for a school outreaching project. Some of handrub was distributed by our students and alumni directly to the elderly and the under-privileged in several communities. Many CUHK students, staff and alumni have participated in the purchase of raw materials and in making and distributing the alcohol based handrub to those in need, combating the disease together with all Hong Kongers. \n#CUHKers #WeUnite #combatthedisease #CUHKHomemade',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-03-12T03:43:22Z',
  'Duration': 130,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '898',
  'Likes': '15',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '自製酒精搓手液‧配方 "Homemade" Alcohol-Based Handrub‧Formulation',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n自製酒精搓手液相當容易！只需依照以下簡單的步驟，在學校實驗室也可製作出合乎世衛標準的酒精搓手液。\n#自製 #酒精搓手液 #通風環境下進行 #勤洗手 #搓手至少20秒 #直至乾透 \n#不讓病菌散播\n\nIt’s easy to prepare an alcohol based handrub at school laboratories! Let’s follow the steps and prepare the handrub according to the WHO formula.\n#Homemade #AlcoholBasedHandrub #PrepareInaVentilatedEnvironment\n#RubForAtLeast20Seconds #UntilTheHandsAreDry #CombatingTheDisease',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-03-09T04:37:40Z',
  'Duration': 44,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3891',
  'Likes': '25',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '鹽水電池自製漂白水 Making Bleach from Salt, Water and Batteries',
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n鹽🧂、水🚰、碳電池🔋、電線⚡，有齊簡單材料，有安全的實驗室環境，有中大化學系楊英洋教授與吳振輝博士示範，自製漂白水實驗開始👨\u200d🔬👩\u200d🔬\n\n安全注意：氯氣具腐蝕性，會損害人體，不宜家居自製\n\nSalt, water, carbon batteries, wire... With these simple materials, Prof. YEUNG Ying Yeung and Dr. NG Chun Fai of CUHK Department of Chemistry have demonstrated to us how to make bleach under a safe laboratory environment. Let's get started with this experiment👩\u200d🔬👨\u200d🔬\n\nSafety Note: Chlorine gas is corrosive and can harm human body. DIY at home is not recommended.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-02-29T02:30:00Z',
  'Duration': 135,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '4205',
  'Likes': '71',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大人上線啦！',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n😈：「阿仔，咪再打機！出嚟食飯啦！」\n😵：「我上緊堂啊......」\n\n線上教學已經開始了個多星期，究竟在熒光幕與鏡頭前上課的感覺是怎樣？小編找來幾位中大老師及同學，一同聚首Zoom的會議室，細說自己在線教、學的經驗。\n\n想必部分同學亦曾遇過片中提及的問題，✏️大學正收集各位師生對在線教學的意見，並會跟進相關事宜：bit.ly/32iDkB0\n\n#中大人上線 #線上教學 #Zoom課堂 #意見收集 #學能提升研究中心\n\n\n😈: "Stop playing video games! It\'s time to eat!"\n😵: "No... I\'m having a lesson now..."\n\nOnline teaching has been going for more than a week. How are these online classes running? We have invited teachers and students to meet via Zoom and talk about their teaching and learning experience.\n\nSome of you may have also encountered the problems featured in the clip. ✏️The University is collecting feedback from teachers and students via an online survey and will follow up with assistance: bit.ly/32iDkB0\n\n#CUHKersOnline #OnlineTeaching #ClassesViaZoom #FeedbackSurvey #CentreForLearningEnhancementAndResearch',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-02-27T06:25:28Z',
  'Duration': 149,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '717',
  'Likes': '10',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '【中大・永不停步】【CUHK in Action】',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n新型冠狀病毒陰霾下，中大各部門上下一心，不分晝夜，齊心協力維持大學運作，推行在線教學，讓疫潮中的教育不止息、學習不受阻。我們，永不停步。\n\n【CUHK in Action】\nIn the haze of the novel coronavirus, all departments and units of CUHK are united together to work around the clock to maintain the operation of the University, and launch online teaching. The epidemic cannot deter our teaching nor detain our learning.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-02-20T06:33:06Z',
  'Duration': 65,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1714',
  'Likes': '33',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '第八十七屆大會校長致辭 Speech of the Vice-Chancellor in 87th Congregation',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n中大舉行第八十七屆大會（頒授學士及碩士學位典禮），校長段崇智教授在典禮上向畢業生致辭。\n\nCUHK held its 87th Congregation (Conferment of Bachelor’s and Master’s Degrees) on 7 November 2019. Prof. Rocky Tuan, CUHK Vice-Chancellor and President gave a speech to the graduates.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-02-19T07:47:47Z',
  'Duration': 527,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1005',
  'Likes': '11',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '準備・在線 CUHK Online!',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\n2月17日（星期一）就是網上教學的第一天。課要怎麼上？怎樣跟學生互動？實驗怎麼學？怎樣維持有效學習？對很多老師、同學都是新挑戰。\n在有限時間及資源下，要適應這麼大的轉變，亦要保持教學質素，教職員與同學都很努力地作準備。1月30日至2月14日期間，資訊科技服務處（ITSC）一共舉行了22場網上工作坊，讓各學院的老師與學生率先試用，不停培訓，同時提升網絡、增加器材等。另一邊廂，老師們則要適應新教學方式、重新設計課堂、準備教材等。\n面對全新的教學模式，希望中大人一起逐一解決未知的難題，學有所得。加油！\n\n17 February (Monday) will be the first day of online teaching. How will the lectures be conducted? How will interaction with the students be achieved? How can lab classes be made to work? How can learning be kept effective? It is a new challenge to many teachers and students.\nTo ensure quality teaching and learning under the huge change and with limited time and resources, staff and students have put much effort into getting prepared. Our Information Technology Services Centre (ITSC) has organised 22 online workshops from 30 January to 14 February to train the teachers and students, so that they can explore e-learning beforehand. At the same time, ITSC have been busy improving the network, acquiring necessary equipment and more, and teachers have had to adapt to the new teaching mode, redesign the classes, and prepare teaching materials.\nIn facing the unknown challenges that will arise from this new form of teaching, we hope that CUHKers will solve them one by one, together. Wish you all a good harvest from the e-learning experience. Add oil!',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-02-15T09:26:55Z',
  'Duration': 189,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'elearning',
   'onlineteaching',
   'zoom',
   '網上教學'],
  'Views': '1527',
  'Likes': '13',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '許教授提提你—新春防疫篇',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片Please watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【許教授提提你—新春防疫篇】\n農曆新年臨近，香港也出現武漢新型冠狀病毒確診個案，逛人多擠迫的花市時，有什麼要留意呢？新春期間與親友拜年有何注意事項？進食賀年糕點、油炸食物過後，我們該怎樣加強身體健康？中大醫學院內科及藥物治療學系系主任許樹昌教授為大家提供貼士。\n\n#武漢肺炎 #新型冠狀病毒 #中大許樹昌教授 #農曆新年 #拜年 #日日運動身體好 #許教授提提你 #戴口罩 #勤洗手',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-02-01T14:32:05Z',
  'Duration': 88,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '323',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大「自家製」酒精搓手液 CUHK "Homemade" Alcohol-Based Handrub',
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n面對突如其來的疫情，中大上下皆嚴陣以待。為此，本身為化學系教授的中大副校長吳基培教授，率領化學系及大學安全事務處同事，特別製作逾200公升酒精搓手液。已製作完成的75%酒精搓手液，主要將會分發予需要留在學校的宿生，以及在此期間於校園執行必要服務的前線同事，共同抗疫。大學亦已聯絡與中大合作的慈善機構，贈送部分給相關的長者中心及院舍，為弱勢社群略盡綿力。校方更將會運用現有物資，盡量繼續製作酒精搓手液。\n\n不妨細看副校長吳基培教授，以及大學安全事務處處長李繼業先生的講解，一睹這些酒精搓手液的生產過程！\n\n#中大自家製 #酒精搓手液 #共同抗疫 #自家限量製作\n#請注意 #酒精成分或致皮膚敏感 #未必適合所有人士使用\n\n\nFaced with great concern over the disease outbreak, CUHK is prepared to meet the challenge. Prof. Dennis Ng, CUHK Pro-Vice-Chancellor and Professor of the Department of Chemistry, has led colleagues including the Department of Chemistry and the University Safety Office, to prepare over 200 litres of 75% alcohol-based handrub, which will be distributed to students staying in hostels and to frontline staff providing essential services. The alcohol-based handrub will also be distributed, for free, to the charities that have partnered with CUHK. By giving to elderly centres and homes, we will do our best to help the under-privileged in a bid to combat the disease together. CUHK will continue to use existing resources to prepare more alcohol-based handrub.\n\nLet's watch the interview with Prof. Dennis Ng and Mr. Ralph Lee, Director of University Safety about the production of the alcohol-based handrub!\n\n#CUHKHomemade #AlcoholBasedHandrub #CombatingTheDisease #LimitedStock\n#AlcoholAllergyDisclaimer #AlcoholMayCauseAllergy #MayNotSuitEveryone",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-02-01T14:20:49Z',
  'Duration': 103,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '110488',
  'Likes': '1425',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '【許教授提提你—武漢肺炎篇】',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【許教授提提你—武漢肺炎篇】\n武漢新型冠狀病毒疫情不斷擴散蔓延，校園師生應如何預防呢？農曆新年臨近，回內地探親或旅行應採取哪些防疫措施？回港後若出現發燒或呼吸道徵狀如何處理？一旦確診，又有什麼藥物治療呢？中大醫學院內科及藥物治療學系系主任許樹昌教授有以下建議提提大家。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-01-22T03:31:56Z',
  'Duration': 127,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2512',
  'Likes': '34',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '冠軍機械人實驗室 CUHK Robocon Lab Tour',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\n【冠軍機械人實驗室】\n差不多每日每夜都在實驗室裏埋首的中大Robocon隊，這裏算是他們的「第二個家」了。\n\n2019年8月贏得亞太冠軍的中大Robocon隊，現在已正默默為來年大賽作準備了。這時，隊長張錚傑想帶大家走進他們的「第二個家」，了解冠軍機械人是如何誕生，開開眼界。\n\n【Winning Robot Lab】\nThe lab that the CUHK Robocon team has spent almost every day and night in is their ‘second home’.\n\nThe team, which has won the Asia-Pacific Robot Contest 2019, is working on the robot for the coming year. This time in the video, the student team leader Cheung Tsang Kit hosts a lab tour and guides us to learn how the winning robot was born.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-01-14T06:33:56Z',
  'Duration': 208,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1108',
  'Likes': '17',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大新一天 New Beginning At CUHK',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\n【中大家書】 \n各位同學、同事及校友，中大的2019-2020年度第二學期已在本周開始了！校長段崇智敎授亦發出了一封公開信，歡迎各位莘莘學子回校，繼續學業和對真知的探求之旅。校長更表示，他會親自領導多項工作，以重建大學成員、夥伴及不同持份者之間的信任，向世界展示中大的傳統及精神。讓我們一起「細閱」這封「中大家書」吧。詳情：bit.ly/308cdr1 \n#中大家書 #校長段崇智教授 #中大新一天 \n\n【Letter to CUHK】 \nDear Students, Colleagues and Alumni, the second term of the 2019-2020 academic year has started this week. Professor Rocky Tuan, our Vice-Chancellor and President, issued an open letter to welcome all students back to the campus to continue their academic and intellectual pursuits. In his letter, Professor Tuan said he would personally spearhead many initiatives to rebuild confidence among our members, partners, and different stakeholders and to tell the world what CUHK stands for. Let us “peruse” this “Letter to CUHK”. Details: bit.ly/37Mn5xt \n#LettertoCUHK #ProfessorRockyTuan #NewBeginningAtCUHK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2020-01-09T07:55:33Z',
  'Duration': 108,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3024',
  'Likes': '54',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '校園安全 Campus Safety',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n衝突事件後，為了讓師生安全又安心，大學迅速委託了獨立認可的化驗所，檢測二號橋附近以至遠離衝突範圍的泥土、空氣和食水樣本。\n\n結果發現受關注的化學物質水平對人體健康無顯著影響，校方隨即展開二號橋附近的修復及清潔工作，大學保健處亦密切跟進大學成員健康，為第二學期開學作好準備。檢測結果請瀏覽 bit.ly/38YQLZG\n\n#辛苦各位中大同事 #願員生安心\n\n\n\n\nAfter the confrontation, the University promptly appointed an independent accredited laboratory to test soil, air and water samples from the areas surrounding No. 2 Bridge and areas even further away from the spot.\n\nSoon after receiving the test results and knowing that health hazards of the contaminants from samples are negligible, our colleagues started repair of roads and cleaning work near No. 2 Bridge. At the same time, the University Health Service is keeping an eye on health of the university members. The University is getting ready for the commencement of the Second Term. Details of test results: bit.ly/2Mfjujk\n\n#ThankYouColleagues #TryOurBestToHeal',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-12-20T19:45:03Z',
  'Duration': 125,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '335',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Meet the CUHK Freshmen 2019 中大新生2019',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\r\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nDo you know that more than 50 nationalities study at The Chinese University of Hong Kong? On our campus, you can see faces from different corners of the world anytime - just like Aditya, Adrian, Angelica, Aru, Marta and Timo - Click to meet our freshmen now!👋\r\n\nMore information about CUHK International Admissions, please visit http://admission.cuhk.edu.hk/international\r\n\n\n\n你知道嗎？中大校內有來自50個不同國籍的學生，Aditya、Adrian、Angelica、Aru、Marta和Timo就是其中幾位2019年入學的新生，他們在片中用自己母語跟大家打招呼啊👋你哋好！\r\n\n國際生入學資訊👉http://admission.cuhk.edu.hk/international',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-12-13T04:13:48Z',
  'Duration': 113,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1120',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大9位教授獲選「2019年全球最廣獲徵引研究人員」| Nine CUHK Professors Named “Highly Cited Researchers 2019”',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n🔎📚 有沒有想過學者們平日寫論文時，會在哪裏查找資料？\n\n最近9位中大教授便獲科睿唯安（Clarivate Analytics）選為「2019年最廣獲徵引研究人員」（Highly Cited Researchers 2019），表彰他們的學術著作獲國際其他學者廣泛引用。本年僅得6,217名來自60個國家或地區的研究人員入選名單，約佔全球學者總數的0.1%，足證他們於學術界及其研究範疇的影響力舉足輕重。\n\n9位中大教授分別為於「臨床醫學」類別獲譽的莫樹錦教授；「跨領域」類別的陳力元教授、沈祖堯教授、黃煒燊教授、關美寶教授、余濟美教授及汪正平教授；「經濟及商業」類別的區大衛教授；以及「精神科/心理學」類別的李誠教授。詳情：bit.ly/383n9tx\n\n\n--------------------------------------\n🔎📚 Have you ever wondered how academics cite references in their papers?\n\nNine CUHK professors have earned the honour of being included by Clarivate Analytics in the list of “Highly Cited Researchers 2019” for being among the world’s top researchers whose work has been highly cited by fellow academics, thereby making a significant impact in ongoing research in their respective fields of study. The 2019 list includes 6,217 highly cited researchers in various fields from nearly 60 countries and regions, representing 0.1% of all professors and researchers worldwide.\n\nThey are Prof. Tony MOK (Clinical Medicine); Prof. Henry CHAN Lik Yuen, Prof. Joseph SUNG, Prof. Vincent WONG Wai-Sun, Prof. KWAN Mei-Po, Prof. Jimmy YU and Prof. WONG Ching Ping (Cross-Field); Prof. David AHLSTROM (Economic & Business); Prof. LEE Sing (Psychiatry/Psychology). Details: bit.ly/33MExiN',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-12-05T02:00:50Z',
  'Duration': 72,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '529',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「智慧的探索」公開講座 |  莫樹錦教授主講 | 抗癌漫長路',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n國際肺癌權威、中大醫學院腫瘤學系系主任莫樹錦教授多年來致力研究肺癌治療，率領全球將晚期肺癌治療個人化，開創標靶治療，研究免疫療法，與病人共同作戰。莫教授於公開講座上，分享他在癌症研究的漫漫長征，為病人創造希望的經歷。 \n\nConsidered “a legend in medical oncology”, Professor MOK has been standing by patients and researching lung cancer treatments for years and he is the first one to really put into practice personalised medicine in advanced lung cancer. He founded targeted therapy and studies on the application of immunotherapy. He told the audience in the lecture of his experience on the long and winding road to conquer cancer and about creating hope for patients.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-12-03T02:13:50Z',
  'Duration': 5243,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '211963',
  'Likes': '3021',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「大通」同學仔 圍埋傾吓偈 🤷♀️💭🙋♂️  Chit-Chat Among UGE Students',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n\n📣 想喺下學期報讀UGEC大學通識課程的同學，請留意！\n\n大學將於下學期開設「21世紀全球公民的重大挑戰」通識課程，同一個課程內齊集不同學系的教授，與同學探討各個全球議題。想知道課程究竟是讀些甚麼？讀完又有甚麼得着？小編找來幾位上年修畢課程的師兄、師姐，交畀他們現身說法！\n\nUGEC 2819：21世紀全球公民的重大挑戰\n⏰ 時間：逢星期三下午4時半至6時15分\n🏢 地點：利黃瑤璧樓（ELB）202室\n\n#大學通識課程 #21世紀全球公民的重大挑戰 #全球議題\n\n\n\n--------------------------------------\n\n📣 Call for students who want to study Area C programme of University General Education course in next semester!\n\nThe University will launch the General Education course ‘Grand Challenges for Global Citizens in the 21st Century’. It is a precious chance to have professors from different departments talking about numerous key global issues in one particular course. Check out the video to learn about what senior fellow students think about this course.\n\nUGEC 2819: Grand Challenges for Global Citizens in the 21st Century\n⏰ Time: 4:30 p.m. -6:15 p.m., every Wednesday\n🏢 Venue: Room 202, Esther Lee Building (ELB)\n\n#UniversityGeneralEducationCourse #GrandChallengesForGlobalCitizensInThe21stCentury',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-12-02T06:43:13Z',
  'Duration': 126,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '225',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大月曆 2020 CUHK 2020 Calendar',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n迎接新一年，中大以「 CUHK Innovations」 為主題製作2020月曆，展現大學開展的四大策略性研究領域及卓越學科領域。研究發揮深遠影響，造福社會。觀看短片，了解多些 CUHK Innovations！\n\n中大2020月曆即日起於中大紀念品銷售處有售，定價港幣40元正，所有收益將撥捐中大I‧CARE博群計劃。\n\nCUHK would like to present to you the 2020 Calendar of the University featuring “CUHK Innovations”. We are demonstrating the University’s four strategic areas of research and the areas of excellence. Our research will benefit humanity by addressing some of the most pressing global challenges. Check out the video to understand more about CUHK Innovations!\n\nThe desktop calendar is offered at HK$40 at the CUHK Souvenir Counter. Proceeds from the calendar sales will be donated to support CUHK I‧CARE Programme.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-11-28T01:52:37Z',
  'Duration': 42,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '5268',
  'Likes': '11',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'University Education Award 2019 二零一九年博文教學獎',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n恭喜教育學院梁鳳蓮博士及其團隊、工程學院施義德教授和劉達銘教授，獲頒二零一九年博文教學獎，以表揚他們豐富學生學習體驗的貢獻及成就。請觀看短片，了解更多他們的教學心得。\n\nCongratulations to Dr. Elean Leung and her team of the Faculty of Education, and Professor Sidharth Jaggi and Professor Darwin Lau of the Faculty of Engineering on being awarded the University Education Award 2019, in recognition of their dedication and achievements in enriching students’ learning experience. Check out the video to learn more about their teaching.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-11-26T04:08:34Z',
  'Duration': 316,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '495',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '一磚一瓦 重新出發 Restore and Restart',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n全賴一班前線同事群策群力的連番修復清理，中大校園經已大致恢復平靜。儘管如此，校方仍會進一步檢測並化驗校園環境，確保為同學及教職員們提供一個安全的學習及工作環境。\n\n修復工作艱巨需時，同事們將繼續不懈投入善後工作。校方由衷感謝各中大成員不忘堅守崗位，一同跨過困難時刻。\n\n\n\nThanks to the concerted efforts of our dedicated front line colleagues in the campus restoration and cleanup, the CUHK campus is now generally safe and in order. The University has entrusted a laboratory to take samplings and conduct a chemical examination of the campus environment in a bid to provide a safe learning and working environment for our students and staff.\n\nOur colleagues will continue to work tirelessly in the time it takes to complete restoration works. The University would like to extend gratitude to each of the CUHK members who have served the University with dedication and professionalism and overcome this challenging time together.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-11-23T04:54:57Z',
  'Duration': 100,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1331',
  'Likes': '42',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '二零一九年中大畢業生感言 Sharing by CUHK Graduates of 2019',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n畢業了，回憶在中大的日子，每位畢業生心中都有最想多謝的人。你們最想多謝的是誰呢？\n\n他們有來見證這個屬於你的畢業典禮嗎？\n\n#2019畢業生 #恭喜畢業了 #中大畢業禮2019\n\nIt's graduation day. Flashing back to their time at CUHK, every graduate has a special person to thank. For you, who is it?\n\nDid they come to witness your graduation today?\n\n#ClassOf2019 #CongratulationsOnYourGraduation #CUHKCongretaion2019",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-11-07T10:06:15Z',
  'Duration': 229,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '7273',
  'Likes': '38',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '高錕教授榮獲諾貝爾獎10周年 The 10th Anniversary of Professor Sir Charles Kao being awarded the Nobel Prize',
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n🔗🌐🎖️ 高錕教授於2009年憑藉他在光纖通訊應用的貢獻，獲頒諾貝爾物理學獎。\n\n今年正值高教授奪獎10周年，大學特意回顧這位「光纖之父」的非凡貢獻；更找來幾位歷屆「高錕獎學基金」得獎者，細味他們如何延續高教授的學術研究精神，在不同領域貢獻世界。\n\n#高錕教授 #榮獲諾貝爾獎10周年 #光纖之父 #高錕獎學基金\n\n\n--------------------------------------\n\n🔗🌐🎖️ In 2009, Professor Sir Charles Kao was awarded the Nobel Prize in Physics for his accomplishment in the development of fibre optic technologies.\n\nTo celebrate the 10th anniversary of Professor Kao's award, the University is paying tribute to the remarkable achievements of this 'Father of Fibre Optics'. Three 'Charles K. Kao Scholarship Endowment Fund' awardees will give accounts of their studies and research and how they are passing on his spirit as eminent researchers to contribute to the world in different ways.\n\n#ProfessorSirCharlesKao #FatherOfFibreOptics #CharlesKKaoScholarshipEndowmentFund",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-11-04T06:15:55Z',
  'Duration': 257,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2463',
  'Likes': '20',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '兩代「工程女」Battle 💥 Battle of ‘Engineering Girls’ from Two Generations',
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n「聽講 engine 嘅男女比例好誇張，一直好多謠言🚹🚹🚹🚹🚹🚺……」\n\n究竟工程學是否傳聞中的「全男班」？小編找來中大系統工程與工程管理學系的首位女教授、系主任蒙美玲教授以及兩位女同學 fact check 一番。想知道幾位「工程女」為何鍾情工程學？工程學又是否男生專利？不妨細聽她們的聲音！\n\n#工程學女將 #男女比例 #工程學院\n\n\n--------------------------------------\n\n“There were many rumnours that the ratio of male to female students of Engineering was exaggerated 🚹🚹🚹🚹🚹🚺…”\n\nWondering if the rumour is true? We have invited Professor Helen Meng, who is the first female professor and Chairman of CUHK Department of Systems Engineering and Engineering Management, and two female students to find out. Want to know why these girls are passionate about engineering and what their edge is in terms of gender? Let's watch the video clip.\n\n#GirlsFromEngineering #GenderRatio #FacultyOfEngineering",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-10-25T09:19:28Z',
  'Duration': 174,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1090',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「智慧的探索」公開講座 | 趙志裕教授主講 | 心想事成：美滿人生心理學',
  'Description': "請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n緣份天注定？還是關係靠經營？❤️\n\n「成長型心態」的人相信世上沒有一拍即合的關係，努力可使大家合拍；「固定型心態」的人相信若真有緣就一拍即合，要努力耕耘就是不合拍。\n\n研究顯示，「成長型心態」的情侶關係會較為穩定長久。其實，心態不止影響愛情，還影響學業、事業、創意及世界觀。今天（9月23日），在第7場 #55周年校慶「智慧的探索」講座中，中大社會科學院院長、卓敏心理學講座教授趙志裕教授以研究結果說明，若我們相信凡事都可以通過努力而達成，即擁有「成長型心態」，在各方面表現都會較成功的💪💪💪詳情：bit.ly/2l0fnwZ\n\n\n\n\nWhen it comes to love, do you believe in fate or do you think your efforts count in building a relationship?❤️\n\nThose with a growth mindset believe a relationship needs to be built through the efforts of both. Those with a fixed mindset believe a bad relationship is destined to fail.\n\nStudies show that a relationship stays stronger and lasts longer for couple with a growth mindset. Your mindset doesn't only affect your love, but also your academic performance, career, creativity and world vision. Today (23 September), Prof. Chiu Chi-yue, CUHK Dean of Social Science and Choh-Ming Li Professor of Psychology spoke in the 7th lecture in the CUHK 55th Anniversary 'The Pursuit of Wisdom’ Public Lecture Series. He illustrated with scientific evidence that a growth mindset, in which we believe our talents can be developed with effort, learning and dedication, brings us closer to success. 💪💪💪Details: bit.ly/2m74WI7",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-10-24T10:28:33Z',
  'Duration': 6078,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1557',
  'Likes': '21',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},

  'Title': '第一次踏足中大 First Encounter with CUHK',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
