  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '陳德霖校友山城之旅 Alumnus Norman Chan Visited CUHK',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n剛卸任香港金融管理局總裁的陳德霖校友日前重返母校，與一眾師弟妹及「中大人」碰面交流。\n\n想知道陳校友重返宿舍主持夜話🗣🌙、於Fintech大師班及商業管理講座分享行業睿智💵📈、師生校友籃球友誼賽🏀⛹️\u200d♂️親身上陣的風采，馬上去片！\n\n#傑出校友訪問計劃2019 #陳德霖校友\n\n\n--------------------------------------\n\nAlumnus Norman T.L. Chan, who has just retired from the position of Chief Executive of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, returned to his alma mater for a series of activities to interact with students, staff and alumni of the University recently.\n\nWant to know how he hosted the ‘night talk’ at the university hostel 🗣🌙 , what he said at FinTech Master Class and Business Lecture 💵📈, and how he performed in the basketball friendly match🏀⛹️♂️ with staff, students and alumni? Let’s watch the clip now!\n\n#DistinguishedAlumniInResidenceProgramme2019\n#AlumnusNormanChan',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-10-08T03:21:45Z',
  'Duration': 148,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '569',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「智慧的探索」公開講座 | 科大衛教授主講 | 孝道與產業：為甚麼「孝」有助商業發展？',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n若問一位商科教授如何做生意，他的答案很可能是洞悉市場；但歷史教授眼中的營商之道，卻變成一個「孝」字？\n\n中大偉倫歷史學研究教授及中國研究中心主任科大衛教授（Prof. David Faure）於9月9日主講第6場55周年校慶「智慧的探索」公開講座系列，便與各位一同翻族譜、訪祠堂，細說明、清時代的華南宗族如何巧妙落實「法人」地位，讓他們在沒有公司法的背景下，仍得以有效管理財產。\n\n--------------------------------------\n中大55周年校慶「智慧的探索」公開講座系列講座報名：bit.ly/2QDoxsR\n\nIf you asked a business professor for tips on doing business, his answer would probably be demand and supply analysis. But why would the answer from a history professor be ‘filial piety’?\n\nIn the sixth lecture of the CUHK 55th Anniversary ‘The Pursuit of Wisdom’ Public Lecture Series on 9 Sept, Prof. David Faure, CUHK Wei Lun Research Professor of History and the Director of Centre for China Studies, talked about the relationship between filial piety and business through genealogies and ancestral halls. Prof. Faure also revealed that, remarkably, our ancestors in Southern China recognised the private ownership of capital through the traditional virtue of filial piety when China had no company law during the Ming and Qing dynasties.\n\n--------------------------------------\nRegister for other CUHK 55th anniversary “The Pursuit of Wisdom” Public Lectures: bit.ly/2Rjxqx8',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-09-25T08:15:55Z',
  'Duration': 5296,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2473',
  'Likes': '42',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '與「崇基師兄」陳德霖的約會 Meeting with Chung Chi College Alumnus Norman Chan',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n不說不知，原來金管局總裁陳德霖在中大唸書時，凡是圓的東西都感興趣，為了它更不惜每朝早6點半起牀出門…… 馬上去片，看看這位「崇基師兄」究竟為甚麼如此着迷！\n\n陳德霖校友將會參與「傑出校友訪問計劃2019」，於10月3至5日回校，與一眾「中大人」交流。歡迎同學、教職員及校友網上報名：bit.ly/2ll0chw\n\n開幕典禮暨專題演講「人生交叉點」（語言：廣東話）\n⏰ 10月3日（四）下午5時至6時30分\n\n大師班「FinTech對金融產業的革新和挑戰」（語言：英語）\n⏰ 10月4日（五）上午10時30分至11時30分\n\n師生校友籃球友誼賽（語言：廣東話）\n⏰ 10月4日（五）下午3時至4時\n\n商業管理講座系列：“It Works for Me: Life Lessons from Norman Chan”（語言：英語）\n⏰ 10月4日（五）下午6時30分至8時\n\n專題演講「香港的國際金融中心角色和前瞻」暨閉幕禮（語言：廣東話）\n⏰ 10月5日（六）上午11時至中午12時30分\n\n#傑出校友訪問計劃 #陳德霖校友 #10月3至5日 #人生交叉點 #FinTech大師班 #師生校友籃球友誼賽 #商業管理講座系列 #香港的國際金融中心角色和前瞻\n\n\n\n\nWhen our distinguished alumnus Norman T.L. Chan, the Chief Executive of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) was at the University, he was interested in everything that is round, an enthusiasm which even got him up at 6.30 a.m. every morning. Let’s watch his interview and find out what he was obsessed with.\n\nOur alumnus Norman Chan will visit his alma mater from 3 to 5 October under the Distinguished Alumni-in-Residence Programme 2019 and interact with students and members of the CUHK family. Welcome all students, staff and alumni to register online: bit.ly/2ll0chw\n\nOpening Ceremony cum Keynote Speech —“Crossroads in Life” (Language: Cantonese)\n⏰ 3 Oct (Thu) 5:00pm－6:30pm\n\nMaster Class: "FinTech — the Innovation and Challenges on the Financial Sector" (Language: English)\n⏰ 4 Oct (Fri) 10:30am－11:30am\n\nBasketball Friendly Match with Staff, Students and Alumni (Language: Cantonese)\n⏰ 4 Oct (Fri) 3:00pm－4:00pm\n\nBusiness Lecture Series: “It Works for Me: Life Lessons from Norman Chan” (Language: English)\n⏰ 4 Oct (Fri) 6:30pm－8:00pm\n\nKeynote Speech —“Hong Kong: International Financial Centre and Future Prospects” cum Closing Ceremony (Language: Cantonese)\n⏰ 5 Oct (Sat) 11:00am－12:30pm\n\n#DARP #NormanChan #3to5October #CrossroadsInLife #FinTechMasterClass #BasketballFriendlyMatch #LifeLessonsFromNormanChan\n#BusinessLectureSeries #HongKongInternationalFinancialCentreAndFutureProspects',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-09-18T01:34:51Z',
  'Duration': 130,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '640',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '第五屆大中華區法律史研討會系列2019-20 5th Year Greater China Legal History Seminar Series 2019-20',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n研討會旨在提供平台討論大中華地區各種法律議題的歷史發展，並由來自各個領域的專家主講，歡迎有興趣的人士參加。\n詳情及登記，請瀏覽：http://www.law.cuhk.edu.hk/en/events/greater-china-1920/\n\nIn 2019-20, CUHK Law continues to organise the 5th year Greater China Legal History Seminar Series which commences in September 2019.\nFor further details, please visit: \nhttp://www.law.cuhk.edu.hk/en/events/greater-china-1920/',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-09-10T02:00:29Z',
  'Duration': 176,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '184',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '做一件好事💗能感染世界',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n「做一件好事💗能感染世界」絕對是有科學根據的說法🌎🔍\n\n我們早前邀請中大同學Jackie與Winson做一些令人窩心的好事，希望接收好意的人會把善意擴散開去。研究指出，做好事會令你和對方體內荷爾蒙變化，大家心情轉好，對方會因此而延續善意，對更多人好。\n\n隨機做好事（Random Act of Kindness）是中大通識課程「豐盛人生：正向心理學的理論與實踐」其中一課。課程推出至今，反應熱烈，由去年收生80人增加一倍至今個學期160人。（課程編號：UGED 1553）\n\n#豐盛人生 #正向心理學 #日行一善 #感染世界',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-09-06T08:44:23Z',
  'Duration': 59,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', '#正向心理學'],
  'Views': '214',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Experiencing life at the United Nations: a student interpreter's perspective 學生譯員：在聯合國工作是一種怎樣的體驗",
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nWant to know how UN interpreters work? Our MA students of the Department of Translation have experienced it firsthand on their recent study trip to the United Nations Office in Vienna. They are sharing their typical day with you in this short film!\n想知道聯合國譯員們是如何工作的嗎？今年5月，應聯合國維也納辦事處邀請，5名翻譯系研究生親身體驗了聯合國的日常工作與生活，並將通過下面的短片與你分享此次修學之旅。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-08-05T06:54:21Z',
  'Duration': 282,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '713',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '分享．愛',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n中大愛心月餅正式接受預訂！每售出一盒，「中大．關懷」服務團便會與你攜手，送上一個「中大月餅」予沙田及大埔的獨居長者。趁著中秋佳節為家人朋友、獨居長者送一祝福，分享便是快樂。\n訂購詳情：www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake\n\n\n"CUHK Mooncake" is now available for charity sale! For each box sold, the CUHK．Care Service Team will deliver a free mooncake to the elderly living alone in Shatin or Tai Po. Join us to share your love to those in need at this festive season.\nPurchase Details: www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-07-30T07:19:55Z',
  'Duration': 71,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '261',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'We are CUHK ROBOCON TEAM 全港大專生機械人大賽2019 - 中大隊',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n沒有生命的機械人，承載着一群中大人的熱血。\n\n在「全港大專生Robocon機械人大賽」現場觀賽，感覺像看世界盃、或者NBA總決賽，熱血沸騰。「開心」這個詞並不足以形容中大Robocon隊贏出比賽的心情，他們絕對是「激動」，因為他們花的是很多個凌晨，經歷的是無數次失敗，才成就今天的冠軍。\n\n今年，是中大計算機科學三年級生、Robocon隊員張錚傑參加比賽的第三年，聽他分享他與隊員背後的奮鬥，沾一下他們的熱血。\n\nA robot with no heartbeat carries the passion of a group of CUHKers.\n\nWatching the Robocon Hong Kong Competition was as exciting as watching the World Cup, or an NBA final. CUHK Robocon was pumped to win because they had worked through so many nights and so many failiures for it.\n\nThis is the third year Cheung Tsang Kit, a CUHK Computer Science Year 3 student, has taken part in the competition. Listen to him telling of the hard work of the team and you will be inspired.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-07-24T06:25:30Z',
  'Duration': 107,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Robocon'],
  'Views': '1459',
  'Likes': '19',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '環球義工之旅  Volunteer Services Journey Around the World',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n「我希望人生不單是為自己而活，更要為身邊人帶來影響。」\n\n來自新聞與傳播學院的李天心同學，去年隻身一人環遊12個國家，參加世界各地的義工活動，探訪雲南偏遠村落的山區兒童、去丹麥大型草地音樂節執垃圾、在匈牙利的環保活動搬運木頭等等，短短4個半月完成這趟環球義工之旅。李同學更憑藉其關懷世界的心志，奪得「2018傑出學生獎 — 社會服務（社區）」獎項。\n\n新一屆「傑出學生獎」現正接受同學自薦報名，歡迎各位在創意與發明、體育、藝術、社會服務或其他範疇有特別表現的同學於網上報名。自薦報名期將於7月15日截止，立即行動：bit.ly/2S8F5eK\n\n"I hope my life will not only be for my own good but also to have an impact on people surrounding me."\n\nOur student Lee Tin Sum from the School of Journalism and Communication travelled to 12 countries alone last summer and participated in different volunteer services. She joined a charity visit to children in rural areas of Yunnan, China, helped to be a voluntary scavenger at a music festival in Denmark, moved wood in an environmental protection campaign in Hungary and took part in other volunteer services in four and a half months. She received the ‘2018 Outstanding Students Awards – Social Service (for the Community)’ for her commitment to the world.\n\nYou are cordially invited to apply for the 2019 Outstanding Students Awards through self-nomination. The deadline of self-nomination will be 15 July. Please apply online now if you have notable achievements and made significant contributions which have had a continual and positive impact in the areas of Innovation and Invention, Sports, Arts, Social Service or Special Achievement: bit.ly/2S8F5eK',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-07-15T09:48:25Z',
  'Duration': 188,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', '傑出學生獎', '關懷世界'],
  'Views': '105',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「智慧的探索」公開講座 | 蒙美玲教授主講 | 懂聽懂說的人工智能如何改善人類的學習及生活',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n「人工智能會搶去人類工作嗎？」「答案是會的，因此我們更要積極裝備自己！」\n\n中大工程學院蒙美玲教授2019年6月3日主講55周年校慶「智慧的探索」公開講座系列，主題為「懂聽懂說的人工智能如何改善人類的學習及生活」。蒙教授即席暢談她多年來研究人工智能技術的歷程，揭秘 A.I.技術是如何懂聽懂說，更是如何幫助中風、腦癱等病的患者。\n\n--------------------------------------\n中大55周年校慶「智慧的探索」公開講座系列講座報名：bit.ly/2QDoxsR\n\n‘Could Artificial Intelligence make people lose their jobs?’ ‘Yes, that's why we need to re-skill ourselves.’\n\nProf. Helen Meng of CUHK Faculty of Engineering gave her lecture in ‘The Pursuit of Wisdom’ Public Lecture Series on the topic of “Artificial Intelligence in Speaking and Listening for Learning and Well-Being”  on 3 June 2019. She unfolded her years of experience in studying artificial intelligence and explained how A.I. managed to listen, talk and even help patients with strokes and cerebral palsy. The full video of Prof. Meng’s public lecture will be uploaded to the internet. \n\n--------------------------------------\nRegister for other CUHK 55th anniversary “The Pursuit of Wisdom” Public Lectures: bit.ly/2Rjxqx8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-06-12T07:55:28Z',
  'Duration': 5171,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '925',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '飯堂廣東話  Learning Cantonese at the Canteen',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n一個人！廣東話？無問題…… 究竟廣東話是否真的如此困難？\n\n來自英屬哥倫比亞大學的交換生Anne-Marie Dahms同學，便坦言在飯堂點餐亦絕非易事…… 不妨測試一下她的廣東話水平如何；平日「雞同鴨講」的她，更有貼士給予其他外國生及香港人！\n\nTable for one please! Cantonese? No problem... Is it hard to learn Cantonese?\n\nOur exchange student Anne-Marie Dahms from the University of British Columbia says honestly that ordering food at the canteen is not an easy task to start with. Let’s find out how proficient she is in Cantonese and hear her tips for foreign students and Honkongers!',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-06-10T04:33:10Z',
  'Duration': 137,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1289',
  'Likes': '24',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「智慧的探索」公開講座 | 朱明中教授主講 | 宇宙的美好缺憾',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n\n「原來恆星不永恆」\n「壯麗的宇宙，看不見的遠超看得見的」\n\n以上是朱明中教授心中「宇宙的美好缺憾」。在5月24日的「智慧的探索」公開講座中，朱教授以梵高畫作《星夜》形容宇宙，有看得見的星星，亦有看不見的暗物質，而星星又終有爆炸、熄滅的一天。但正因為有着這些遺憾，令一群「傻仔傻女」（朱教授笑言他的學生是傻仔傻女）醉心研究，尋找所有未知的答案。講座詳情：bit.ly/2JCQSRj\n\n--------------------------------------\n中大55周年校慶「智慧的探索」公開講座系列講座報名：bit.ly/2QDoxsR\n\n【Beautiful Asymmetries in the Universe】\n'Stars don't live forever.'\n'In the magnificent universe, what we can't see is far more than what we can.'\n\nIn Prof. Chu Ming-chung's mind, these are the 'beautiful asymmetries in the universe'. In 'The Pursuit of Wisdom' Public Lecture on 24 May, Prof. Chu used Vincent van Gogh's art piece 'The Starry Night' to describe the universe, 'There are stars that we can find but, at the same time, dark matter that we can't find. Even if we can find the stars, they will one day explode and become black holes.' Wait, don't be too sad. These imperfections have attracted 'silly boys and silly girls' (Prof. Chu's way of calling his students) to immerse themselves in studying and reveal the unknowns. Details of the lecture: bit.ly/2MhbYH8\n\n--------------------------------------\nRegister for other CUHK 55th anniversary “The Pursuit of Wisdom” Public Lectures: bit.ly/2Rjxqx8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-06-05T09:04:02Z',
  'Duration': 5946,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'cosmology', 'astronomy'],
  'Views': '4728',
  'Likes': '84',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '重溫「中大創業日2019」精華片段',
  'Description': '「中大創業日2019」早前於校園順利舉行！活動匯聚山城的創業力量，藉中大創業大賽、創業項目展覽、日內瓦國際發明展得獎項目巡禮、創業大師班、與校友投資者會面等多元化活動，激發一眾創業朋友的創新智慧，踏出做老闆的第一步。馬上重溫「中大創業日2019」的精華片段！🎞🎥\n#有得揀做老闆 #中大創業日2019 #創業嘉年華 #來年再會\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-06-05T08:13:01Z',
  'Duration': 108,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'entrepreneur',
   '創業',
   '中文大學',
   'boss',
   'investors',
   'thechineseuniversityofhongkong'],
  'Views': '152',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '永不轉會的「中大名宿」 CUHK Legends who Never Request a Transfer',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n不少「打工仔」動輒就會「密謀」轉工，有沒有想過在同一機構效力35年？\n\n中大早前表揚逾250位長期服務大學的員工，當中4位獲得25年及35年長期服務獎的得主，皆「中大教職員足球會」隊員，90年代初已經一齊踢波。幾位「中大名宿」分別來自交通處、視聽製作部，亦有工程學院副院長以及新亞書院院長……究竟此組合如何擦出火花？他們又有否想過要入紙申請「轉會」？\n\nMany of you may frequently hunt for new jobs. Could you ever imagine serving in the same organisation for 35 years?\n\nThe University presented the 2018 Long Service Awards last month to over 250 staff members. Among the 25 and 35 Years Long Service Award winners, 4 of them are the members of CUHK Staff Football Club and have been playing football together since the early 90s. Interestingly, the team are from the Transport Office, the Audio-Visual Division, the Associate Dean of the Faculty of Engineering and the Head of New Asia College. Let's find out how this combination works on the pitch and why they have served the University for such a long period.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-05-27T08:14:07Z',
  'Duration': 99,
  'Tags': ['中大教職員足球會', '長期服務獎', '中大名宿'],
  'Views': '367',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '正向員工服務獎 2018/19 Positive Workplace Service Award 2018/19',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n中大負起教育與學術研究的使命，需要所有員工同心協力，學校的教職員如何發揮最大力量？有「好同事」很重要！那何謂「好同事」呢？以下列舉7件「好同事」會做的事：\n\n1. 盡心盡力做好本份\n2. 耐心聆聽，願意花時間了解同事想法\n3. 同事有需要但未開口，已主動幫忙\n4. 協助新同事盡快適應工作\n5. 欣賞同事的優點，不吝嗇讚賞\n6. 提點同事不足，並請同事提點自己不足\n7. 提醒同事照顧自己，「我們不需要做super human，只要做human就可以了」\n\n老套也要說一句，彼此關懷尊重，互相信任，是「正向工作間」的核心元素，返工開心，做事亦事半功倍。小編也要趁這個機會多謝各位好同事！\n\n中大「正向員工服務獎」得獎名單：bit.ly/2VpKzqB\n#正向工作間 #在乎溝通與關懷 #多謝同事\n\nA university serving academic research and education purposes needs all staff to work together. How can all of them give their best? Working with good colleagues is one of the major factors, but what defines a good colleague? Below are 7 things a good colleague will do:\n\n1. Be fully committed to playing his or her part\n2. Be patient in listening to and understanding colleagues' thoughts\n3. Take the initiative to help colleagues even before they ask\n4. Give a hand to new colleagues to quickly adapt to the working environment\n5. Appreciate colleagues and always express it\n6. Advise colleagues on how to improve on their weaknesses and ask them to do the same in return\n7. Remind colleagues to take good care of themselves: We don't need to be 'super human', but to be 'human'\n\n'Care and concern, mutual respect and trust are core elements of a positive workplace.' It sounds a cliche but it’s true. Happy work life can bring efficiency. Thank you, colleagues.\n\nCUHK Positive Workplace Service Awardees: bit.ly/2VpKzqB\n#PositiveWorkplace #Communication #Care #ThankYouColleagues",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-05-14T08:34:52Z',
  'Duration': 848,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '175',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '研究機械人尾巴的工程師 The Engineer who Studies Tails for Robots',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n袋鼠會彈跳，豹會翻筋斗，全靠他們的尾巴。機械與自動化工程學系歐國威教授就從大自然取得靈感，研究給機械人加上尾巴，讓他們變得更加靈活。\n\nTails help kangaroos to jump and leopards to turn somersaults. Prof. Samuel Au from CUHK Department of Mechanical and Automation Engineering (MAE) was inspired by biology and nature to study giving robots a tail, so that they can be more flexible and versatile.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-05-14T07:33:34Z',
  'Duration': 79,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'robots'],
  'Views': '393',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大創業大賽2019 - 五強爭霸  CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2019 - Five Finalists do battle',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n晉身最後五強的初創公司如何得到評審團的青睞，贏得「中大創業大賽2019」冠軍？一同看看他們如何各展所長。\n\nHow do the 5 finalists win the judges’ hearts and take the championship of 'CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition 2019'? Let’s watch how they show their strengths.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-04-30T08:45:35Z',
  'Duration': 85,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '235',

  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "進學「喵星人」 The 'Meow' at Learning Garden",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n進學園早前出現「喵星人」🐱，說的是中大藝術系一年級生Kelly在白板上畫的貓，超逼真！後來，她又在圖書館另一幅牆上畫了一幅畫……\n\nKelly表示，畫畫是她減壓的方法，而白板貓引起的迴響亦讓她尋回自己的初衷，穿過瓶頸重新出發。臨近final，Kelly在圖書館入口處的牆上再畫了一幅畫，希望為考final的同學打氣，提醒大家記得錫住自己，找個方式為自己減壓！ \n\nA few weeks ago, a 'cat' at the Learning Garden grabbed a lot of attention. That was the lifelike cat drawn by Kelly, CUHK Fine Arts Year 1 student. Following that, she drew a new picture on another wall in the library.\n\n'Drawing is a good way to relieve my stress,' said Kelly. The overwhelming response created by the cat drawing reminded her of her initial motivation. Now she has cleared her mental bottleneck. She would like to cheer up students preparing for exams and remind them to find ways to relieve their stress, which led to this work on the wall near the main library entrance.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-04-18T12:32:06Z',
  'Duration': 115,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', '中大有晴', 'Sunshine at CUHK'],
  'Views': '488',
  'Likes': '16',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '達文西機械臂外科系統 | da Vinci Medical Robot',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n機械與自動化工程學系歐國威教授參與研發的「達文西機械臂外科系統」，只需在病人身上開出一個小創口，即可將配件小至3.5毫米的超迷你機械臂及三維角度內窺鏡置入病人體內，讓外科醫生透過電腦控制台完成手術。系統適用於前列腺、子宮癌以至肝臟移植等手術，面世至今更已完成約400萬個手術！不妨看看歐國威教授對醫療機械人有何看法。\n\nPlease rest assured that da Vinci will be steady as a rock and handle with precision. This is the ‘da Vinci Surgical System’ co-invented by Prof. Samuel Au and his team from CUHK Department of Mechanical and Automation Engineering (MAE). The system only requires a single, small incision, through which the robotic arms with surgical instrument down to 3.5mm and a 3D endoscope to be placed inside the body. This allows the surgeon to control the computer console to carry out more complicated surgeries like prostatic and uterine cancer surgeries and even liver transplantation. A total of 4 million surgeries have been completed since its launch. Let’s learn more about ‘the man behind da Vinci’ and his views on the development of medical robot.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-04-18T11:05:14Z',
  'Duration': 102,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2141',
  'Likes': '21',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「智慧的探索」公開講座 | 林漢明教授主講 | 大豆研究：一段從實驗室到農田科研之旅',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n如果你的另一半在30周年珍珠婚紀念為你送來一顆只得大豆的戒指，你會有甚麼感想？\n\n這位「送粒豆」的勇敢丈夫便是「大豆專家」林漢明教授。林教授於4月1日主講第三場 #55周年校慶 「智慧的探索」公開講座系列，便率領參加者一同踏上他的「大豆研究：一段從實驗室到農田科研之旅」，細說他歷年的「大豆奇遇記」。\n\n糧食危機堪稱當下全球公民面臨的挑戰之一，林教授多年來研究大豆基因，為各地農民培植能夠適應惡劣環境的大豆品種，以新技術提升糧食產量及質素。林教授領導的國際合作研究團隊，最近更完成全球首個野生大豆的參考基因組，為全球的大豆基因研究提供重要基礎。有關研究成果日前於國際著名學術期刊《自然·通訊》發表。詳情：bit.ly/2HVhkEY\n\n--------------------------------------------\n中大55周年校慶「智慧的探索」公開講座系列講座報名：bit.ly/2QDoxsR\n\nHow would you feel if your spouse presented you with a ring made of soybean as your 30th wedding anniversary gift?\n\nOur 'Soybean Expert' Prof. Lam Hon-ming prepared just such a gift for his wife. Prof. Lam gave the third lecture in ‘The Pursuit of Wisdom’ Public Lecture Series on the topic of 'Soybean Research: A Journey from Laboratory to Field' on 1 April and shared his research which has taken him to landscapes and agriculture all over the world.\n\nHunger is one of the challenges facing people globally nowadays. Prof. Lam is a pioneer in improving the genetic make-up of soybean to help alleviate the looming problems in world food supply and security. He believes that scientists are responsible for developing new technologies to increase crop yield and quality, and to achieve the aim of sustainable agriculture. An international collaborative research team led by Prof. Lam completed the world’s first reference-grade wild soybean genome which provides an important tool for soybean genetic research. The research findings have been published in the internationally renowned academic journal Nature Communications recently. Details: bit.ly/2TRAQnb\n\n--------------------------------------\nRegister for other CUHK 55th anniversary “The Pursuit of Wisdom” Public Lectures: bit.ly/2Rjxqx8",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-04-18T10:44:04Z',
  'Duration': 5632,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'The Pursuit of Wisdom', '智慧的探索'],
  'Views': '1318',
  'Likes': '24',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '大潭道水壩智能交通燈設計師 |  Developer of the Smart Traffic Light at Tai Tam Road (Dam Section)',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n要數2018年度最觸目交通燈，非大潭道水壩路段的智能交通燈莫屬。今天，設計師現身說法！\n\n他是中大系統工程與工程管理學系前副教授、中大校友鄭進雄博士，他研發的智能交通燈一次過解決存在已久的對頭車爭路與塞車問題🚚🚙鄭博士謙虛表示，研究最終能貢獻社會，是他最大的喜悅。\n\nNo one can doubt that the smart traffic lights at Tai Tam Road (Dam Section) are the most striking traffic lights of 2018. Now, let's meet the developer.\n\nHe is Dr. Cheng Chun-hung, the former Associate Professor, CUHK Department of Systems Engineering and Engineering Management, who is also an alumnus of CUHK. The smart traffic light he developed has solved the long-standing traffic deadlock and traffic jam in one go. Dr. Cheng says modestly, 'It is the greatest pleasure to have our research contributing to society.'",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-03-22T10:36:31Z',
  'Duration': 127,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3441',
  'Likes': '23',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「智慧的探索」公開講座 | 盧煜明教授主講 | 科研的挑戰與樂趣',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n遠在天邊，近在眼前。「無創產檢之父」盧煜明教授大學時就大膽假設孕婦血液有胎兒DNA，但在求證過程中，曾有8年時間一直忽略了手上的研究重點——媽媽的血漿。直到一天他靈機一閃把焦點放在血漿，成就了「無創產前檢查」，更延展至鼻咽癌篩查研究，造福社會。\n\n盧教授於2019年2月15日的「科研的挑戰與樂趣」公開講座分享了他科研路上的靈感來源。詳情：bit.ly/2tmJE9F\n\n--------------------------------------\n中大55周年校慶「智慧的探索」公開講座系列講座報名：bit.ly/2QDoxsR\n\n\nSo near and yet so far. “Father of the Non-Invasive Prenatal Test” Prof. Dennis Lo had made the bold assumption of the presence of fetal DNA in maternal blood from the days of his university studies. However, for 8 years he\'d been missing the key to the research, which is the plasma, until the idea of it came to him. Now, not only is he the "Father of Non-Invasive Prenatal Test”, he has also developed the “Plasma DNA Screening Study of Nasopharyngeal Cancer”.\n\nProf. Lo shared his interesting research experiences at the Public Lecture on \'The Joys and Challenges of Scientific Research\' today (15 February). Details: bit.ly/2EcOigQ\n\n--------------------------------------\nRegister for other CUHK 55th anniversary “The Pursuit of Wisdom” Public Lectures: bit.ly/2Rjxqx8',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-02-28T02:04:50Z',
  'Duration': 4497,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1936',
  'Likes': '28',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《摯愛》舞台劇花絮 My Love Drama Making Of',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n必睇短片！校長、前任校長齊齊「開金口」！\n\n由中大校友會聯會主辦的《摯愛》(My Love) 舞台劇，以中大為背景，講述一段纏綿悱惻的愛情及幾經風浪的香港金融故事，道出香港及「中大人」永不言倦的奮鬥精神，各位同學、校友絕對不能錯過！\n\n《摯愛》台前幕後均為「中大人」，稍後他們更會作環球巡迴演出，將中大故事搬上世界舞台。校長段崇智教授及前任校長沈祖堯教授日前更率先錄製主題曲《博文約禮》，為舞台劇打響頭炮。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-02-19T04:49:04Z',
  'Duration': 147,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '322',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '《摯愛》舞台劇 | 北京、深圳站巡迴演出宣傳片 My Love Drama in Beijing and Shenzhen Promo Video',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '農曆新年小遊戲 | 猜猜豬年賀詞',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n段崇智校長跟大家拜年！\n\n新一年，祝各位中大人🐷🍓✉👅⛓⛓☑🐟🍊⭐🍰💡🦒☁💤🌈！你到底睇咗啲乜？估一估，片尾有答案~',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '渣馬戰記2019 | 高強度間歇訓練 - 針對長跑 Standard Chartered Marathon 2019 | HIIT for Long-distance Running',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n近年流行高強度間歇訓練（HIIT），中大馬拉松隊有福了，亞運壁球金牌選手李嘉兒及HIIT專家Eric親身示範針對長跑的6個HIIT動作，仲有練習小貼士。\n\nHigh-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT) has been topping fitness trends in recent years. CUHK runners, pay attention here. Lee Ka-yi, Asian Games squash gold medalist, and Eric Poon, HIIT expert, have demonstrated the six HIIT exercises for long-distance running and given some tips too.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-02-01T04:54:29Z',
  'Duration': 178,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'HIIT',
   'Fitness',
   'Marathon training',
   'Marathon'],
  'Views': '4918',
  'Likes': '20',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「智慧的探索」公開講座 | 段崇智教授主講 | 再生醫學的前途與挑戰',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n以再生醫學技術製作的人體軟骨，與粥麵檔必備的魚蛋有何關係？段校長於2019年1月11日的「再生醫學的前途與挑戰」講座中，向全場觀眾概述再生醫學的理念，更即席分享他多年來從事科研工作的心路歷程。\n\n是次為中大55周年校慶「智慧的探索」公開講座系列的首場講座。有興趣從一眾中大學人探索更多智慧的朋友，歡迎參與其餘講座。網上報名：bit.ly/2QDoxsR\n\n\nWhat are the similarities between tissue-engineered cartilage produced from regenerative medicine technologies and a fish ball? Prof. Rocky S. Tuan, Vice-Chancellor and President of CUHK gave his public lecture on 11 January to introduce the promises and challenges of regenerative medicine. He also told of his research experiences and achievements. \n\nThis is the first lecture of the CUHK 55th anniversary “The Pursuit of Wisdom” Public Lecture Series. Come join the remaining lectures to pursue more wisdom from our experts. Online registration: bit.ly/2Rjxqx8',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-01-25T02:52:14Z',
  'Duration': 4950,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '7712',
  'Likes': '51',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '渣馬戰記2019 | 中大戰衣 Standard Chartered Marathon 2019 | CUHK Team Uniform',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n\n穿上戰衣，代表中大征戰\n穿上戰衣，聽中大人吶喊\n穿上戰衣，因自己而驕傲 \n\n今年的中大馬拉松隊戰衣已出爐，隊員領取日期時間地點如下：\n⏳1月19日 12:00pm - 6:00pm\n⏳1月20日 12:00pm - 5:00pm\n📫中大專業進修學院中環教學中心102室\n\n⏳1月21至23日 12:30pm - 8:00pm\n📫中大富爾敦樓103D室\n\n\n\nWear it and run for CUHK.\nWear it and receive CUHKers' cheers.\nWear it and be proud of yourself. \n\nCUHK Marathon Team uniform is just out. Team members please collect yours during the below time slots:\n⏳19 January 12:00pm - 6:00pm\n⏳20 January 12:00pm - 5:00pm\n📫Room 102, Central Learning Centre, School of Continuing and Professional Studies, CUHK\n\n⏳21-23 January 12:30pm - 8:00pm\n📫Room 103D, John Fulton Centre, CUHK Campus",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-01-17T11:03:00Z',
  'Duration': 32,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'standard chartered marathon',
   'marathon',
   '渣打馬拉松'],
  'Views': '761',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '渣馬戰記2019 | 輪椅上的起跑線 Standard Chartered Marathon 2019 | Wheelchair Race at the Starting Line',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n無論你是否跑者，總會有過馬拉松是自討苦吃的念頭。偏偏跑者會在吃苦過後，為自己額外添加一條法則：「痛是難免的，苦卻是甘願的。」\n\n李豪飛校友自幼因病不良於行，卻無阻他好動的性格。他憶述小時候在特殊學校的陸運會中，第一次感受到「風馳電掣」的快感；迄至渣馬宣布舉辦輪椅賽，便決心以參賽為目標。輪椅上的馬拉松殊不容易，不妨細看這位輪椅賽冠軍的故事，為自己打打氣！\n\n\nNo matter whether you are a runner or not, a marathon seems to be choosing to ask for trouble. However, there is a famous quote for those who keep running: “Pain is inevitable; suffering is optional.”\n\nOur alumnus Lee Ho Fei has been disabled since childhood, due to an illness. He recalled his first encounter with the thrill of speed at an athletic meet at his special school. When Standard Chartered Hong Kong Marathon announced the inclusion of a wheelchair marathon as an event, he set the newly launched race as his goal. Let’s watch and get inspired by his story of wheelchair racing championship.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-01-17T10:23:22Z',
  'Duration': 136,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'wheelchair marathon',
   'marathon',
   'standard chartered marathon',
   '渣馬',
   '輪椅馬拉松'],
  'Views': '667',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大再生醫學專家段崇智教授・你問我答——斯路手斷重生有可能？',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n\n中大的再生醫學專家與網民大玩「你問我答」！\n\n想知道健吾、郭志仁、徐緣及伍家謙4位「重量級喱民」有甚麼問題？專家又有甚麼「神回覆」？馬上去片！\n\n#智慧的探索公開講座 #再生醫學的前途與挑戰\n#1月11日下午5時 #門票已經換罄 #多謝支持\n\n\n\nWe have recently invited a regenerative medicine expert from CUHK to run a ‘Q&A Session’ with netizens!\n\nWant to know what questions our ‘heavyweight VIPs’ Kengo Ip, Ken Kwok, Vincent Tsui and Vince Ng raised from a layman’s perspective and how our expert answered them wittily? Let's watch the video now!\n\n#ThePursuitOfWisdomPublicLecture #RegenerativeMedicinePromisesAndChallenges \n#5pm11January #AllSeatsAreTaken #ThanksForYourSupport",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2019-01-07T06:36:51Z',
  'Duration': 172,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Regenerative Medicine', '再生醫學'],
  'Views': '8057',
  'Likes': '26',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '你上一次哭是…… The Last Time You Cried...',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n學業、家庭、朋友、愛情……大學生要煩的事實在很多，有時難免流淚。中大uBuddies與你分享心路歷程，哭不是醜事，淚水有助釋放壓力、紓緩情緒。\n\n遇到煩惱時，踏出一步主動傾訴，總有人伴你同行。\n\n☀認識我們的uBuddies：bit.ly/2So66tQ\n☀心理健康及輔導中心最新活動消息：bit.ly/2KGnuHB\n☀「中大有晴」網頁：bit.ly/2BDbRya\n\nStudy, family, friendship, love… There are so many things university students have to face. There are times we cry. It is not shameful to cry, but a crucial way to release stress and emotions.\n\nStep out and talk to your family and friends when you feel worried. They are always there for you.\n\n☀Learn about our uBuddies bit.ly/2QvBwkt\n☀Latest News about Wellness and Counselling Centre’s activities bit.ly/2ra8FE0\n☀'Sunshine@CUHK' Website: bit.ly/2SgVCwg",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-12-03T05:00:29Z',
  'Duration': 204,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '229',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大2019月曆 CUHK 2019 Calendar',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n\n「傑出學生獎」的得獎同學不僅在藝術、創意與發明、社會服務或運動等範疇有卓越表現，更可能「隱藏」額外技能？\n\n今年大學邀請12位首屆「中大傑出學生獎」的得獎同學，拍攝中大2019月曆。一班同學不僅在各個範疇有出色表現，面對鏡頭時同樣從容淡定，潛藏的演藝細胞絕不失禮！不妨看看他們早前拍攝中大2019月曆時的花絮片段。\n\n中大2019月曆將於明日起（11月24日）率先登陸富爾敦樓地下的中大紀念品銷售處。月曆定價港幣40元正，所有收益將撥捐中大I‧CARE博群計劃。各位參加「中大校友日」的朋友，緊記將中大月曆帶回家！\n\n\nThe awardees of the ‘CUHK Outstanding Students Awards’ not only have outstanding achievements in arts, innovation and invention, social service, sports and more, they may also possess ‘hidden abilities’...\n\nThis year, the University invited 12 recipients of the awards to participate in the production of our 2019 calendar. They looked so confident in front of the camera and performed so professionally in the studio. Let’s have a look at their performing talents when shooting the CUHK 2019 calendar.\n\nThe desktop calendar will be offered at HK$40 starting from tomorrow (24 Nov) at the CUHK Souvenir Counter located at G/F, John Fulton Centre. Proceeds from the calendar sales will be donated to support CUHK I‧CARE Programme. Take it home, after you've come to the Alumni Homecoming Day!",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-11-28T02:38:12Z',
  'Duration': 87,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '583',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '傑出校友訪問計劃——姚沈宛 Distinguished Alumni-in-Residence Programme - Dorothy Yuen',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n中大「傑出校友訪問計劃」頭炮完滿結束。有四十多年社工經驗的姚沈宛（Dorothy）校友親自到訪中大，在四天內見過同學、教職員及其他校友，真摯地分享她生命中的甜酸苦辣，談經驗、談人生、談生死，有笑有淚。\n\n雖然畢業多年，Dorothy對母校的歸屬感仍然強烈，她期盼透過這次緊密的行程，把中大人文精神發揚光大。bit.ly/2B3w0x0\n\nThe inaugural visit of the Distinguished Alumni-in-Residence Programme has concluded successfully. CUHK alumna Dorothy Yuen, who has more than forty years of social work experience, met CUHK students, staff and alumni in her four-day visit here. She spoke with a passion about her sweet moments and bitter ones, about life and death, bringing laughter and tears.\n\nThough it has been a long time since her graduation, the sense of belonging to CUHK has stayed intense. Dorothy came back to her alma mater with a true intention to foster the humanistic spirit.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-11-21T04:08:34Z',
  'Duration': 198,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '130',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Sharing by Graduates of 2018 二零一八年畢業生感言',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong held its 85rd Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 15 November 2018. Let's hear the sharing by fresh graduates through the video.\n\n2018年11月15日，香港中文大學舉行第八十五屆大會（頒授學位典禮），讓我們一齊聆聽應屆畢業生的畢業感言。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-11-15T11:13:16Z',
  'Duration': 200,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', '畢業', 'Graduation'],
  'Views': '2353',
  'Likes': '16',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'University Education Award 2018 二零一八年博文教學獎',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong held its 85rd Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 15 November 2018. Awardees of the University Education Award this year, including Prof. Fan Tingting, Department of Marketing, Faculty of Business Administration; Dr. Lai Hon-weng, John, Department of Management, Faculty of Business Administration; and Dr. Yuen Kwan-yuk Jacqueline, Department of Medicine & Therapeutics, Faculty of Medicine were invited to talk about their ideas on enhancing the student learning experience in the video.\n\n2018年11月15日，中大舉行第八十五屆大會（頒授學位典禮）。大會邀請到博文教學獎得獎者，包括工商管理學院市場學系范亭亭教授、工商管理學院管理學系賴漢榮博士，以及醫學院內科及藥物治療學系阮君毓博士，拍攝短片分享推動優質教學的心得。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-11-15T05:28:48Z',
  'Duration': 307,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '490',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大55周年校慶標誌 CUHK 55th Anniversary Logo',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n1963年10月17日，香港中文大學正式成立，翌年訂立校訓「博文約禮」。\n\n中大55周年校慶標誌正正由「博」、「文」、「約」、「禮」四字砌成，背後有甚麼意思？不如由設計師葉小卡先生親自解畫。\n\n鳴謝：香港中文大學特別邀請校友兼香港設計師協會會長、伍宜孫書院、敬文書院及和聲書院院徽設計師葉小卡先生（2000新亞建築、2003研究院建築）義務設計55周年校慶標誌。\n\nOn 17 October, 1963, CUHK was founded. The motto of the University, Bo Wen Yue Li (Through learning and temperance to virtue), was adopted the following year.\n\nThe 55th Anniversary logo is derived from the motto's four Chinese characters. What is the meaning behind it? Let's listen to the logo designer Karr Yip.\n\nAcknowledgment: CUHK has specially invited alumnus Mr. Karr Yip (2000 New Asia, Bachelor's in Architecture; 2003 Master of Architecture), who is the chairman of the Hong Kong Designers Association and designer of the emblems of Wu Yee Sun College, C.W. Chu College, and Lee Woo Sing College, to contribute a design for the 55th Anniversary logo.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-10-22T03:25:14Z',
  'Duration': 106,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Anniversary', '校慶'],
  'Views': '994',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Shun Hing Lecture 2018 - Dr. Victor Dzau (Full Veresion) 信興講座：曹文凱醫生主講（完整版）',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nDr. Victor Joseph Dzau, a world renowned cardiologist and the President of the US National Academy of Medicine (NAM), came to The Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) on 18 September 2018 to deliver a Shun Hing Lecture, co-organised by CUHK and the Shun Hing Group. Dr. Dzau spoke on the topic “Medical and Technological Breakthroughs Shaping the Future of Health and Medicine and Their Implications for Society”.\n\n世界著名心臟病學家、美國國家醫學院院長曹文凱醫生於2018年9月18日蒞臨香港中文大學（中大）校園，為中大及信興集團合辦之「信興講座」擔任主講嘉賓，主題為「醫學及科技突破對未來衛生、醫療及社會的影響」。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-10-11T08:12:44Z',
  'Duration': 5034,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Victor Dzau', 'Medical Science'],
  'Views': '298',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'NIRS based traditional Chinese medicine herb identification system 中藥材近紅外光譜鑑定系統',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nNear infrared spectroscopy based traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) herb identification system, a process analytical technology (PAT) project led by the Hong Kong Institute of Biotechnology, is a custom-made project specially designed to meet the need of a well-known local TCM manufacturer with GMP certification.  This NIRS identification system has been incorporated into the routine quality control system of the company since 2015, setting it as a successful case on the application of modern technology in the manufacturing of TCM in Hong Kong.\n\n由香港生物科技研究院主導的製程分析技術應用團隊，利用近紅外光譜技術、為本地一間歷史悠久的GMP中成藥製造商，開發原料快速鑑定系統。該系統自2015年投入該公司服務並沿用至今，實為應用現代科技在中藥製造的一個成功案例。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-10-04T09:15:33Z',
  'Duration': 288,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Chinese Medicine', '中醫', '中藥', '中醫藥'],
  'Views': '335',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大中醫中藥研究所、藥用植物應用研究國家重點實驗室',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【Institute of Chinese Medicine and State Key Laboratory of Research on Bioactivities and Clinical Applications of Medicinal Plants (The Chinese University of Hong Kong)】\nThe mission of Institute of Chinese Medicine is to establish evidence-based Chinese medicines by performing the multiple functions of authentication, quality control, safety assurance, clinical trials, drug development, information centre and public education, with a view to facilitating the cooperation between traditional and western medicines.\n\n【香港中文大學中醫中藥研究所和藥用植物應用研究國家重點實驗室 (香港中文大學)】\n中醫中藥研究所的使命是以實驗方法建立多方面的中藥研究，包括藥物開發，臨床試驗，鑑定質量控制，安全監察，中藥信息中心和公共教育等，以促進傳統中藥和西藥之間的協作。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-10-04T09:06:44Z',
  'Duration': 306,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Chinese Medicine', '中醫', '中藥', '中醫藥'],
  'Views': '656',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學李達三葉耀珍中醫藥研究發展中心：中藥材分子鑑定和品質控制的研究和發展',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【Research and Development in Molecular Authentication and Quality Control of Chinese Medicinal Material in Li Dak Sum Yip Yio Chin R&D Centre for Chinese Medicine, CUHK】\nTo keep Hong Kong as an international trading and quality control hub for medicinal herbs, the Centre pioneers in rapid molecular techniques for onsite authentication. \nWe are offering authentication and quality control services to the industry and the regulatory agencies. We anticipate this will also help to protect the right of consumers.\n\n【香港中文大學李達三葉耀珍中醫藥研究發展中心在中藥材分子鑑定和品質控制的研究和發展】\n為保持香港作為中藥材國際貿易及品質控制中心，我們率先採用快速分子技術進行中藥材現場鑑定， 並為行業和監管機構提供鑑定和品質控制服務。這些活動也有助於保障消費者的權益。\n\n\n#CUHK #DNA #authentication #TCM #herbs #identification #molecular #quality\n#分子鑒定 #中藥材 #中藥鑒定',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-10-04T08:59:55Z',
  'Duration': 299,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'DNA',
   'authentication',
   'TCM',
   'herbs',
   'indentification',
   'molecular',
   'quality',
   '分子鑒定',
   '中藥材',
   '中藥鑒定',
   'CUHK Chinese Medicine',
   '中大中醫',
   'Chinese Medicine'],
  'Views': '534',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'School of Chinese Medicine: Research on Quality Assurance / Quality Control of Chinese Medicines',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe research team in School of Chinese Medicine, CUHK has long-term commitment to the research on quality of Chinese herbal medicines to ensure that the herbal materials used in clinical treatment and research are authentic and with stable quality.  Thereby, good treatment effects and reliable research results can be achieved.\nAbout the School of Chinese Medicine:\nhttp://www.scm.cuhk.edu.hk/en-GB/\n\n\n香港中文大學中醫學院好的研究團體，長期致力於中藥的品質研究工作，以確保真材實料及品質穩定的中藥材應用於中醫臨床治療和研究當中，從而獲得優良的療效及穩定、可靠的研究結果。\n關於中醫學院：\nhttp://www.scm.cuhk.edu.hk/zh-TW/',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-10-04T08:52:07Z',
  'Duration': 342,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Chinese Medicine', '中醫', '中醫學院', '中醫藥'],
  'Views': '636',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學中藥材鑑定和品質控制 Authentication and Quality Control of Chinese Medicinal Material in CUHK',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nIn CUHK, there are four units providing authentication and quality control services:\n1. Hong Kong Institute of Biotechnology (HKIB)\n2. Institute of Chinese Medicine (ICM)\n3. Li Dak Sum Yip Yio Chin R & D Centre for Chinese Medicine (RDCCM)\n4. School of Chinese Medicine (SCM)\n\n香港中文大學有四個提供中藥材鑑定和品質控制的單位：\n1. 香港生物科技研究院\n2. 中醫中藥研究所\n3. 李達三葉耀珍中醫藥研究發展中心\n4. 中醫學院',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-10-04T08:43:57Z',
  'Duration': 421,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '776',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'A different set of GPA introduced by Vice-Chancellor Prof. Rocky Tuan 段崇智校長：成績以外的另一個GPA',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【中大人的另一個GPA】\n新學年正式開始，相信同學都會十分在意成績表上的GPA，但在今日的本科生入學典禮上，段校長特別想各位新生留意成績以外的另一個GPA：\n\nG 代表 Global perspective 世界視野\nP 代表 Positive mindset 正向思維\nA 代表 Appreciation of life's diversity, including cultures and differences 海納四方，存異共融\n\n他歡迎新生成為中文大學的一分子。祝願各位在中大的日子精彩充實，好好享受這段人生旅程！段校長歡迎演講全文：bit.ly/2wzrEew\n\n【The Other GPA for CUHK-ers】\nToday marked the beginning of the new academic year. GPA, or Grade Point Average, will naturally be one of the very important things that the freshmen will want to keep an eye on. However, at the Inauguration Ceremony for Undergraduates, Vice-Chancellor Prof. Rocky Tuan introduced a different set of GPA to focus on.\n\n‘G’ – Global perspective\n‘P’ – Positive mindset\n‘A’ – Appreciation of life’s diversity, including cultures and differences\n\nHe welcomed the new students and wished them a fantastic and rewarding time here at CUHK, 'Enjoy your journey!' Full welcoming speech of Prof. Tuan: bit.ly/2wyXsz2",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-10-02T07:31:56Z',
  'Duration': 1138,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Inauguration Ceremony',
   'GPA',
   'Vice-Chancellor'],
  'Views': '492',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '甚麼是正向心理學？ What is Positive Psychology?',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【正向心理學 = 凡事正面？】\n新的通識課程「豐盛人生：正向心理學的理論與實踐」（UGED 1553A）是不是要同學凡事正面❓究竟甚麼是正向心理學❓❓正向心理學又如何讓同學活得更豐盛❓❓❓\n\n滿腦子充滿問題的你，看這動畫吧！\n想活出豐盛人生的你，報讀課程吧！\n\n課程詳情\n課程編號：UGED 1553A\n時間：逢星期三 16:30 - 18:15\n地點：康本國際學術園 LT8\n授課語言：粵語\n\n【Positive Psychology = Stay Positive Regardless?】\nDoes the new General Education course 'Live to Flourish: The Science and Practice of Positive Psychology' (UGED 1553A) ask students to think positively, regardless? What is positive psychology? How does positive psychology lead students to live more fully?\n\nIf your mind is full of question marks, watch this animation!\nIf you want to live an enriched life, register for the course!\n\nCourse Details\nCourse Code: UGED 1553A\nTime: Wednesdays 16:30 - 18:15\nVenue: YIA LT8\nMedium of Instruction: Cantonese",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-09-11T03:51:40Z',
  'Duration': 114,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', '正向心理學', '正向心理', 'Positive Psychology'],
  'Views': '23088',
  'Likes': '158',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '21世紀全球公民的重大挑戰 Grand Challenges for Global Citizens in the 21st Century',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n重量級教授陣容！跨學科全球爭議性議題！\n\n全新通識課程「21世紀全球公民的重大挑戰（UGEC 2819）」引來不少迴響，皆因課程破天荒雲集8位不同學系的星級教授，探討一個個當前全球議題，機會難逢！歡迎有興趣一起思考全球議題的同學修讀！\n\n想知道課程詳情，1分鐘短片一眼睇晒！\n\nOur heavyweight professors are lining up! Let’s explore the interdisciplinary key global issues!\n\nMany of you may be discussing the new General Education course, ‘Grand Challenges for Global Citizens in the 21st Century (UGEC 2819)’, because it is a precious chance to have 8 CUHK star professors talking about numerous key global issues in one particular course. You are very welcome to join us if you are keen to explore these global issues, to make the world a better place!\n\nFor details, please watch our one-minute short video.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-09-11T03:28:14Z',
  'Duration': 2,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'General Education',
   'Grand Challenge',
   'Global Citizens',
   '21st Century',
   '21世紀',
   '全球公民'],
  'Views': '270',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Experiencing Conference Interpreting at the United Nations',
  'Description': 'Four Master of Arts in Translation students went on a study trip to the United Nations Office in Vienna. They participated in meetings of committees under the umbrella of the Conference of the State Parties (COSP) of the UN Convention against Corruption. Students could use their interpreting skills on the spot to experience what an interpreter would do at work. Let’s watch the video to understand what the students think about the trip.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-09-10T09:58:36Z',
  'Duration': 465,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '15230',
  'Likes': '284',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中秋．傳情 Festival of Love',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n中秋本是團圓佳節，偏偏對於不少人而言，卻是一個人的節日。\n\n中大愛心月餅正式接受預訂！每售出一盒，「中大．關懷」服務團便會與你攜手，送上一個「中大月餅」予沙田及大埔的獨居長者。不妨以月餅傳情，讓愛傳承。\n\n訂購詳情：www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake\n\nMid-Autumn Festival is a reunion time for family and friends to stay together. Yet, not everyone is lucky enough to find a companion by their sides at this festive period.\n\n"CUHK Mooncake" is now available for charity sale! For each box sold, the CUHK．Care Service Team will deliver a free mooncake to the elderly living alone in Shatin or Tai Po. Join us to express your love to those in need at this festive season.\n\nPurchase Details: www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-08-06T12:18:25Z',
  'Duration': 86,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', '月餅', 'mooncake', 'Mid-Autumn Festival'],
  'Views': '188',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "The Book of a Lifetime: Daisy Wong's Pick 一生只讀一本書：王迪詩之選",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【王迪詩之選：孤獨的心靈寄託】\n中大新聞與傳播學院校友王迪詩向大家推薦《The Heart is a Lonely Hunter》。作者Carson McCullers寫這本書時只有23歲，但她像看得透每個人的心，把不同性別、年齡和種族的角色、甚至聾啞主角的孤獨感都刻劃得很真實，而她也因為此書一炮而紅。 #趁暑假讀好書 #中大圖書館 #超過400萬本電子書 #我們都是愛書人\n\n「那股澎湃的寂寞籠罩着他，令他惶恐不安……他會說話，但那些於清晨黑暗中自然而生的絮語，只會消散在大街上，甚或煙滅在他的房間裏。那些字說出了口，是一種解脫。」——The Heart is a Lonely Hunter（作者：Carson McCullers）\n\n【Daisy Wong's Pick: Sustenance of Lonely Hearts】\nDaisy Wong, CUHK School of Journalism and Communication alumna, recommends 'The Heart is a Lonely Hunter' to you all. The author Carson McCullers was only 23 when she wrote the book, but it seems that she could read everyone's mind. Her portrayal of the loneliness of the characters is so true to life, no matter their gender, age or race - even that of the main deaf-mute character. Carson McCullers became famous overnight because of this book. #SummerGoodRead #CUHKLibrary #OverFourMillionElectronicBooks #WeAreBookLovers\n\n'The loneliness in him was so keen that he was filled with terror... He would talk, and the words created themselves from the dark mornings spent in the streets or in his room alone. The words were formed and spoken with relief.' — The Heart is a Lonely Hunter by Carson McCullers",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-07-17T08:04:22Z',
  'Duration': 68,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '962',
  'Likes': '10',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '世界盃在中大 — World Cup Final in CUHK',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n歡迎中大師生校友一同觀看決賽直播，感受世界盃熾熱氣氛。\n日期：7月15日（星期日）\n入場時間：10:00pm\n開賽時間：11:00pm\n地點： 香港中文大學嶺南運動場\n精彩節目：樂隊表演、幸運抽獎及飲品小食供應\n\nCome join the live broadcast of the World Cup Final and have fun! \nDate: 15 July 2018 (Sunday) \nAdmission time: 10 pm \nKick off time: 11 pm \nVenue: Lingnan Stadium, CUHK \n\nWhat’s more? \n- Refreshments \n- Live band performance\n- Games and lucky draw',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-07-12T01:44:18Z',
  'Duration': 60,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '346',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "一生只讀一本書：中大學生張雅欣之選 The Book of a Lifetime: Student's Pick",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【反映社會現實的魔幻小說】\n#書展倒數12天 中大商學院四年級、2016-17「文學中大」徵文比賽公開組銀獎得主張雅欣推薦《愚木：短篇小說集》，作者陳苑珊堅持故事反映現實，卻又加了虛構、魔幻的情節，既陌生又熟悉，說起來有點像發夢💭🌜#到底我在現實還是在夢裏 #趁暑假讀好書 #中大圖書館 #入館人次超過二百萬 #我們都是愛書人\n\n「由於員工長時間被困在大型滾球裏工作，導致全體職員患上石化症，終生僵硬坐在球裏。」——《愚木：短篇小說集》（作者：陳苑珊）\n\n【A Magical Realism Read】\n##12DaysCountdownToBookFair Joyce Cheung, CUHK Business School year 4 student and Silver Awardee of the 2016-17 'Literature CUHK' Writing Competition Open Section, recommends the book 'Fool the Wood: A Collection of Stories'. The author Chan Yuen-shan insists that the stories must be reflections of reality which, at the same time, set up imaginary and fantastical scenes. The stories sound strange yet familiar, like dreams.  💭 🌜 #AreWeDreaming ##SummerGoodRead #CUHKLibrary #OverTwoMillionVisits #WeAreBookLovers\n\n'Trapped in a big rolling ball, working long hours, all the staff are turned to stone, sitting rigid in the ball for a lifetime.' —— Fool the Wood: A Collection of Stories by Chan Yuen-shan",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-07-06T10:39:52Z',
  'Duration': 95,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'books', 'chinese books', 'magical realism'],
  'Views': '194',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "The Book of a Lifetime: Tony Mok's Pick 一生只讀一本書：莫樹錦之選",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【大眾都讀得明的科學書】\n#書展倒數19天 中大醫學院莫樹錦教授給大家推介《The Gene: An Intimate History》，作者Siddhartha Mukherjee是美國哥倫比亞大學的癌症科醫生，他特意將複雜的基因故事用簡單、有趣的方法寫出來，讓大眾了解自身的過去與現在，並一起思考基因科學的未來。 #趁暑假讀好書 #中大圖書館 #藏書超過200萬冊 #我們都是愛書人\n\n「基因為現代生物學提供了有組織的理論 – 它握着我們健康身體與美好命運的控制權，吊我們的胃口。」——The Gene: An Intimate History（作者：Siddhartha Mukherjee）\n\n【A Science Book Accessible to Public】\n#19DaysCountdownToBookFair Professor Tony Mok, CUHK Faculty of Medicine recommends the book 'The Gene: An Intimate History'. The author Siddhartha Mukherjee, who is a cancer doctor at the Columbia University, makes complicated gene history into easy and interesting stories. It lets the public learn more about their own past and present and reflect on the future of gene science. #SummerGoodRead #CUHKLibrary #OverTwoMillionVolumesOfBookHoldings #WeAreBookLovers\n\n'The gene provides an organizing principle for modern biology - and it tantalizes us with the prospect of controlling our bodies and fates.' —— The Gene: An Intimate History by Siddhartha Mukherjee",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-06-29T11:24:58Z',
  'Duration': 72,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '5027',
  'Likes': '60',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "中大靚景幕後功臣 Backstage Hero of CUHK's Scenic Campus",
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n美麗動人的新亞櫻花、到處盛放的杜鵑、廣種藥用植物的中草藥園、翠綠的草地籬笆……校園綠意盎然，幕後功臣少不了他！\n園藝組的盧家強先生默默為中大校園付出超過15年，多謝您！\n\nThe stunning cherry blossoms at New Asia College, the everywhere-blooming azaleas, the Herbal Garden housing a wide range of herbs, the green meadow and hedges and more... Behind the curtain of our green and beautiful campus, he must be one of the heroes.\nMr. Lo Ka-keung has contributed silently to our campus for over 15 years. Thank you!',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-06-15T09:30:09Z',
  'Duration': 116,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Campus', 'Landscaping'],
  'Views': '170',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Coursera慕課：離散優化算法篇',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n你有沒有嘗試過在婚禮安排座位，安排輪班，或者完成一個數獨謎題？如果你有這樣的經歷，你其實已經在求解離散優化問題。這些問題在生活上和工作中都很常見，不過解決它們通常是很困難的。 \n\n這個推廣視頻介紹了Coursera上一個大型網絡公開課系列的第三門課程：離散優化算法篇（https://bit.ly/2kx0LBd ）這門課程會幫助你學習如何簡單地求解這一類的問題。\n\n這門課程採用了獨特的教學方法，在學習中包含了《山海經》，《封神演義》和《西遊記》中許多著名的中國經典故事。它是由香港中文大學和墨爾本大學合作出品，是離散優化建模系列四門課程的其中之一。請注意，這門課程有完整的英文版(https://bit.ly/2H21pQk )。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-05-25T09:40:14Z',
  'Duration': 104,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '282',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Coursera: Solving Algorithms for Discrete Optimisation',
  'Description': 'Please watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nHave you ever planned the seating for a wedding, organized a roster, or completed a Sudoku puzzle? If so, you have solved a discrete optimization problem. These problems are ubiquitous in business and our daily lives, but solving them well is often very challenging.  \n\nThis promotional video introduces the third course in a series of Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) now available on Coursera: Solving Algorithms for Discrete Optimization (https://www.coursera.org/learn/solving-algorithms-discrete-optimization) that will help you learn how to solve such problems with ease. The course uses a unique pedagogy where the learning is woven around famous Chinese fables, “The Book of Mountains and Seas” and The Investiture of the Gods” and “Journey to the West”. This course is also available wholly in Chinese (https://www.coursera.org/learn/lisan-youhua-suanfapian), and has been developed in a unique collaboration between The Chinese University of Hong Kong and The University of Melbourne, and will form part of a four course Specialization on Modeling for Discrete Optimization.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-05-25T09:40:14Z',
  'Duration': 104,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '356',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '回憶感動一刻 人鍊搬書運動\u3000A Touching Moment: Human Book Chain',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【回憶感動一刻📚人鍊搬書運動】\n1971年、2天時間、1個舊圖書館、1個新圖書館、900米路、12萬冊書、數以百計中大師生……到底崇基學院圖書館的人鍊搬書壯舉是怎樣誕生的？當年的參加者帶大家回到這感動的歷史一刻。\n\n感謝這些中大人用青春的汗水，讓承載知識的書本，傳給愛書愛知識的每一位。\n\n【Look Back to the Touching Moment 📚Human Chain Book Moving】\nIt is the year 1971; 2 days, 1 old library, 1 new library, a 900-metre road, 120,000 books, hundreds of CUHK students, teachers and staff... How did this big Chung Chi Library Human Chain Book Moving Event happen? The participants look back to the touching historical moment with us.\n\nThanks to all the CUHKers' effort, the books, the knowledge bearers, are transferred to everyone who loves them.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-05-25T07:40:27Z',
  'Duration': 222,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   '崇基學院',
   'Chung Chi College',
   '圖書館',
   'Library',
   'History',
   '歷史'],
  'Views': '1286',
  'Likes': '14',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大創業大賽 2018 — 致勝關鍵',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【創業必看！】\n初創公司怎樣才可以得到投資者的青睞？相信沒有比投資者更清楚答案。開聲看看「中大創業大賽2018」評審提供的貼士！\n\n【Entrepreneurs Must See！】\nHow can startups win investors' heart? No one knows the answer better than the investors themselves. Watch the tips given by the judges of 'CUHK Entrepreneur Competition 2018'!",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-05-10T01:54:34Z',
  'Duration': 96,

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Entrepreneur Day Promo 中大創業日宣傳片',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n【中大創業日 🔎發現未來】\n📡5月11日，中大Facebook將直播「中大創業日」專題演講，「來自未來」的重量級演講嘉賓包括：\n⭐港產A.I.「獨角獸」- 商湯集團聯合創始人及CEO徐立博士\n⭐國際生物醫學權威 - 中大校長段崇智教授\n還有更多中大師生校友分享創業成果，歡迎校友登記出席，也可携同親友参加。立即登記 👉🏻bit.ly/2KpfkTs\n\n中大創業日\n日期：5月11及12日（星期五及六）\n時間：上午10時至下午6時\n地點：中大康本國際學術園地下（大學站D或A出口）\n詳情：www.alumni.cuhk.edu.hk/cuhkeday\n主辦：香港中文大學校友傳承基金\n\n香港中文大學校友事務處 CUHK Alumni Affairs Office\n\n【CUHK Entrepreneur Day 🔎Discover the Future】\n📡'CUHK Entrepreneur Day' Public Lecture will go LIVE on our Facebook page on 11 May. Heavyweight speakers 'From the Future' who include:\n⭐Dr. Xu Li, co-founder and CEO of A.I. unicorn SenseTime Group Limited\n⭐Prof. Rocky Tuan, international biomedical authority and CUHK Vice-Chancellor\nMore CUHK teachers, students and alumni will be sharing their entrepreneurial achievements. CUHK alumni and their friends are welcome. Register now 👉🏻bit.ly/2KpfkTs\n\nCUHK Entrepreneur Day\nDate: 11 and 12 May (Friday & Saturday)\nTime: 10am - 6pm\nVenue: G/F, Yasumoto International Academic Park, CUHK (University Station Exit A/D)\nOrganizer: CUHK Alumni Torch Fund",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-05-04T09:53:26Z',
  'Duration': 33,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Entrepreneurship'],
  'Views': '281',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Chill Out and Relax 放空自然放鬆',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nBUDDHAISH DOESN'T MEAN GIVING UP\nWhen you feel pressure, be laid back and relax. Then when your positive mood comes, you can do your best of your own free will.\n\n佛系不代表放棄\n有壓力時hea呆放鬆，是為了緣份到、心情好時，憑意志做最好的自己。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-04-26T07:02:54Z',

  'Views': '273',

  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The Journey Home For Professor Rocky Tuan 段崇智：歸家之旅',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK installed Professor Rocky S. Tuan as its eighth Vice-Chancellor and President on 17 April. Dr. Norman N.P. Leung, Chairman of the Council, CUHK, presided over the ceremony. Over 800 CUHK faculty members, staff, students, alumni and members of the community were in attendance to witness this memorable moment.\n\nAt the ceremony, Professor Tuan delivered his installation address, “Standing here is indeed a wonderful journey home for me, and I am filled with a tremendous sense of belonging...I solemnly pledge to you that I shall, to the best of my knowledge and ability, cultivate, cherish, and pass on the legacy of this University,” Professor Tuan said.\n\n中大於4月17日舉行第八任校長段崇智教授就職典禮，由大學校董會主席梁乃鵬博士主禮。逾800位中大教職員、學生、校友及來自社會各界的嘉賓友好出席典禮，見證此重要時刻。\n\n在典禮上，段教授發表就職演說，形容加入中大有如「歸家之旅」：「今天可以站在這裡，對我來說是一個奇妙的旅程，是一種前所未有的歸屬感……我在此莊嚴承諾，定必竭盡所知所能，珍視、守護、延續及發揚大學寳貴的傳統。」',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-04-18T09:38:37Z',
  'Duration': 1384,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2317',
  'Likes': '17',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '5 Things to Know Before Blood Donation 捐血前五件小事',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index   \n\n捐血前準備：\n- 飲用充足水份\n- 4小時內曾進食\n- 充足休息\n- 勿穿衣袖太緊衣服\n- 請帶同香港身份證(如有)或有效旅行證件 \n\n3月14日至4月6日「中大捐血運動2018」詳情：goo.gl/59JWX5\n\nPreparation before blood donation: \n- Have sufficient sleep the night before \n- Consume food within 4 hours before donation \n- Drink sufficient water \n- Do not wear clothing with tight sleeves \n- HKID Card or valid travel document is required\n\nCUHK Blood Donation Campaign 2018 (14 Mar to 6 Apr) details: goo.gl/sbAxKu',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-03-15T04:34:42Z',
  'Duration': 47,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '238',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Green Graduation Photo Book 綠色畢業相大全',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片  \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n  \n1. Upcycle your old doll and transform it into a new graduation doll. \n2. Make your own vegetable bouquet, which can become your nutrients.\n3. Let different greens on campus be the background of your creative photos.\n4. Graduation dolls and flower bouquets can be recycled, passing down your green spirit.\n\n1. 為自家公仔穿袍戴帽，陪你畢業！\n2. 自製菜束可化成營養，不致浪費！\n3. 校園到處不同的綠，打卡更有新意。\n4. 公仔和花束都可以回收，傳承環保精神。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-03-08T02:56:42Z',
  'Duration': 51,

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Fai Chun Writing to Celebrate Chinese New Year  狗年揮春迎新歲',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index   \n\n如果自己寫揮春，你會寫什麼？ 中大師生校友於中大文物館齊齊寫揮春，表達新年願望！校長段崇智教授也送上恭賀說話，與大家一齊迎春接福。 \n\nWhat are your wishes for the Year of the Dog? Here's what our students, staff and Prof. Rocky Tuan, CUHK Vice-Chancellor are wishing for the Lunar New Year.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-02-20T01:59:40Z',
  'Duration': 57,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'faichun',
   'The Chinese University of Hong Kong',
   '香港中文大學'],

  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK I·CARE Programme 香港中文大學博群計劃',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index   \n\nEstablished in 2011, the I·CARE Programme\'s motto is "Aspiration through Reflection; Renewal through Civility". With a framework using five initials "I, C, A, R, E", representing different values, the Programme aims to nurture students to be moral and intellectual persons with introspection, ability and compassion to serve the community and care about the world. \n\nI - Integrity and Moral Development \nC - Creativity and Intellectual Development\nA - Appreciation of Life and Aesthetics Development\nR - Relationships and Social Development \nE - Energy and Wellness\n\nI·CARE Programme website: http://www4.cuhk.edu.hk/icare/\n \n博群計劃（I·CARE Programme）於 2011 年成立，以「博思明志，群育新民」為宗旨，目的是循着I、C、A、R、E五個英文字母所代表的不同範疇，去培養同學成爲德智兼備的公民，具備內省的能力且有外顧的抱負，懂得推己及人，服務社群及關心世界。   \n\nI - 人格與德育 (Integrity and Moral Development) \nC - 創意與知性 (Creativity and Intellectual Development) \nA - 生活藝術與美學 (Appreciation of Life and Aesthetics Development) \nR -人際關係與群育 (Relationships and Social Development) \nE - 活力與身心健康 (Energy and Wellness)\n\n博群計劃網頁：http://www4.cuhk.edu.hk/icare/',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-02-01T08:45:18Z',
  'Duration': 253,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'I·CARE Programme',
   '博群計劃',
   '香港中文大學',
   'The Chinese University of Hong Kong'],
  'Views': '298',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Everyday Chinese Medicine',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index   \n \nA Chinese medicine course in English is now available at Coursera. Developed by the Faculty of Medicine, the online course aims to promote basic knowledge of traditional Chinese medicine, which is tailored to the needs of English speakers around the world. \nAbout the course: https://www.coursera.org/learn/everyday-chinese-medicine \n\n中大於網上大型學習課程平台Coursera設立首個英語中醫課程。\n關於課程：https://www.coursera.org/learn/everyday-chinese-medicine',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-02-01T02:36:17Z',
  'Duration': 119,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'chinese medicine'],
  'Views': '878',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Master's Degree (2016-2017) Graduation Ceremony  二零一六至二零一七年度碩士學位課程畢業典禮",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nOn 17 and 18 November, CUHK held Master's Degree Graduation Ceremony.\n11月17及18日，中大舉辦碩士學位課程畢業典禮。",

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Marathon Team 2018  香港中文大學馬拉松隊 2018',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nLet's relive the spectacular Hong Kong Marathon when CUHKers burst with vigour and enthusiasm!  \n鬥志與熱誠爆發啦！一起重溫1月21日的渣馬盛況啦！\n\nPhoto album/相片集：\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/marathon/photo-and-video?year=2018",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-01-26T10:50:24Z',
  'Duration': 153,

  'Views': '458',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Special Trainings on Strength for Running 增強跑力特訓',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nStandard Chartered Hong Kong Marathon will begin in two weeks! Are you ready? \nCUHK lecturers Lee Chi Wo Daniel, Chi Ngan Chow Alison and Chan Chi Ming help you run faster by offering professional advice on staircase running, slope running and resistance running.\n\n還有兩個星期就到渣馬比賽啦。中大跑神李致和，今次聯同另外兩位中大跑神周子雁、陳志明教大家階梯跑、坡道跑、阻力跑，助中大人跑得更快。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2018-01-08T04:33:24Z',
  'Duration': 156,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1968',
  'Likes': '11',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '第八十四屆大會（頒授學位典禮）(精華版)',
  'Description': '完整版/Full version: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/921\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK held its 84th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 30 November. Dr. Norman N.P. Leung, Chairman of the Council of CUHK, presided at the Congregation. Five distinguished persons were conferred honorary degrees in recognition of their outstanding contributions to their respective areas of achievement in cultural and educational progress, scientific research and the promotion of community welfare. They are: Dr. Chan Shuk-leung (alias PAK Suet-sin), Professor Arieh Warshel, Dr. Zhou Jianping, Mr. Chien Lee and Mrs. Lee Yick Hoi-lun Helen. \n\n中大11月30日舉行第八十四屆大會（頒授學位典禮），典禮由中大校董會主席梁乃鵬博士主持。五位傑出人士獲頒授榮譽博士學位，以表揚他們對促進文化藝術、科研發展、教育及增進人民福祉的傑出貢獻。分別為：陳淑良博士、Arieh WARSHEL教授、周建平博士、利乾先生及利易海倫女士。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-12-18T10:00:07Z',
  'Duration': 655,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '476',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Get Trained for SC Marathon  備戰渣馬：跑神教路',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nTo prepare for 2018 Standard Chartered Hong Kong Marathon, don’t miss the chance to learn from Lee Chi Wo Daniel, a leading runner in HK and CUHK. Build up your muscle, improve your balance and stability. GET READY FOR THE RACE! \n\n中大跑神李致和教路，幫各位中大馬拉松跑手迎戰2018渣馬比賽！今日先做肌力訓練，提升不同肌肉的力量、平衡與穩定性。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-12-06T07:50:05Z',
  'Duration': 167,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3025',
  'Likes': '21',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '83rd Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees 第八十三屆大會(頒授學位典禮)',
  'Description': '完整版/Full version: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/919\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK held its 83rd Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on16 November. Dr. Norman N.P. Leung, Chairman of the University Council, conferred first and master’s degrees at the Congregation. Prof. Joseph J.Y. Sung, Vice-Chancellor and President of CUHK, officiated at the Inauguration of the Choh-Ming Li Professorships and presented awards to outstanding teachers and researchers in recognition of their achievements. \n\n中大於11月16日舉行第八十三屆大會（頒授學位典禮），由大學校董會主席梁乃鵬博士主禮並頒授各科學士及碩士學位，並由校長沈祖堯教授主持卓敏教授席就職典禮，以及頒發傑出教學及研究獎予27名優秀的教研人員，嘉許他們的卓越成就。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-12-06T07:48:47Z',
  'Duration': 883,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3440',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'School Bus Challenge',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe ‘School Bus Challenge’ was newly launched in the Alumni Homecoming Day this year. As many alumni as possible were invited to get onto what was colloquially known as the ‘hot dog’ bus, a classic CUHK school bus. Each participant who successfully got in the bus was sponsored with a donation of HK$500 by three generous alumni donors, in support of the CUHK Alumni Torch Fund. The challenge was divided into male and female groups. Ultimately a total of about 170 alumni and friends successfully squeezed onto the school bus in two rounds of challenges. And the alumni donors have generously raised the donation amount up to HK$150,000.\n\n今年校友日首辦「迫巴士大挑戰活動」，邀請校友登上懷舊「熱狗」校巴，重溫中大人「迫校巴」的回憶。三位校友捐款人贊助成功登上校巴的參加者每人港幣500元，以支持「中大校友傳承基金」。挑戰分男、女子組進行，兩輪挑戰合共有約170人成功擠上校巴，獲校友捐款人合共捐出港幣15萬元。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-12-04T04:33:42Z',
  'Duration': 35,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1203',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'University Education Award 2017 二零一七年博文教學獎',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong held its 83rd Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 16 November 2017. Awardees of the University Education Award this year, including Prof. Chan Ying-yang Emily, JC School of Public Health and Primary Care, Faculty of Medicine; Prof. So Ho-wai Suzanne, Department of Psychology, Faculty of Social Science; and Prof. Lee Ho-man Jimmy, Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Faculty of Engineering were invited to talk about their ideas on enhancing the student learning experience in the video.\n\n2017年11月16日，中大舉行第八十三屆大會(頒授學位典禮)。大會邀請到博文教學獎得獎者，包括醫學院賽馬會公共衞生及基層醫療學院陳英凝教授、社會科學院心理學系蘇可蔚教授，以及工程學院計算機科學與工程學系李浩文教授，拍攝短片分享推動優質教學的心得。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-11-17T06:37:39Z',
  'Duration': 310,
  'Tags': ['The Chinese University of Hong Kong',
   '香港中文大學',
   'Education Award',
   '教學獎',
   'Public health',
   'Psychology',
   'Computer Science',
   'Engineering',
   'good teachers',
   '好老師',
   '心理學',
   '公共衞生',
   '救災',
   '計算機科學',
   '工程'],
  'Views': '726',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Sharing by Graduates of 2017 二零一七年畢業生感言',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong held its 83rd Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 16 November 2017. Let's hear the sharing by fresh graduates through the video.\n\n2017年11月16日，香港中文大學舉行第八十三屆大會（頒授學位典禮），讓我們一齊聆聽應屆畢業生的畢業感言。",

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'University Mall Turns Into a Golden Path in 1 Minute 百萬大道一分鐘變身',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nThe University Mall is ready to welcome all fresh graduates for the upcoming graduation ceremony on 16 November. Graduates of 2017, are you ready for your big day?\n\n搭架、起蓬、上漆、搬凳、擺花……轉眼間，百萬大道已經預備好迎接11月16日的畢業典禮。各位2017畢業生，你們準備好了嗎？',
  'Category': '27',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK 10K Night Challenge 中大10公里夜跑',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nCome and join the CUHK 10km Night Challenge on Nov 8 by CUHK Physical Education Unit. Register now: http://www.cuhk.edu.hk/peu/10Krun/\n\n11月8日，中大體育部邀大家一齊參與10公里夜跑。立即報名：http://www.cuhk.edu.hk/peu/10Krun/',
