 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Team Cheers on the Announcement of 2017 Physics Nobel Laureates 中大重力波團隊慶祝諾貝爾物理學獎公佈一刻',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nKudos to American Scientists Rainer Weiss, Barry C. Barish and Kip S. Thorne for winning this year’s Nobel Prize in Physics for LIGO’s successful detection of gravitational waves! Being the only team from a HK institute involved in the detection work, Prof. Tjonnie G. F. LI of the Department of Physics at CUHK and the researchers he has been leading celebrate the good news together!\n\n恭喜3位美國科學家Rainer Weiss、Barry C. Barish和Kip S. Thorne憑LIGO的重力波探測成果，奪得2017諾貝爾物理學獎！作為唯一參與研究的香港院校團隊，中大物理系黎冠峰教授與隊友一起等待結果公佈，知道LIGO獲獎的一刻，歡呼鼓掌！',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-10-04T07:09:36Z',
  'Duration': 93,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1072',
  'Likes': '20',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Girl Reading Braille with Lips Dream Comes True 唇讀少女夢想成真',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nBlindness, hearing loss and weak physical sensitivity did not impede Tsang Tsz-kwan's determination in chasing her dreams. Let's hear her story. \n\n雙眼失明、雙耳弱聽、觸覺微弱，多重身體殘障並沒有阻礙曾芷君追求夢想的腳步。讓我們一起聆聽她的逐夢心聲。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-22T01:17:13Z',
  'Duration': 177,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'tsang tsz-kwan', '曾芷君', '唇讀'],
  'Views': '4402',
  'Likes': '44',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Between Extremes: Threatening Heat and Cold Health Series - Health Co-benefits',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nMany carbon-reduction behaviors produce health co-benefits. CCOUC of CUHK analyzed the practice of environmental friendly behaviours in Hong Kong, and encouraged more people to take action of these behaviors and lifestyle.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T02:20:48Z',
  'Duration': 312,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'climate change',
   'The Chinese University of Hong Kong'],
  'Views': '74',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Between Extremes: Threatening Heat and Cold Health Series - Help seeking',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nExtreme temperature events pose health impacts with varying degree of severity. Focusing on the cases of requesting assistance in the community, CCOUC of CUHK studied mild discomfort and symptoms due to extreme temperatures, and hopefully could contribute to establishing a more comprehensive weather warning system.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T02:17:18Z',
  'Duration': 248,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'climate change',
   'The Chinese University of Hong Kong'],
  'Views': '24',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Between Extremes: Threatening Heat and Cold Health Series - Hospital Admission',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nCCOUC of CUHK found that some diseases have much association with extreme weather events. These included asthma, Hand, Foot and Mouth Disease, stroke, acute myocardial infarction and heart failure. Medical personnel and other public service units should pay more attention and provide timely and adequate information for high risk groups.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T02:13:57Z',
  'Duration': 330,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'climate change',
   'The Chinese University of Hong Kong'],
  'Views': '50',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Between Extremes: Threatening Heat and Cold Health Series - Urban Heat Island Effect',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nIn Hong Kong, a number of districts face the Urban Heat Island effect, in particular Wan Chai, Yau Tsim Mong and Tsueng Kwan O. The results from CCOUC's study suggested that Urban Heat Island effect exacerbate the negative health consequence of high temperature and low wind speeds.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T02:09:34Z',
  'Duration': 247,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '838',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Between Extremes: Threatening Heat and Cold Health Series - Death',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nWith climate change, temperature in Hong Kong is becoming more extreme and its seasonal climate alters. CCOUC of CUHK analyzed the mortality under both hot and cold seasons in Hong Kong. The related vulnerable groups should be more alert.',
  'Category': '27',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '熱到爆凍到震健康系列：健康協同效益篇',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\n減低碳排放的減緩氣候變化行為，可產生健康協同效益，香港中文大學CCOUC災害與人道救援研究所分析了香港市民日常的環保習慣，鼓勵更多人實踐這些行為及生活方式。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T02:01:09Z',
  'Duration': 318,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'climate change',
   'The Chinese University of Hong Kong'],
  'Views': '145',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '熱到爆凍到震健康系列：求助篇',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\n極端氣溫對健康有不同程度的影響，香港中文大學CCOUC災害與人道救援研究所針對社區的求助個案的資料，分析了因極端氣溫引起的不適及輕微症狀，期望協助政府制定一個更加完善的天氣警告系統。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T01:56:26Z',
  'Duration': 258,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'climate change',
   'The Chinese University of Hong Kong'],
  'Views': '104',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '熱到爆凍到震健康系列：入院篇',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\n香港中文大學CCOUC災害與人道救援研究所發現，一些疾病與極端天氣有莫大關聯，包括哮喘、手足口病、中風、急性心肌梗塞和心臟衰竭。醫療和相關服務單位需要多加留意和考慮為高危人士提供資訊及支援！',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T01:52:46Z',
  'Duration': 337,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'climate change',
   'The Chinese University of Hong Kong'],
  'Views': '160',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '熱到爆凍到震健康系列：熱島效應篇',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\n香港多個地區都有出現熱島效應，其中灣仔、油尖旺和將軍澳都屬於較嚴重的地區。香港中文大學CCOUC災害與人道救援研究所的研究顯示，熱島效應會加劇高溫天氣和低風速對健康的不良影響。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T01:43:38Z',
  'Duration': 240,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3404',
  'Likes': '19',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '熱到爆凍到震健康系列: 死亡篇',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\n氣候變化令氣溫變得極端，四季天氣反常。香港中文大學CCOUC災害與人道救援研究所分析了炎熱與寒冷季節下，香港死亡人數的變化，提醒高危群體提高警惕。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-12T01:41:13Z',
  'Duration': 289,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '460',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Soar with us @ CUHK',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片 \nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index  \n\nAs a leading comprehensive research university in Hong Kong, The Chinese University of Hong Kong offers quality teaching and research through its 8 faculties and a Graduate School. As the only university to offer college experience in Hong Kong, CUHK also emphasises general education and the all-round development of the students.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-09-04T03:48:32Z',
  'Duration': 286,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2133',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The liveliness and loneliness of Korean at Mid-Autumn Festival 韓國中秋佳節下的熱鬧與寂寞',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nKorean pop culture is appealing to a lot of audiences. However, the glamorous TV episodes are not equivalent to the everyday lives of Korean people – they have also experienced loneliness. Steve Chung, assistant lecturer of Global Studies of CUHK, will tell the story of loneliness and Mid-Autumn Festival among Korean people.\n\nFor full article, please check Steve Chung’s Facebook page: http://bit.ly/2wInnaa\n\nTo solve loneliness, we can start caring about our friends and families. This is the third year since the debut of CUHK Mooncake for Charity. For each box sold, the CUHK‧Care service team will deliver a free mooncake to the elderly living alone in Shatin or Taipo before Mid-Autumn Festival.\nAction now: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake\n\n五光十色的韓流底下，夢幻的韓劇不等於韓國人的真實生活，他們同樣有著你我都體驗過的寂寞。中大全球研究課程助理講師鍾樂偉以聲音導航，講解韓國人的中秋與孤獨。\n閲讀全文：http://bit.ly/2wInnaa\n\n要解決人與人之間的寂寞，先從關懷身邊人開始。今年是中大第三年推出「中大愛心月餅」，是印有「中大CUHK」字樣的低糖雙黃白蓮蓉月餅，大家每買一盒與親友分享，中大 • 關懷服務團便會於中秋節前，為沙田/大埔獨居長者免費送上中大月餅一個。\n立即訂購︰http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake/zh/',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-08-28T01:45:57Z',
  'Duration': 79,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '174',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Kelvin Ng: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger 吳翹充: 傷後更強",
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n"What doesn\'t kill you makes you stronger" \nAs a gymnast and a CUHK student, Kelvin Ng grew stronger out of his injuries. Now, he and another nine CUHK student athletes will participate in this year\'s Summer Universiade in Taipei.\n\n兼顧訓練與學業的中大運動醫學碩士生吳翹充經歷傷患的磨煉，身心都更加堅強。這位香港「吊環王子」將與另外九位中大運動員參與2017臺北世界大學運動會。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-08-21T01:41:50Z',
  'Duration': 131,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '795',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Water Sports Centre 中大水上活動中心',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCanoeing, sailing, wind surfing… exciting water sports cool down the summer heat. CUHK Water Sports Centre not only offers its students, staff and alumni rental and storage services for sports gear, but also training courses for inexperienced newcomers. Tailor-made training courses for groups are also available upon request and by prior reservation.  \nDetails: https://www.peu.cuhk.edu.hk/en-gb/facilities/water-sports-centre/wsc-info/wsc-opening-hour\n\n獨木舟、帆船、滑浪風帆等水上活動是炎炎夏日的消暑良方。中大水上活動中心不但為師生、校友提供滑浪風帆、獨木舟等器材的租借及儲存服務，更定期舉辦訓練課程，中大人也可自己組隊，向中心申請度身設計的團體訓練課程。\n詳情: https://www.peu.cuhk.edu.hk/zh-tw/facilities/water-sports-centre/wsc-info/wsc-opening-hour',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-08-16T07:59:10Z',
  'Duration': 65,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '472',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Joseph Sung Talks on Loneliness 沈祖堯談寂寞',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nA reunion with loved ones at Mid-Autumn Festival could be beyond some people’s dreams.\nInto the third year of CUHK Mooncake for Charity, Professor Sung and Ms Akina Fong joined in the production of mooncakes, and Prof Sung is going to share his views on loneliness.\n"CUHK Mooncake for Charity" has been launched for a third year. For each box sold, the CUHK‧Care service team will deliver a free mooncake to the elderly in Shatin or Taipo. Order now!\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake\n\n每逢中秋節，總會聽到「人月兩團圓」這句祝福語，這從側面說明了，很多人在這個節日裏，或許本就難以團圓而滿足，反倒是在孤單寂寞中度過。\n香港城市居所密集，住得這麼近，人卻那麼遠。中大在第三年推出「愛心月餅」，為獨居長者送暖賀中秋的同時，亦邀請了沈校長和方健儀參與製作，更分享了校長對於寂寞的一些看法。\n#沈祖堯談寂寞#月圓容易團圓難\n這是我們第三年推出「中大愛心月餅」，是印有「中大CUHK」字樣的低糖雙黃白蓮蓉月餅，每售出一盒，中大 • 關懷服務團便會於中秋節前，為沙田/大埔獨居長者送上一個中大月餅。\n立即訂購︰http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/mooncake',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-08-09T02:14:18Z',
  'Duration': 141,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '58059',
  'Likes': '866',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Research Project: Ancient Chinese Gold Techniques 中國古代黃金工藝研究',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nAmong all kinds of ancient Chinese craftsmanship, goldworking techniques are less well-known. The research project "Ancient Chinese Gold Techniques" is a collaborative effort of Art Museum of the Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shaanxi Institute for Preservation of Cultural Heritage, the Conservation Office of the Leisure and Cultural Services Department of Hong Kong, and the Master Studio of Chow Tai Fook, for the first time to use interdisciplinary research methods to reconstruct several major ancient goldsmithing techniques and the history of the development.\n\n在中國古代形形色色的傳統工藝中，黃金工藝是令人較感到陌生的一門。一方面史籍甚少記載，另一方面又容易因金匠們的口耳相傳而訛誤，失去歷史的原貌。「中國古代黃金工藝研究」專案是香港中文大學文物館、陝西省文物保護研究院、康文署文物修復辦事處及周大福大師工作室於2014年開始合作研究的一個項目，首次以跨學科的方法復原古代工藝，並釐清工藝發展的歷史脈絡。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-08-07T03:08:04Z',
  'Duration': 66,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '92',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Entrepreneurship: The Boss' Secret 創業 ─ 老闆的秘密",
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nStarting a business is not only about enjoying the prestige of being a boss, but also bearing the hardships. Two alumni, Xu Zinan and Kenneth Chow, who are the Champion and the 2nd Runner Up in the 2017 CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition, reveal to us the challenges to them as a boss, through the video.\n\n創業做老闆，看似很威風，其實過程中的辛酸又有誰知道？中大校友徐子南以及周昌明在第一屆中大創業擂台分別贏得冠軍及季軍，並獲得兩位投資者即場簽署合作備忘錄。創業過程中他們遇到什麼挑戰？',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-07-24T03:50:05Z',
  'Duration': 222,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '181',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Entrepreneurship: Durian to start with 創業 ─ 從榴槤開始',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nDurian Coffee, Durian Milk Tea and Durian Egg Rolls are products from "Durian BB", 1st Runner Up of the 2017 CUHK Entrepreneurship Competition. Let\'s hear how alumnus KK Yuen develops his own brand based on durian.\n\n榴槤咖啡、榴槤奶茶、榴槤蛋卷等都是「榴槤BB」的產品。中大校友袁家駒憑著對榴槤的熱愛，在第一屆中大創業擂台贏得亞軍，並獲得兩位投資者即場簽署合作備忘錄。他的創業心得是甚麼?',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-07-17T09:27:29Z',
  'Duration': 131,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '493',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Our Hands Speak 妙手可言',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nProfessor Catherine So Wing-chee from the Department of Educational Psychology and her research team have been using social robots to help autistic children to integrate into society. She is nominated for the "Spirit of Hong Kong Awards" organised by SCMP this year. Let\'s vote and support her team in breaking down the barrier and helping the development of autistic children.\nOnline Voting: http://spiritofhk.scmp.com/vote\n\n教育心理學系副教授蘇詠芝藉着社交機械人幫助自閉症兒童融入社會，令她今年被提名入南華早報舉辦的「香港精神獎」。希望大家於7月30日前投她一票，支持她的團隊繼續為自閉症兒童打破溝通隔膜。\n網上投票：http://spiritofhk.scmp.com/zh-hant/vote',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-07-11T08:58:22Z',
  'Duration': 156,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '195',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The Myth of Calculus 微積分的神話',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe game uses the CUHK campus as background and Dr. Chan hopes that the game can strengthen the motivation of students to learn mathematics. \nGame Beta version: https://goo.gl/akqMiW\n\n遊戲由中大數學系講師陳啟良博士設計，過關必須回答微積分題，數學稍弱都不是對手。\n自信的你，可以試玩測試版：https://goo.gl/akqMiW',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-07-04T01:35:51Z',
  'Duration': 131,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1326',
  'Likes': '20',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Golden Techniques: Art of the Chinese Goldsmiths 鑠古鑄今：中國古代黃金工藝與傳承',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nGolden Techniques: Art of the Chinese Goldsmiths features over 40 pieces (sets) of carefully-selected ancient Chinese gold and silver wares from private collections as well as the collection of Art Museum, and samples from reconstruction experiments as well as traditional goldsmith's tools, both from the Master Studio of Chow Tai Fook. The exhibition will bring the cutting-edge findings of ancient Chinese techniques used to make gold and silver objects.\n\n「鑠古鑄今：中國古代黃金工藝與傳承」展出文物館館藏及私人收藏家借出的40餘件（套）中國古代金銀器、周大福大師工作室的復原實驗樣品及傳統金匠工具。透過具有代表性的古代文物、科學檢測結果以及還原實驗樣品等，將最前沿的黃金工藝學術研究成果呈現給觀眾。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-06-29T06:50:54Z',
  'Duration': 68,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '278',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Taste @ CUHK  嚐．在中大',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK has more than 30 restaurants with many signature dishes and delicacies. Try them out for yourself on campus!\n\n上海菜？拉花咖啡？檸檬批？中大校園有超過30間食肆，各式美食包羅萬有，何不相約師生校友來一起細味中大？',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-06-26T08:08:32Z',
  'Duration': 76,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '5193',
  'Likes': '23',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'History of Gold: Masterpiece from Shaanxi 錯彩鏤金：陝西珍藏中國古代金銀器',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nGold has long been considered the most desirable of precious metals with time-tested tradition. However, the ancient Chinese goldworking techniques are less well-known. Shaanxi is internationally famous for her massive and important findings of gold and silver. The exhibition features 60 pieces (sets) of carefully-selected ancient Chinese gold and silver works from 22 institutions of Shaanxi province, dating from 1000BC to 19th century. Exhibition period is : 2017.6.24 – 9.24 at Art Museum. Through illustrating the development of goldworking techniques in ancient China, the exhibition will reveal the historical and cultural significances behind.\n\n黃金，自古以來便是十分珍貴的材質，其工藝古老，是最早被古人認識並加以開發利用的金屬之一。可惜由於這種技藝在史籍中甚少記載，只是通過師徒間口耳相傳來流傳，難免令這門工藝失去歷史的原貌。陝西素以出土大量的重要金銀器聞名，文物館將於2017年6月24日至9月24日展出來自陝西省內22間文博機構共60件（套）展品，從晚商至清代，以歷史為主軸，為你揭開中國古代黃金工藝的神秘面紗……',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-06-20T02:24:31Z',
  'Duration': 60,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '230',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Swifts Go Home 燕子．愛回家',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nIn 2009, due to the expansion work on the Main Library, the University installed 25 artificial nest boxes in the eaves of the southern facade of the library as a measure to help the house swifts affected to relocate their nests. The University Library is still home to the largest house swift colony in Hong Kong.\n\n中大數年前在圖書館北面加建新翼大樓，為了協助受擴建工程影響的小白腰雨燕遷新居，大學在南面簷口安裝了二十五個人工鳥巢。之後，亦花不少心思於選料及做玻璃幕牆測試以防鳥撞，現在中大依舊是全港最大的雨燕聚居點。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-06-16T06:42:10Z',
  'Duration': 66,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '246',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Sixteenth Honorary Fellowship Conferment Ceremony 第十六屆榮譽院士頒授典禮',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong held its Sixteenth Honorary Fellowship Conferment Ceremony on 22 May. Six distinguished persons had conferred upon them honorary fellowships in recognition of their remarkable contributions to the University and the community.\n\n香港中文大學於五月二十二日在校園舉行第十六屆榮譽院士頒授典禮，頒授榮譽院士銜予六位傑出人士，表揚他們對大學及社會的卓越貢獻。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-06-01T05:14:00Z',

  'Title': 'Cheers for CUHK Dragon Boat Teams 中大龍舟賀端午',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK Dragon Boat Teams will join the races at Aberdeen and Central to celebrate the Dragon Boat Festival in 2017. Let's join the crowd and cheer them on!\n\n中大龍將參與2017年赤柱及中環的龍舟比賽，共賀端午佳節。大家食糉之餘，請為中大隊加油！",

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Experience Sharing by Recipients of Positive Workplace Service Award(2016/17) 正向員工服務獎(2016/17)得獎者感受',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nPositive Workplace and Staff Development is an initiative of the University to promote learning and development, as well as positive communication, professional relationship and mutual trust in the workplace. Let’s hear the stories from the awardees of the Positive Workplace Service Award on how they build up a positive workplace culture in the university.\n\n正向員工服務獎主力倡議及促進員工學習與發展，以及在工作間建立正向溝通和專業互信。讓我們透過短片，聽一聽第一屆正向員工服務獎的得主如何於工作間發揮出正能量，感染身邊的人。',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Love@CUHK 愛 • 在中大',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nFrom 20 May to 15 July,2017, our student ambassadors will show you the fascinating views of the University through campus tours every Saturday. Alumni and organisations are welcome to register. \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/en/ambassadors_campus_tour.php\n\n懷念未圓湖的陽光與草地？難忘在合一亭眺望吐露港？ 2017年5月20日至7月15日逢星期六，學生大使帶你暢遊校園，歡迎校友或團體報名參加。\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/tc/ambassadors_campus_tour.php',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Rex Tso: It's Okay to Talk about It 曹星如：開心唔開心都可以Share",
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nNamed as Hong Kong\'s "Wonder Kid", how does Rex Tso, a professional boxer handle pressure? Let\'s hear his story.\nSunshine at CUHK: http://www.sunshine.cuhk.edu.hk/?lang=en\n\n「爆胎如」也可以成爲「神奇小子」，不敗拳王曹星如試過被打得毫無還擊之力，面對無比壓力，他會怎麼辦？\n中大有晴：http://www.sunshine.cuhk.edu.hk/?lang=zh_tw',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Minor Programme in Entrepreneurship and Innovation 創業創新副修課程',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nCUHK is introducing a pioneering, university-wide Minor Programme in Entrepreneurship and Innovation (EPIN) in the 2017-18 academic year. The first of its kind in Hong Kong, EPIN is open to all undergraduate students from different faculties and departments. Details: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/en/press_detail.php?1=1&1=1&id=2488\n\n中大將於2017-18學年推出全港首個創業創新副修課程，校内任何學系的本科生均可報讀。\n詳情：http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/tc/press_detail.php?1=1&1=1&id=2488',
  'Category': '27',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Sammy Leung: Love Yourself 森美：好好愛錫自己',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index \n\nFeeling down and depressed? "Happiness can only be found by yourself". Let\'s hear the story of alumnus Sammy Leung about his pursuit of happiness. \nSunshine at CUHK: http://www.sunshine.cuhk.edu.hk/?lang=en\n\n有壓力？感到迷惘？「快樂是自己尋找的」。一齊來聽聽校友森美尋找快樂的故事。\n中大有晴：http://www.sunshine.cuhk.edu.hk/?lang=zh_tw',
  'Category': '27',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Pak Suet Sin Celebrates 90th Birthday 白雪仙中大慶九十',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 27 March, the University celebrated the 90th birthday of Dr. Pak Suet Sin, the renowned Cantonese opera star, at the opening ceremony of ‘Unveiling the Splendor of the Flower Princess: An Exhibition from CUHK Library’s Yam Pak Collection in Honour of Dr. Pak Suet Sin’s 90 Years’.\nDetails of the exhibition: https://goo.gl/jFoOMx\n\n3月27日，多位戲曲及藝術界名人親臨校園，參與「九十風華帝女花—香港中文大學圖書館任白珍藏展」開幕典禮，並為白雪仙博士慶祝九十大壽。\n展覽詳情：https://goo.gl/DsZoQL',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-03-28T08:08:24Z',
  'Duration': 90,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '59509',
  'Likes': '172',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Veg Bouquet Brings Fresh Taste to Graduates 靚菜變花束 畢業添滋味',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nEvery year at this time, College Photo Day takes place when final year students wear their graduation gowns and take photos with their classmates, friends and families on campus. Besides the usual beautiful flower bouquets, students from the Agricultural Development Group are offering another choice as a gift to the graduates: a vegetable bouquet. \n\nLet’s see how our daily greens are turned into a colourful veg bouquet through the video.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-03-14T02:12:30Z',
  'Duration': 26,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '8322',

  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK for International Students',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong is a comprehensive research-led university in Hong Kong delivering high-quality education on both undergraduate and postgraduate levels and serving the community with its cutting-edge research capability.',
  'Category': '27',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Infrared Photography Reveals an Invisible Campus 紅外線攝出夢幻校園',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe picturesque campus of CUHK is always a hot destination for local photographers. Recently, Steven Wu, an alumnus of Chung Chi College, presented a surreal view of campus with infrared photography.\n\n中大校園風景如畫，向來都是攝影一族的攝影勝地。最近一位中大崇基校友胡思遠則運用紅外線攝影的方法，將人眼無法看見的校園美景呈現出來。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-02-24T08:03:39Z',
  'Duration': 171,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Marathon Team 2017',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nA total of over 3,100 runners joined the CUHK Marathon Team this year, making CUHK the second largest group in the Marathon. Prof. Joseph Sung, CUHK Vice-Chancellor also joined the 10km session of the race, in the hope of encouraging more students to accept the challenge.\n\n今年中大馬拉松隊人數再創新高，總共有3100多名隊員參與渣馬，是今屆渣馬第二多人參賽的隊伍。校長沈祖堯教授也加入其中，首次參與渣馬10公里賽。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-02-24T07:17:13Z',
  'Duration': 146,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '203',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Music for CM Li and You ─ The Lantern Festival Concert 李氏知音 ─ 元宵音樂會',
  'Description': '完整版/Full version: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/813\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nTo celebrate the Lantern Festival, “Yat Po Singers”, Hong Kong’s first professional a cappella choral theatre group was invited to perform at the Institute of Chinese Studies (ICS). \n\n元宵臨近， 本港首個專業無伴奏合唱劇團「一舖清唱」，在中國文化研究所清唱演繹爵士風樂曲及民謠，技驚四座。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-02-13T01:40:30Z',
  'Duration': 111,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '107',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'VC Cheers for CUHK Marathon Team 校長為中大馬拉松隊打氣',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nProf. Joseph Sung cheers for CUHK runners in the upcoming marathon race!\n\n渣打香港馬拉松即將開跑，沈校長為大家送上打氣短片。中大加油！',
  'Category': '27',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Marathon Experts Share Hot Tips for CUHK Runners 專家教你備戰馬拉松',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 12 February 2017, over 3,100 runners of the CUHK Marathon Team will join the Standard Chartered Hong Kong Marathon. Mr. Daniel Lee from the Department of Sports Science and Physical Education and Mr. Chan Chi Ming from the Physical Education Unit introduced more tips and tactics for runners. \n\n2017年2月12日，中大馬拉松隊將有超過3,100名跑手出戰渣打香港馬拉松。體育運動科學系講師李致和與中大體育部講師陳志明透過錄像為中大跑手分享實用貼士。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-01-26T03:27:22Z',

  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'marathon', 'tips'],
  'Views': '3180',

  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Heralds of Spring: Celebrating the Year of the Rooster 百鳥迎春：雞年賀歲展',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nTo welcome the Lunar New Year, the Art Museum of CUHK presents the exhibition ‘Heralds of Spring: Celebrating the Year of the Rooster’ from 13 January to 5 March 2017. The works come from the collection of the CUHK Art Museum as well as local private collections on the theme of auspicious birds. Members of the public are welcome to visit the exhibition. Admission is free. \n\n為迎接雞年來臨，中大文物館於2017年1月13日至3月5日舉辦「百鳥迎春：雞年賀歲展」，展出以百鳥為主題的中大文物館館藏及本港私人藏家收藏品，歡迎公眾參觀，費用全免。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2017-01-17T04:51:03Z',
  'Duration': 2,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '117',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Hear it from Experts: Manage Your Pace in Marathon  備戰馬拉松：專家教你配速管理',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 12 February 2017, over 3,100 runners of the CUHK Marathon Team will join the Standard Chartered Hong Kong Marathon. Miss Alison Chow from the Physical Education Unit believes pacing management is vital for endurance running.\n\n2017年2月12日，中大馬拉松隊將有超過3,100名跑手出戰渣打香港馬拉松。體育部助理講師周子雁認爲配速管理對馬拉松跑手來説至關重要。',
  'Category': '27',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Foundation Stone Laying Ceremony of the Jockey Club Postgraduate Halls 2 & 3 賽馬會研究生宿舍（二座及三座）奠基典禮',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe foundation stone laying ceremony for the Jockey Club Postgraduate Halls 2 & 3 at The Chinese University of Hong Kong was held on 9 December. The two new hostels, expected to come into service in 2018, will enrich students’ learning experience and foster communication among students of diverse backgrounds. \n\n中大於12月9日舉行賽馬會研究生宿舍（二座及三座）奠基典禮。兩座新宿舍預計於2018年啟用，豐富學生的學習生活，並促進來自不同背景學生之交流。',
  'Category': '27',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Christmas Party with the Vice-Chancellor 2016 校長師生同賀聖誕 2016',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nVice-Chancellor Prof. Joseph Sung has hosted a cheerful gathering for over 150 students, alumni and faculty members at the Vice-Chancellor's Lodge to celebrate Christmas and their achievements made in the past year.\n\n聖誕將至，沈校長與150多位師生校友歡聚漢園，慶祝佳節之餘也恭賀他們在過去一年取得的驕人成績。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-12-29T06:48:22Z',
  'Duration': 150,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '175',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Master's Degree (2015-2016) Graduation Ceremony 二零一五至二零一六年度碩士學位課程畢業典禮",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 18 and 19 November, CUHK held Master's Degree Graduation Ceremony.\n\n11月18及19日，中大舉辦碩士學位課程畢業典禮。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-12-22T09:56:34Z',

  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Ground Breaking Ceremony of The CUHK Medical Centre 香港中文大學醫院動土典禮',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK held the ground breaking ceremony of The CUHK Medical Centre on 8 December, symbolising the commencement of the Centre’s construction. \n中大於12月8日為香港中文大學醫院舉行動土典禮，標誌著中大醫院的建築工程已順利展開。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-12-20T06:56:43Z',
  'Duration': 280,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '798',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Modeling Discrete Optimization MOOC Specialization',
  'Description': 'Have you ever planned the seating for a wedding, organized a roster, or completed a Sudoku puzzle? If so, you have solved a discrete optimization problem. These problems are ubiquitous in business and our daily lives, but solving them well is often very challenging. \n\nThis promotional video introduces two Massives Open Online Courses (MOOCs) now available on Coursera: Basic Modeling for Discrete Optimization (https://www.coursera.org/learn/basic-modeling ) and Advanced Modeling for Discrete Optimization (https://www.coursera.org/learn/advancedmodeling ) that will help you learn how to solve such problems with ease. They use a unique pedagogy where the learning is woven around a famous Chinese fable, “The Romance of the Three Kingdoms”. These courses, also available wholly in Chinese (Basic: https://www.coursera.org/learn/lisan-youhua-jianmo-jichupian , Advanced: https://www.coursera.org/learn/lisan-youhua-jianmo-gaojiepian ), have been developed in a unique collaboration between The Chinese University of Hong Kong and The University of Melbourne, and will form part of a four course Specialization on Modeling for Discrete Optimization. \n\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-12-13T08:40:10Z',
  'Duration': 81,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'MOOCs',
   'Massive Open Online Courses',
   'MiniZinc',
   'Modeling Discrete Optimization',
   'Fable based pedagogy'],
  'Views': '667',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「離散優化建模」慕課專項課程',
  'Description': '您有沒有試過為婚禮做座次安排、編排值班表、或完成一個數獨問題？如果有的話，您已經有了解決離散優化問題的經驗。這些問題在我們的工作及日常生活中無所不在，如何好好解決這些問題頗具挑戰性。\n\n這個宣傳視頻介紹了兩門能幫助您輕松解決這些問題的課程，它們是由香港中文大學開發，在Coursera平台發布的大規模開放在線課程（慕課）「離散優化建模基礎篇」（https://www.coursera.org/learn/lisan-youhua-jianmo-jichupian ）和「離散優化建模高階篇」（https://www.coursera.org/learn/lisan-youhua-jianmo-gaojiepian ）。課程導師運用獨特的教學方法，圍繞中國名著《三國演義》開展趣味十足的教學。此外還提供全英文的版本（基礎篇https://www.coursera.org/learn/basic-modeling  ，高階篇https://www.coursera.org/learn/advancedmodeling ），由香港中文大學與墨爾本大學合作開發，是四門專項課程「離散優化建模」的一部分。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-12-13T06:49:54Z',
  'Duration': 93,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'MOOCs',
   'Massive Open Online Courses',
   'MiniZinc',
   'Modeling Discrete Optimization',
   'Fable based pedagogy'],
  'Views': '223',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Distinguished Lecture and Demonstration by Professor Au Ho-nien 歐豪年教授主講:「從一根草說起」及書畫示範',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 1 December, Prof. Au Ho-nien, a master of the “Lingnan School” of painting and a 2016 Honorary Graduate of CUHK gave a talk followed by a demonstration of Chinese painting on campus.\n\n12月1日，中國畫藝壇大師、二零一六年中大榮譽文學博士歐豪年教授蒞臨中大，為觀眾帶來了一場精彩的講座，更即場揮毫示範，一展大師風采。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-12-06T08:54:19Z',
  'Duration': 271,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '157',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '82nd Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees 第八十二屆大會(頒授學位典禮)',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK held its 82nd Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 1 December. Three distinguished persons were conferred honorary degrees, including the Honourable Chief Justice Ma Tao-li, Geoffrey, Prof. Au Ho-nien and the Venerable Master Hsing Yun. A total of 422 doctoral degrees were conferred at the Congregation.\n\n中大於12月1日舉行第八十二屆大會（頒授學位典禮），由中大校董會主席梁乃鵬博士主持。大學向三位傑出人士頒授榮譽博士學位，表彰他們對社會、教育、文化藝術及增進人民福祉的傑出貢獻。三位榮譽博士分別為：馬道立首席法官、歐豪年教授及星雲大師。大會同時頒授422個博士學位。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-12-06T08:36:56Z',
  'Duration': 616,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '972',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '81st Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees 第八十一屆大會(頒授學位典禮)',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK held its 81st Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 17 November. Dr. Norman N.P. Leung, Chairman of the Council, conferred first and master’s degrees at the Congregation. Prof. Joseph J.Y. Sung, Vice-Chancellor and President, presented awards for teaching and research excellence. A total of 5,593 master’s degrees and 4,029 bachelor’s degrees were conferred at the Congregation. \n\n中大於11月17日舉行第八十一屆大會（頒授學位典禮），由大學校董會主席梁乃鵬博士主禮並頒授各科學士及碩士學位，並由校長沈祖堯教授頒發傑出教學及研究獎。大會頒授了5,593個碩士學位及4,029個學士學位。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-12-06T04:23:33Z',
  'Duration': 695,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1083',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Happy 53rd Birthday to CUHK ! 中大53歲生日快樂！',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOctober 17, 2016 is the 53rd anniversary for CUHK! For over half a century, generations of CUHK members have worked for the progress of the University, and the once barren hillside by the Tolo Harbour has been turned into a stunning campus covered in greenery. Let’s follow the camera and start a wonderful tour around the campus.\n\n2016年10月17日，香港中文大學迎來五十三歲生日！半個多世紀以來，一代代中大師生校友蹈厲奮發，吐露港旁光禿禿的山頭逐漸變成了綠意盎然的著名學府。趁著校慶日，我們特別剪輯短片，展示大學最新風貌，帶大家一齊細味校園的一花一木、一磚一瓦。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-10-18T08:00:24Z',
  'Duration': 111,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1099',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Vice-Chancellor's Speech in Inauguration Ceremony for Undergraduates 2016 本科生入學典禮校長講辭",
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nAt the Inauguration Ceremony, Prof. Joseph Sung, CUHK Vice-Chancellor, suggested that new students compile a list of what they want to achieve and encouraged them to learn three things: who you are, what this world actually needs, and how to work with others.\n\n在開學典禮上，校長沈祖堯教授希望新生為大學生涯定下目標，並在未來數年學會認識自己，認識世界的需要，以及認識如何與人共事。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-09-06T04:34:35Z',
  'Duration': 409,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1370',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」中大划艇隊',
  'Description': 'English subtitle: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/735?lang=en\n\n請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n2016年，對中大划艇隊來説，別具意義。團隊不單成功取得大專賽十五連勝的驕人成績，也迎來三十周年紀念日。爲此，我們製作了一輯短片，作為「中大五十 • 人」錄像系列之一，與大家共同見證中大划艇隊成長的腳步。\n\nThe year 2016 is a meaningful one for the CUHK Rowing Team. It not only achieved the 15th consecutive victory in this year’s Hong Kong Universities Rowing Championships but also entered its 30th year. To celebrate this special occasion, a video of the team’s inspiring story was made as one of the ‘CU50 • The People’ video series.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-08-26T09:27:07Z',
  'Duration': 629,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '5798',
  'Likes': '36',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Campus Guardians during Typhoon 颱風中的守護者',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nDo you know that there is a team named the Typhoon and Black Storm Squad from our Estates Management Office? Let's see what they've done when Typhoon Nida hit Hong Kong in early August through the video.\n\n本月頭，颱風妮妲吹襲香港。中大物業管理處的颱風及黑雨候命小組在打風前爭分奪秒做好防風準備，更連夜留守校園直至風球離開。\n\n我們透過鏡頭記錄下物業管理處同事在颱風前後的工作，更拍攝到颱風吹襲校園的情景，精彩片段不容錯過！",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-08-12T04:30:22Z',
  'Duration': 246,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '102',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '2016 CUHK Summer Institute 高中生暑期課程',
  'Description': 'It has never been an easy proposition for secondary school students to decide which discipline to pursue if they are to enter university in the near future. To inspire them and give them some direction on their future studies, CUHK has, in recent years, been organizing the Summer Institute, a two-week summer programme designed for S.5 students (or the equivalent). \n\n對於中學畢業生來説，要從大學眾多專業中選擇適合自己的一個並非易事。爲了幫助中學生了解不同科目的特色、確定自己的志向，中大每年暑假都會舉辦高中生暑期課程，邀請就讀中五的學生到校園體驗大學生活的滋味。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-07-29T09:39:49Z',
  'Duration': 156,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '4785',
  'Likes': '17',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Thirty-five years with CUHK 三十五載情不移',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK presented the 2015 Long Service Awards to 136 staff members who have been working at the University for 25 and 35 years. Let’s hear their stories with CUHK shared by two awardees.\n\n在2015年度長期服務獎頒授典禮上，大學向136位為中大服務25年及35年的員工頒授榮譽獎項，感謝他們多年來對大學的貢獻。讓我們透過短片，聽一聽兩位得獎員工的中大故事。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-07-14T01:32:35Z',
  'Duration': 208,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '131',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '80th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees 第八十屆大會（頒授學位典禮）',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n完整版/Full version: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/723\n\nCUHK held its 80th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 26 May. Prof. Randy W. Schekman and Prof. Joseph E. Stiglitz, both of whom are Nobel Laureates, had honorary doctorates conferred on them at the Congregation. \n\n中大於5月26日在校園舉行第八十屆大會(頒授學位典禮)，頒授榮譽博士學位予兩位諾貝爾得獎者—2013年諾貝爾生理學或醫學獎得主蘭迪‧謝克曼教授(Professor Randy W. Schekman)，以及2001年諾貝爾經濟學獎得主約瑟夫‧斯蒂格利茨教授(Professor Joseph E. Stiglitz)，表彰他們對科研及社會的傑出貢獻。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-06-16T02:23:28Z',
  'Duration': 265,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '792',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Inter-disciplinary Research Team Finds Novel Drug Candidate for Rare Neurological Diseases',
  'Description': 'Please watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nChinese version: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4u5qGqs1F2s&feature=youtu.be\n\nSince 1998, Prof. Edwin Chan from CUHK School of Life Sciences has studied a group of rare neurological disorders and developed therapeutic interventions against these diseases. Prof. Chan’s team has discovered a drug candidate P3, a 13-amino acid peptide, which can neutralize toxic RNA and rescue neurodegeneration. A United States patent application protecting this technology has been allowed by the US Patent and Trademark Office.  P3 has the potential to be developed into therapeutic usage giving hope to individuals who suffer from rare neuronal diseases.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-06-06T05:59:04Z',
  'Duration': 539,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '736',
  'Likes': '10',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '中大跨學科研究團隊為罕見神經系統疾病研發新藥物',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nEnglish version: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UlixLPEFJhM&feature=youtu.be \n\n中大生命科學學院陳浩然教授及其團隊多年來一直致力研究與神經系統有關的罕見病之致病原因及治療方案，最近發明了一種名為P3的多肽分子（由蛋白質中13個氨基酸肽合成），能有效抑制神經細胞退化，並已取得美國專利及商標局的專利，可望成為新藥物，為罕見神經系統病患者帶來令人振奮的消息。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-06-06T05:45:06Z',
  'Duration': 539,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1974',
  'Likes': '34',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Fifteenth Honorary Fellowship Conferment Ceremony 第十五屆榮譽院士頒授典禮',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong held its Fifteenth Honorary Fellowship Conferment Ceremony on 16 May. Five distinguished persons had conferred upon them honorary fellowships in recognition of their remarkable contributions to the University and the community. \n\n香港中文大學於五月十六日在校園舉行第十五屆榮譽院士頒授典禮，頒授榮譽院士銜予五位傑出人士，表揚他們對大學及社會的卓越貢獻。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-05-31T06:30:39Z',
  'Duration': 301,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '570',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Entrepreneur Day 2016 中大創業日2016',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n“CUHK Entrepreneur Day 2016”, a two-day event initiated by the CUHK Alumni Torch Fund was held on May 6 and 7, setting off a new wave of entrepreneurial enthusiasm throughout the campus with an exhibition, a series of seminars and consultancy services. \n\n5月6、7日，「中大校友傳承基金」舉辦的「中大創業日2016」在校園掀起一股創業熱潮。這個為期兩日的創業盛事展出了近60項中大校友師生的創業理念與成果，並舉辦十多場講座及個案分享，讓中大歷代創業者以及投資人共聚一堂，分享創業心得。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-05-13T03:32:26Z',
  'Duration': 276,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '569',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Dancing Lines: An Encounter of East and West Calligraphy with Dance at CUHK 線舞: 中西書法與舞蹈的完美邂逅',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n完整版/Full version: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/706\n\nOn 16 April, three artists Ms Loi-Che Chan, Mr Mark van Praagh and Ms Sarah van Praagh staged on campus a unique performance, an interlocking inspiration of calligraphy, music and dance, as one of the events of the “Dutch Days in Hong Kong” festival.\n\n4月16日，定居荷蘭逾30年的藝術家陳耐持校友聯同兩位藝術家Mark van Praagh 以及 Ms Sarah van Praagh在校園為大家帶來一場行為藝術舞蹈表演 —「線舞」，將中西書法與舞蹈的美感完美結合，別具一格。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-04-29T06:17:22Z',
  'Duration': 522,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1274',
  'Likes': '7',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Pai Hsien-yung: From Literature to Kunqu 白先勇: 寂寞十七到絢爛七十',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nProf. Pai Hsien-yung organized four talks on campus, between 14 and 19 March, in which he brought the audience into a glamourous world which merges Chinese Literature with various art presentations, including drama, movie and Kunqu. At the age of 78, Prof. Pai seems to have endless energy when talking about his life-long pursuit to an audience.\n\n3月14至19日，在短短六日的時間，白先勇教授在中大校園一連舉辦了四場公開講座，透過舞台劇錄像、電影以及崑曲，帶領大家走入一個中國文學與藝術融會的絢爛世界，為中大人帶來多場難得的文化盛宴。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-04-01T08:36:36Z',
  'Duration': 746,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '520',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Marathon Team Award Ceremony 2016 香港中文大學馬拉松隊頒獎典禮2016',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn Mar 12, an award ceremony was held to honor outstanding CUHK runners, cheerers and supportive colleges, faculties and units of the University.\n\n3月12日大學舉辦中大馬拉松隊頒獎典禮，嘉獎今年渣馬取得傑出成績的中大健兒，以及踴躍支持比賽的啦啦隊成員、書院、學院及部門。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-03-21T02:30:41Z',
  'Duration': 226,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '141',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Prof. Tjonnie Li on "Einstein’s Messenger: A New Window on the Universe" 黎冠峰教授:「愛因斯坦的信使：探視宇宙的新窗戶」',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n完整版/Full version: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/693\n\nOn 11 February, the Laser Interferometer Gravitational-wave Observatory (LIGO) officially announced that the gravitational waves from colliding black holes 1.3 billion years ago have been detected by both of its twin detectors, opening up a new window on the study of the Universe. Prof. Tjonnie G. F. LI, Research Assistant Professor from the Department of Physics at CUHK, has been involved with the work of LIGO since 2009, and is currently the only scientist from a Hong Kong institution to be part of it. \n\nIn the talk entitled ‘Einstein’s Messenger: A New Window on the Universe’, Prof. Li gave a detailed introduction on gravitational waves and the operation of LIGO.\n\n今年2月11日，鐳射干涉儀重力波觀測站（LIGO）合作組正式宣布，成功探測到兩個黑洞在13億年前合併時所產生的重力波。這是人類第一次探測到重力波，為進一步揭開宇宙起源之謎奠下重要里程碑。中大物理系研究助理教授黎冠峰教授自2009年開始就參與LIGO的研究工作，是LIGO合作組中唯一來自香港院校的科學家。\n\n在講座中，黎教授詳細介紹了重力波以及LIGO的運作。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-02-23T10:28:53Z',
  'Duration': 587,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1614',
  'Likes': '14',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Marathon Team 2016',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nIt was a very rainy day for the Standard Chartered Hong Kong Marathon on 17 January. A strong and united team, comprising nearly 3,000 runners, 300 cheerers and the Sports Medicine Team from CUHK participated in the event regardless of the soaking weather.\n\n1月17日，渣打香港馬拉松在大雨中進行。近3000名中大馬拉松隊跑手、300名啦啦隊成員及中大運動醫學團隊無懼惡劣天氣參與賽事，展現出中大人的拼搏和團結精神。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-01-29T04:25:50Z',
  'Duration': 273,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '310',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Shaw College 30th Anniversary: Glass Bottle Recycling Challenge 香港中文大學逸夫書院三十周年 ─ 聚SHAW成磚環保路',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 10 January, Shaw College celebrated its 30th anniversary in an innovative and environmental-friendly way. With overwhelming support from CUHK members and the public, a total of 1,147 kilograms of glass bottles were collected within an hour, officially setting a first Guinness World Record for recycling glass bottles in one hour!\n\n1月10日，中大逸夫書院以一個結合創意與環保的獨特方式慶祝成立三十周年。憑着師生校友的踴躍支持，書院在短短一小時回收了1147公斤的玻璃瓶，成功創造全球首個玻璃瓶回收的健力士世界紀錄！',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2016-01-18T08:45:45Z',
  'Duration': 550,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '317',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Vice-Chancellor's Christmas Party with Champion Teams 校長師生同賀聖誕",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 17 December, Vice-Chancellor Prof. Joseph Sung was host to a cheerful and uplifting gathering of 150 guests at the Vice-Chancellor's Lodge to celebrate Christmas. Students and alumni of CUHK who have made outstanding achievements in the past year in different fields, such as science, sports, social service, public speaking and debating joined the fun-filled festive party.\n\n12月17日，校長沈祖堯教授於漢園舉辦聖誕派對，與150位中大師生校友共度一個愉快的夜晚，並向所有中大人送上節日的祝福。 \n\n獲邀出席的同學校友於過去一年代表大學在不同領域包括科學、運動、社會服務以及演講辯論等取得驕人成績。 校長不僅準備了豐富美食，還與一眾與會者玩集體遊戲，打成一片。當晚崇基學院聖誕詩班到漢園報佳音，更添濃濃的聖誕氣氛。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-12-28T09:05:07Z',
  'Duration': 251,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '194',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Hear it from Experts: Marathon Route Analysis 專家解析馬拉松賽道',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nMr. Chan Chi-ming, lecturer from the Physical Education Unit, has been invited to analyze the 10km route of the race and suggest phase by phase strategies for runners in the video.\n\n中大體育部陳志明講師透過錄像總括上屆中大跑手的成績，更詳細分析來年十公里賽道的特點，並分享每段賽道的應對策略，跑手們不要錯過。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-12-28T07:37:14Z',
  'Duration': 151,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '201',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CU Runners, Get Set, Go! 中大人備戰馬拉松',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nTo help the runners to achieve their best results in the races, Mr. Daniel Lee, lecturer from the Department of Sports Science and Physical Education gave useful advice, such as warming up exercises to do before the run, postures for running on slopes and how to deal with physical discomfort during the race. \n\n體育運動科學系講師李致和與大家分享起跑前的熱身運動，上下斜坡時的跑姿，以及如何應付賽跑時身體不適等實用資訊。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-12-11T06:51:42Z',
  'Duration': 306,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2806',
  'Likes': '9',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '79th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees 第七十九屆大會(頒授學位典禮)',
  'Description': 'Full version of the Congregation/典禮完整錄像: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/677 \n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 3 December, CUHK held its 79th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees. Prof. Joseph Sung, Vice-Chancellor conferred five honorary doctorates and 372 doctoral degrees at the Congregation.\n\n中大於12月3日舉行第七十九屆大會（頒授學位典禮），大學向五位傑出人士頒授榮譽博士學位。大會同時頒授372個博士學位。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-12-11T06:43:18Z',
  'Duration': 435,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '444',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '78th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees 第七十八屆大會(頒授學位典禮)',
  'Description': 'Full version of the Congregation/典禮完整版：http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/668\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK held its 78th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 19 November. At the congregation, Prof. Joseph J.Y. Sung, CUHK Vice-Chancellor, conferred 6,167 Master’s and 3,732 Bachelor’s degrees. He also officiated at the Inauguration of the Choh-Ming Li Professorships and presented awards to 27 outstanding teachers and researchers.\n\n11 月 19日，中大舉行第七十八屆大會（頒授學位典禮）。今屆大會共頒授了6,167個碩士學位及3,732個學士學位。同時，沈校長主持卓敏教授席就職典禮，並頒發傑出教學及研究獎予27名優秀教研人員。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-12-07T02:28:38Z',
  'Duration': 713,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1783',
  'Likes': '8',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Vice-Chancellor's Address in 78th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees 第七十八屆大會（頒授學位典禮）校長致辭",
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n78th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees/第七十八屆大會(頒授學位典禮): http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/668\n\nCUHK held its 78th Congregation for the Conferment of Degrees on 19 November. Prof. Joseph J.Y. Sung, CUHK Vice-Chancellor and President gave a speech, titled ‘The Young Are the Hope of Our Future’ to the graduates.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-11-27T10:39:32Z',
