 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Universities Join Hands to Promote Academic Chinese 兩岸四地齊推動學術中文',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK held a summit on 18 November on Assessment and Development of Academic Chinese as one of the initiating universities including Peking University, Nanjing University, Shanghai Jiao Tong University and Taiwan University. A total of 32 cross-strait universities from mainland China, Taiwan, Hong Kong and Macau signed a collaboration agreement to promote Chinese as an internationally recognized research language during this remarkable historic event across the four regions. \n\n11月18日，中大舉行「中文學術評鑑與發展高峰論壇」。論壇上，中大聯同北京大學、南京大學、上海交通大學及台灣大學五所發起院校，和海峽兩岸及港澳地區合共32所院校一同簽署「推動學術中文合作協議」，以提升中文研究成果在國際學術界的地位。活動為兩岸四地學術界的一項盛事。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-11-27T10:28:45Z',
  'Duration': 367,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '63',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Master's Degree (2014-2015) Graduation Ceremony 二零一四至二零一五年度碩士學位課程畢業典禮",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 20 and 21 November, CUHK held Master's Degree (2014-2015) Graduation Ceremony.\n\n11月20及21日，中大舉辦二零一四至二零一五年度碩士學位課程畢業典禮。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-11-27T09:58:27Z',
  'Duration': 501,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '820',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'School of Journalism and Communication Celebrates 50th Birthday 新聞與傳播學院成立50周年',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nOn 31 October, the “50th Birthday Party” of the School of Journalism and Communication was held in New Asia College, drawing close to 1,000 alumni, staff, students and guests to attend. Packed with brilliant performances by alumni, students and teachers, the evening show was a heartwarming memory for all. \n\n今年是新聞與傳播學院成立50周年，學院不僅舉辦多場學術活動以及晚宴慶祝，更於10月31日在新亞書院舉辦了一場精彩熱鬧的慶祝活動 —「新傳五十‧張佬擺大壽」，吸引了近千名校友、教職員、學生及嘉賓共聚一堂。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-11-13T11:05:54Z',
  'Duration': 192,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '561',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Professor Donna Chu on "On Mediated Love" 朱順慈教授主講「未得的愛」',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n完整版/Full version: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/651 \n\nOn November 5, Prof. Donna Chu from the School of Journalism and Communication gave a talk, titled “On Mediated Love”, as the third session of the talk series “Ten Theses on Freedom”. Facilitated by Dr. Lau Po-hei from CUHK’s General Education Foundation Programme, the talk drew a full house of nearly 200.\n\n11月5日，新聞與傳播學院朱順慈教授以「未得的愛」為題舉辦通識沙龍講座，並由通識教育基礎課程的劉保禧博士擔當主持。講座吸引了近200位中大師生校友參與，全場座無虛席。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-11-13T04:29:17Z',
  'Duration': 468,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '605',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Muhammad Yunus on ‘Small Loans for a Big Future’ 穆罕默德‧尤努斯主講「盆景樹下小錢莊」',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\n完整版/Full version: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/644\n\nOn 14 October, Nobel Peace Prize winner Muhammad Yunus visited CUHK and gave a lecture on campus, titled “Small Loans for a Big Future”, to share his experience in social business.\n\n10月14日，諾貝爾和平獎得主穆罕默德‧尤努斯來到中大，以「盆景樹下小錢莊」為題主持「博群大講堂」，與聽眾分享自己發展及推動社會企業的歷程。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-11-10T10:00:12Z',
  'Duration': 461,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Muhammad Yunus (Organization Leader)'],
  'Views': '242',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The Bei Shan Tang Legacy: Rubbings of Stone Engraving and Model Calligraphy「北山汲古─碑帖銘刻拓本」展覽',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe Art Museum of CUHK has opened the exhibition ‘The Bei Shan Tang Legacy: Rubbings of Stone Engraving and Model Calligraphy’ to features, in two phases, 70 pieces of precious ink rubbing. \n\nTo help the public better understand the art, a video has been produced to demonstrate the process of rubbing, and Dr. Ho Pik-ki, Associate Researcher of Art Museum will introduce the historical value of Chinese ancient rubbings.\n\n中大文物館正舉辦「北山汲古─碑帖銘刻拓本」展覽，分兩期展出合共70件珍貴碑帖銘刻拓本。\n\n為了更加生動介紹這一重要的中國書法文化，文物館特別邀請到拓碑專家拍攝製作拓本的步驟，並由文物館副研究員何碧琪博士為大家介紹拓本的歷史價值。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-11-02T04:56:13Z',
  'Duration': 276,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Rubbing'],
  'Views': '222',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Celebrates Her 52nd Anniversary 中大慶祝52周年',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK was inaugurated with three colleges, Chung Chi, New Asia and United on 17 October, 1963. Since then, the unique college system of CUHK has been kept and developed.\n\nAs the University is stepping into its 52nd anniversary, we have produced a special video to record the growth of the nine colleges and bring you to experience the different cultures of each college.\n\n1963年10月17日，香港中文大學成立。五十多年來，中大一直延續本港大學獨一無二的書院制。\n\n在大學慶祝成立52周年之際，我們特別製作短片見證九間書院的成長，並帶大家體驗各具特色的書院生活。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-10-19T06:46:17Z',
  'Duration': 276,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (College/University)'],
  'Views': '564',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」饒宗頤',
  'Description': 'English subtitle: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/638?lang=en\n\n請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n中大偉倫榮譽藝術講座教授大紫荊勳賢饒宗頤教授爲蜚聲國際的漢學家，集學者與藝術家於一身。我們特別製作一輯關於饒教授的短片，作為「中大五十 • 人」錄像系列之一，帶大家了解饒教授的生平、成就，感受這位國學泰斗永不倦怠的治學精神。\n\nProf. the Honourable Jao Tsung-I, GBM, Wei Lun Honorary Professor of Fine Arts at CUHK is a world-renowned sinologist. To record his life story and achievements, and appreciate his great perseverance on the pursuit of knowledge, a video of Prof. Jao was made as one of the “CU50 • The People” video series.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-09-29T09:39:36Z',
  'Duration': 525,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '11673',
  'Likes': '121',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Vice-Chancellor's Speech in Inauguration Ceremony for Undergraduates 2015 本科生入學典禮校長講辭",
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nAt the inauguration ceremony, Prof. Joseph Sung encouraged the new students with a quote from Confucius, “I set my heart on the way, base myself on virtue, lean upon benevolence for support and take my recreation in the arts.” Let's listen to his speech from the video.\n\n校長沈祖堯教授於入學典禮上以孔子的話勉勵同學，希望他們「恪守正道，以德為本，心存仁道，游賞藝術」。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-09-11T13:05:29Z',
  'Duration': 606,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '341',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Welcoming CUHK New Students 歡迎中大新鮮人',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe University has recruited over 3,000 undergraduate students this year. To help the new students immerse themselves in university life, orientation activities have been organized by faculties and colleges. Let’s welcome the new members to CUHK family!\n\n新學年，大學喜迎超過3,000位本科新生。爲了幫助他們了解大學生活，儘快融入中大的大家庭，各書院及學系學生組織舉辦了内容豐富的迎新活動。讓我們透過短片歡迎這班中大新鮮人。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-09-11T12:40:57Z',
  'Duration': 105,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (College/University)'],
  'Views': '8886',
  'Likes': '49',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Visiting the Elderly with CUHK Mooncake 中大愛心月餅贈長者',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nTo celebrate the upcoming Mid-Autumn Festival, CUHK co-organised the social service “Visiting the Elderly with CUHK Mooncake” with the Evangelical Lutheran Church of Hong Kong’s Ma On Shan District Elderly Community Centre and Strategic CSR Network.\n\n9月5日，中大與基督教香港信義會馬鞍山長者地區中心及縱橫社會責任網絡合辦「中大愛心月餅慶中秋」活動。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-09-11T12:31:41Z',
  'Duration': 121,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Mooncake (Dish)'],
  'Views': '90',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Herbal Gardens at CUHK 中大藥園',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe beautiful campus of CUHK is home to hundreds of Chinese medicinal herbs. These herbal gardens have become scenic spots on the campus and are also of great importance to research on herbs and our education in them.\n\n中大校園不僅優美，亦是數百種天然中草藥材的寶庫。這些中草藥植物分佈於校内數個中藥園，除了供觀賞之用，同時推動中藥知識的普及與研究。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-08-24T04:26:06Z',
  'Duration': 241,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1631',
  'Likes': '13',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Statues on CUHK Campus 中大校園群像',
  'Description': "請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nYou may have seen them many times on campus. They are always there, watching over students in their pursuit of knowledge, seeing them graduate and witnessing the growth of the University. They are the guardians of the University, standing for the sources of wisdom and the models of achievement who inspire generations of CUHK members. \nLet's follow the camera and learn more about the stories behind them.\n\n在中大校園，我們常常和他們擦身而過；他們默默站在一旁，陪伴大家學習，目送同學學成畢業，見證大學成長；他們是知識的創造者、大學的守護者，啟發每一代中大人，是我們的模範。\n讓我們一起跟隨鏡頭，尋覓這些校園人像。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-08-07T02:15:09Z',
  'Duration': 256,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '486',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Campus Gardeners 校園拓荒者',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nThe campus of CUHK is indeed a botanical garden. Around 60% of the 137-hectare site is covered in greenery. You can hardly believe that when the University was built more than 50 years ago, this scenic place was just a barren hill side. \n\n中大校園佔地137公頃，約六成的面積都覆蓋着綠色植物，其中植物及花卉有300多種，樹木接近200種，堪稱本港綠色生態的縮影。但誰又能想像得到，50年前創校之時的校園只是一個光禿禿的山頭。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-07-24T01:47:41Z',
  'Duration': 264,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '206',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」謝婉雯',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n2003年6月23日，世界衛生組織正式將香港從沙士疫區中剔除。在這場對抗沙士病毒的戰役中，中大畢業生謝婉雯醫生因救治病人而殉職。時隔十二載，我們沒有忘記這位香港的女兒，特別製作短片記錄謝婉雯醫生的事蹟，作爲「中大五十 • 人」錄像系列之一，紀念她的醫者心。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-06-24T04:14:54Z',
  'Duration': 597,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '314261',
  'Likes': '3395',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Awards for Green Buildings at CUHK 綠在建築',
  'Description': "Besides the natural greenery, CUHK has been putting a great effort into constructing green buildings for a sustainable campus. In GreenMAP's April issue published by the Hong Kong Green Building Council, CUHK was top of the list among local tertiary institutions for the distinctive achievements in buildings certified by the BEAM Society, Hong Kong’s first non-profit organization that provides Building Environmental Assessment services.\n\n身處依山而建的中大校園，滿眼盡是綠意。不過，中大的「綠色校園」並不局限於自然環境的綠；在校園設計和設施方面，中大也努力建立一系列「綠色建築」。在香港綠色建築議會今年四月公佈的全港院校綠建版圖中，中大建築取得5白金、6金、2銅的環評獎項，數量遠超其他院校。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-06-08T04:42:14Z',
  'Duration': 156,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Green Building (Industry)',
   'Architecture (Industry)',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (College/University)'],
  'Views': '1122',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The Art of CUHK 2015 中大藝術',
  'Description': 'The Art of CUHK 2015, organized by the students of the Department of Fine Arts, commenced on May 30 and presented a series of exhibitions on campus, including a BA Graduate Exhibition, an Undergraduate Exhibition and an Invitational and Postgraduate Exhibition.\n\n今年中大藝術系學生籌劃的「中大藝術2015」已經開幕，内容包括本科畢業展、本科生展、邀請展以及7月份的研究生作品展。一連串的展覽，由策展、宣傳、贊助到場地佈置等均由同學負責。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-06-08T04:16:21Z',
  'Duration': 261,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (College/University)',
   'Department of Fine Arts'],
  'Views': '976',
  'Likes': '11',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Fourteenth Honorary Fellowship Conferment Ceremony 第十四屆榮譽院士頒授典禮',
  'Description': 'The Chinese University of Hong Kong held its Fourteenth Honorary Fellowship Conferment Ceremony on 11 May. Five distinguished persons had conferred upon them honorary fellowships in recognition of their remarkable contributions to the University and the community.\n\n香港中文大學於五月十一日在校園舉行第十四屆榮譽院士頒授典禮，頒授榮譽院士銜予五位傑出人士，表揚他們對大學及社會的卓越貢獻。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-05-22T10:43:39Z',
  'Duration': 324,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '107',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」胡秀英',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n胡教授生前是一位享譽國際的植物學家。她1968年來到中大，出任崇基學院生物系高級講師，課餘之暇，踏遍香江，收集香港特有標本，為大學成立了一間可供研究與教學兩用的植物標本館。多年來她著作不斷，採集植物標本超過三萬份，獲得「植物學活百科全書」之美譽。支持她研究的最大動力便是對自然的熱愛，她曾說「做研究的動力就是到自然，與自然合一。」\n\n在胡教授逝世三周年之際，我們特別製作一輯記錄胡教授生平的短片，作爲「中大五十 • 人」錄像系列之一，以緬懷這位心如赤子的學者。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-05-22T10:13:53Z',
  'Duration': 584,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', '胡秀英'],
  'Views': '3405',
  'Likes': '40',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'A Tribute to Long Service Staff 情繫中大',
  'Description': 'CUHK presented the 2014 Long Service Awards to 105 staff members who have been working at the University for 25 and 35 years on April 22. Let’s hear their stories at CUHK shared by two awardees.  \n\n中大於4月22日舉行2014年度長期服務獎頒授典禮，表揚105名任職滿25和35年的同事。讓我們透過短片，聽一聽兩位得獎同事的中大故事。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-05-11T02:58:57Z',
  'Duration': 276,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Staff (Job Title)'],
  'Views': '61',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Cocktail Reception with International, Mainland and Local Students 「文化之夜」聯歡晚會',
  'Description': 'About 100 students from over 30 countries or regions and a number of Consuls-General were invited to savor Chinese culture at a “Cultural Night” party at the Art Museum on Apr 13.\n\n4月13日，近100位來自30多個國家及地區的中大學生、多位駐港外國總領事和領事館代表，蒞臨中大文物館參加一個富濃厚中國文化色彩的「文化之夜」。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-04-28T02:59:10Z',
  'Duration': 206,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '70',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'I·CARE Floral Festival 博群花節2015',
  'Description': 'Organized by I • CARE programme, I • CARE Floral Festival provided a chance for CUHK members to enjoy beautiful campus scenes and express themselves in different ways.\n\n中大I‧CARE「博群花節」是校園一項文化盛會，2012年首辦獲得熱烈迴響，今年三月再度重臨校園。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-04-09T08:12:27Z',
  'Duration': 401,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '199',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'A Toy Library in Northern Myanmar 愛心玩具傳緬北',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv\n\nIn December of 2014, more than 10 students and alumni from the United College of CUHK visited the orphanages and schools in Lashio in Northern Myanmar. The service group helped to set up a toy library with toys collected in Hong Kong.\n2014年12月，中大聯合書院十幾位學生及校友透過「愛心玩具傳緬北」活動，將玩具由香港帶給緬甸臘戌的孤兒和中學生，並設立玩具圖書館。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-03-24T04:11:25Z',
  'Duration': 169,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Myanmar (Country)', 'Toy (Interest)'],
  'Views': '106',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Professor Jao Tsung-I and CUHK 饒公·中大·情',
  'Description': 'As a world-renowned sinologist, Professor the Honourable Jao Tsung-I, GBM is now Wei Lun Honorary Professor of Fine Arts at CUHK, Professor Emeritus in the Department of Chinese Language and Literature, as well as the Honorary Professor of the Institute of Chinese Studies. CUHK is honored to have had close ties with Professor Jao for more than 60 years.\n大紫荊勳賢饒宗頤教授學貫中西，博古通今，是備受推崇的國學泰斗。他現任中大偉倫榮譽藝術講座教授、中國語言及文學榮休講座教授及中國文化研究所榮譽顧問，而他與中大結下的情緣也超過六十年。\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-03-20T02:31:47Z',
  'Duration': 476,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1547',
  'Likes': '20',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Green Mini Movies Competition 綠色微電影',
  'Description': 'A special edited prelude of the entries from primary and secondary schools for the Green Mini Movies Competition hosted by the ‘Go Green Community – Jockey Club Carbon Reduction Partnership Scheme’ of CUHK Jockey Club Initiative Gaia. \n\n中大賽馬會地球保源行動「綠色社群——賽馬會減碳伙伴計劃」舉辦「綠色微電影比賽」。在此，我們特別準備一段精彩剪輯的預告片，讓大家一睹綠色小演員的風采。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-03-06T01:28:06Z',
  'Duration': 240,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '111',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Writing Fai Chun with Vice-Chancellor 與校長一同寫揮春',
  'Description': 'Vice-Chancellor Prof. Sung, wrote fai chun with students on 18 Feb to wish everyone a prosperous Year of the Ram.\n\n2月18日(年三十)，沈祖堯校長與同學們在校園一同寫揮春，並祝大家新年進步，身體健康！\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-02-23T04:17:19Z',
  'Duration': 154,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '306',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Year of the Horse : Looking Back 馬年回顧',
  'Description': 'Time flies! The Year of the Horse is waving goodbye to us. In the past year, members of CUHK have experienced many unforgettable moments together.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-02-17T02:48:54Z',
  'Duration': 291,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '138',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '情人節在敬文：與高錕教授伉儷茶聚',
  'Description': '香港中文大學前校長，諾貝爾物理學奬得主高錕教授偕夫人黃美芸女士在情人節當日來到敬文書院與同學分享他們的愛情故事。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-02-17T02:48:53Z',
  'Duration': 232,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '4859',
  'Likes': '36',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '2'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「喜氣洋洋──中國藝術與文化中的羊」展覽',
  'Description': '為迎接羊年來臨，中大文物館與藝術系、中國語言及文學系合作，於2月6日至4月26日聯合舉辦「喜氣洋洋──中國藝術與文化中的羊」展覽，展出文物館及本港私人藏家收藏的歷代羊文物。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-02-17T02:48:50Z',
  'Duration': 371,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '111',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '2015 CUHK Marathon Team 香港中文大學馬拉松隊',
  'Description': '每年一度的體壇盛事——渣打香港馬拉松於1月25日舉行。賽場上，衆多中大跑手及中大啦啦隊成員熱烈參與，發揚馬拉松堅毅的運動精神\n\nBy the time the Standard Chartered Hong Kong Marathon had run its course on 25 January 2015, our tenacious runners sporting their smart CUHK running shirts and all the supporting students, staff and alumni, who heartily cheered for them along the race route, were definitely highlights of the event.\n\n活動相片/Event photo: http://www.cuhk.edu.hk/cpr/marathon/Photo.html\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-02-10T04:12:00Z',
  'Duration': 285,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Marathon (Sport)',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (College/University)'],
  'Views': '325',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Prof. Yau Shing-tung on Science and Humanity 丘成桐教授主講「數理與人文」',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看講座完整版\nPlease watch the full version from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/565\n\n中大博文講座教授兼數學科學研究所所長丘成桐教授於1月9日蒞臨母校中大主持講座。他以「數理與人文」為題，憑藉獨特視角分析科學與人文的關係，講解人文訓練對於優秀科學家的重要意義。\n\nProf. Yau Shing-tung, Distinguished Professor-at-Large and Director of the Institute of Mathematical Sciences at CUHK gave a talk titled ‘Science and Humanity’ on campus. Prof. Yau shared his insights on the relationship between science and humanity and the importance of humanitarian qualities to excellent scientists.\n\nLanguage: Cantonese',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-01-23T07:27:55Z',
  'Duration': 489,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Shing-Tung Yau (Academic)',
   'Science (TV Genre)'],
  'Views': '2116',
  'Likes': '21',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Prof. Lutz-Christian Wolff Gives Inaugural Lecture on Chinese Foreign Investment Law',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看講座完整版\nPlease watch the full version from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/562\n\nThrough the lecture, Prof. Wolff from the Faculty of Law offered insightful observations on Chinese Foreign Investment.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-01-23T07:03:38Z',
  'Duration': 495,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Lecture (Type Of Public Presentation)'],
  'Views': '1653',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Alumni Homecoming 2014 中大校友日',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv\n\nThe 2014 Alumni Homecoming Day of CUHK was held on 29 November, drawing close to 5,000 alumni, together with their families and friends to the campus.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-01-15T10:16:45Z',
  'Duration': 573,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (College/University)'],
  'Views': '127',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Prof Andrew Ng on "Education without Limits" 吳恩達教授主講：「教育無邊界」',
  'Description': 'On 27 December, Professor Andrew Ng, Co-founder of Coursera and Chief Scientist of Baidu gave a talk on campus for the Sir Run Run Shaw Distinguished Visiting Scholar Lecture, titled ‘Education without Limits’.\n\n國際大型公開網上課程平台Coursera聯合創辦人及百度首席科學家吳恩達教授於12月27日來到中大，以｢教育無邊界」為題主持邵逸夫爵士傑出訪問學人講座。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看講座完整版\nPlease watch the full version from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/556',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-01-09T02:38:20Z',
  'Duration': 654,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Andrew Ng (Computer Scientist)'],
  'Views': '7328',
  'Likes': '47',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Hot Tips for CUHK Runners 馬拉松備戰貼士',
  'Description': 'To help CUHK Marathon Team runners better prepare for the marathon, sports professionals from the Department of Sports Science and Physical Education, and the Department of Orthopaedics & Traumatology at CUHK have shared suggestions for the final stages in preparing for the marathon.\n\n渣打香港馬拉松開賽在即，中大體育運動科學系以及矯形外科及創傷學系專家為跑手們送上專業全面的備戰貼士，助大家做好最後準備，跑出最佳成績。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2015-01-09T02:25:25Z',
  'Duration': 346,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Marathon (Sport)',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (College/University)'],
  'Views': '3375',
  'Likes': '12',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Christmas Party with the Vice-Chancellor 2014 校長師生同賀聖誕',
  'Description': "To celebrate Christmas, Prof. Joseph J.Y. Sung, the Vice-Chancellor held a party at the Vice-Chancellor's Lodge on 15 December. Over 100 students, professors and staff were invited to celebrate the holiday together.\n\n校長沈祖堯教授於12月15日在漢園舉辦聖誕派對，和一班中大師生聚首一堂，共賀聖誕。",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-12-23T04:13:15Z',
  'Duration': 296,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Party (Literature Subject)',
   'Christmas (Holiday)'],
  'Views': '321',
  'Likes': '2',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},

  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv\n\nThe 21st Joint University Mass Dance made CUHK its second stop on 5 November. Dancing teams from 10 universities in Hong Kong gathered in front of the Beacon to let their feet go.',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Sylvia Chang on ‘Failure is the Nutrient of Success’ 張艾嘉主講「失敗是成功的牛奶」',
  'Description': 'Ms. Sylvia Chang, a renowned actress, scriptwriter and director, visited CUHK on 31 October as the guest speaker for the Shun Hing Lecture Series in Arts and Humanities. In her lecture ‘Failure is the Nutrient of Success’, she shared her ups and downs through her success stories.\n\n張艾嘉女士於10月31日的信興藝文講座上，以「失敗是成功的牛奶」為題，向觀衆分享成功事業背後的心路歷程。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看講座完整版\nPlease watch the full version from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/538',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-11-14T01:46:23Z',
  'Duration': 534,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Sylvia Chang (Film Director)',
   'Film (Media Genre)'],
  'Views': '3512',
  'Likes': '19',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'I‧CARE University Lecture on Civility by Mr. Kris Yao 姚仁喜主講「結廬在人境」',
  'Description': 'Mr. Kris Yao, a renowned architect from Taiwan, gave a lecture titled ‘Making A Thatched Cottage Amongst the Throng of Men’, for the I • CARE University Lecture on Civility on 7 November.\n\n台灣著名建築師姚仁喜於11月7日在I‧CARE博群大講堂上，以「結廬在人境」為題，與中大師生分享如何透過建築展現生命、壯大心靈。\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看講座完整版\nPlease watch the full version from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/540',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-11-14T01:35:41Z',
  'Duration': 400,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1983',
  'Likes': '30',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'A Humble Cottage at CUHK 結廬在中大',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv\n\nA small thatched cottage was built by the lawn next to Lake Ad Excellentiam. The humble cottage perfectly matches the forest. It gives off a refreshing earthiness, like a fragrance, that clears your mind on the autumn breeze.',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK 51st Anniversary: 1963-2014',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看其他精彩短片 \nPlease watch other videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv\n\nOn October 17, 1963, The Chinese University of Hong Kong was founded. Today, the University takes pleasure in its 51st anniversary.',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Conversing About Xiao Hong  「都是自由的」──對談蕭紅',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看講座完整版\nPlease watch the full version from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/521\n\n著名導演許鞍華現身中大校園，與來自中大中文系的黃念欣教授及嶺南大學中文系的許子東教授共同參與「『都是自由的』──對談蕭紅」座談會，透過許鞍華導演的電影《黃金時代》，探討現代文學界一位傳奇女作家—蕭紅。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-10-20T07:59:27Z',
  'Duration': 900,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Xiao Hong (Author)',
   'Literature (Media Genre)'],
  'Views': '1184',
  'Likes': '17',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Party Under the Full Moon 眾志迎月慶中秋',
  'Description': 'Over 400 staff of the University got together at the Chung Chi Tang on 8 September to spend a cheerful and relaxing evening with Prof. Joseph J.Y. Sung, Vice-Chancellor of CUHK.',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Cambodia Service Trip  柬埔寨義工計劃',
  'Description': 'This summer, 11 CUHK students and the Pathfinder team worked with the local NGO of Cambodia, Clear Cambodia, to build new sanitary facilities and a water filtration system at Kampong Chhnang, and to share hygiene tips with primary students and local families.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-09-22T03:27:53Z',

  'Comments': 0},

  'Title': 'Soaring Over CUHK 「飛」一般的中大',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nHave you ever wondered what a view you would get looking at the campus from above? Now, let’s go “flying” with the camera and enjoy the campus panorama from another angle.',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Teaching Hospital Project and CUHK Jockey Club Institute of Ageing Introductory Video',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index\n\nCUHK receives HK$1.3 billion from The Hong Kong Jockey Club Charities Trust for the development of the territory’s first not-for-profit and self-financed teaching hospital. This is the largest single donation ever made by HKJC, and is also the greatest single donation ever received by CUHK.',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'World Cup Live at the University Mall',
  'Description': 'In the early morning of July 14, the University Mall was bustling with the sounds of good cheer. Over 1,500 CUHK members came and sat on the ground to watch the World Cup Final in front of a giant screen set up under the Science Centre.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Water Fun at CUHK',
  'Description': 'Canoeing, sailing, wind surfing… exciting water sports cool down the summer heat. CUHK Water Sports Centre offers its students, staff and alumni the chance to experience these fun-filled activities during the summer holiday.\n\n請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Connecting the Space and the Earth 太空地球連一線',
  'Description': '當發生水災，我們如何即時知道最新災情？\n當山火熊熊來襲，我們如何準確知道林木燒毀的面積？\n其實，答案就隱藏於校園內一個巨型白色球體內......',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-07-15T01:24:53Z',
  'Duration': 349,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '124',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Watch the World Cup Final at CUHK 中大人齊集百萬大道同看世盃決賽',
  'Description': '「中大人百萬大道齊看世盃決賽」特邀兩位口才非凡兼熱愛足球的中大老師——馬嶽教授及蔡子強先生擔任評述員，並由區家麟校友擔任大會主持。除了沈祖堯校長親身支持之外，中大男女子足球隊還會現場表演精湛球技。如此強大陣容及精彩節目中大人豈能錯過！',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-07-02T09:55:07Z',
  'Duration': 26,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '328',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」中大如家',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n「我在這裡工作了這麽長時間 ，宿舍就像自己的家一樣 ，學生就似子女，和他們相處、聊天，覺得自己也年輕了。」\n\n今集我們將繼續講述一些在平凡崗位上不平凡員工的故事。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-06-24T10:13:53Z',
  'Duration': 421,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '755',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'University Library: Inherit and Innovate 大學圖書館 : 保育·創新',
  'Description': '沒有鮮亮的色彩、雄偉的高度，大學圖書館屹立在大學廣場，簡樸而莊重，與周遭的自然環境融為一體，更成爲香港最多小白腰雨燕的安家之地。大學圖書館剛榮獲「香港建築師學會二○一三年年獎的主題建築獎 - 室內設計」，其創新的學習共享空間概念及對一磚一瓦的致力保育最為評審稱道。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-06-12T04:38:59Z',
  'Duration': 341,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Library (Building Function)'],
  'Views': '1517',
  'Likes': '13',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Business School Global Leader Series by Mr. Antony Leung Kam-chung (Highlight Version)',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
  'Category': '27',

  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」教師背後',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n「服務中大可以用三個『心』來形容，第一個心是『將心比心』...... 第二個心是『放心』......第三個心就是『開心』。」 \n\n自2001年起，學校人事處舉辦「員工優異服務獎」，嘉許表現傑出的員工。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-05-23T10:05:11Z',
  'Duration': 456,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1168',
  'Likes': '6',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」盧煜明',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n「我相信將來每個人的基因圖譜在他們一出生或還未出生前就已經做好了」，這並不是科幻片裏的台詞，而是盧煜明教授對自己研究成果的切實展望。2010 年，中大醫學院副院長(研究)盧教授帶領團隊成功透過孕婦的血液找出胎兒整個基因圖譜，革新了檢測遺傳病甚至癌症的方法。 \n\n作爲醫生，盧教授憑藉堅韌的毅力和靈活的知識開創醫學新領域；作爲教授，他堅持在研究上精益求精，培養更多優秀的醫學研究人才，造福社會。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-04-11T03:17:52Z',
  'Duration': 491,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3064',
  'Likes': '27',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The blooming campus 花開中大',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-04-01T06:47:27Z',
  'Duration': 168,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'Campus'],
  'Views': '244',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CW Chu College, CUHK 香港中文大學敬文書院',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-03-27T10:40:33Z',
  'Duration': 249,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'CW Chu College'],
  'Views': '7935',
  'Likes': '25',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」鄧慧蘭',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n以往聾的學生讀到中學畢業，很多時不會參加公開會考，這意味着大學之路及學習的機會對他們來講，一早就已經斷了。\n\n鄧慧蘭教授自1993年開始聾人手語及口語雙語教育的研究工作，致力打破聾童語言學習的障礙。多年的工作令她於2013年獲頒授香港人道年獎。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-03-27T04:14:33Z',
  'Duration': 593,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3829',
  'Likes': '52',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Prof. Tony Mok on 'Declaration of War Against Lung Cancer' 莫樹錦教授主講「向肺癌宣戰」",
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看完整版\nPlease watch the full version from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/458',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-03-27T03:21:03Z',
  'Duration': 554,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Lung Cancer (Disease Or Medical Condition)'],
  'Views': '12665',
  'Likes': '65',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'CUHK Marathon Team (highlight version) 2014 年中大馬拉松隊(精華版)',
  'Description': '請登陸中大視野觀看更多精彩短片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-03-07T02:40:09Z',
  'Duration': 100,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '245',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」錢穆',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n「錢穆」是中大人耳熟能詳的名字，沒錯，他是新亞書院的創校校長。所謂「艱險我奮進，困乏我多情」如何支持、鞭策中大人從艱難的年代走到今天？爲何經歷歲月洗刷後，這種風骨氣節依然強勁有力、令人振奮？\n\n現在，我們就透過「中大五十•人」短片，走入歷史，看看爲什麽他要來香港開辦新亞書院？在同學眼中，他是一位怎樣的老師？從中了解這位不平凡的人物。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2014-02-26T07:06:50Z',
  'Duration': 490,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '22186',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '沈祖堯校長為香港中文大學五十周年校慶晚宴致辭',
  'Description': '歡迎於中大視野觀看其它影片\nPlease watch more videos from CUTV\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/index',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-12-20T07:38:18Z',
  'Duration': 476,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '17990',
  'Likes': '169',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十．人」走出校園，關懷世界',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n中大鼓勵同學走出校園，體會社會不同階層的生活面貌。逸夫書院的同學選擇將關愛帶給塔門島的長者；而音樂系的同學發起「MOTIVIC樂動視遊」，透過音樂讓視障人士感受世界，展現了以生命影響生命的信念。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-12-18T10:12:10Z',
  'Duration': 464,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '348',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十．人」余光中',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n「鄉愁詩人」 余光中在中大度過的十一年，可以說是他文學生命中的香港時期。中大得天獨厚的環境令他感嘆, 就連大霧天氣下的中大校園在他的筆下也變得有趣起來。\n \n他說一所大學如果不強調人文精神，就不能稱爲大學。中大的人文精神就在「博文約禮」這四個字。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-12-18T10:05:48Z',
  'Duration': 555,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '23549',
  'Likes': '151',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '李歐梵教授主講：「全球化年代學者 / 知識分子的角色」',
  'Description': 'Please go to CUTV for the full version of the lecture\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/407',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-12-12T09:26:07Z',
  'Duration': 514,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1166',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Grand Opening of University Gallery 2013',
  'Description': 'Please go to CUTV for the full version of the grand opening http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/408',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-12-12T09:17:57Z',
  'Duration': 430,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '31',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十．人」楊振寧',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n「結合傳統與現代，融會中國與西方」，楊振寧教授與香港中文大學志同道合，結下了五十年的良緣。除了早於一九五七年取得諾貝爾物理學獎外，近年大熱的「上帝粒子」學說亦源於他的「楊米理論」。現時楊教授仍然為中大物理系同學講課，啟發了不少年青人。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-11-28T01:06:42Z',
  'Duration': 600,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '4818',
  'Likes': '41',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "Prof. Joseph E. Stiglitz's lecture in CUHK",
  'Description': 'Prof. Joseph E. Stiglitz on "Sustainable Growth in the Wake of the Crisis: Lessons for Asia and the World" (Highlight version)\n\nPlease go to CUTV for the full version of the lecture\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/399',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-11-26T06:14:55Z',
  'Duration': 316,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '425',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '恭賀高錕教授八十大壽',
  'Description': '2013年11月4日是香港中文大學前校長高錕教授的八十嵗壽辰，大學三十多位敬愛高教授的好友及舊同事在校園為高教授舉行簡單的慶祝聚會，一同唱生日歌、並送上蛋糕、生日卡及禮物，表達對高教授的敬意及愛護。讓我們一起為高教授獻上生日祝福，祝願他身體健康，生活愉快。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-11-06T09:15:37Z',
  'Duration': 135,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '8830',
  'Likes': '70',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '辛世文教授:「科海揚帆：香港植物科學家的夢」',
  'Description': '歡迎於中大視野觀看完整版: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/368',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-10-07T10:42:18Z',
  'Duration': 578,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '704',
  'Likes': '0',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '0'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」辛世文',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n有「植物基因複製之父」美譽的辛世文教授不僅在研究基因改造水稻和大豆方面成就卓越，更透過書院工作以生命影響生命。書院最重要是要建立一個軟件，使學生有在家的感覺。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-09-16T06:20:27Z',
  'Duration': 453,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1491',
  'Likes': '16',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」陳英凝',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n陳英凝教授1998年加入無國界醫生，長期的救援工作為她帶來香港人道年獎。無論是留守前線或是退居幕後，她的目標就是令每個人的生存權利受到尊重。\n\n她相信，只要將這粒種子埋在學生心中，終有一日他們可以學以致用，惠澤他人。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-09-16T06:16:34Z',
  'Duration': 391,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1600',
  'Likes': '14',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "2013年度本科生入學禮校長講辭 VC's Welcome Speech at the Inauguration Ceremony for Undergraduates 2013",
  'Description': '典禮上，校長沈祖堯教授勸勉新生入學後便要着手訓練及改變自己，學會過儉樸、謙卑和高尚的生活。\n\nAt the ceremony, Professor Joseph J.Y. Sung, Vice-Chancellor of CUHK, encouraged students to start living a simple, humble and noble life when they enter the university.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-09-06T06:40:19Z',
  'Duration': 409,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2510',
  'Likes': '23',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '朱明中教授:「幽靈粒子與宇宙演化」Prof. Chu Ming-chung on "Ghost particles and the evolution of the universe"',
  'Description': '歡迎於中大視野觀看完整版\nPlease go to CUTV for the full version of the lecture\nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/314',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-09-06T04:53:11Z',
  'Duration': 406,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1946',
  'Likes': '22',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」高錕',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n憑藉將光纖應用於通訊的研究，高教授於2009年獲頒諾貝爾物理學獎，但他並沒有為此申請專利，而是將技術開放，造福世界。\n\n他二十年前為中大工程學院奠定的發展方向至今仍能配合大學、以至香港整體的發展。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-08-09T09:08:39Z',
  'Duration': 446,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Charles K. Kao',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (Organization)'],
  'Views': '11127',
  'Likes': '102',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」吳恩融',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n「可否找個方法幫助他們，讓他們不用每天冒着生命危險上學呢？」一個簡單的理由促成了無止橋這個理念。\n\n做人只看到自己，是很辛苦的。關注他人的生命，就能活得更加快樂。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-08-09T09:08:37Z',
  'Duration': 391,
  'Tags': ['CUHK',
   '中大',
   'video',
   'Chinese University Of Hong Kong (Organization)'],
  'Views': '1204',
  'Likes': '18',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '陳志輝教授:「建立成功品牌之策略」',
  'Description': '歡迎於中大視野觀看完整版: http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/346',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-08-06T04:51:41Z',
  'Duration': 451,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '2457',
  'Likes': '22',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」李卓敏',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n他敢於打破辦學傳統，堅信「沒有研究就不成大學」；他不懼政府壓力，為保存四年制大學課程「寧死不屈」；他就是中大創校校長—李卓敏，也是香港第一位華裔大學校長。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-08-01T10:18:08Z',
  'Duration': 541,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '3872',
  'Likes': '41',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': '3'},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大五十•人」小思',
  'Description': '請瀏覽中大視野收看其他「中大五十•人」錄像系列\nPlease go to CUTV to watch other series of "CU50•The People" \nhttp://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/series/26\n\n她自小一心追隨人文學者如錢穆、唐君毅、牟宗三，大學報名表上六個選擇全部都填新亞中文系，表示她堅定不移的決心。她一生以文學、教育為己任，卻說自己不是作家，甚至不是教授，她是一位老師，並以此為榮。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2013-08-01T09:44:32Z',
  'Duration': 556,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '11364',
  'Likes': '106',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Professor Richard J Davidson on "Change the Brain by Transforming the Mind"',
  'Description': "Please visit CUTV for full version : http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/279\r\n\r\nSir Run Run Shaw Distinguished Visiting Scholar 2012-13, Professor Richard J. DAVIDSON from the University of Wisconsin-Madison spoke on 'Change the Brain by Transforming the Mind', sharing how one can transform the mind through meditation and thereby alter the brain and the periphery in ways that may be beneficial for mental and physical health at Shaw College of The Chinese University of Hong Kong.",

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學邁向五十周年校慶短片「我們的中大歲月」',
  'Description': '來自三個不同年代的校友：六十年代的賴漢明校友、曹宏威校友及謝福源校友，八十年代的鄭志豪校友，以及千禧年代的郭寶琪校友，一同分享他們在中大的難忘歲月。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-11-29T09:16:40Z',
  'Duration': 269,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1219',
  'Likes': '4',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'Distinguished Public Lecture by Professor Justin Yifu Lin on "Demystifying the Chinese Economy"',
  'Description': "Please visit CUTV for full version : http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/279\r\n\r\nThe Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK) invited Prof. Justin Yifu Lin, Former Senior Vice President and Chief Economist of the World Bank, and Honorary Dean of National School of Development at Peking University, to present a distinguished public lecture on 'Demystifying the Chinese Economy' on campus.",
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-11-26T08:56:19Z',
  'Duration': 384,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video', 'economic'],
  'Views': '2503',
  'Likes': '14',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'The Shaw Prize Lecture by The Shaw Laureates in Astronomy 2012',
  'Description': 'Please visit CUTV for full version : http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/242\r\n\r\nHaving received the Shaw Laureates in Astronomy Prize 2012, Professor Jane Luu and Professor David C Jewitt delivered a lecture entitled "Expanding the Solar System: The Kuiper Belt Discovery" and "Kuiper Belt: What We Know and What We Don\'t".',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-11-23T07:28:10Z',
  'Duration': 596,
  'Tags': ['CUHK', '中大', 'video'],
  'Views': '1547',
  'Likes': '3',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '「中大人，跑出中大精神」短片',
  'Description': '詳情可瀏覽: http://www.cuhk.edu.hk/cpr/marathon\r\n\r\n現呼籲各位響應中大醫學院院長霍泰輝教授、中大體育運動科學系副講師李致和先生、中大校友兼兩屆半馬拉松女子組冠軍姚潔貞小姐以及一眾中大學生的號召，一同參加明年2日24日(星期日)舉行的渣打香港馬拉松比賽並加入中大隊伍，與所有中大人同步起跑！',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-10-25T07:41:23Z',

  'Title': 'The Chinese University of Hong Kong Eleventh Honorary Fellowship Conferment Ceremony',
  'Description': 'Six distinguished persons closely associated with CUHK were conferred honorary fellowships in recognition of their contributions to the University and the community. They are: Prof. Chang Shu-ting, Mr. Fung Siu-to Clement, Prof. Jin Sheng-hwa Serena, Prof. Lee Hon-ching, Dr. Lo Tak-shing Peter, Dr. Yeung Ming-biu.',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '神舟九號航天講座',
  'Description': '天宮一號與神舟九號載人交會對接任務代表團蒞臨香港中文大學，與本港八所高等院校約五百名學生舉行講座，成員包括代表團團長牛紅光、航天員景海鵬、劉旺和中國首位女航天員劉洋，以及負責這次載人航天工程的科學家。\r\n\r\n請到「中大視野」觀看原整版：http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/208',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-10-19T07:46:00Z',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': "VC's speech in Inauguration of Academic Year 2012-13",
  'Description': 'Prof. Joseph J.Y. Sung, Vice-Chancellor of the University, described this year as a historical moment in his speech at the inauguration ceremony of the new academic year. He urged freshmen to make good use of the extra year, so that their university life would not go to waste. He challenged them to read a book every month, make at least one friend from a different country (or region) every year, and join at least one service trip offered by their Colleges to find like-minded friends.',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-10-19T07:45:59Z',

  'Tags': ['Joseph Sung', 'CUHK'],
  'Views': '321',

  'Title': '博群大講堂 林懷民先生 「在水泥地上種花」',
  'Description': '請到「中大視野」觀看原整版：http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/73\r\n\r\nI‧CARE博群計劃首場博群大講堂，邀得世界知名台灣雲門舞集創辦人林懷民先生以「在水泥地上種花」為題主講，與中大師生分享他的藝術人生和家國情懷。',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '雕塑大師朱銘博士於中大主持公開講座 「藝術即修行」',
  'Description': '請到「中大視野」觀看原整版：http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/72\r\n\r\n著名雕塑家朱銘博士應香港中文大學（中大）邀請，在大學校園主持公開講座，題目為「藝術即修行」。於講座上，朱銘博士分享其藝術之路及作品的幕後故事，並闡述其獨特的美學觀──「藝術即修行」。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-10-19T07:45:55Z',
  'Duration': 310,
  'Tags': ['Fine Art (Literary Genre)'],
  'Views': '909',
  'Likes': '5',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'I‧CARE 博群論壇 － 新葉先勇：白先勇教授談「永遠的青春夢」',
  'Description': '請到「中大視野」觀看原整版：http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/185\r\n\r\n香港中文大學舉行I‧CARE「博群花節」中第三回博群大講堂，邀得著名台灣旅美作家白先勇教授以「永遠的青春夢」為題，與中大師生分享貫穿他一生的青春夢二重奏──首部份是他年青時代創辦《現代文學》的青春夢，第二部份是晚年大力推動崑曲的青春夢。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-10-19T07:45:54Z',
  'Duration': 614,

  'Title': 'Public Lecture by Professor Ezra F. Vogel on "Deng Xiaoping and Foreign Relations"',

Vogel, Henry Ford II Professor of the Social Sciences Emeritus at Harvard University, who is also an Honorary Graduate of CUHK, to present a public lecture on 'Deng Xiaopeng and Foreign Relations' to enhance understanding on modern Chinese history.",

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': 'I‧CARE 博群論壇 － 「功成百煉」 許鞍華導演談成功背後的百般歷鍊',
  'Description': '請到「中大視野」觀看原整版：http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/184\r\n\r\n香港中文大學舉行I‧CARE「博群花節」中第二回博群大講堂，邀得著名導演許鞍華女士以「功成百煉」為題，與中大師生分享其成功背後的百般歷練，期間回顧她不同時期的作品主題和風格，探討如何透過電影反映現實百態。一幕幕動人心弦的經典場面，由許導演親自作演繹，份外引人入勝。另外，大會特別邀請資深電影文化人黃愛玲擔任主持，她對電影發展素有研究，言論精闢，引領觀眾對許鞍華的電影世界有更深刻的體會。',
  'Category': '27',
  'Published_date': '2012-10-19T07:45:54Z',
  'Duration': 226,
  'Tags': None,
  'Views': '175',
  'Likes': '1',
  'Favourites': '0',
  'Comments': 0},
 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '博群大講堂 「挫而彌堅」：李歐梵教授談挫敗造就謙厚人生',
  'Description': '請到「中大視野」觀看原整版：http://www.cpr.cuhk.edu.hk/cutv/detail/183\r\n\r\n香港中文大學舉行I‧CARE「博群花節」中第一回博群大講堂，邀得國際知名文化研究學者李歐梵教授以「挫而彌堅」為題主講，與中大師生一起回到他失意的日子，細味「失敗的高雅」。',

 {'Channel_name': 'CUHK Channel',
  'Title': '香港中文大學邁向五十周年校慶短片「中大．情不變」',
  'Description': '任職中大三十八年的Tony 講述多年與師生校友的足球情、校巴司機羅金成解釋他的綽號「魯迅」的由來、醫學院餐廳Amy姐介紹多年大熱的招牌檸檬批等等，幾位跟中大有深厚感情的員工藉著中大的變遷分享他們對「中大．情不變」。',

PU_video_details = get_video_details(youtube, PU_video_ids)

HKUST_video_data = pd.DataFrame(HKUST_video_details)

CityU_video_data = pd.DataFrame(CityU_video_details)

#HKUST data processing

HKUST_video_data["Published_date"] = pd.to_datetime(HKUST_video_data["Published_date"]).dt.date
HKUST_video_data["Duration"] = pd.to_numeric(HKUST_video_data["Duration"])
HKUST_video_data["Category"] = pd.to_numeric(HKUST_video_data["Category"])
HKUST_video_data["Views"] = pd.to_numeric(HKUST_video_data["Views"])
HKUST_video_data["Likes"] = pd.to_numeric(HKUST_video_data["Likes"])
HKUST_video_data["Favourites"] = pd.to_numeric(HKUST_video_data["Favourites"])
HKUST_video_data["Comments"] = pd.to_numeric(HKUST_video_data["Comments"])

#HKU data processing

HKU_video_data["Published_date"] = pd.to_datetime(HKU_video_data["Published_date"]).dt.date
HKU_video_data["Duration"] = pd.to_numeric(HKU_video_data["Duration"])

HKU_video_data["Views"] = pd.to_numeric(HKU_video_data["Views"])

HKU_video_data["Comments"] = pd.to_numeric(HKU_video_data["Comments"])

CUHK_video_data["Likes"] = pd.to_numeric(CUHK_video_data["Likes"])

#City U data processing

CityU_video_data["Published_date"] = pd.to_datetime(CityU_video_data["Published_date"]).dt.date
CityU_video_data["Duration"] = pd.to_numeric(CityU_video_data["Duration"])

#Poly U data processing

PU_video_data["Published_date"] = pd.to_datetime(PU_video_data["Published_date"]).dt.date
PU_video_data["Duration"] = pd.to_numeric(PU_video_data["Duration"])
PU_video_data["Category"] = pd.to_numeric(PU_video_data["Category"])
PU_video_data["Views"] = pd.to_numeric(PU_video_data["Views"])
PU_video_data["Likes"] = pd.to_numeric(PU_video_data["Likes"])
PU_video_data["Favourites"] = pd.to_numeric(PU_video_data["Favourites"])
PU_video_data["Comments"] = pd.to_numeric(PU_video_data["Comments"])

#All Uni daata processing

all_video_data["Published_date"] = pd.to_datetime(all_video_data["Published_date"]).dt.date
all_video_data["Duration"] = pd.to_numeric(all_video_data["Duration"])
all_video_data["Category"] = pd.to_numeric(all_video_data["Category"])
all_video_data["Views"] = pd.to_numeric(all_video_data["Views"])
all_video_data["Likes"] = pd.to_numeric(all_video_data["Likes"])
all_video_data["Favourites"] = pd.to_numeric(all_video_data["Favourites"])
all_video_data["Comments"] = pd.to_numeric(all_video_data["Comments"])

In [ ]:
# Sorting videos based on views

# All video data
all_top10views_videos = all_video_data.sort_values(by="Views", ascending = False).head(10)

# HKUST
HKUST_top10_videos = HKUST_video_data.sort_values(by="Views", ascending = False).head(10)

# HKU
HKU_top10_videos = HKU_video_data.sort_values(by="Views", ascending = False).head(10)

# CUHK
CUHK_top10_videos = CUHK_video_data.sort_values(by="Views", ascending = False).head(10)

# City U
CityU_top10_videos = CityU_video_data.sort_values(by="Views", ascending = False).head(10)

# Poly U
PU_top10_videos = PU_video_data.sort_values(by="Views", ascending = False).head(10)
